Trump isn’t even president yet, but he’s already announced a roster of extremists and conspiracy theorists to his cabinet – even threatening recess appointments if the Republican-controlled Senate tries to check any of his power. [We want to know how concerned you are about the incoming Trump administration. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Preparing for my trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=93691ebe3e7e480f956fa5b6bb35a159&_e=RCkxOG_4l0OTzxiKan14Zd0fkXfFgI6y9ZJzoOJ7VMmeKVr6om3BtqwUFShYfZt1deJzjuPpMNO_RQ0ODpuf2buU_N1RfOzCGp58Pdo_6psoSfyzSi2a7z8WCNotBUWmri90cM1LxLzg4sZdCmDRkLoavEoDdxEz0p0A-M0fI3zjODupgjHKbmmkLHyrD1LX4v3NbbpsiZnmYd7GbKmCguHASWVqbTtkXliXbazYKLS0OR1aL-CXKhxRKiObYyQLHASWRAFc7W1bfTKU9CgbsgcnhF7PmcuyyoCFdMSnKEi1Ce8Cx_P9UdJifOSW5rKC7Z7zuxPFzdP7HC3Nrib5h9eljBDmoWpBzYT15AJDrl0RhUq51T98sJUaUQqNMVv2WUuv0phrd6i_QcZF6fPlUQ%3D%3D)
---
My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend.
---
**_In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American.
---
The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.
---
And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of _everything_ I own.
---
But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---

clean_body: It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... | My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend. In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the final chance to save my home. To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American. The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president. And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home... No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life. In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ IMPRISONMENT! ” But no matter what it costs me, I will never surrender this fight for my freedom and justice. And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting. I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high. But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I refuse to give up my rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddd32ead5924424fb8e4e710f157c58b&_e=_ph93nXiiyqjdhnhRub7nnvNBMPAhJQtivPNPFeuMAvykF4oLI0hOv6eJyOvvsS9fVhB9dpjEY5suR37W_MBxYIZbejXObWjgPFpOh6fhGJjmBCBhkRexxtF9nKKtUmYxa1N7NZfv3wetvH1gR1WjWrnszeP8EEHAgilU_i67qwO-igBkOgrSAuNdR1qAyMGzGewA8c3-WJxSIrk9zf4KAAPKiVAe84Euu7pfP9LKVYJZ0Ho1LgqQtbRXdVvWuiwyxfT6er5lBG0A2fK9w5cViCEipM_z5Mgn6fXu8lr4-62kztR6iOPvuEJUNeGVIQtafE5Rqx_uKWRoW6CW3Hb-G9SrN3YiPArFQaX2CUpKEBfXR-eCxkzasA05Ut3aTRqMHnvJIdnQthOj_ldtthC_A%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddd32ead5924424fb8e4e710f157c58b&_e=_ph93nXiiyqjdhnhRub7nnvNBMPAhJQtivPNPFeuMAvykF4oLI0hOv6eJyOvvsS9fVhB9dpjEY5suR37W_MBxYIZbejXObWjgPFpOh6fhGJjmBCBhkRexxtF9nKKtUmYxa1N7NZfv3wetvH1gR1WjWrnszeP8EEHAgilU_i67qwO-igBkOgrSAuNdR1qAyMGzGewA8c3-WJxSIrk9zf4KAAPKiVAe84Euu7pfP9LKVY79V9PK2KLu6KysL56LEsK3t1pRwJVxH7Fdq51Ja3fSEE2FFf2FWfkn9up1Q-hJ5H2BgwX0a1CL92hP6aviBgoLKYwFLxMKuagUVDYdJCK-5Lp-ysBMDaI24M6W0ByTJ_bWh8I4GPzJjVQr_h1XnZTiqGW33phYjzb5ok5wsRM9g%3D%3D)
---

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddd32ead5924424fb8e4e710f157c58b&_e=_ph93nXiiyqjdhnhRub7nnvNBMPAhJQtivPNPFeuMAvykF4oLI0hOv6eJyOvvsS9fVhB9dpjEY5suR37W_MBxYIZbejXObWjgPFpOh6fhGJjmBCBhkRexxtF9nKKtUmYxa1N7NZfv3wetvH1gR1WjWrnszeP8EEHAgilU_i67qwO-igBkOgrSAuNdR1qAyMGzGewA8c3-WJxSIrk9zf4KAAPKiVAe84Euu7pfP9LKVY75so-XlA-64-38jBEcs9eCBBIgZ0_Z_gRl-NxUe4ezZ3FB2tc_H7_-AfyW5C-_4xkPzyL1kb1UKmuNcSKhj_T3EQyiaZHY1VkfuBRmw_k01qunK9ausqLbVv7AU_LZJC2TKCMYqQ6n4tTQr6ju92R0ViEGo8nLDVxVgbEF6BtNw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst | Dear Peter, Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car – I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice. And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights: Newsweek : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, “Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?” Here’s what I said: “Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.” Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. They want me to pay $148 MILLION! It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York. But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored. Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House! That’s why I will KEEP FIGHTING for my God-given freedoms and rights. If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011225_2&amount=25]
NC Newsline: Republicans on the NC Supreme Court block certification of the Democratic incumbent’s election [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=011225_2&amount=25]
All eyes are still on North Carolina, Team and for good reason.
Our state Supreme Court here in North Carolina just stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court, which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties.
For background: On Election Day, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- both of which increased Riggs' lead.
Now Judge Griffin has sued to remove 60,000 voters' ballots from the count , even though they've been validated in the recount. The state Board of Elections dismissed his request , but now his partisan, would-be colleagues -- the court has a 5-2 Republican majority -- have stepped in to adjudicate the election and possibly kick off one of their own.
Justices Anita Earls (D) and Richard Dietz (R) dissented while Justice Riggs properly recused herself, so the judicial stay on election certification was put in place by a 4-2, mainly party-line vote.
The bottom line is that the partisan Supreme Court is stepping into an election for one of their own members to try and reverse the results of the vote because their party didn't win. Opponents of voting rights are trying to steal this election in plain sight.
We've got to make sure everyone knows about this egregious intervention before these votes are stolen and the voices of the people are silenced. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word and defend these votes in North Carolina and so many other votes across the country? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=011225_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011225_2&amount=25]

name: Riley Gaines
subject: We’re on a slippery slope
body:
Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth.| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8cb09a0e47af4e2facf62e2377b7364b&_e=il0d8x-JanlMFG0c-ik0eYi81X_IBRf9LfF7_gsayObsEmIcZvYFHGQHAXEnk4kmvMfv3Yr29-06_Rwn8_RJW2XL6LDOfDYhkDyEZqLkxeKFan-xBhkxC8gxI4H2Ga5i88cinm7qf1Q8GyrQ93J28QhGqgDYjBQmfp-cYd603ZAMf59Giwq_ov0OHXxTBCZoVhiN8ZpqvpalrJ1YVpt3o1mdhVHk_ubBTOj0CBqEfQQiLes3WVkWbETRal-ZDZyK8bCAxW5ceFHYzO4F4sCyL0f04tJCGuAm2Wfei12tJa3IFApqTFco8IeoVrL6u5mbZGJg6jKWebJUHkHb04eektcfNZIDpS25SDNJ8B-0TSVCMThAglr9BmkVnYo7w0HE2PPIxyzVgXU7Z_JnP9TwSA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8cb09a0e47af4e2facf62e2377b7364b&_e=il0d8x-JanlMFG0c-ik0eYi81X_IBRf9LfF7_gsayObsEmIcZvYFHGQHAXEnk4kmvMfv3Yr29-06_Rwn8_RJW2XL6LDOfDYhkDyEZqLkxeKFan-xBhkxC8gxI4H2Ga5i88cinm7qf1Q8GyrQ93J28QhGqgDYjBQmfp-cYd603ZAMf59Giwq_ov0OHXxTBCZoVhiN8ZpqvpalrJ1YVpt3o1mdhVHk_ubBTOj0CBqEfQTcCcatmHBY3-T1hctNvt7iWEcUUl0jCINykYvfPwdl0Pl1pu2_Bd1LcV1R036EtkNpmXzk0OUVheLOzNjsgMuJDd-ZF2VwfMLurQxTfED0N9IQAYvuK0EZAp1IQYD0W3L9wtEX1B3wglqvNqnQly5IDr9WdIKftwqiFz71zTj53w%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8cb09a0e47af4e2facf62e2377b7364b&_e=il0d8x-JanlMFG0c-ik0eYi81X_IBRf9LfF7_gsayObsEmIcZvYFHGQHAXEnk4kmvMfv3Yr29-06_Rwn8_RJW2XL6LDOfDYhkDyEZqLkxeKFan-xBhkxC8gxI4H2Ga5i88cinm7qf1Q8GyrQ93J28QhGqgDYjBQmfp-cYd603ZAMf59Giwq_ov0OHXxTBCZoVhiN8ZpqvpalrJ1YVpt3o1mdhVHk_ubBTOj0CBqEfQSIdopHUx5DdrvMegUh_lrZXJrNorTbo51o01PVxZrMIDUZ0CmiiUM7G-itJ1iXfV62K5cmDHdO8Lq48HNJ91Jgmnmgx_s2Sf2EKG-XCF-bzs9D09NQewProtr24btqglPayfsWEBGbneIciPx3droEqCD2Nc-SvXlh5_xHFACmZA%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8cb09a0e47af4e2facf62e2377b7364b&_e=il0d8x-JanlMFG0c-ik0eYi81X_IBRf9LfF7_gsayObsEmIcZvYFHGQHAXEnk4kmvMfv3Yr29-06_Rwn8_RJW2XL6LDOfDYhkDyEZqLkxeKFan-xBhkxC8gxI4H2Ga5i88cinm7qf1Q8GyrQ93J28QhGqgDYjBQmfp-cYd603ZAMf59Giwq_ov0OHXxTBCZoVhiN8ZpqvpalrJ1YVpt3o1mdhVHk_ubBTOj0CBqEfQRPpWCYe2BLqR86cgRH9fF3yzJT-Srv2Bo29gpaaFW5ol1CO3TAlggzJfmIK1MicplmE9LQCE-NQG5FOeaTn8stUkBeoNsJRYpv2GSYeoS2qdWBodaMnDpjIU9DoKJ2wAbyXcmQNQUlB0dsm0VF3UQFKYTmiasN-bWxOCoJHa1yRQ%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---

My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. subject: A Marshall Plan for Rebuilding the Middle Class
body:
The issues are so interconnected we need a comprehensive plan

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..Sk4O7O1uKk3ZtXhbavMbbr2bKkkdcDh7iemWflhiX2A?) for more
---
NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [A Marshall Plan for Rebuilding the Middle Class](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=154444822&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NDQ0ODIyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzY3MzMzMzAsImV4cCI6MTczOTMyNTMzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.psWSBF3hEoim_BUvN85JwIdFumX-PX51Da-Ig-NPnaw)
### The issues are so interconnected we need a comprehensive plan
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Jan 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=154444822&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NDQ0ODIyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNjczMzMzMCwiZXhwIjoxNzM5MzI1MzMwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nmSCNeF1oRu-ihN3T7ML7Yk9cA9gRKOn7UYLSHndM0Q&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=154444822&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NDQ0ODIyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzY3MzMzMzAsImV4cCI6MTczOTMyNTMzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.psWSBF3hEoim_BUvN85JwIdFumX-PX51Da-Ig-NPnaw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=154444822&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NDQ0ODIyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzY3MzMzMzAsImV4cCI6MTczOTMyNTMzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.psWSBF3hEoim_BUvN85JwIdFumX-PX51Da-Ig-NPnaw)
---
| | [](https://substack..AYtvjCB7bWp8mWtL47tFGqhygJAYYsR7j6rYwpwEkvo?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/a-marshall-plan-for-rebuilding-the?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7f48fe62-60f0-4ffe-a578-8b2f06cb09c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Image by **Tegar Randynal Nugraha. Licensed by Shutterstock.**
The photograph above depicts the inter-connectivity of issues that impact American households with incomes less than $150,000 per year.
We can't address one issue that plagues the middle class without touching on another issue. And there are lots of issues!
I just said, "middle class". I'm not even sure how to define the middle class anymore. I'm of an age that I still think that anyone earning six figures must certainly be "set" for life. That is no longer true.
The gist of today's message is that spending time in Congress to fix one area, such as Social Security, or Immigration, or Veteran's care, will take decades. The billions spent in one area will be cited as cause to not fund another billion-dollar appropriation somewhere else. What's vitally important is that lawmakers develop a comprehensive plan, that addresses the totality of circumstances that impact American families.
I liken it to the Marshall Plan, which cost Americans $13.3 billion (about $173 billion in today's dollars) to rebuild 16 European nations after World War II. Note that aid does not include money given to rebuild war-torn Japan and the Philippines.
We came close to developing a comprehensive plan for America's middle class in 2020-2022, with the plans introduced in the first years of the Biden administration. The plans were an effort to address the economic devastation of the pandemic. Sadly, there was not the political will to pass the aggressive measures that were originally proposed ([Manchin and Sinema](https://substack.com/redirect/7e4a34b3-c0b2-4367-a8c4-98de577ac671?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), notably, withheld the requisite votes.)
Below, please find another graphic that shows the components of my comprehensive plan for the middle class. In the coming days, I will publish more articles that address each of the areas on this graphic. For today, I address four areas: Climate, Wages, Immigration, and Housing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f858c510-d709-4c27-b448-c1732db523c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Image created by Paula Collins, depicting a wheel with twelve blocks describing aspects of a comprehensive plan for the middle class.
### Any plan to help the middle class must include a plan for climate change.
Historic flooding in St. Lawrence and Lewis Counties, as well as other parts of NY-21. Now, devastating fires in LA. Paralyzing snow and cold in the midwest and northeast. Did we forget about the hurricane damage on the east coast? Or the drought in the New York City area? Wildfires in New Jersey? Did we even finish rebuilding after Super Storm Sandy? Katrina?
With so much damage in regions across the country, one wonders: who pays for it all?
What's needed is not only a plan for storm cleanup, but also a plan that includes a communications system for each county, evacuation and shelter systems, first responders, a plan to shelter and feed first responders, regular checks on things like water and food supplies, and policies regarding electrical grids. For starters.
Moreover, what's needed is a comprehensive plan for land use and real estate development, transportation. Where can we build houses, commercial space, and roads so that we are not exacerbating the impacts of climate change. How can we develop housing, work, and manufacturing spaces that have minimal environmental impact? How can we develop alternative forms of fuel?
How can we keep our food supply safe?
In California, we learned too late that ["No water system in the world could have handled the LA fires."](https://substack.com/redirect/3021f551-2755-4d79-96f9-a683ce5ee044?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We must do better. In an era in which we are advancing the political role of billionaires who want to make commercial space flight possible, we have no excuse for not having a water system adequate to respond to fires in the second-largest city in the US.
Most American families earning under $150,000 will barely recover from a devastating disaster if they have homeowner's insurance. They absolutely will not recover if they had inadequate homeowners insurance, or none at all. Multiple hits -- as we see in zones where there is significant flood, fire, or storm damage, and the result is that the poor get poorer and the wealthy either self-fund their renovations or relocate.
The real estate hawks, also known as "investors" sweep through neighborhoods after a disaster and buy properties for pennies on the dollar. Any equity that the middle class homeowner had? Gone in an instant.
I'm light on details for the climate plan that's needed. I'm not a climate scientist. Please -- can we get some in Congress, ASAP?
### Wage stabilization
Numerous studies have proven that when unions raise wages, wages increase across industry sectors. Simply put: raising the minimum wage raises wages for everyone.
Trickle down economics hasn't worked to support the middle class wage earner. There is little hard evidence to support the claim that raising wages will result in widespread layoffs. [From a 2023 Forbes article:](https://substack.com/redirect/5aeb313e-6418-43e5-b30e-8543ee1976fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "Indeed, the research suggests that small businesses don't appear to cut jobs in response to an increase in the minimum wage, and may actually benefit from it instead."
Much of the anger felt by white wage earners can be attributed to the broad concept that their quality of life has been lost. That is true. When they embrace the notion of "Make America Great Again", many people reminisce about an era in which a single wage earner could support himself and two wage earners could support a family, own a home, drive two cars, and take a two-week vacation in the summers. Their admiration shifts to billionaires who resort to populist messages. It's as if to say, "I wish I could just beat the system, like that guy did!"
Wages for the hourly-wage earner, especially for the minimum wage earner, are increasingly far apart from the earnings of the millionaire and billionaire class that is now dominant in our nation's government.
> The extraordinarily high level of the CEO-to-worker compensation ratio reflects the strikingly different trajectory of CEO pay compared with typical worker pay over the past 40 years. On the one hand, there has been little growth in the compensation of a typical worker since the late 1970s: It has grown just 24.0% over the 45 years from 1978 to 2023, despite a corresponding growth of net economywide productivity of 74.8% (EPI 2024). Meanwhile, the 1,085% growth in realized CEO compensation from 1978 to 2023 (excluding 1979, since there are no data for that year) exceeded the growth in productivity in that period. ([Economic Policy Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/654a10fe-412c-41c8-835d-8db61e231e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
It is vitally important that we act fast to have wages catch up. Without a radical course correction on wages, most of the other problems for the middle class will persist.
### Immigration
A major plank of any comprehensive plan for the middle class is a workable immigration policy.
"I'm a native-born citizen. I don't care about immigration," you say.
And yet, the issues surrounding low wages cannot be resolved as long as employers can find someone who has a precarious immigration status who therefore must accept low wages (or they will deal with no wages). Thus, we can't begin to address wages until we have a reliable immigration policy. Eliminate the sub-economy that relies on undocumented workers, and you will see that wages rise across the board.
A workable immigration policy is sure to pump needed tax revenues into communities, as immigrants step forth into the light of day, get paid on the books, and pay payroll taxes. Many immigrants already do this, but it would be great to have everyone paying into the system. It will help Social Security!
Mass deportations will mean that crops will not get harvested. This, in turn, will mean that grocery prices will soar, and the supply chain will possibly return to the stresses we experienced during the pandemic.
The whole pushback on immigration by the Christian Nationalists is downright puzzling to me. The Christian right is often vocal about keeping our borders safe. This is jarring to my understanding of the teachings in the Bible. "Whatsoever you do to the least of my people, that you do unto me." Matthew 25:40. If we are going to present ourselves as a nation that embraces Christian principles, we must be a nation that has a pathway for asylum seekers as well as climate and political refugees.
### Housing availability and cost
Nowhere is the gap between the haves- and have-nots more profound than in housing. Where do people go when they are priced out of literally every option? At present, they improvise. They sofa surf. They double-up with another family. They live in cars. They remain in abusive or substandard housing because they can't even come up with the deposit to move somewhere else. Or they take to the streets and shelters, if any exist in their areas.
The reasons are multi-fold. As mentioned above, incomes are too low. Inventory is low in most counties, whether rural or urban. Rents are high because long-term rentals got converted to short-term rentals, such as AirBnB (a big problem in NY-21).
A comprehensive plan for the middle class must include a plan for building more housing, and for an offer of subsidies for the families who otherwise simply cannot afford rent. An additional form of support in the form of a tax credit for first-time homebuyers is lovely, but ultimately meaningless if there are no homes to buy, and no money to even afford the down payment while awaiting the tax credit to be sent to them.
### Democrats get stuff done
Democrats are historically the party of the middle class. Somehow that has gotten forgotten in recent years.
But there is cause for celebration. In NY, Democrats get stuff done!
Our state activists and lawmakers fought long and hard to get the [NY State Climate Superfund](https://substack.com/redirect/e8f9053b-c84d-4081-afb6-2d441a034096?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) signed into law, holding our biggest polluters accountable for the damage they cause. Statewide our [minimum wage](https://substack.com/redirect/b1785783-b372-411b-84af-af714b8ebf1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is $15.50 as of January 1, 2025 though that is certainly not the highest minimum wage in the country. New York activists continue to push lawmakers to sign protections for immigrants outlined in the [NY for All Act](https://substack.com/redirect/c22ced22-a5d6-412e-9571-9406554a2f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And NY Governor Kathy Hochul [continues her battle for everyday families](https://substack.com/redirect/7beb5fa7-9065-460f-a0b9-12af05bd0c2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in a proposal that limits the purchase ability of hedge funds on single family housing units, appropriates $100 million to encourage starter home construction and down payment support, and continues her five-year plan to build or renovate 100,000 affordable homes.
But we must do more. And we must tell voters what we are doing.
I'm hoping to gain the nomination to the ballot in NY-21's Special Election. I'm goign to Congress to put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over heads.
We're in this together.
###

clean_body: The issues are so interconnected we need a comprehensive plan | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race The issues are so interconnected we need a comprehensive plan | | | Jan 13 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Image by Tegar Randynal Nugraha. Licensed by Shutterstock.** The photograph above depicts the inter-connectivity of issues that impact American households with incomes less than $150,000 per year. We can't address one issue that plagues the middle class without touching on another issue. And there are lots of issues! I just said, "middle class". I'm not even sure how to define the middle class anymore. I'm of an age that I still think that anyone earning six figures must certainly be "set" for life. That is no longer true. The gist of today's message is that spending time in Congress to fix one area, such as Social Security, or Immigration, or Veteran's care, will take decades. The billions spent in one area will be cited as cause to not fund another billion-dollar appropriation somewhere else. What's vitally important is that lawmakers develop a comprehensive plan, that addresses the totality of circumstances that impact American families. I liken it to the Marshall Plan, which cost Americans $13.3 billion (about $173 billion in today's dollars) to rebuild 16 European nations after World War II. Note that aid does not include money given to rebuild war-torn Japan and the Philippines. We came close to developing a comprehensive plan for America's middle class in 2020-2022, with the plans introduced in the first years of the Biden administration. The plans were an effort to address the economic devastation of the pandemic. Sadly, there was not the political will to pass the aggressive measures that were originally proposed (, notably, withheld the requisite votes.) Below, please find another graphic that shows the components of my comprehensive plan for the middle class. In the coming days, I will publish more articles that address each of the areas on this graphic. For today, I address four areas: Climate, Wages, Immigration, and Housing. | | ---|---|--- Image created by Paula Collins, depicting a wheel with twelve blocks describing aspects of a comprehensive plan for the middle class. Any plan to help the middle class must include a plan for climate change. Historic flooding in St. Lawrence and Lewis Counties, as well as other parts of NY-21. Now, devastating fires in LA. Paralyzing snow and cold in the midwest and northeast. Did we forget about the hurricane damage on the east coast? Or the drought in the New York City area? Wildfires in New Jersey? Did we even finish rebuilding after Super Storm Sandy? Katrina? With so much damage in regions across the country, one wonders: who pays for it all? What's needed is not only a plan for storm cleanup, but also a plan that includes a communications system for each county, evacuation and shelter systems, first responders, a plan to shelter and feed first responders, regular checks on things like water and food supplies, and policies regarding electrical grids. For starters. Moreover, what's needed is a comprehensive plan for land use and real estate development, transportation. Where can we build houses, commercial space, and roads so that we are not exacerbating the impacts of climate change. How can we develop housing, work, and manufacturing spaces that have minimal environmental impact? How can we develop alternative forms of fuel? How can we keep our food supply safe? In California, we learned too late that We must do better. In an era in which we are advancing the political role of billionaires who want to make commercial space flight possible, we have no excuse for not having a water system adequate to respond to fires in the second-largest city in the US. Most American families earning under $150,000 will barely recover from a devastating disaster if they have homeowner's insurance. They absolutely will not recover if they had inadequate homeowners insurance, or none at all. Multiple hits -- as we see in zones where there is significant flood, fire, or storm damage, and the result is that the poor get poorer and the wealthy either self-fund their renovations or relocate. The real estate hawks, also known as "investors" sweep through neighborhoods after a disaster and buy properties for pennies on the dollar. Any equity that the middle class homeowner had? Gone in an instant. I'm light on details for the climate plan that's needed. I'm not a climate scientist. Please -- can we get some in Congress, ASAP? Wage stabilization Numerous studies have proven that when unions raise wages, wages increase across industry sectors. Simply put: raising the minimum wage raises wages for everyone. Trickle down economics hasn't worked to support the middle class wage earner. There is little hard evidence to support the claim that raising wages will result in widespread layoffs. "Indeed, the research suggests that small businesses don't appear to cut jobs in response to an increase in the minimum wage, and may actually benefit from it instead." Much of the anger felt by white wage earners can be attributed to the broad concept that their quality of life has been lost. That is true. When they embrace the notion of "Make America Great Again", many people reminisce about an era in which a single wage earner could support himself and two wage earners could support a family, own a home, drive two cars, and take a two-week vacation in the summers. Their admiration shifts to billionaires who resort to populist messages. It's as if to say, "I wish I could just beat the system, like that guy did!" Wages for the hourly-wage earner, especially for the minimum wage earner, are increasingly far apart from the earnings of the millionaire and billionaire class that is now dominant in our nation's government. The extraordinarily high level of the CEO-to-worker compensation ratio reflects the strikingly different trajectory of CEO pay compared with typical worker pay over the past 40 years. On the one hand, there has been little growth in the compensation of a typical worker since the late 1970s: It has grown just 24.0% over the 45 years from 1978 to 2023, despite a corresponding growth of net economywide productivity of 74.8% (EPI 2024). Meanwhile, the 1,085% growth in realized CEO compensation from 1978 to 2023 (excluding 1979, since there are no data for that year) exceeded the growth in productivity in that period. () It is vitally important that we act fast to have wages catch up. Without a radical course correction on wages, most of the other problems for the middle class will persist. Immigration A major plank of any comprehensive plan for the middle class is a workable immigration policy. "I'm a native-born citizen. I don't care about immigration," you say. And yet, the issues surrounding low wages cannot be resolved as long as employers can find someone who has a precarious immigration status who therefore must accept low wages (or they will deal with no wages). Thus, we can't begin to address wages until we have a reliable immigration policy. Eliminate the sub-economy that relies on undocumented workers, and you will see that wages rise across the board. A workable immigration policy is sure to pump needed tax revenues into communities, as immigrants step forth into the light of day, get paid on the books, and pay payroll taxes. Many immigrants already do this, but it would be great to have everyone paying into the system. It will help Social Security! Mass deportations will mean that crops will not get harvested. This, in turn, will mean that grocery prices will soar, and the supply chain will possibly return to the stresses we experienced during the pandemic. The whole pushback on immigration by the Christian Nationalists is downright puzzling to me. The Christian right is often vocal about keeping our borders safe. This is jarring to my understanding of the teachings in the Bible. "Whatsoever you do to the least of my people, that you do unto me." Matthew 25:40. If we are going to present ourselves as a nation that embraces Christian principles, we must be a nation that has a pathway for asylum seekers as well as climate and political refugees. Housing availability and cost Nowhere is the gap between the haves- and have-nots more profound than in housing. Where do people go when they are priced out of literally every option? At present, they improvise. They sofa surf. They double-up with another family. They live in cars. They remain in abusive or substandard housing because they can't even come up with the deposit to move somewhere else. Or they take to the streets and shelters, if any exist in their areas. Politico reports this week: House Republicans are passing around a “menu” of more than $5 trillion in cuts they could use to bankroll President-elect Donald Trump’s top priorities this year, including tax cuts and border security. The early list of potential spending offsets obtained by POLITICO includes changes to Medicare and ending Biden administration climate programs, along with slashing welfare and “reimagining” the Affordable Care Act. At Cedar Key Progress, we’re planning major pressure campaigns on vulnerable Republican to hit them where it hurts - their re-elections. We need your help to fund billboards and ads that will tell voters in target districts that their Republican member of Congress voted to kick millions of health care. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 1/12/2025
body:
Heidi’s Response to Governor Polis’ State of the State Address
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**January 12, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,

I want to start off with acknowledging the atrocity in Los Angeles right now, a place that holds a special place in my heart. As someone who has called California (and LA specifically) home in the past, it breaks my heart to see the devastation caused by the fires. To all the firefighters, first responders, and community members standing together amidst this crisis, thank you for your bravery. Our heart and prayers are with everyone impacted.
And as much as I have a special place in my heart for California, I'd like to keep Colorado from becoming it politically. This past week, Governor Jared Polis delivered his State of the State address to the 75th Colorado Legislature, painting a rosy picture of Colorado’s future. However, in my response [published in Rocky Mountain Voice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), I laid out the harsh realities that Coloradans are facing—realities that the governor conveniently glossed over.
Economic hardship continues to plague working families across the state. Seniors on fixed incomes are being priced out, grocery bills are skyrocketing, and vehicle registration fees are an added burden. While the administration pours resources into urban-centric electric vehicle projects, rural communities are left with crumbling roads and little support. Colorado’s overregulation of vital industries like agriculture and energy is further undermining the backbone of our economy, leading to fewer jobs and rising costs for everyone.
Crime has also surged under Polis’s soft-on-crime policies, leaving law enforcement underfunded and communities vulnerable to gang activity and drug cartels. Meanwhile, rural Coloradans, who already feel neglected by the state government, bear the brunt of policies driven by urban elites, from wolf reintroduction to anti-business mandates.
At Rocky Mountain Voice, we believe that Colorado deserves better. Our state needs leadership that values every Coloradan—not just those living in Denver or Boulder. We must prioritize public safety, restore economic opportunities, and focus on common-sense policies that serve all our communities.
I encourage you to read my [full response](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to the governor’s address for a deeper dive into these critical issues. As always, thank you for being part of this community, where we strive to hold our leaders accountable and share the truth that Coloradans deserve.
In liberty and truth, Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Minority Leader Pugliese pledges Republicans will find solutions for all Coloradans in 75th session](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) When Rose Pugliese left behind her children to begin the 75th General Assembly in Denver, as children will do she was asked why she did the job of Colorado House minority leader.
**[Browning: Colorado egg law and bird flu has people ‘scrambling’ to find eggs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) During the last few weeks, there have been a couple of notable changes you may have noticed at your local grocer. The old saying that warns us not to keep all of our “eggs in one basket”, has now become, “I can’t find or afford eggs in my basket.”
**[Republicans in minority, but with House seat gains, as 75th General Assembly opens on Wednesday](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The 75th session of the Colorado General Assembly opens Wednesday, Jan. 8, with sine die — adjournment on the final day of the session — slated for May 7.

|
---
**STATE**
**[House Republicans respond to Gov. Polis on his ‘State of the State’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) It will remain to be seen how closely Democrat Gov. Jared Polis aligns in the 75th legislative session with Colorado House Republicans on a variety of priority issues to the minority caucus.

**[House Republicans launch 23 policy positions in 25-second video to open session](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) If Republican House Minority Leader Rose Pugliese did not make it clear enough Wednesday in her address to the Colorado House upon the opening of the 75th General Assembly, the caucus simplified her words.

**[CPW Commission denies petition to pause wolf introduction on 10-1 vote](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In a highly-emotional hearing that lasted more than six hours, Colorado Parks and Wildlife commissioners took testimony from nearly 100 people concerning whether or not the Commission should vote to approve or deny a petition to pause the wolf introduction program, until all of the mitigation tools were in place and funded.

**[Brita Horn announces she will seek chair of Colorado Republican Party](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Brita Horn, a former Routt County treasurer, a fire chief and grassroots and civic leader, has announced her candidacy for chair of the Colorado Republican Party. “This is about the future,” Horn said in a campaign press release.
**[Colorado’s large city mayors urge governor, lawmakers not to take away local control to combat crime](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The mayors of Colorado’s three largest cities on Thursday urged Gov. Jared Polis and lawmakers to focus on housing, the economy, and public safety. They notably urged state policymakers to ensure that municipalities retain the flexibility to combat crime.

_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_

**[Juan Merchan sentences Trump to unconditional discharge: No Penalty, conviction upheld](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[BREITBART](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Justice Juan Merchan sentenced President-elect Donald Trump to an unconditional discharge in the Manhattan business records case on Friday, which does not penalize him, though it upholds the jury’s felony conviction.

**[Los Angeles fire budget cut, hundreds of hydrants stolen for scrap before fires](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE DAILY SIGNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Hundreds of fire hydrants were stolen from the ground for scrap metal in advance of the blazes raging across Los Angeles, highlighting the local government’s challenges in maintaining basic order and infrastructure.
**[‘Colossal win for women and girls’: Federal court strikes down Biden title IX rewrite](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DAILY WIRE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Biden administration’s attempt to rewrite Title IX to allow men in women’s sports, locker rooms, and bathrooms, has been struck down nationwide by a federal court.

**[Biden confirms he is considering preemptively pardoning Anthony Fauci](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE DAILY CALLER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) President Joe Biden confirmed in an interview with USA Today that he is considering preemptive pardons for Dr. Anthony Fauci and former Republican Rep. Liz Cheney.

**[Mark Zuckerberg promises less censorship on Facebook as he scraps biased third-party ‘fact checkers’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[BREITBART](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Mark Zuckerberg has announced major changes to Meta’s content moderation policies and practices on Facebook and Instagram, citing a desire to embrace free speech and avoid censorship. Zuckerberg’s changes begin with scrapping Facebook’s third-party “fact check” system which is notorious for its leftist bias.

**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[District 11 ends decades-old contract with teacher union in effort to deliver for students, families](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The District 11 School Board has decided against renewing its master agreement with the local teacher union — the Colorado Springs Education Association (CSEA).

**[Mijares bridges Montrose divides with whiskey bar, now hopes to do so in office](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Montrose County Commissioner-elect Scott Mijares never set out to run for office. His path to becoming a public servant started at Wild Horse Wine and Whiskey, a Main Street business he and his wife, Julie, opened in 2021.

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The National Western Stock Show is returning to Denver and bringing cowboys, rodeos, livestock and just about anything Western for more than two weeks in January.

clean_body: Heidi’s Response to Governor Polis’ State of the State Address | | | | January 12, 2025 SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST By Heidi Ganahl | | Dear Readers, I want to start off with acknowledging the atrocity in Los Angeles right now, a place that holds a special place in my heart. As someone who has called California (and LA specifically) home in the past, it breaks my heart to see the devastation caused by the fires. To all the firefighters, first responders, and community members standing together amidst this crisis, thank you for your bravery. Our heart and prayers are with everyone impacted. And as much as I have a special place in my heart for California, I'd like to keep Colorado from becoming it politically. This past week, Governor Jared Polis delivered his State of the State address to the 75th Colorado Legislature, painting a rosy picture of Colorado’s future. However, in my response , I laid out the harsh realities that Coloradans are facing—realities that the governor conveniently glossed over. Economic hardship continues to plague working families across the state. Seniors on fixed incomes are being priced out, grocery bills are skyrocketing, and vehicle registration fees are an added burden. While the administration pours resources into urban-centric electric vehicle projects, rural communities are left with crumbling roads and little support. Colorado’s overregulation of vital industries like agriculture and energy is further undermining the backbone of our economy, leading to fewer jobs and rising costs for everyone. Crime has also surged under Polis’s soft-on-crime policies, leaving law enforcement underfunded and communities vulnerable to gang activity and drug cartels. Meanwhile, rural Coloradans, who already feel neglected by the state government, bear the brunt of policies driven by urban elites, from wolf reintroduction to anti-business mandates. At Rocky Mountain Voice, we believe that Colorado deserves better. Our state needs leadership that values every Coloradan—not just those living in Denver or Boulder. We must prioritize public safety, restore economic opportunities, and focus on common-sense policies that serve all our communities. I encourage you to read my to the governor’s address for a deeper dive into these critical issues. As always, thank you for being part of this community, where we strive to hold our leaders accountable and share the truth that Coloradans deserve. In liberty and truth, Heidi Ganahl | | | TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK When Rose Pugliese left behind her children to begin the 75th General Assembly in Denver, as children will do she was asked why she did the job of Colorado House minority leader. During the last few weeks, there have been a couple of notable changes you may have noticed at your local grocer. The old saying that warns us not to keep all of our “eggs in one basket”, has now become, “I can’t find or afford eggs in my basket.” The 75th session of the Colorado General Assembly opens Wednesday, Jan. 8, with sine die — adjournment on the final day of the session — slated for May 7. | STATE It will remain to be seen how closely Democrat Gov. Jared Polis aligns in the 75th legislative session with Colorado House Republicans on a variety of priority issues to the minority caucus. If Republican House Minority Leader Rose Pugliese did not make it clear enough Wednesday in her address to the Colorado House upon the opening of the 75th General Assembly, the caucus simplified her words. In a highly-emotional hearing that lasted more than six hours, Colorado Parks and Wildlife commissioners took testimony from nearly 100 people concerning whether or not the Commission should vote to approve or deny a petition to pause the wolf introduction program, until all of the mitigation tools were in place and funded. Brita Horn, a former Routt County treasurer, a fire chief and grassroots and civic leader, has announced her candidacy for chair of the Colorado Republican Party. “This is about the future,” Horn said in a campaign press release. The mayors of Colorado’s three largest cities on Thursday urged Gov. Jared Polis and lawmakers to focus on housing, the economy, and public safety. They notably urged state policymakers to ensure that municipalities retain the flexibility to combat crime. | NATIONAL Justice Juan Merchan sentenced President-elect Donald Trump to an unconditional discharge in the Manhattan business records case on Friday, which does not penalize him, though it upholds the jury’s felony conviction. Hundreds of fire hydrants were stolen from the ground for scrap metal in advance of the blazes raging across Los Angeles, highlighting the local government’s challenges in maintaining basic order and infrastructure. The Biden administration’s attempt to rewrite Title IX to allow men in women’s sports, locker rooms, and bathrooms, has been struck down nationwide by a federal court. President Joe Biden confirmed in an interview with USA Today that he is considering preemptive pardons for Dr. Anthony Fauci and former Republican Rep. Liz Cheney. Zuckerberg’s changes begin with scrapping Facebook’s third-party “fact check” system which is notorious for its leftist bias. | LOCAL The District 11 School Board has decided against renewing its master agreement with the local teacher union — the Colorado Springs Education Association (CSEA). name: Steve Scalise + Jimmy Patronis
subject: Trump’s guy in the FL-01 Special Election reached out…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Now I’m following up because early voting in the all-important FL-01 Special Election begins NEXT WEEK so there’s no time to waste.

| |
---
| | | **Early voting in the all-important FL-01 Special Election begins NEXT WEEK so there 's no time to waste.**

This is Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I need to pass along an urgent message. Our MAGA candidate - Jimmy Patronis - already reached out, but we haven't heard back. That's why I'm following up with you right now.

**_[I'm pleading with you to read his message immediately.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znupno87jlvh4l2pt0btualiuqq0kem1sk5qj6jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o34cth2bs "I’m pleading with you to read his message immediately.")_**

Remember:

The outcome of this Special Election could determine whether or not we can SAVE our razor-thin Majority and FILL Matt Gaetz's seat with a true America First Conservative.

_*** Please Read Jimmy 's Message Below ***_

---
I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdegvvienu7urh1ffo22lrdh3ej3j3pn7mqckqqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o34cth2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6an4aphe7tcij4uutjq8s1p32pab0rus4slnud0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o34cth2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6pg14hb5i7533sc5cae98l3d4g7o9ab5uff43hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o34cth2bs "Jimmy Patronis + Donald Trump")
---
Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za50q8agov8vccfp38foj8js7pbbtatqi0ne5hpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o34cth2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

To victory,
_- Jimmy_

**JIMMY PATRONIS**
Trump-Endorsed Candidate, FL-01 Special Election

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1vpv7gn6ln2na31bpcdnhojdivvgmfhhk7mur78_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o34cth2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zir7qgmqq30j3h4snug6r52uefo8cq1fmltti900_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o34cth2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---

name: Randy Fine [FL-06 Special Election Candidate]
subject: Some call me the HEBREW HAMMER!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m Pres. Trump’s pick in the FL-06 Special Election!

| |
---
| | | Some call me the HEBREW HAMMER!

But you can call me Randy.

_**[My name's Randy Fine and I'm honored to be President Trump's pick in the upcoming SPECIAL ELECTION in FL-06!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt098qh1586tftqgs6h5up4dsqlh365rh1vnufsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o33c1h2bs "My name’s Randy Fine and I’m honored to be President Trump’s pick in the upcoming SPECIAL ELECTION in FL-06!")**_

I'm running to replace Congressman Mike Waltz because he got called up to serve as President Trump's National Security Advisor. He's leaving some BIG SHOES to fill, but I will honor his legacy here in Eastern Florida, support Israel's right to exist, be a key MAGA ally in Congress, and help save our Conservative House Majority.

That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50k to help WIN key races like this Special Election! _Since early voting is about to begin, I 'm humbly asking you to pitch in here and now:_

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziqknpa8pgsj943814fmuass6jt41hdvm5rq99to_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o33c1h2bs "Randy Fine")
---
| | | [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1suoi727ncj456vvho0qcv9002ei0684kp2srbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o33c1h2bs "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: DONATE NOW")
---
If you're still not convinced, here's my final pitch to you:

The ENTIRE country is watching this race like a hawk. Republicans control the House of Representatives by a PAPER-THIN margin. This Special Election is a must-win to stop the Democrats from taking control...

**And don 't forget - losing this seat would spell the end of President Trump's trifecta, effectively STONEWALLING his entire legislative agenda. **

That would be the worst possible scenario for our country.

_**[Like I said, early voting begins soon, so I'll cut to the chase. I'm kindly asking every Conservative in America to pitch in a few bucks to help win key races like this Special Election.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z20pjkmrijfthjc6o7kj9apquff27forie1quruo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o33c1h2bs "Like I said, early voting begins soon, so I’ll cut to the chase. I’m kindly asking every Conservative in America to pitch in a few bucks to help win key races like this Special Election.")**_
---
| | | [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z23tm3jm4blr9pterdqk8afb1s3udd41brf54fg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o33c1h2bs "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: DONATE NOW")
---
Thank you,

Randy Fine
_(A.K.A. The Hebrew Hammer)_

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7sibut03ae5sdu7lvconjdlmud9itmj1q4k5dug_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o33c1h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zag2o0c2eqk6kmmc0g7ve24mvlte0edrdhimj810_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o33c1h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---

---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT [From House Republicans]
subject: EVERYTHING comes down the FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21 Special Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
There’s no other way around this:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2opq909anse4iasko0veo19tjqhfl2ijhj5toqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o36clh2bs "INCOMING: Three Special Elections")
---

Sorry to be the bearer of bad news:

Our House Majority is hanging on by a thread. We're clinging to one of the narrowest Majorities of the last CENTURY. And if Democrats win the upcoming Special Elections, they could win back the House and bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt.

There's no other way around this: _Everything comes down to the upcoming Special Elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21._

**_[Early voting is about to begin in Florida and this is a major test for our Conservative movement.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4lt70np05hojsmn2pba2un6cqhffs029ki602s8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o36clh2bs "Early voting is about to begin in Florida and this is a major test for our Conservative movement.")_**

Why? Because...

**If we lose these Special Elections, House Democrats would take control and effectively destroy our Republican Trifecta in one fell swoop.**

Democrats are supercharging their efforts to take back control of the House so we desperately need your help to rebuild our warchest after our 2024 victory.

We're closing in on the first and most IMPORTANT deadline of the New Year so if you're willing and able to **_[chip in a few bucks](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2sm2pinaj6d8eg33lcvp2o5fq5bouagnhp5fbi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o36clh2bs "chip in a few bucks")_** to help, you can make a REAL difference.
| | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjh91nrhlp57g5ltc21fav37hj811s14pf236hd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o36clh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE")
---

If you're debating whether or not to contribute right here and right now, remember this:

**Our Conservative House Majority isn 't the only thing on the line... So is the fate of our Republican Trifecta.**

_**[So- with everything on the line - can we count on you to step up?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqlp4fp1q65726v7g6b2o48ho4hojvopaqtn7h2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o36clh2bs "So – with everything on the line – can we count on you to step up?")**_
| [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdpb0759is8pgr47bba047urq5vp7qj9nsevcoa8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o36clh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE")
---

Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- House Republicans

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbpmg0pstofatl1uvj285ue0rihnuobjpfonrfdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o36clh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt3grf9i9d4rn2app6jrft3esve28ssd0dh38jug_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6o36clh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---

name: SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT [From House Republicans]
subject: EVERYTHING comes down the FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21 Special Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
There’s no other way around this:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znd327vq033ihls3r9npah0o889j385st1e998eg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6p76c9h2bs "INCOMING: Three Special Elections")
---

Sorry to be the bearer of bad news:

Our House Majority is hanging on by a thread. We're clinging to one of the narrowest Majorities of the last CENTURY. And if Democrats win the upcoming Special Elections, they could win back the House and bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt.

There's no other way around this: _Everything comes down to the upcoming Special Elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21._

**_[Early voting is about to begin in Florida and this is a major test for our Conservative movement.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvm0qbm0c9h4pvh099qdfsa1vttt1fuc62rf12j8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6p76c9h2bs "Early voting is about to begin in Florida and this is a major test for our Conservative movement.")_**

Why? Because...

**If we lose these Special Elections, House Democrats would take control and effectively destroy our Republican Trifecta in one fell swoop.**

Democrats are supercharging their efforts to take back control of the House so we desperately need your help to rebuild our warchest after our 2024 victory.

We're closing in on the first and most IMPORTANT deadline of the New Year so if you're willing and able to **_[chip in a few bucks](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9a50vltg58itqpv9ja0qnbdnqlgduola6i2lsi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6p76c9h2bs "chip in a few bucks")_** to help, you can make a REAL difference.
| | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE >>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8554n0068ar81e9s8dvj38qiov9kgr8irvaeam0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6p76c9h2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE")
---

If you're debating whether or not to contribute right here and right now, remember this:

**Our Conservative House Majority isn 't the only thing on the line... So is the fate of our Republican Trifecta.**

_**[So- with everything on the line - can we count on you to step up?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z65scbfn5iqeoen8hnsd0jgf520el1s21aq5vaa0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6p76c9h2bs "So – with everything on the line – can we count on you to step up?")**_
| [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE >>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zltls9cn0d65fblqf36dvbe1s0urfajkv3f9d4r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6p76c9h2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE")
---

Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- House Republicans

| |

---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z07gt03gm4mkl5qljp5t7pf5dqm66tbg28v4hqm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6p76c9h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztriekhd9pq99t4uv2cr8pooe7hp1bdsmpvo8n0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cthm6p76c9h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

body:
Continuing that legacy, we're ecstatic to introduce our latest masterpiece...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19754/6374453/140e2a94047254b54716ee51fc1f7a681501b1fd/1b52b40ef94e0cc69e3b5c55de0d503b7913ebef)

_January 13th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
**Meet the Silver Back OTF:
A Cut Above ****the Rest!** At Gunner Gear, we pride ourselves on delivering innovative tactical equipment designed with purpose, power, and precision. Continuing that legacy, we're ecstatic to introduce our latest masterpiece - **The Silver Back OTF Knife**. **Strength Meets Elegance** : Crafted with precision engineering and high-quality materials, the Silver Back is not just another OTF knife. It's a testament to durability, functionality, and unmatched sharpness - all while exuding an elegance that's second to none. **Quick Deploy, Every Time** : The Silver Back boasts a rapid, one-handed deployment mechanism that ensures you're always ready, irrespective of what challenges lie ahead. **Aesthetics & Ergonomics Unified**: Its sleek design is not just about looks. The Silver Back's ergonomic grip offers unparalleled comfort, ensuring extended usage without fatigue. **Limited-Time Offer Just For You!** : To celebrate the launch of the Silver Back, we're granting our loyal customers an exclusive discount. **Order within the next 48 hours and enjoy a limited time discount!** **[Act fast – this is a limited-time offer, and we expect stocks to run out quickly!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19754/6374453/140e2a94047254b54716ee51fc1f7a681501b1fd/1b52b40ef94e0cc69e3b5c55de0d503b7913ebef)** The Silver Back OTF Knife is more than just a tool; it's an embodiment of craftsmanship, power, and elegance. When you carry the Silver Back, you carry a promise of reliability. Step up your tactical game with the Silver Back and experience the difference of true quality. **[Secure Your Silver Back OTF Knife& Save Now!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19754/6374453/140e2a94047254b54716ee51fc1f7a681501b1fd/1b52b40ef94e0cc69e3b5c55de0d503b7913ebef)** Warm Regards, The Gunner Gear Team _**Disclaimer:** Always handle knives with care and ensure that you follow safety guidelines. The Silver Back is intended for responsible adults only._

It's a testament to durability, functionality, and unmatched sharpness - all while exuding an elegance that's second to none. Quick Deploy, Every Time : The Silver Back boasts a rapid, one-handed deployment mechanism that ensures you're always ready, irrespective of what challenges lie ahead. Limited-Time Offer Just For You! : To celebrate the launch of the Silver Back, we're granting our loyal customers an exclusive discount. Order within the next 48 hours and enjoy a limited time discount! The Silver Back OTF Knife is more than just a tool; it's an embodiment of craftsmanship, power, and elegance. When you carry the Silver Back, you carry a promise of reliability. Step up your tactical game with the Silver Back and experience the difference of true quality. | URGENT: Key Races Up for Grabs in 2025! Peter, there’s a lot at stake this year as Americans vote on some crucial races. Whether voters are picking Mayors to lead major cities like New York City and Boston, choosing Attorneys General to defend the rights of ALL citizens, or selecting Governors to guide a state’s future, there’ll be some major decisions made at the polls. The elections that take place over the next few months will be the first ones of this Trump era – and this could be a BIG OPPORTUNITY for Democrats to slow the MAGA movement. If we start investing in these key races RIGHT NOW, we can elect progressives in offices around the country who will keep our rights, freedoms, and democracy safe. These Democrats will fight hard against the GOP’s threats to our communities. That’s why we’re setting a goal to raise $25,000 in the next 5 days so we can start investing early in Democratic candidates. [Will you join us by pitching in towards our goal? | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Troy Downing
subject: I didn't run for office to be a rubber stamp for the status quo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I need your help to hit the ground running!

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Db7QMzKrkUccoqjRpn-KQ)
---
Peter, it's Congressman Troy Downing.

As a freshman Congressman, I'll be facing a lot of pressure from The Establishment to conform to their way of doing things. _**But I didn't run for office to be a rubber stamp for the status quo**_.I ran to shake things up and fight for the conservative values and principles we hold dear, like bolstering national security, shutting down the border invasion, supporting our veterans, and ending government waste.

I'm eager to get to work for you and the rest of the America First Patriots around the country to execute this mandate, but I need your help to hit the ground running.

I've set an ambitious goal for my first month in office and need your support to reach it. **To be blunt, I need to raise $6,856 in the next 48 hours to tell The Establishment that we won't back down from this fight for America.**

[**Will you help me reach this critical goal by chipping in $25, $50, or more today? Every dollar counts, and with your support, we can show Washington that we are ready to take on the challenges ahead and defend the values that make this country great.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
**HELP TROY CRUSH HIS FIRST GOAL**
---
[ DONATE NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-yfy4A3XELzExmad_xw)
---
Together, we’ll take America back.Thank you for your unwavering support,Troy Downing
