subject: Trump’s guy in the FL-01 Special Election reached out…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Now I'm following up because early voting in the all-important FL-01 Special Election begins NEXT WEEK so there's no time to waste.

| |
---
| | | **Early voting in the all-important FL-01 Special Election begins NEXT WEEK so there 's no time to waste.**

This is Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I need to pass along an urgent message. Our MAGA candidate - Jimmy Patronis - already reached out, but we haven't heard back. That's why I'm following up with you right now.

**_[I'm pleading with you to read his message immediately.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=389da83b3b4a47269379455e5dffdb4c&_e=4xUvC4RmB_GQWMabYB8_JFaDIlK822u9Z5gabuG9JMJTujHbtPjWDrEzOphCCz1EZcVjDWVtYXVMGUzE2HBARI6LIdc5ZC-sE2OgkMh_5u-M-4q2E3z4GmnFET49hf0XwbkfxEeDmrSS6ID18m0fNlny2H3JdR4wFz-PPa6N5WoFipXzt_0Aez3at76KJXeH5yr3K2gxN9LRV5FsP6jW88mk189-T-rFVllX3K126X91z1uh5G81LyB50C8Q47azXz3Vlf64mGL6MgNmfdpP6s1iXiEbuaU11ZrFZQ_w1DhcboiQXHZlJ4op_d8hLPB_w8Q4RFMIAHr_yWcZUuTuncJXXh9rEDNnOt-iU22zKT75neJm0APKwsiQlO7QXbsjGAvgb-4vnekm4DV7UWCZiyu17FWvUUETpUb9vinc1ZYICIeNiY06T0XbNgWJ2-jxQrmKlsC1jXpORcSFi38eIw%3D%3D "I’m pleading with you to read his message immediately.")_**

Remember:

The outcome of this Special Election could determine whether or not we can SAVE our razor-thin Majority and FILL Matt Gaetz's seat with a true America First Conservative.

_*** Please Read Jimmy 's Message Below ***_

---
I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=389da83b3b4a47269379455e5dffdb4c&_e=4xUvC4RmB_GQWMabYB8_JFaDIlK822u9Z5gabuG9JMJTujHbtPjWDrEzOphCCz1EZcVjDWVtYXVMGUzE2HBARI6LIdc5ZC-sE2OgkMh_5u-M-4q2E3z4GmnFET49hf0XwbkfxEeDmrSS6ID18m0fNlny2H3JdR4wFz-PPa6N5WoFipXzt_0Aez3at76KJXeH5yr3K2gxN9LRV5FsP6jW88mk189-T-rFVllX3K126X91z1uh5G81LyB50C8Q47azXz3Vlf64mGL6MgNmfdpP6s1iXiEbuaU11ZrFZQ_w1DgaW0OcBpa4qBEPNlaGIWaZ_rWm_S_WsbFdCxRTUG_t5c1BNo2kpQM8okmFUzS-EgK9-wHeD3KdTPs9gSKVzw-WHNv5WTpQPtjfQW6HgE6bhRcKLc5wuihzJD4dKiebcCcboNxvHc_lfxvFQtvkfcaB1rTCMafHrBs5mxSYmDDn5A%3D%3D "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=389da83b3b4a47269379455e5dffdb4c&_e=4xUvC4RmB_GQWMabYB8_JFaDIlK822u9Z5gabuG9JMJTujHbtPjWDrEzOphCCz1EZcVjDWVtYXVMGUzE2HBARI6LIdc5ZC-sE2OgkMh_5u-M-4q2E3z4GmnFET49hf0XwbkfxEeDmrSS6ID18m0fNlny2H3JdR4wFz-PPa6N5WoFipXzt_0Aez3at76KJXeH5yr3K2gxN9LRV5FsP6jW88mk189-T-rFVllX3K126X91z1uh5G81LyB50C8Q47azXz3Vlf64mGL6MgNmfdpP6s1iXiEbuaU11ZrFZQ_w1Dg_ZS0v3RJAJ-2jsv2EIdNn0ZWHcdYycaVXoamP7fAGYmrn48PBRT5N-N7gfyvA3lMdU9_HO8ctrMsSNrv807VqEXaX1dQLMSmNYxMg9C4WHxYpNbju4ohlPZZa2mbt6xx9sRDhC-F83BXTI_ES6SfCil-3EUUplkOtTFlPfcan5A%3D%3D "PLEASE DONATE NOW")

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=389da83b3b4a47269379455e5dffdb4c&_e=4xUvC4RmB_GQWMabYB8_JFaDIlK822u9Z5gabuG9JMJTujHbtPjWDrEzOphCCz1EZcVjDWVtYXVMGUzE2HBARI6LIdc5ZC-sE2OgkMh_5u-M-4q2E3z4GmnFET49hf0XwbkfxEeDmrSS6ID18m0fNlny2H3JdR4wFz-PPa6N5WoFipXzt_0Aez3at76KJXeH5yr3K2gxN9LRV5FsP6jW88mk189-T-rFVllX3K126X91z1uh5G81LyB50C8Q47azXz3Vlf64mGL6MgNmfdpP6s1iXiEbuaU11ZrFZQ_w1DhgckWvZkYqkvHDGnUlq4ybzegKYK3qIE61glZWwZRLB0wi6ExG23HW9aQxh2DBWX6eSC6ilnKg4RJzgK8rh7GsYWz3WQSYT6PhGSTKnLeGox0tF4aDj-hQ5SKV_U0nHC5-RnTwoG0Z9RTTmIjro3cEHHddmo2sgfELKGEjKulSgA%3D%3D "Jimmy Patronis + Donald Trump")
---
Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=389da83b3b4a47269379455e5dffdb4c&_e=4xUvC4RmB_GQWMabYB8_JFaDIlK822u9Z5gabuG9JMJTujHbtPjWDrEzOphCCz1EZcVjDWVtYXVMGUzE2HBARI6LIdc5ZC-sE2OgkMh_5u-M-4q2E3z4GmnFET49hf0XwbkfxEeDmrSS6ID18m0fNlny2H3JdR4wFz-PPa6N5WoFipXzt_0Aez3at76KJXeH5yr3K2gxN9LRV5FsP6jW88mk189-T-rFVllX3K126X91z1uh5G81LyB50C8Q47azXz3Vlf64mGL6MgNmfdpP6s1iXiEbuaU11ZrFZQ_w1Dh8IA-6B89cRs-5hG2WftCkMVBU1eDe5B_xZimI4SCNIY9V8Dz6PXNCe4Y-Q0H7-LludlXIP_lK7CSWOYD7ZWFeEK-aTvCl6mPiOlk_2GX0BJKzZvBTLh0RhH_cBoIKODhiicIfGKI8jXvLDdzMGejlntqOuYnxTPGzvYr8CCihpw%3D%3D "PLEASE DONATE NOW")

To victory,
_- Jimmy_

**JIMMY PATRONIS**
Trump-Endorsed Candidate, FL-01 Special Election

There’s no other way around this:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29376364b5004cd5b0e1297c2f645931&_e=Muj8O0q9p7mbBWv7xnBRnWu0GFG0XpquN3fyvdPMeo-XMEM57SxF39wLyOap6RAfu142rs0NSSeYSx-mnrQH_2jjAZdwQBhDrNW44ADFQ88DxM15KqyQeX_DQhiObjZflKmicJnkbvZNLKfl1xxFp9fpejIDQpsJm3zTchO6wlR_8f_xgtsQLC_uCgYAYCcvdKzm5EW2eVn1zv37Sw43erZXeQYUTeWHkrUqcEfSb0kt0MEEIo65QrnF_gN4QGh1P7T-S0_t48zLQ6WCpacQMJjQcVfk2vmcPiZPo8ZC3byLHbKDSh331LAVPmD4ZuKwEAPy_SCBWeedNymbnGkIP43xX0o7YYJQa-YPSPYk0fbhnAM0HiCAk-Vwv8pnIp8-gXLFG2I0UFg9pc8FBrABzlNpammfAol3oH4riIa3BtprSvvG0PS_fI4DPsOPF_wtFpKyKJpxxXuNq1Ltip_fUA%3D%3D "INCOMING: Three Special Elections")
---

Sorry to be the bearer of bad news:

Our House Majority is hanging on by a thread. We're clinging to one of the narrowest Majorities of the last CENTURY. And if Democrats win the upcoming Special Elections, they could win back the House and bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt.

There's no other way around this: _Everything comes down to the upcoming Special Elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21._

**_[Early voting is about to begin in Florida and this is a major test for our Conservative movement.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29376364b5004cd5b0e1297c2f645931&_e=Muj8O0q9p7mbBWv7xnBRnWu0GFG0XpquN3fyvdPMeo-XMEM57SxF39wLyOap6RAfu142rs0NSSeYSx-mnrQH_2jjAZdwQBhDrNW44ADFQ88DxM15KqyQeX_DQhiObjZflKmicJnkbvZNLKfl1xxFp9fpejIDQpsJm3zTchO6wlR_8f_xgtsQLC_uCgYAYCcvdKzm5EW2eVn1zv37Sw43erZXeQYUTeWHkrUqcEfSb0kt0MEEIo65QrnF_gN4QGh1P7T-S0_t48zLQ6WCpacQMJjQcVfk2vmcPiZPo8ZC3byLHbKDSh331LAVPmD4ZuKwImzU7yETERZ8Mpi-ptCDx7ZWG41ePpo_N0kU3_V0jGEEl500tanrCTUc3U3blrW59anyUWIP-jUR0NomcKy8bTSaNM7jMcNCK29L-2nCriIi9XtBcv4rnnoe--fzqnmFJyU9ZT_SKcF_-w4kXUJ3Zg%3D%3D "Early voting is about to begin in Florida and this is a major test for our Conservative movement. ")_**

Why? Because...

**If we lose these Special Elections, House Democrats would take control and effectively destroy our Republican Trifecta in one fell swoop.**

Democrats are supercharging their efforts to take back control of the House so we desperately need your help to rebuild our warchest after our 2024 victory.

We're closing in on the first and most IMPORTANT deadline of the New Year so if you're willing and able to **_[chip in a few bucks](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29376364b5004cd5b0e1297c2f645931&_e=Muj8O0q9p7mbBWv7xnBRnWu0GFG0XpquN3fyvdPMeo-XMEM57SxF39wLyOap6RAfu142rs0NSSeYSx-mnrQH_2jjAZdwQBhDrNW44ADFQ88DxM15KqyQeX_DQhiObjZflKmicJnkbvZNLKfl1xxFp9fpejIDQpsJm3zTchO6wlR_8f_xgtsQLC_uCgYAYCcvdKzm5EW2eVn1zv37Sw43erZXeQYUTeWHkrUqcEfSb0kt0MEEIo65QrnF_gN4QGh1P7T-S0_t48zLQ6WCpacQMJjQcVfk2vmcPiZPo8ZC3byLHbKDSh331LAVPmD4ZuKwwA7qC-P_TlUAwwxVLcYK2I2SK-k1Jk8fqTSHCWq8xqSeC5FPSaXtfjEpFJ4WPdAo7LRx9DdQ_VgtY9_hutr2NXuOsAT_r5PP3HwVyrm5aJGtofXakCLuJlhs6hc-4djpP4nPit_T7ks5-CCpJVhWSA%3D%3D "chip in a few bucks")_** to help, you can make a REAL difference.

| Hello Massachusetts Republicans.
We wanted to share a message we were asked to distribute from the RNC. Please see below:
When Donald J. Trump raises his right hand to be sworn in as the President of the United States, he wants to see that all his patriotic supporters from Massachusetts have his back. That's why the Trump Vance Inaugural Committee formally invites you to represent Massachusetts in our Nation's Capital to witness President Trump taking the OATH OF OFFICE!
If you thought last year's nominating convention was a blowout celebration, you haven't seen anything yet.
The crowd will be massive, the atmosphere will be electric, and the Inaugural Address of the 47th President will go down in history!
If you're interested in reserving standing room tickets for the inauguration, click the link below!
---

Friend,

Now, we're ramping up to do it all again in 2026.

Which is where you come in- **[please complete our NEW 2025 Data Audit to provide us with the information we need to keep winning.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jGRJHL-1oJhzdILdQ9bPZA~~/AARclAA~~~ "please complete our NEW 2025 Data Audit to provide us with the information we need to keep winning.")**

|
---
| | | Over 100,000 people around our country are on a waitlist for a kidney transplant, with wait times reaching up to seven years in some parts of the United States.
Right here in Indiana, over 1,000 Hoosiers are waiting for critical, life-saving, organ transplants. I am honored to carry _[SB 111](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce329f1f43a8168f28d875e9ed069c7d7baaab9f1f56c434d9712f60a18382e5fe7275f4fff311d14a95bd82dd09fddd554)_ , long championed by Senator Jean Breaux, which would guarantee insurance coverage for those who choose to donate.
Coverage for living organ donors would incentivize life-saving organ donations by ensuring that those who donate are able to receive insurance coverage after their donation.
Donating an organ is one of the most selfless things a person can do, and it is unconscionable that someone would be met with denial of insurance coverage or higher premiums after a donation.
This bill has already been referred to our **Committee on Insurance and Financial Institutions **and will be heard on **Wednesday, Jan. 15, 2025 at 9:30 AM**. You can view the committee stream, and get additional information about the committee, [here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce3e6d4be73afeb483a9441048c3c80e830805427d8764fc6a68d9644c6f0fc48e9c586e051355966722159d3bc72ce341a "here").
---
#
* * *
---
# Indiana Senate Democrats Unveil 2025 Priorities
---
|
---
I was honored to join my colleagues in announcing our Caucus priorities for the 124th General Assembly.
Our caucus outlined a plan to empower the futures, families and freedom of all Hoosiers.
To do this, we are introducing legislation focused on the issues that you have said matter most: health, housing and education. You can read more about our priority bills [here.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce3da1b3f7a7687a65eb27c13f2624cae1a2f5a21050c54c29011a93b0d64c203095fbab94a44b11b28d1b7bc671be19dd2)
---
#
* * *
---
# About HB 1136...
Many members of our community have reached out about [HB 1136](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce310182f63064c924aea77b1ff399ed2cece4d4873fb9bfee349f4474f8556fdc221e9bfc28c4efb970d07e541d528fc10 "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2025/bills/house/1136/details") to express their concern.
If [HB 1136](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce310182f63064c924aea77b1ff399ed2cece4d4873fb9bfee349f4474f8556fdc221e9bfc28c4efb970d07e541d528fc10 "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2025/bills/house/1136/details") is new to you, it would dissolve traditional public school districts and elected school boards in five communities across our state, including Indianapolis Public Schools. Then, it would require all remaining schools, including 50 schools in IPS, to become charter schools. You can read more about it [here.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce366033dc92df9e5160b7ed1189ac6123e7cdfc2ee8c8e1d5746873cb50ecdeb9b702ee740bbce1f7957a59f6d8cb5f391 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.wfyi.org/news/articles/indiana-house-bill-1136-disband-ips-gary-union-cannelton-tri-township-schools__;!!FlTQaCg!midrGKjDOKTT_7-o1pDjUZzphWxsWZ0VUww8PDS3qrdbfCothsoaK7znZfgVJdHxGGe98gBWhtT8G7aRofOUzTMrwJY$")
Our goal is to never let [HB 1136](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce310182f63064c924aea77b1ff399ed2cece4d4873fb9bfee349f4474f8556fdc221e9bfc28c4efb970d07e541d528fc10 "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2025/bills/house/1136/details") make its way to the Senate. But we will need the help of our communities to send a clear message of support for our public school districts.

* Call the authors of the bill, the chairman of the House Education Committee and House Leadership to let them know how this bill will personally impact you and your family.
* Stay informed! You can find information on this bill on the [Indiana General Assembly](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce310182f63064c924aea77b1ff399ed2cece4d4873fb9bfee349f4474f8556fdc221e9bfc28c4efb970d07e541d528fc10 "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2025/bills/house/1136/details") website including when the bill will be heard _ if_ it gets a hearing, amendments as well as information like authors and co-authors.
* Follow my social media for information, updates on the bill and further calls to action.

As someone whose children have attended IPS for over a decade, I am in this with you. I will be working tirelessly to ensure that our public school systems are supported.
---
#
* * *
---
| | | |
---
|
# Take my Pre-Session Survey
I want to continue to hear from you!

Though session has started, there is still time to submit your response to my pre-session survey. This information helps me best represent District 46 in the Statehouse!

Thank you for sharing your thoughts and using your voice to help create change.
---
| | [Take My Survey](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce383289a4a06d93fcd258704b83560ba426e8905f156a816530de10ca13940a9b08e673325121cbc40251bc2dff1df7546)

# _In the News_
[Bills to watch as the 2025 Indiana General Assembly session kicks off Wednesday](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce393dc49b8560a5d0496ead8e51a9a3807c497ddfab8038775f45ea6ddabb9bb555e30abcf5472957efacc2a5e5a08aafb) [Legislation would dissolve IPS, four other school districts. Then charters take over](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce316d1a12a8202b2bab1fb2af07e418a87a9dc913a3d0064e33bacae7a4d2205f2724e4b608b79e11f6b5e53565c986ee1) [Indiana bill would ban social media accounts for Hoosiers under age 16 without parental consent](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ed5d32eebd5d8ce344051477201d891daab3f2a56735aa4e1f6dda8068efa6b10f5827e1de4e5312e768574c7d211a0db7e862fa66449126)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Petition: Rename J6 ‘Patriots Day’
body:
Let’s send a message to the establishment

| | | | |
---
Friend – As I write this, hundreds of patriotic Americans are sitting in jail cells in the Washington, DC gulag... Enduring inhumane and un-Godly conditions as political prisoners of a corrupt and weaponized DOJ.
They are not criminals; **they are political prisoners.**
They are being held because they dared to exercise their constitutional right to question an election: a sacred tradition as old as the Boston Tea Party itself.
They were targeted by institutions so corrupt and politicized, they make the USSR’s Secret Police look like a department store’s security guards.
These Americans deserve our appreciation... _**[and they deserve our recognition](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NUW/?__vbtrk=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_**.**
**__[That’s why I’m asking YOU, right now, to sign my petition to declare January 6th as American Patriots’ Day](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NUW/?__vbtrk=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__ _._**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NUW/?__vbtrk=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Let me be clear: this is not just about them. **This is about all of us.**
This is about whether we still live in a nation where freedom of speech, freedom of assembly, and freedom to stand up against injustice are protected rights—or if we have become a country where dissent is punished and patriots are silenced.
We don’t honor these patriots because of what the media says about that day;_****_**we honor them because of what it represents:**_**the courage to take a stand, the love of country that drives ordinary Americans to extraordinary action, and the resilience of a movement that refuses to be silenced.**_
[SIGN THE PETITION – DECLARE JANUARY 6th ‘AMERICAN PATRIOTS DAY’ ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NUW/?__vbtrk=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Patriots’ Day will remind us of the values that make America great: love of country, belief in freedom, and the unshakable conviction that when the people rise, they cannot be silenced.
_Yours,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NUW/?__vbtrk=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NUW/?__vbtrk=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5NDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Drug-addicted Rats, H-E-B No. 1, and the World's Best Cleaner
body:
Drug-addicted rats have taken up residence in the Houston Police Department's evidence warehouse, which holds over 1.2 million pieces of evidence, including marijuana confiscated in the 1980s and '90s.

## Rats Overrun Houston Police Evidence Room
[Drug-addicted rats](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOgzAQBNCvMR1odw02FC6uocu1VyLHXoIlByPjQPL3p6S65uqnGY3m5zJdbIhhvX3bO5vynNNEQF0NWKOcvA3xNbWVN1fwA1ZsUEulle61rhbTWdUDSadbcqB6PXQOUUkatCZoAatg3mWAKBGpR93MvpMD-JmvziuJXrTAPpSUm7Jw4afd5_hKB-fGpXsVzVLKtgv5JWgUNJ7n2bglp_WtgsaVz13QuKTHXtJaf_KCRptLcJH_iM-PW51t2Ws-gufVcU0ApGWnmm3Zqmz8doYYw660aOF2tyF-FpR_LzkM_QYAAP__Oxhi6A) have taken up residence in the Houston Police Department's evidence warehouse, which holds over 1.2 million pieces of evidence, including marijuana confiscated in the 1980s and '90s. Officials have known about the issue for years, but eradication efforts have failed. [Concerns about the integrity of evidence](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn-N2Rz5DMFm8NCFLV07IoOPcJLBrn1Jw7-v0r3zp-_p6X3dppunSMf90-_o-LWmSSt9lQoktFPwFM-pa4KbVRigQQem7U1vrDHN5jqrw2zQDMtsdQid19bOBqGb10Uh9A25N0wBtADagrms4doOKqw4L6FvIYhOYSBO5cIbMr58XeOZnlguS9qb6DbmXEX7IfQo9OjnBdr3IvSYU2Whx-JZ0rFiZc-UDrmlR-V0yJwiLSgDZl94x4NlLilj4VOWlHZZPFWs8vuB9f2rcvEVJR2M90J8Cj3C1Vg7KBB6bIoL-YdipNob0an77in-GfK_yZ5O_wYAAP__G-BxNA) from more recent cases have motivated Mayor Whitmire and newly elected Harris County District Attorney Sean Teare to tackle the problem. "_We've got 400,000 pounds of marijuana in storage that the rats are the only ones enjoying_ ," [Whitmire said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQRp_GdEbjH2woXNyGLrfdEhnPOFhrMAInJG-_yvZbf_qOjs7Xbbr5lNN2_-9XcvUVyyRBdhwEF2pCn_J70g26GXAQDTlhlbHG9tY2iwuDIdXN0fRgQQ5BG62CIoMGotYwNMl9YCCEEkL2wrYROzUARpoDGiWQaSBMtRxtXajSy58xv8uTjjaUtcluqXU_mfrH5MjkeF1X-72Ux2dkcvRHTSETk-NG18nkmEvwmclxKY-zlo3vJadAfD_KTkd986OUlT-2jQgJeaq0fl6y73jEOaCCnmMfDde-E7wPVnKwWnoUEWCG5nC4XynndBrLNNxXn_KvZ_0z3NPJnwAAAP__oXVuwg). Teare said his office has updated rules to allow police to destroy evidence acquired before 2015, and he's helping the department determine what evidence must be retained. Houston Police Chief Noe Diaz highlighted environmental and procedural challenges associated with evidence disposal. "_Everything has a cost. Where do we take it? We can't just go set it out and burn it_ ," Diaz said.
## Judge Rules American Airlines Broke Law
A federal judge in Texas has ruled that Fort Worth-based American Airlines [violated federal law](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2ypCAUhJ8GMywOqGhAsInZbLqhhXBw2MWf4uA48_Zb3uBmN-3u6vrq-_OYHjamuC2_7YqmvMM-SSFbLoCDmryN6TM1lTez8ANUaECrTne617p6GtUAame7gLNGFKIHpXtwczs4PYimraK5zwSAApA96Dr4Vg3CB5yd7xR41gj0sey5Lk8s-LYU0md_Ya7dvlbJPEs5iKlfTI5Mjtd11RnPgpnunslxPiluSMTkaDHvdFiH3GPAjfDOVszR2Y3bmNM95GF3J3GkhTcC_vEj2Y1H4jElXGziJ_G_p1-Q5zMh8W8VgsmxysYfV0wpUqdZI5bVxvTFWX4U9zLyfwAAAP__1t5xIA) by allowing retirement plan investments to prioritize environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors over financial interests. U.S. District Judge Reed O'Connor in Fort Worth found that BlackRock, American's asset manager and a major shareholder of the company's stock, [breached its fiduciary duty](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOpCAURp8Gu2sAFf4pKGYKu9l2S4Nwde4GcAKo49tvZvstv3zJycn5_ZyelgKl9ZeNaOpn2SbJ5QBcgOgmbylcU994M3N_Ew0aoTullf7RunkZPqPrhVaKd071jg9KDL2z3PczanVzDZkvjAvRCSF_hG4XP3Q37hecnVed8Kzn6Kluua0vrPixZQnXdmBu3RabYF61vgvr7kyOTI7nebaxpO_H5IgJ9sLkGLeEF5NjwvM7_-x-Rch7wAI2YiZnE1jKgRIWOGgLtqKHjJUyRkwV3sEm8HslLDBfgMlte7YrpRWwrEDpwFIprUyONsPjIfJyj7bJxr9PCoGK0qzna7QU_mnX_3Y8jPwbAAD__0dEePk) to 401(k) participants. O'Connor, an appointee of former President George W. Bush, said he has not yet determined whether American must pay damages to plan participants. _"The evidence made clear that [American 's] incestuous relationship with BlackRock and its own corporate goals disloyally influenced administration of the Plan,"_ [said O'Connor](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFu8yAUBeCnwRsR92IbZ2D4F7b8a0cLDDi3xWAZkiZvX7l713OkT0fn4zbfLCXK63-7Bd1escwocOACOMjZW0rvue-8dsJfoQsalBzVqCalurtWFmByXsXrhMMIg1vcZDGqGAcnXRg70icmACQATqAu0Q_yKnwMbvGjBM96ETy1clzaPbTwsjWmd3mG47KUrUv63tpemfzH0DA0-b2X2s6KoTllhkYAQwOCoXGPSjnUytDYLRy02MwtHekMeSzLo_KSeagrp8x7AV98TzZzqpxSCqtN_PPh18DQdIf2-zelRHVUrBfrZin9Lmp_XvTU-BMAAP__WUNoXg). BlackRock publicly disputed the lawsuit's allegations, while American Airlines stated it is reviewing the decision. The lawsuit was brought in 2023 by American Airlines pilot Bryan Spence on behalf of over 100,000 plan participants. O'Connor previously rejected arguments from American's lawyers that the case should be dismissed because Spence could not definitively prove that BlackRock's strategies hindered the performance of plan investments.
## Texans Dominate Chargers
The Houston Texans [quieted their naysayers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDuO7CAURFeDM1r82uCA4CXO-qUTWtiAQcJcy9z-rn7kkSacuKqOSufrNt1cLrmu_90WLL4iTIKJK2Wccjl5l8t7Up23M_MD74LlWva610brLlnB2OyVUFKxmQ1OGiOdWYaea22MUKrL9oQxziXnwnB9if4qB-ZjmBffS-6JYsFnhOOCKWB4uRbLGx7huCywdcUmxL0R-Y-IkYjRIXzaDge2MyZirLEQMSa4N4RKz31ttIZnI2KMcGzhoDUWmoLzdAG3JOp2KLDmT2i_dQ_3GXNdKaZwMrvD-v2ZS8mt10SxdXO5_NzBP_08rPgOAAD__4-Faes) with a dominant performance against the Los Angeles Chargers in their Wild Card matchup on Saturday. They intercepted Chargers quarterback Justin Herbert a career-high four times. The 10-7 Texans were three-point underdogs ahead of the contest, and former New York Jets head coach Rex Ryan dismissed it as essentially a bye week for the 11-6 Chargers. The injury-plagued Texans [left no doubt they belong](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL0O2yAURp_G3rD4cSAeGLp4S9eOFuZezK0wRECT-O2rdO_-fUdH59djezhKlI-f7kTbP6Fskssb44IJtYGjdG3zCHbnsIgRrTBKG23uxozRCh-8FMEvXMkFBexz0NzcF9TeL-BxJPuFcSGUEPIuzBTgphYOAXcPWgkYZo5AvdSpR-z4cS2kq7ywTr6cY7Kx92cb1I9BroNc27PU3qbLxVK-g0GuiV44yPV7zY2FUj2y339ap8wi1h1rZ5R7YZmO2E9XkYG7GJSTsuvIfHT1wNoYZfamBMy7CuxNmUmuuNBi0VPsZxqrheebUqKmzTDz43SU_jn2_0Z7Wfk3AAD__1lPcis) in the postseason and should not be overlooked by opponents. Texans wide receiver Nico Collins [set a franchise record](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGy4yAMRb8Gd2SQnJikoNiG7m27ZQYjETOPgAfYOP77HWe2fa10dDT3_vm6f7mYYn78dk82_R3KHRVepAIJ451cTPv9PJCZFd1gYAN6nPSkr1oPi3EK1e2sYNZXBRfvp2lGN6ICuhIEmoZoDpkCGAHwCvoU6DLeFAWePU0jkDgrpthLPfWFO79dC2kvL64nX55DMkvvaxPjL4FWoN227eRT9N-4lL-tl3xQAm1bS-1NoD2-CbQKBFpAgfZQ5ia3SCwre44vrjJHX6QvKcXcZOPeZKgu-yU2lmtyewnhPxzzQ-6uknt8zkslubrWjjGxy1RZLmX9PjxOzok_K4F2qIbWLaYU26TFWT2eLqZPpP5jxy-D_wIAAP__BHqB1A) for receiving yards in a playoff game, catching 7 passes for 122 yards and a score. On this day in 1974, Dallas-Fort Worth Regional Airport officially opened. The celebratory occasion was marked by the landing of the Concorde supersonic passenger jet, the first such landing in the U.S. Now known as , it is the third busiest airport in the world, with 81.8 million passengers in 2023. If the new year has you motivated to do some cleaning, you're not the only one. It's gotten so bad for the Houston Police Department that its evidence room has been overrun by drug-addicted rats. Abilene 🌤️ 48/24° | Amarillo 🌥️ 40/19° | Austin ☁️ 54/36° | Brownsville ☁️ 63/49° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 60/43° | DFW ☁️ 48/29° | El Paso 🌤️ 54/32° | Houston ☁️ 55/43° | Laredo 🌤️ 62/40° | Lubbock 🌤️ 45/22° | Midland ⛅ 47/27° | San Antonio ☁️ 57/39° | Tyler 🌥️ 50/33° | Waco 🌥️ 50/32° | Rats Overrun Houston Police Evidence Room have taken up residence in the Houston Police Department's evidence warehouse, which holds over 1.2 million pieces of evidence, including marijuana confiscated in the 1980s and '90s. Officials have known about the issue for years, but eradication efforts have failed. from more recent cases have motivated Mayor Whitmire and newly elected Harris County District Attorney Sean Teare to tackle the problem. "We've got 400,000 pounds of marijuana in storage that the rats are the only ones enjoying ," . Teare said his office has updated rules to allow police to destroy evidence acquired before 2015, and he's helping the department determine what evidence must be retained. Houston Police Chief Noe Diaz highlighted environmental and procedural challenges associated with evidence disposal. "Everything has a cost. Where do we take it? We can't just go set it out and burn it ," Diaz said. Judge Rules American Airlines Broke Law A federal judge in Texas has ruled that Fort Worth-based American Airlines by allowing retirement plan investments to prioritize environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors over financial interests. U.S. District Judge Reed O'Connor in Fort Worth found that BlackRock, American's asset manager and a major shareholder of the company's stock, to 401(k) participants. O'Connor, an appointee of former President George W. Bush, said he has not yet determined whether American must pay damages to plan participants. "The evidence made clear that [American 's] incestuous relationship with BlackRock and its own corporate goals disloyally influenced administration of the Plan," . BlackRock publicly disputed the lawsuit's allegations, while American Airlines stated it is reviewing the decision. The lawsuit was brought in 2023 by American Airlines pilot Bryan Spence on behalf of over 100,000 plan participants. O'Connor previously rejected arguments from American's lawyers that the case should be dismissed because Spence could not definitively prove that BlackRock's strategies hindered the performance of plan investments. Texans Dominate Chargers The Houston Texans with a dominant performance against the Los Angeles Chargers in their Wild Card matchup on Saturday. They intercepted Chargers quarterback Justin Herbert a career-high four times. The 10-7 Texans were three-point underdogs ahead of the contest, and former New York Jets head coach Rex Ryan dismissed it as essentially a bye week for the 11-6 Chargers. The injury-plagued Texans in the postseason and should not be overlooked by opponents. Texans wide receiver Nico Collins for receiving yards in a playoff game, catching 7 passes for 122 yards and a score. In postgame remarks, Chargers head coach Jim Harbaugh described Houston's edge pass rushers as the "best we've seen." After the game, Texans running back Joe Mixon went live on Instagram while smoking a cigar. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1942, Henry Ford patented a "[Soybean car](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL2O2zAQhJ9G6tbgn0W7YJFG3aVNKeyRS3EPNClQvDvw7QM7aZNy8H0YYObX2_aGnLnsP_FBrse6KaGuICRIvQXkPDYzBxeJFOmZnLR6sctNLGZOTlpv41ULf4siCn-_X4UlE_Bm35cQFjmze7YJKbWU2ih9uVuvTECtroas1HEyggL32i4flUtPFPOoX9Quvj7m7FLvxznpH5NaJ7Ue2Kn0UXd-4kmtPfEJAQdwgT8QEp-9tvFfCLXAB5ZPbAOkBnk3ChKVNiDWFv7KFADhrOOdsIDHBghHxrOzf6XvxD4Bn6AFZN5TpwY9YQGERvtnxvbUJrXOzYXjm3Pmc7GTEfsDOb_m9X_d_eXU7wAAAP__0vOE9Q)," a plastic vehicle 30% lighter than traditional cars, but it never entered production due to World War II. The California wildfires still dominate the news. More than anything we've seen, [this video in our Et Cetera section](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQxvGnsbeg852xw-ChC1u6dkQGnxO3BqdggdKnr-je7ZM-6Sf9P27Dzaeclvu7n9nVWAYEbC-gLoqG4FN-DVoGF5mRSbJTlow1VzBaPhz5Frw13Nku0IjRxNFy7CaE0IFhLZM7NVCKlCKN1HR2Qh08YavZKopCA4dUy9p8lrTUB8f8KjuvzVRmmd2j1ucm6E1gL7A_jqMZx-n8BPYLH5vAfk-ByzkmC98_V8AvbotcXXgeKee0GSs03Gef8p9Z_2vcHf4GAAD__14KUgU), comparing the same Palisades neighborhood before and after the fire, brings home how enormous the destruction has been. Our sponsors help keep the lights on, be sure to check out today’s with [Timeline](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD_vmzAQQD-N2YLw2UAYPPwkypZ0iVRlQi4-wlX-g-AI4ttXtOnY9d3TO939uPU3S57i624DGh5TDwWUl0JepOqdJX_0OnNmRARUGRpZq6qurkWls8mUV6llWVTleAU7QAk_tW5Ka1Uz2KYZXEbmrBVSKimVBpU39QDaWQWlxlqqUegCHXFa8l-JIk84-iO9ccmHFDJvJuZ5FepLQCeg2_c9ZwroKeIpCOj8LKCLx3JceExCdRuHfk3bMqBQ7WPC7m9OQHVOAjraglDtt2DJf-Bgw2zpFYVq78_780MZl1N8fO_-aSkyRj6tjRdiSlFAZdcVuXfIZ0-1X9li3LyT97RWtdDF61z05xj-33PfBn4HAAD__yZtfNA).

## Special Counsel Jack Smith Resigns
Special counsel [Jack Smith resigned](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3O4yAQRZ_G7ohgBmynoNgmXbbd0hrDOJ4s_hEQR3n7Vbb_yqsrHR2dP_fxTpJke_ymlX2d9xE0OKWNMjhGkvQZbRv9zAyMLXvTY9d3g-5su3gAhommwV3dTKxdH-PUQaRBs3EDYSv-S9PGoDFoAS_XPoCNhOAs9wbnxmqOUvd8ee6y1YXn9NlPzpewr23yS61HafBXA7cGbnRs_C7f6ztylZC4gVvNr_VQ5eAglFTYX1vhpJ4U_qqySl2UbCeXKg-qcrLKfOy5Kju5gKjDxGiCxWA1TdfYGWSnhyFwm3083pKSlK5vrH6sJOm_Vv0p0-nhXwAAAP__RnlqNw) from the Justice Department on Friday after submitting a final report on President-elect Donald Trump to Attorney Gen. Merrick Garland. The two-volume report examines Smith's [allegations that Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O4yAUxfGnwR0WXPAHBcVKK3fZZjWa0iJwbd8MNhaQRHn7Uaaf-icdHf0_L_PFUaRj_ed2tHVJMwjouJBcqjk4iq9ZN8EuiICqQSsH1Q_9KHrdbHYQXhjwDo0J_XINsjcjalikGYM347Uh-14TUioplQbVmsGDDk5Bp3GQamFaYKCacntLdNQNl_hKD8ytT3sT7VbrWZj6w2BiMLmrP_BZ2jW9mcH08Z_BdHP-i5ed6sYzFloPDLyc6MlF7tP9KBj57V4qeeQBT5frjkd9U64MplJTfjE1UWDqr5RDN3adGptsw_mkGKn0A9Ni3R3Fn1P1t0gPC98BAAD__zvbaXo) sought to undermine the 2020 election results and held back classified documents after he left the White House, despite neither case ever going to trial. The Trump camp is seeking to [block the Justice Department](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGvpCAUBeBfg901cmFkLCi2sXvbbmkQLso8BAPMM_PvN26_zWlO8uXk_PlavkyIIW2_zUG6-bzggA8YOHCxOBPiZ5Gd054ISXSkuRKjGp_DKLtdK6lofTq_-gc-RxR2Uugm76ScFNK4dkHf2sC54FxIFP2kLEpnBD4kKS48kwO50HLpXzmktpOPn_xDpbf56KLeWzsrE78Yzgzn67p6m1Z7lwznm2Y4D5zhzO-oJ9lgItj8TpUivIz9hnqEtkOhGrZUwZd8gMsvMBVaeR9nBR-2vUHLsMZsv8GHZCIUOnNpYHNqIb2p9ns7Yle0O68QY6ijYnLYDhPiv6Xtf8_9aPwbAAD__48_cU0) from making the report public in the final days of Joe Biden’s presidency.
## Trump's Nominees Set for Hearings This Week
Senate confirmation hearings kick off this week for many of President-elect Donald Trump’s Cabinet picks. You can see the [full hearing schedule here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp_G3oiAi8EeGLpkS9eOFj-X-Lb4R0AS5e0rd-_46ZOOjs7Xbb45yrTdP92KtqV9llwOjAsmYI6O8ntWfbQJUSL0aIUBbfTIteoXqwcvxKS8HyfUMCYAj2EMPgk9SRhiT_akcSFACFASLpMJUkUHclBoBKROcYzU9nL53mlrC6b83p9YLmFf-2yX1o7awUcnr528umPDVz2vc5RGIWMnr6081oMF52nDxg4KP5VV3FxDtqArtN0rq2HB-MjIFEZj1BATR4dq8i5yE7mMxgs98sH3xcbjRTlT1aZT_L46yn827b86Tyt_AwAA___8amZV). Defense Secretary nominee Pete Hegseth will be one of the first, with his hearing set for tomorrow morning. Hegseth will face scrutiny over allegations about his personal life but [continues to have Trump's support](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtCAUhZ8GOw1cGNCC4m_o5m-3NCjXkQ2KkTtjfPsN22_3Fd85OTlfz_HpY4r767_f0NKSR-DwaLlohRyDj-keVRPsgggoG7TCSG10z7VqVjtNYjEqwKMfBhEEn8Mwea3QiKX3Ruom2trGhZBCSAWyG8wMKngJj2rJhSmOIVI-u-8cd1pxSXf-4NnNeWuSXYmOwuQ_Bo6Bu66rexdPOfi7CgxcoXzeDNyOV2HgjpwixbkiJpwp5r0ycFAMnAAGjuvqIWG74qsgrS2d7-1oQ35PVNo570s8N1-jDJzRPShhgHPDwDWnDccVU4pFG6b4a_Mx_U6lv677WPgJAAD__5IQbmc). Senate Republicans are cautioning the nominees not to [take the bait](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAUhZ8GNiK4F_9kYOjiLV07Whiu41thsGySKG9fuZ27nqNzPun7uo03z4nz_dOv5OpcRtDQKG2UwTF6Tu_RyuhmIiCU5EyHbdf2urVycaGJutHTHPDq42S9No0lRB_nnkKwUbI737QxaAxawMu1C2CjR2gsdQZnYTVFrmW_fBfOdaE5vcuT9ksoq0xuqXU7BH4IGAQMdaGFUzo7AcNSVsr0OgQMB2VfScDQ6F5D26u_QO20PabEwedD1f2xbir4iTNVlcvKmegcy93F7cUp8dF2wur76vmXIet_Pp4OfgIAAP__EltjHw) when questioned by Democrats, suggesting that composure will ensure Republican votes, which are all that's needed for confirmation.
## Judge Blocks $750 Million Bitcoin Dig
A British judge last week ended one man’s 12-year legal battle to recover [a hard drive he claims holds 8,000 bitcoins](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OozAURp8GOiP_4k3hYhu6bLslMvga38jYkbmByduPMv20nz4dHZ3_9_nuMWPZ_vkdHMU6Sy4N44IJNQeP-T3rPrgIIEH14IRVox3_8FH3yXllxWqVjdbcVgPaQFxg1PpmFzkaI3t0HxoXQgmhtFTDza5SB6-k0WCFip3mEJBqGx4VCyWI-V1PaMNa9z67RPQ8OvW3k1Mnp-u6hli_lteBBY7j8-nkRLCmUnPd3p2cHq-wAUs-08E8EexPYg2oIZzAFqS1YmHJt8BCwxPYVRslZg1nO-aMtbDsS4iYc99ceF6f8Rhtp_m2e8w_WvRbptPJ7wAAAP__mClsoA), valued at nearly $750 million, buried in a Newport, Wales landfill. James Howells, 39, offered to fund the excavation and share 25% of the proceeds with Newport City Council; however, the court ruled against him, citing environmental risks and the council's ownership of landfill contents. Howells says his ex-girlfriend [mistakenly discarded the hard drive in 2013](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOnDAQhJ_GdHuy1z5zKVykofvTpkQ-7wJ7MjYB30W8fUT6vxyNNN_o-_01fkXJUuZfceXQpjqixjtoA8aOFCWfo-soTMzItuNgeut7_9DedUvoEa03j4em5D0-jUtGa3TkDSFZmjoJ15o2xhpjHdrbjz6ho2jx7rg3dlJOM0mr--1VpbSFp3zWD--3VNcuh6W17VD2p8JB4RD3o3FaiqR49QqHK8JWs6RT4XCxFA7aKBxeb5oZuNABaywHGAMnxx3-vPlo0CqQzPDeIMdCk-QMsRDsnC449P6-ghR4SktVisKh2wNtfyVnOXyvnJ7XKPn_yfadtE_AfwEAAP__R_BtBA). It's now buried under 10,000 to 15,000 tons of waste, part of a landfill containing 350,000 tons overall. Howells expressed frustration, saying the decision denied him a chance to present his case and left him with "nothing.”

| Volvo's CEO Martin Lundstedt promises a future of cutting-edge innovation and sustainability for trucks. But in the U.S., Volvo has been actively stalling the shift to the newest, cleanest technologies—leaving the country behind other economies.

A real agent of change drives change everywhere, for everyone. **Tell Martin to stop delaying the transition to electric trucks in America.** [TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3240179/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi—

The Consumer Electronics Show—well regarded as the most powerful tech event in the world—just took place last week in Las Vegas.

And it gave Volvo Group's CEO Martin Lundstedt quite the stage to wow the audience with a vision of clean, cutting-edge technology for the trucks of the future: No fossil fuels, no emissions—just pure innovation.

What Martin **_did not say_** is that Volvo Group North America, along with other truck manufacturers, **has been delaying the adoption of the technologies they are promising in the U.S.**

Here's what they have been doing: As recently as 2024, Volvo lobbied to weaken emissions standards that could shift the market to make electric trucks more accessible, scared dealers out of supporting these same rules, and poured money into new plants for diesel trucks.

Americans shouldn’t be forced to deal with diesel fumes, polluted roads, and avoidable health crises when the technology for truly clean trucks is already here and even Volvo is accelerating electric truck deployment overseas. We shouldn't be left behind with bad air. **That's why we're joining our friends at Idle Giants to flood Martin with letters on LinkedIn demanding he back his words with action and accelerate a just transition to electric trucks ASAP.** |
[](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3240180/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Will you take two minutes to send one? [**Our friends at Idle Giants made it super easy with pre-written text you can share here.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3240181/87SdQ4wZ)

Volvo plays a pivotal role in global transport and infrastructure, and its decisions impact businesses and communities worldwide. While progress is being made, Volvo’s actions in the U.S. are actively delaying the transition to clean technologies—**with real consequences for the health, livelihoods, and future of the very communities Martin Lundstedt claims to serve.**

Words at a flashy tech show are not enough.

If fossil-free transportation and zero emissions are truly global goals, Volvo must lead both in words and actions—everywhere it operates.

[**Please, take action on LinkedIn to demand Volvo Group be the leader it claims to be by accelerating and driving a truly sustainable future, everywhere.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3240182/87SdQ4wZ)

In solidarity, |
---
| | |
---
### Craig Segall

name: Lara Trump
subject: If you want truth to win, please open this email.
body:
You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind

| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8pe956bc0t8moranq0sv7h6qlglcdo1n1it5vkg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge6pr4cth2bs)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1a8bcpep8r22cll8nodanooe7hpqjlaeabdio38_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge6pr4cth2bs)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zino6tdmjf3an15ihgq018iaedn69j23jft6smhg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge6pr4cth2bs)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3f5cqmtu14snb1gcp9geqft6pg3vh18j8bgvj2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge6pr4cth2bs)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvn1d3e4jcdqqm3vnq1k5ume2ansigj6nlt78le8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge6pr4cth2bs)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3e96g4rmhhek1u1m9frhbog5p53c0q6kcbtpc0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge6pr4cth2bs), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zad8ag4lrr0se8f30ppadq4ua47qds9pr7vvqeb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge6pr4cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpj53rg139t6rmt6akktt82mj99j305an4ricac0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge6pr4cth2bs)
---
**Lara Trump** **Wife, Mother, and Author**
---
|
---
| | **P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left.[Please help me fight by giving to Brave Books to protect our children today.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp484dp7pq9qr0u1ekifles2lms8etbho6554si0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge6pr4cth2bs) **Thank you! - Lara
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj8579rgepe7ub19seive78gdlvtq4muo9bffb00_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge6pr4cth2bs)
---

---

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zegba41n6slbqscadi72tbgo5ate56rfroc0oa08_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge6pr4cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Dark Money? Elder Abuse? Investigation is a Must
body:
My research into alleged Indentify Theft and Money Laundering in US Elections

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e0c0641fa625/when-we-vote-we-win-14761634?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | ‘Words Talk, Numbers Scream’
* PBD Podcast

_**If you stare at the numbers, patterns will emerge**_
---
|
---
| **Dark Money In US Elections:**
**Alleged Identify Theft and Elder Abuse in a Grand Money Laundering Scheme?**
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| **A Web of Small Donors, Big Questions: An Investigation into Campaign Finance**
_By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator_
In 2018, while running for the U.S. Senate, I studied my opponent, Chris Murphy, ’s FEC filings. My goal was simple: to understand how he raised such vast sums nationwide. The numbers were staggering, almost unbelievable. As I sifted through the data, patterns emerged that were hard to ignore.
I noticed donors donating four or five times a day, often in small amounts like $1 or $5, with some donating as many as 30 times per month. The source of money was questionable, but a common denominator began to stand out: the donors were often 78 years old or older, and it became clear that many were unsuspecting. These donations were being made in their names but **were NOT from their bank accounts** and without their knowledge or consent, as determined from **first-hand interviews**. In May 2023, I compiled and provided this data to Attorney General William Tong, determined to shine a light on what I believed to be a disturbing case of elder abuse, identity theft, and potentially illegal campaign financing. He has **not responded** since providing his office with these findings and extensive data. That was May, 2023.
As someone who has worked in Silicon Valley for over three decades, I’ve learned how to analyze data, identify patterns, and detect trends. That experience equipped me to create a working theory of what I was looking at: a highly coordinated, automated system funneling small-dollar donations through unwitting individuals. The sheer frequency and scale pointed to something far beyond typical grassroots fundraising—it looked like a deliberate scheme operating in the shadows of our campaign finance system. From whom? Foreign actors, corporations? We don’t know, yet.
In the Spring of 2023, my associate Chris Coyle (Pomfret Chair) and I presented this data and our findings to RNC officials and congressional staffers in Washington, D.C. Despite the evidence and the alarming implications, the response was disappointing. Few seemed willing to investigate what I saw as a potential threat to the integrity of elections and the financial security of countless Americans.
As questions arise about unprecedented fundraising hauls—**like Kamala Harris raising $81 million in a single day through small donations** —I can’t help but revisit what I uncovered. Could these patterns offer a clue? For anyone interested, the tools to investigate are accessible. FEC reports can be downloaded at FEC.gov, and with some effort in Excel, patterns may emerge, just as they did for me.
It’s not just about connecting dots—it’s about safeguarding the integrity of our republic. Our press has largely abandoned the intellectual curiosity required to unravel such complex issues, so we, as citizens, must step in and demand answers. What I uncovered isn’t just a campaign finance anomaly—it’s a warning sign for the health of our democracy.
**Read the article regarding my findings from the Daily Signal Below:**
---
|
---
|

# Where Does the Money Come From? Elderly Democrats Say Donations Made in Their Names Aren’t Genuine
[Elizabeth Troutman Mitchell ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=79bf0f925c&e=8763c56857) | January 08, 2025
****[**Article LINK**](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=30f507c123&e=8763c56857) Democratic fundraising platform [ActBlue](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=3621da9a1f&e=8763c56857) may have raked in millions through fraudulent donations, according to the testimonies of elderly Americans who said federal election records do not reflect their giving.
Eighteen [registered Democrats](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=595ff628c9&e=8763c56857) in Connecticut, all over the age of 70, appear to have donated $1.9 million to Democratic causes, including ActBlue, through hundreds of thousands of small donations from 2016 to 2024, according to a review of Federal Election Commission filings by Dominic Rapini, cybersecurity company CEO and a former Connecticut Republican candidate for office.
Curious about the donation patterns, Rapini tracked down some of the Connecticut residents and asked them if they really did make thousands of small donations, sometimes multiple in a day, [through ActBlue](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=fab4847b25&e=8763c56857).
The Daily Signal depends on the support of readers like you. [Donate now](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=39b4539414&e=8763c56857)Several of the supposed donors told Rapini they did not make any of the reported donations, nor did they know anything about how their names were being used, Rapini told [The Daily Signal](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=d96c43352c&e=8763c56857).
An 88-year-old retired Yale University professor, for example, supposedly made 7,539 donations for a total of $213,163, according to FEC records. After Rapini informed him about the significant donations in his name, he signed an affidavit saying, “I believe this does not reflect my donation frequency or dollars I have donated.” According to Rapini, who has analyzed numbers for three decades in the tech industry, this is a possible case of alleged identity theft and money laundering. A contribution made by one person in the name of another is illegal.“When I examine the donation patterns tied to these alleged ‘smurfs,’ the irregularities jump off the page, revealing behavior that defies both human logic and common sense,” he told The Daily Signal. “To safeguard trust in our election process, we must confront these anomalies head-on.”
[Rep. Bryan Steil](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=858009bdf1&e=8763c56857), R-Wis., chairman of the House Administration Committee, told The Daily Signal he’s aware of similar reports from across the country. “In response, last fall, I shared the findings of our investigation with several state attorneys general,” Steil said in an emailed statement. “The committee and I remain fully available to collaborate with any state law enforcement officials who wish to access the information we have gathered on this critical issue.”An elderly acupuncturist and registered Democrat appears to have made 17 donations in 2022 through ActBlue totaling $317. In an email to Rapini, she promised she hasn’t made political contributions since 2016.
“I can promise you I have NOT made donations myself to the [Democratic National Committee] or Democratic local party since 2016 ... ,” she said. “Anything past that are fake and/or manipulated donations.”
A 91-year-old woman appears to have made 2,591 donations totaling $41,000, according to FEC filings. She signed an affidavit with Rapini denying making the reported donations.
Another 75-year-old woman looks to have made 4,270 small donations adding up to $32,323. She too signed an affidavit with Rapini denying making the donations in this frequency or quantity.
**ActBlue is currently under congressional investigation for alleged laundering of foreign money laundering.**
ActBlue came under fire on Oct. 29 because of its donor-verification policies. In a letter that day to ActBlue, Steil said foreign actors from Iran, Russia, Venezuela, and China could use the platform to launder illicit money for use in U.S. political campaigns.
The Democratic fundraising platform admitted in 2023 to Steil that it didn’t require contributors to use a card verification value, or CVV, to donate on its website with a credit card. Those security codes are meant to ensure that the person making a purchase physically possesses the credit card.
ActBlue responded to The Daily Signal’s request for comment about the affidavits by referring The Daily Signal to a post on its [blog](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=b62be7e6ad&e=8763c56857), which says, “Because of how reporting works for intermediaries, contributions made on platforms like ours often show up more than once in public FEC records, because both ActBlue and the receiving campaign or committee must report the contributions.
“FEC rules require ActBlue to itemize every contribution made through its platform, regardless of amount,” the post says.“Additionally, FEC reports often lump multiple donors with the same name together,” the post continues. “This can make it difficult to easily identify which contributions should be associated with each individual donor, especially donors with common names.”
Rapini said whether the suspicious donation patterns come from “sloppy data systems at the FEC” or “nefarious actors laundering money through unsuspecting elderly donors,” an investigation is needed. **“Transparency and accountability are nonnegotiable when it comes to protecting the integrity of our democracy,” he said.**

clean_body: My research into alleged Indentify Theft and Money Laundering in US Elections | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ‘Words Talk, Numbers Scream’ PBD Podcast If you stare at the numbers, patterns will emerge | | Dark Money In US Elections: Alleged Identify Theft and Elder Abuse in a Grand Money Laundering Scheme? | | | | | | | | | | | A Web of Small Donors, Big Questions: An Investigation into Campaign Finance By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator In 2018, while running for the U.S. Senate, I studied my opponent, Chris Murphy, ’s FEC filings. My goal was simple: to understand how he raised such vast sums nationwide. The numbers were staggering, almost unbelievable. As I sifted through the data, patterns emerged that were hard to ignore. I noticed donors donating four or five times a day, often in small amounts like $1 or $5, with some donating as many as 30 times per month. The source of money was questionable, but a common denominator began to stand out: the donors were often 78 years old or older, and it became clear that many were unsuspecting. These donations were being made in their names but were NOT from their bank accounts and without their knowledge or consent, as determined from first-hand interviews. In May 2023, I compiled and provided this data to Attorney General William Tong, determined to shine a light on what I believed to be a disturbing case of elder abuse, identity theft, and potentially illegal campaign financing. He has not responded since providing his office with these findings and extensive data. That was May, 2023. As someone who has worked in Silicon Valley for over three decades, I’ve learned how to analyze data, identify patterns, and detect trends. That experience equipped me to create a working theory of what I was looking at: a highly coordinated, automated system funneling small-dollar donations through unwitting individuals. The sheer frequency and scale pointed to something far beyond typical grassroots fundraising—it looked like a deliberate scheme operating in the shadows of our campaign finance system. From whom? Foreign actors, corporations? We don’t know, yet. In the Spring of 2023, my associate Chris Coyle (Pomfret Chair) and I presented this data and our findings to RNC officials and congressional staffers in Washington, D.C. Despite the evidence and the alarming implications, the response was disappointing. Few seemed willing to investigate what I saw as a potential threat to the integrity of elections and the financial security of countless Americans. As questions arise about unprecedented fundraising hauls—like Kamala Harris raising $81 million in a single day through small donations —I can’t help but revisit what I uncovered. Could these patterns offer a clue? For anyone interested, the tools to investigate are accessible. FEC reports can be downloaded at FEC.gov, and with some effort in Excel, patterns may emerge, just as they did for me. It’s not just about connecting dots—it’s about safeguarding the integrity of our republic. Our press has largely abandoned the intellectual curiosity required to unravel such complex issues, so we, as citizens, must step in and demand answers. What I uncovered isn’t just a campaign finance anomaly—it’s a warning sign for the health of our democracy. Read the article regarding my findings from the Daily Signal Below: | | Where Does the Money Come From? Elderly Democrats Say Donations Made in Their Names Aren’t Genuine | January 08, 2025 Democratic fundraising platform may have raked in millions through fraudulent donations, according to the testimonies of elderly Americans who said federal election records do not reflect their giving. Eighteen in Connecticut, all over the age of 70, appear to have donated $1.9 million to Democratic causes, including ActBlue, through hundreds of thousands of small donations from 2016 to 2024, according to a review of Federal Election Commission filings by Dominic Rapini, cybersecurity company CEO and a former Connecticut Republican candidate for office. Curious about the donation patterns, Rapini tracked down some of the Connecticut residents and asked them if they really did make thousands of small donations, sometimes multiple in a day, . The Daily Signal depends on the support of readers like you. of the supposed donors told Rapini they did not make any of the reported donations, nor did they know anything about how their names were being used, Rapini told . An 88-year-old retired Yale University professor, for example, supposedly made 7,539 donations for a total of $213,163, according to FEC records. After Rapini informed him about the significant donations in his name, he signed an affidavit saying, “I believe this does not reflect my donation frequency or dollars I have donated.” According to Rapini, who has analyzed numbers for three decades in the tech industry, this is a possible case of alleged identity theft and money laundering. A contribution made by one person in the name of another is illegal.“When I examine the donation patterns tied to these alleged ‘smurfs,’ the irregularities jump off the page, revealing behavior that defies both human logic and common sense,” he told The Daily Signal. “To safeguard trust in our election process, we must confront these anomalies head-on.” , R-Wis., chairman of the House Administration Committee, told The Daily Signal he’s aware of similar reports from across the country. “In response, last fall, I shared the findings of our investigation with several state attorneys general,” Steil said in an emailed statement. “The committee and I remain fully available to collaborate with any state law enforcement officials who wish to access the information we have gathered on this critical issue.”An elderly acupuncturist and registered Democrat appears to have made 17 donations in 2022 through ActBlue totaling $317. In an email to Rapini, she promised she hasn’t made political contributions since 2016. “I can promise you I have NOT made donations myself to the [Democratic National Committee] or Democratic local party since 2016 ... ,” she said. “Anything past that are fake and/or manipulated donations.” A 91-year-old woman appears to have made 2,591 donations totaling $41,000, according to FEC filings. She signed an affidavit with Rapini denying making the reported donations. Another 75-year-old woman looks to have made 4,270 small donations adding up to $32,323. She too signed an affidavit with Rapini denying making the donations in this frequency or quantity. ActBlue is currently under congressional investigation for alleged laundering of foreign money laundering. ActBlue came under fire on Oct. 29 because of its donor-verification policies. In a letter that day to ActBlue, Steil said foreign actors from Iran, Russia, Venezuela, and China could use the platform to launder illicit money for use in U.S. political campaigns. The Democratic fundraising platform admitted in 2023 to Steil that it didn’t require contributors to use a card verification value, or CVV, to donate on its website with a credit card. Those security codes are meant to ensure that the person making a purchase physically possesses the credit card. ActBlue responded to The Daily Signal’s request for comment about the affidavits by referring The Daily Signal to a post on its , which says, “Because of how reporting works for intermediaries, contributions made on platforms like ours often show up more than once in public FEC records, because both ActBlue and the receiving campaign or committee must report the contributions. “FEC rules require ActBlue to itemize every contribution made through its platform, regardless of amount,” the post says.“Additionally, FEC reports often lump multiple donors with the same name together,” the post continues. “This can make it difficult to easily identify which contributions should be associated with each individual donor, especially donors with common names.” Rapini said whether the suspicious donation patterns come from “sloppy data systems at the FEC” or “nefarious actors laundering money through unsuspecting elderly donors,” an investigation is needed. “Transparency and accountability are nonnegotiable when it comes to protecting the integrity of our democracy,” he said. | | Aggregate Data from a sample of 18 Connecticut Donors | | Mark Your Calendar and**Let’s Bring the Winning to Connecticut! | WESTPORT 1/14/25 EVENT:Why The Ukraine War Must End Immediately CDM Founder L Todd Wood will lead a discussion on the underlying reasons for the Ukraine conflict, and why it must end immediately. # **EP92: CALI BURNS: Newsom Goes Up In Flames**
_NOTE: Please consider upgrading your subscription here for $7 month to help me keep this publication up and running. While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political commentary. Your subscription for a nominal fee supports my journalistic efforts, and the expenses associated with my investigations. If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today!_
Over the past week, America's attention has turned to California, where tragedy has engulfed Los Angeles, one of the nation's largest cities. Several fires, likely sparked by downed power lines, and possibly even arson, erupted in the suburbs of Los Angeles. Fanned by powerful Santa Ana winds, low humidity, and bone-dry ground conditions, these fires quickly escalated into raging infernos. Entire communities, such as the Palisades, were consumed by flames on Tuesday night, leaving five dead and over 1,000 structures reduced to ash.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Hk-6oTjPH3ZMSSVRRuVn72fCi_yHkpJiGnHyUVXuxA0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154710665)
Natural disasters are often an unavoidable part of life--there is little anyone can do to prevent a hurricane or a tornado. However, wildfires stand apart as one of the few disasters we can actively mitigate. Through controlled burns and strategic fuel reduction, forestry workers can minimize the threat of wildfires. And, of course, firefighters can combat flames with water and protective measures to save lives and property. Yet, this week, we've seen how California has failed on both fronts.
Reports from the field tell of dry or inoperable fire hydrants, leaving firefighters with limited tools to defend against the advancing flames. Meanwhile, California's forestry management practices have been severely neglected. The state's failure to properly maintain its forests has turned them into tinderboxes, resulting in catastrophic wildfires year after year. President Trump raised this issue back in 2019, noting on social media that Governor Newsom's lack of proactive forest management was setting the stage for disaster.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/933a448f-ea34-48d7-aeeb-f85c4d9c2684?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e35dac13-a50f-49ed-b0e7-8a71c6af3a90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What's happening in California isn't just a natural calamity; it's a case study in governmental failure. Once again, Americans find their lives shattered by the incompetence of their elected leaders--many of whom are Democrats. We saw this just months ago when Hurricane Helene devastated parts of southern Appalachia, only to see those communities abandoned by the federal government. Hard working Americans, most of whom live in extreme poverty in Appalachia, were told they would not be receiving any assistance for FEMA because the money was instead spent on illegal aliens. Now, Democrats in California like Governor Gavin Newsom are making promises of FEMA assistance, but if there is no money for the people victims of Hurricane Helene in North Carolina, how will there be FEMA money for the people displaced by fires in California? California's situation is distinct, an emblem of systemic mismanagement, chronic decline, and policies that prioritize ideology over practicality.
Forty years ago, California was a shining example of the American dream. It was a state of immense promise--a land of breathtaking natural beauty and unparalleled opportunity. California's landscapes ranged from picturesque beaches to sprawling deserts and majestic, snow-capped peaks. Its cities were vibrant hubs of innovation and culture. Los Angeles stood as a global cultural icon with Hollywood, while San Francisco emerged as the tech capital of the world. Economically and socially, California was thriving. At the time, it was a reliably Republican state, voting red in every presidential election until 1992.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Hk-6oTjPH3ZMSSVRRuVn72fCi_yHkpJiGnHyUVXuxA0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=154710665)
But today, the Golden State has lost its luster. What was once a beacon of American prosperity has become a cautionary tale. California is no longer the state people dream of moving to--it's the state they're fleeing from. Homeless encampments, open drug use, and unchecked crime have replaced the clean, thriving neighborhoods of yesteryear. San Francisco's streets, once charming and full of life, are now marred by needles and human waste. Just steps from the Hollywood Walk of Fame, trash and tent cities line the sidewalks.
How did it come to this? How did a state once synonymous with the American dream descend into what many now see as a nightmare? The answer lies in failed leadership. Decades of Democratic policies have fostered mismanagement, opened borders, and a refusal to enforce basic standards of law and order. These policies have systematically eroded California's infrastructure, economy, and sense of community.
The recent fires offer a tragic snapshot of this decline. While Los Angeles burned, Democrat Mayor Karen Bass--an elected leader entrusted with the welfare of millions--wasn't even in the country. Instead, she was thousands of miles away in Ghana, Africa attending the inauguration of the nation's president as part of a U.S. delegation. Why a mayor was representing the United States at a foreign event in Africa remains unclear. What is clear, however, is her inaction. The National Weather Service issued an "Extreme" fire weather watch two days before her departure. Whether she ignored the warnings or simply didn't care, her absence speaks volumes about her priorities.
Governor Newsom, meanwhile, has focused on damage control--not for the fires but for his public image. His failure to invest in effective forestry management and disaster preparedness has made these tragedies all the more devastating. Californians who have lost their homes, their communities, and even loved ones are not blaming climate change--they are blaming Newsom, Bass, and the rest of the state's ineffective Democrat leadership that did nothing as fire hydrants were abandoned for months without water.
California's plight should serve as a wake-up call to the rest of the nation. This is not an isolated incident; it's a harbinger of what's to come if America continues on its current path. Today, it's California's hydrants that run dry. Tomorrow, it could be yours. While it's easy to dismiss California as a "liberal hellscape," the reality is that its decline is a warning to all of us. States like New York, Illinois, and Maryland are already following the same trajectory.
We must recognize these events for what they are: a dire warning. Americans must demand better from their leaders. The stakes could not be higher--not just for California, but for the future of the nation. Stop electing terrible people. Stop accepting less. Demand more from your government. Demand better for yourself, and demand more for the American people.

How did it come to this? How did a state once synonymous with the American dream descend into what many now see as a nightmare? The answer lies in failed leadership. Decades of Democratic policies have fostered mismanagement, opened borders, and a refusal to enforce basic standards of law and order. These policies have systematically eroded California's infrastructure, economy, and sense of community. The recent fires offer a tragic snapshot of this decline. While Los Angeles burned, Democrat Mayor Karen Bass--an elected leader entrusted with the welfare of millions--wasn't even in the country. Instead, she was thousands of miles away in Ghana, Africa attending the inauguration of the nation's president as part of a U.S. delegation. Why a mayor was representing the United States at a foreign event in Africa remains unclear. What is clear, however, is her inaction. The National Weather Service issued an "Extreme" fire weather watch two days before her departure. Whether she ignored the warnings or simply didn't care, her absence speaks volumes about her priorities. Governor Newsom, meanwhile, has focused on damage control--not for the fires but for his public image. His failure to invest in effective forestry management and disaster preparedness has made these tragedies all the more devastating. Californians who have lost their homes, their communities, and even loved ones are not blaming climate change--they are blaming Newsom, Bass, and the rest of the state's ineffective Democrat leadership that did nothing as fire hydrants were abandoned for months without water. California's plight should serve as a wake-up call to the rest of the nation. This is not an isolated incident; it's a harbinger of what's to come if America continues on its current path. Today, it's California's hydrants that run dry. Tomorrow, it could be yours. While it's easy to dismiss California as a "liberal hellscape," the reality is that its decline is a warning to all of us. States like New York, Illinois, and Maryland are already following the same trajectory. We must recognize these events for what they are: a dire warning. Americans must demand better from their leaders. The stakes could not be higher--not just for California, but for the future of the nation. Stop electing terrible people. Stop accepting less. Demand more from your government. Demand better for yourself, and demand more for the American people. LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. name: History Facts
subject: What was in ancient laundry detergent?
body:
Most laundry detergent has ingredients you probably haven’t heard of — carboxymethyl cellulose is a common one, ditto linear alkylbenzene sulfonate — but one thing it doesn’t contain is animal fat. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cfeg6kuwidkgvjt2f8qjuv2a0zhqckg1z9ur2wny1vitzeo58rs7b6ay5qp7yvkhblnbhh4ken7l6kbrs5pjzp3104bdzt7vlbvg0gmosvz4mtjqnye1y1kpoitq1qb93x8a0vegdwv819x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq10ek&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [People once used animal fat to do laundry. ](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq10ek&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq10ek&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq10ek&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| M ost laundry detergent has ingredients you probably haven’t heard of — carboxymethyl cellulose is a common one, ditto linear alkylbenzene sulfonate — but one thing it doesn’t contain is animal fat. That hasn’t always been the case, however, as people have [used fat](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq10ek&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to do laundry since ancient times. Rendered animal fat has long been present in cleaning products, a practice we only moved past fairly recently. The Mesopotamians were the [first](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq10ek&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) known group to produce soap, and did so with plant ashes and animal fat.
---
Other ingredients in proto-detergent solutions included lye and even urine. A set of 14th-century instructions in _A Medieval Home Companion_[explains](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq10ek&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), “If there is any spot of oil or other grease, this is the remedy: Take urine and heat it until it is warm, and soak the spot in it for two days. Then, without twisting it, squeeze out the part of the dress with the spot. If the spot is not gone ... put it in other urine, beat in ox gall, and do as before.” Indeed, laundry was an intensely arduous process in medieval Europe, one that involved literally beating the dirt out of one’s clothes, and it was carried out almost exclusively by women. So next time you find yourself dreading laundry day, take solace in the fact that it’s infinitely easier than it used to be.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq10ek&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq10ek&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The first commercial electric washing machine was called Thor.
The Norse god of thunder isn’t the only notable Thor. That was also the name of the first commercially produced electric washing machine, which the Hurley Machine Company of Chicago introduced in 1908. The brainchild of inventor Alva J. Fisher, the drum-type washer had a galvanized tub and, per the [patent](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq10ek&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), the “perforated cylinder is rotatably mounted within a tub containing the wash water.” The Thor proved successful enough for the company to continue innovating for the next several decades; it even made a hybrid dishwasher-washing machine called the Automagic in the 1940s.
