clean_body: Most laundry detergent has ingredients you probably haven’t heard of — carboxymethyl cellulose is a common one, ditto linear alkylbenzene sulfonate — but one thing it doesn’t contain is animal fat. | M ost laundry detergent has ingredients you probably haven’t heard of — carboxymethyl cellulose is a common one, ditto linear alkylbenzene sulfonate — but one thing it doesn’t contain is animal fat. That hasn’t always been the case, however, as people have to do laundry since ancient times. Rendered animal fat has long been present in cleaning products, a practice we only moved past fairly recently. The Mesopotamians were the known group to produce soap, and did so with plant ashes and animal fat. Other ingredients in proto-detergent solutions included lye and even urine. A set of 14th-century instructions in A Medieval Home Companion, “If there is any spot of oil or other grease, this is the remedy: Take urine and heat it until it is warm, and soak the spot in it for two days. Then, without twisting it, squeeze out the part of the dress with the spot. If the spot is not gone ... put it in other urine, beat in ox gall, and do as before.” Indeed, laundry was an intensely arduous process in medieval Europe, one that involved literally beating the dirt out of one’s clothes, and it was carried out almost exclusively by women. So next time you find yourself dreading laundry day, take solace in the fact that it’s infinitely easier than it used to be. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Year the first mechanical washing machine was invented 1851 | | Gallons of water used by an Energy Star-certified washing machine per average cycle 14 | Gallons of water used by an Energy Star-certified washing machine per average cycle 14 | | Percentage of people irritated by scented laundry products 30.5% | | Laundromats in the United States ~35,000 | Laundromats in the United States ~35,000 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The first commercial electric washing machine was called Thor. The Norse god of thunder isn’t the only notable Thor. That was also the name of the first commercially produced electric washing machine, which the Hurley Machine Company of Chicago introduced in 1908. The brainchild of inventor Alva J. Fisher, the drum-type washer had a galvanized tub and, per the , the “perforated cylinder is rotatably mounted within a tub containing the wash water.” The Thor proved successful enough for the company to continue innovating for the next several decades; it even made a hybrid dishwasher-washing machine called the Automagic in the 1940s. Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | Recommended Reading | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|--- | ---|--- A daily digest of history's most fascinating happenings. | Want to unsubscribe? | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2024 History Facts. name: Lara Trump
subject: If you want truth to win, please open this email.
body:
You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind

| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4bh4vbfde01dt8onb152i25daefp4khi5nh5p9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge1pb2c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5lgjm62d6pbuho63qnnntu59egbmjm5kq9cicig_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge1pb2c1h2bs)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z75jdphrpa8hig6dcf281s49q2n7h6cplfrlgd58_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge1pb2c1h2bs)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbp4tas571po1tjb65kb8tskqpt2j6av340ekv9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge1pb2c1h2bs)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z58rbtra72050onghdsj3gql4rrkkc00uv8v3tfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge1pb2c1h2bs)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zespgmrsnu9qgoesnig4d34ti89ldjd749263k90_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge1pb2c1h2bs), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1lu1tafh5glnuhgqs5fojit9lssl12c0n75om4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge1pb2c1h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5ab6pdq716fo7log3gj6gr7vmj5ss2vpcm0dnjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge1pb2c1h2bs)
---
**Lara Trump** **Wife, Mother, and Author**
---
|
---
| | **P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left.[Please help me fight by giving to Brave Books to protect our children today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr4k4bm5d9cgbcr8mpvhbaa2a6uvmbpe5h0ecn7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctge1pb2c1h2bs) **Thank you! - Lara
---

clean_body: You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind | | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology. | | | | Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. If you've heard of Brave Books , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on Fox News for countering the Left's horrible poison. Brave Books fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian Kirk Cameron (Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great Brave Books with conservative messages such as: The Test of Lionhood by Kevin Sorbo -- Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good. The Night the Snow Monster Attacked by General Michael Flynn -- Shows children what it takes to be a good leader. Happy No Snake Day byRiley Gaines -- Encourages children to stand up for the truth. Because You're My Family by Missy Robertson -- Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love. | | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several Brave Books. But my favorite is Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at Brave Books aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My Brave Book , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled The Never-Give-Up Pup and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In The Never-Give-Up Pup , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. Your gift helps Brave Books create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your, I'll send you a copy of The Never-Give-Up Pup as a special "Thank you" from me. Sharing the lessons of The Never-Give-Up Pup with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children, | | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author | | | Lara Trump Wife, Mother, and Author | | | P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left. Thank you! - Lara | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Demand Confirmation for Pete Hegseth—Act Now
body:
His Senate hearing is Tuesday. Your voice is needed urgently.
| | | |
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a8e0a2ea/1edb9794a8d61dab)
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** Your senators will begin confirming President Trump's cabinet this week, and first up is Pete Hegseth. As a military veteran, he understands the real issues our troops face, and he's not a deep-state loyalist who'll continue "business as usual" in D.C.
They need to hear from you--loud and clear--to confirm Hegseth. Senators [Thom Tillis (R-NC](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a8e0a2ea/1edb9794a8d61dad "https://x.com/SenThomTillis")[)](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a8e0a2ea/1edb9794a8d61daf) and [John Curtis (R-UT)](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a8e0a2ea/1edb9794a8d61db1) especially need pressure to be team players.Here's what you can do right now:
1. **[Use our action page](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a8e0a2ea/1edb9794a8d61db3 "https://www.patriotproject.com/petition/support-hegseth")** to directly contact your senators.
2. **Get on social media** (if you're on it) to apply more pressure--especially on Tillis and Curtis.
Democrats and the left are mobilizing to derail this nomination, so we must remind our senators that the American people elected President Trump to implement his agenda, including his cabinet picks. Share this call to action widely--we cannot let them block these nominees.
Let's make sure Pete Hegseth is confirmed! In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin **__** **** ************

As a military veteran, he understands the real issues our troops face, and he's not a deep-state loyalist who'll continue "business as usual" in D.C. They need to hear from you--loud and clear--to confirm Hegseth. Senators "" and especially need pressure to be team players.Here's what you can do right now: 1. "" to directly contact your senators. 2. Get on social media (if you're on it) to apply more pressure--especially on Tillis and Curtis. Democrats and the left are mobilizing to derail this nomination, so we must remind our senators that the American people elected President Trump to implement his agenda, including his cabinet picks. Share this call to action widely--we cannot let them block these nominees. Let's make sure Pete Hegseth is confirmed! subject: Sign: Demand Rudy Giuliani be put in jail for defaming 2020 election workers
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Enough is enough. Put Rudy in jail](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc474688-1563-4f16-941e-414665619005/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T42381573-40d5-4185-9445-04f0557ea9b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | How the hell is this guy not already in jail? Put him there NOW. _" A federal judge on Friday [found Rudolph W. Giuliani](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb7270fc-cdda-49d7-9001-3fe91ecdd6bc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in contempt of court for continuing to defame two Georgia women after the 2020 election._ _In May, Mr. Giuliani, 80, agreed to stop repeating lies about the women, Ruby Freeman and Shaye Moss, a mother-daughter team of 2020 election workers in Fulton County, Ga._ _That agreement, Judge Beryl A. Howell of U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia said, was "clear and unambiguous._ _But in November, Mr. Giuliani repeated accusations against the women at least four times, after Donald J. Trump won the 2024 presidential election "_ [**Enough is enough. It's time to put Rudy in jail. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T42a51eb9-3709-41c7-a324-b40c40be170b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|

name: SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT [From House Republicans]
subject: EVERYTHING comes down the FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21 Special Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
There’s no other way around this:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zke265ih9dtucfs1v3jkcm4pn1c408d8slp45ksg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34c9h2bs "INCOMING: Three Special Elections")
---

Sorry to be the bearer of bad news:

Our House Majority is hanging on by a thread. We're clinging to one of the narrowest Majorities of the last CENTURY. And if Democrats win the upcoming Special Elections, they could win back the House and bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt.

There's no other way around this: _Everything comes down to the upcoming Special Elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21._

**_[Early voting is about to begin in Florida and this is a major test for our Conservative movement.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zl8shibiuffs71beqi62sntvdn2kq81fs4afqqi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34c9h2bs "Early voting is about to begin in Florida and this is a major test for our Conservative movement.")_**

Why? Because...

**If we lose these Special Elections, House Democrats would take control and effectively destroy our Republican Trifecta in one fell swoop.**

Democrats are supercharging their efforts to take back control of the House so we desperately need your help to rebuild our warchest after our 2024 victory.

We're closing in on the first and most IMPORTANT deadline of the New Year so if you're willing and able to **_[chip in a few bucks](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zkoh87erp7e3ngt12egluk75p54i6cvq4dsjp3c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34c9h2bs "chip in a few bucks")_** to help, you can make a REAL difference.
| | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z6e0quf0f1m82ihs2v2lvgb4ab8gtio1qkhafr4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34c9h2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE")
---

If you're debating whether or not to contribute right here and right now, remember this:

**Our Conservative House Majority isn 't the only thing on the line... So is the fate of our Republican Trifecta.**

_**[So- with everything on the line - can we count on you to step up?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zmb40mnf62k6aaj190sfh9gmlbgksovpg1u46bi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34c9h2bs "So – with everything on the line – can we count on you to step up?")**_
| [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zdd0f4bsitp6c8t870iq51s95ktc8sn4gcr9ql5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34c9h2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE")
---

Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- House Republicans

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8e9mm3i2cid23ohb0r816ms077gboq4vnfenhcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34c9h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zblk26ttqbfg5a6q8kh4hu4j5da23aa0oap8ngbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34c9h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zqurl1ugc9r151796g92ecb4lngqbv9cfqk4vv6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34c9h2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE

name: DOGE Alert via House GOP
subject: Did you see what DOGE uncovered?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is CRAZY! Complete our DOGE Survey today and share your thoughts.

|
---
| | | **DOGE SURVEY:[ ACCESS HERE](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjoprcgkmo0e0tdprmiqfgj5clt168vabvtqjpno_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34chh2bs "ACCESS HERE")**
**Friend,

Did you see what Elon Musk's DOGE uncovered?

The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) uncovered how the U.S. Government Spent your Tax Dollars in 2024.

Here are some of the highlights, or should we say lowlights.

-$7 million on various projects studying magic
-$1,513,299 to use kittens in a study to analyze motion sickness.
-$419,470 to determine if lonely rats sought cocaine at a greater frequency than happy rats
-$123,000 teaching children in Kyrgyzstan how to go viral on social media
-The State Department spent $4,840,082 on "influencers"**

---
| | | [COMPLETE DOGE SURVEY](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvfb77m16v7giviksplejauosbkq246jva6tp6og_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34chh2bs "Generic Button")
---

This is madness, Friend. It's clear that we have to cut the crap, and cut it soon.

What are your thoughts? **[Complete the House GOP's DOGE Survey and let your voice be heard.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3i1079h075b04sduhqdqh5g2uqm9s2b3akg7p18_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctie4p34chh2bs "Complete the House GOP’s DOGE Survey and let your voice be heard. ")**

| | | | | | | |

Dear Fellow Patriot,

The United Nations' "Small Arms Treaty" has been the Gun Control Lobby's crown jewel since Barack Obama sent it to the US Senate and insisted we ratify it a decade ago. Year after year, we refused.

_But each and every day, the UN is getting closer to implementing the terms of this dangerous Treaty's provisions here in the United States even without ratification_.

**And it's all being done in secret by the UN's allies in the Washington, D.C. "Swamp."**

The good news is, with the big changes in Washington due to the 2024 election, you and I have a chance to stop the Gun Control Lobby cold.

But it's an opportunity that won't last forever.

That's why -- as Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the message below -- **[it's absolutely critical you and I act now!](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=1d7jrzrb22skfc18tsy2ul1ss40tb2dnya6j7u15xiz61n1qqnr3x09ng2kwz5aohsoh4m9bbbs95i9jpzy36v6ce8f5lmi00dtvb2hi4vr6mfrqsf6535hicmv3o63vtg2obs747h8t2z6gyyd7go6nmqmsguqyv2hei32h96rliver8bnwas2hqqjf7nq7t2q4kud1t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq1409&__onlt=h)**

**Sincerely,

The Hon. Rand Paul
U.S. Senator (R-KY)**

* * *

Fellow Patriot,

**There is a sword hanging over the head of every American gun owner.**

I'm referring to the UN "Small Arms Treaty" -- the first stage of the UN's global gun control agenda.

_I've stared these global gun banners in the face and told them what they could do with their precious "Small Arms Treaty," though I knew the UN would NOT like me crashing their "Gun Ban Club" in Geneva_.

_**I told UN bureaucrats you and I will NEVER surrender to their anti-gun schemes!**_

When I told these anti-gun international bureaucrats they were walking in the footsteps of every 20th century murderous dictator who disarmed their citizens to shuffle them off to death camps, I guess my words hit a little "close to home."

All they could do in response was squirm in their seats and laugh nervously...

But while you or I or even President Trump can tell these gun grabbers what we think of their treaty, only the U.S. Senate can remove the treaty document from the Senate agenda.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to sign your "NO UN GUN BAN" petition to your U.S. Senators IMMEDIATELY](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=1d7jrzrb22skfc18tsy2ul1ss40tb2dnyaqbexyvm3m8iyt9yxiswdg1dmyzu1cf8f3nf6exi94xykxdghkhn7xgozx5fqbv2f8wn3rzr8mtkkfhmby6lp28tej05ts9zvv18ayzyn69xg3puflq7poyo94t79aacjzdjf3e5mtdsee8kogerzx8o92fvk90q1gy867t1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq1409&__onlt=h)**.

As you'll see, this petition insists your Senators act to oppose and reject the UN "Small Arms Treaty" and send it back to the President where it can be formally and finally trashed.

But until they do, the UN "Small Arms Treaty" will remain pending in the Senate, and ratification by a future Senate is all that's needed for this gun grab to become reality.

_And that's REGARDLESS of who occupies the White House or their position on the Treaty_!

With this Treaty, the UN's goal is to DESTROY the legal buying, owning, manufacturing, and selling of pistols, rifles, and shotguns by FORCING: **> > _ALL countries involved in the export of firearms -- including the United States -- to establish a "National Control System_."**
This is nothing more than GUN REGISTRATION, plain and simple -- the first step toward outright GUN CONFISCATION; **> > _ALL firearms manufacturers who seek to export firearms to ask for permission and report on how they believe the guns they sell will be used_.**
The UN ultimately wants final say on whether or not any firearms transfer should be allowed. Period. After all, they know guns in the hands of the "wrong" people is the biggest threat they face toward imposing their brand of one-world socialism around the globe; and **> > _ALL Treaty countries to allow firearms manufacturers to be sued for crimes committed with their products_.**
Imagine how outrageous it would be if Ford was sued because an F-150 owner ran a red light and caused a crash! That's what gun grabbers want to do with firearms because they know this could END gun manufacturing. This is exactly what Mexico is attempting to do in their lawsuit against Smith & Wesson. _**The UN's ultimate plan for all civilian-owned guns:_Incinerate them_**_ It's hard to see how the Second Amendment could survive in the United States were the one-world socialists at the UN to get their way.

Of course, that's their goal.

_To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand "utopian" designs_.

Meanwhile, enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed, they're pouring money into the UN "Small Arms Treaty" hand-over-fist.

So, it's no wonder why they're hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it!

**[I'm counting on you to help beat the UN by signing your "NO UN GUN BAN" petition to urge your U.S. Senators to end all support for the UN Gun Ban and send it back to the White House right away](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=1d7jrzrb22skfc18tsy2ul1ss40tb2dnyayupb7ik9jndjj4gipfwvqdaumcojf9y5feu3nu2eek40jyo4nzri0jj2p5zuv24glwj3lqbj5fz48o4y28hw8w9nmikeelf8lbdj270d4250lir17wwqujq3ktw0kckerclv4b1qvv11e2a0q06h3xm37fix3fn1n3tfzj8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq1409&__onlt=h)**.

If we don't dispose of the treaty quickly, the gun grabbers will leap to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate the moment they have the votes, no matter who the President is or what their stance is on the treaty.

_That's why we have to mount a massive campaign to send this Treaty back to the President NOW so he can kill the Treaty as promised, before it's too late_.

The great news is, just doing so puts you and me in a win/win situation.

Either we get the 60 votes we need to finally KILL this Treaty...

... Or anti-gun U.S. Senators will be on record in support of arguably the **WORST anti-gun initiative** to come before either chamber of Congress in decades.

Believe me.

_U.S. Senators who vote to allow international bureaucrats to trample on our gun rights will pay the price at the ballot box_.

Just like they did in 2014 after their all-out push for gun control in the wake of the Newtown tragedy, and in 2016 after Hillary Clinton's full embrace of every anti-gun policy imaginable, and in **2024 when 4 anti-gun democrats went down in flames, and 4 more barely hung on by the skin of their teeth.**

_But if we don't fight now, it could be the gun grabbers who get the last laugh -- even if it takes them years to regain control of the U.S. Senate_!

After all, gun grabbers have been battling for this scheme since President Bill Clinton's administration.

_They're going to do whatever it takes to make their global gun control crown jewel a reality_.

They're clearly in this for the long haul.

Are you?

**[Click here to sign your "NO UN GUN BAN" Petition and insist the U.S. Senate vote to return the treaty to President Trump so he can send it to the trash where it belongs](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=1d7jrzrb22skfc18tsy2ul1ss40tb2dnyagmkefmyswqz9p036h6wmltxbkf7fhbluw96lgq9otmx39sfoarwws1tt55tyox6icxv4v60y15n9yekuumddqi0fafe45bkksqn5tcr71ga7irn8rcjrb8rketie8f6z7c195xjuxmxmdipzj7k2xk7jog97ky80dwdt4pc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq1409&__onlt=h)**.

Sadly, the UN "Small Arms Treaty" is now only the beginning of the problem.

_Under Joe Biden's direction, one-world bureaucrats are even now pushing key parts of these gun controls deep into every part of government_.

On top of the Biden ATF's anti-gun executive actions, a headline from _The Hill_ showed how **"Democrats' latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership"** involves new State Department "sanctions" designed to drive the price of ammo up by BANNING imports.

_That's the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed restarting the funnel of your tax dollars into funding the UN "Small Arms Treaty_."

Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it's under the guise of "public health."

None of us want any more of that.

Still, now the Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says _"Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy."_

_That's why insisting that your U.S. Senators vote to DISPOSE of the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" is not enough_.

We must insist that the U.S. Senate help President Trump root out anti-gun policies pushed by Joe Biden's government and ensure that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for.

But I'm counting on your help to send that message -- before it's all swept under the rug by the bureaucrats running for cover.

Once you have signed your petition, I am counting on your support to help the National Association for Gun Rights: 1\. _Contact and mobilize_ up to 10 million pro-Second Amendment Americans using mail, email and phone banks to turn up maximum pressure on the U.S. Senate; 2\. _Launch a full-scale online effort_ , including internet ads, op-eds, text messages, and video updates, working highly-trafficked blogs and using social media to generate even more heat to ensure the so-called "Small Arms Treaty" can be returned to the White House where President Trump can finish it off; and 3\. _Craft hard-hitting radio_ , newspaper and TV ads, which we'll be ready to unleash at a moment's notice if we can raise the resources to fund them. Of course, a program of this scale won't be cheap.

But as I explained, doing nothing would only play right into the gun grabbers' hands.

_So along with your signed petition, could you please consider a generous contribution of $100 TODAY_?

I know that's a lot to ask for, believe me.

But the fight to reclaim our stolen freedoms is here, fellow patriot. It's on. There's no time to wait.

So please act -- and agree to give generously.

**[But if $100 is just too much -- even given the urgency of the situation -- please agree to $30, or at least $15 TODAY](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=1d7jrzrb22skfc18tsy2ul1ss40tb2dnyb9i5001kfgwpi8cvdfivg4js5mkjy0yc816wei6yrflv7j5dfplfjm8ymb55flzn08yd5yaxldezwrcynqqw5dvvgszqch6mppdpyof82jrcxbt3yi3zu1gvasuymejyoda4b7rbcafbedveklzstya3xygkta81lavme19v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq1409&__onlt=h)**.

Gun grabbers around the globe are determined to bring the U.S. to its knees, and wipe liberty off the map forever -- starting with our Second Amendment freedoms.

_If you and I don't fight back, they'll be back again to keep stealing our freedoms one bite at a time_.

Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There's no time to waste.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights**

name: Kelly Ayotte
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kelly for New Hampshire, Chris Connelly Treasurer, PO Box 4723 Manchester, NH 03108
body:
I am so grateful for your support as we hit the ground running to deliver for all of New Hampshire! | | | | | [](https://kellyfornh.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b706db8cb07a975cbe2ecb8b7&id=c4413e7894&e=38cb9f3df0)
---
| | | | | Friend,
Last week, I was honored to be sworn in as New Hampshire’s 83rd Governor. Whether you joined us in Concord for the ceremony or sent your well wishes from afar, thank you for your support.
I was so proud to have my wingman, Joe, and our kids, Kate and Jake, by my side as I was sworn in!
---
| Although we have a lot of work to do to tackle our challenges and keep moving in the right direction, I firmly believe our best days are still to come. I love our state, and I know that together, we will ensure New Hampshire remains the envy of the nation.
Once again, I can’t thank you enough for your support throughout my campaign, the transition, and now as we hit the ground running in Concord. It is truly the honor of my life to serve as your Governor, and I’m excited to get to work for all New Hampshire.
Best wishes,
Kelly
---
| Paid for by Kelly for New Hampshire, Chris Connelly Treasurer, PO Box 4723 Manchester, NH 03108

Conservative Member of Parliament **[Kemi Badenoch SCORCHED a woke BBC interviewer](https://substack.com/redirect/873dab22-47ba-4f83-8d3a-b96a43651af9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with a hard-to-swallow truthbomb about immigration and cultural compatibility.
"Which cultures would you say are less valid?" the host asked Bedencoch.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/873dab22-47ba-4f83-8d3a-b96a43651af9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I think cultures where women are told that they should not work,... I don't think that's equally **[as valid as our culture,"](https://substack.com/redirect/873dab22-47ba-4f83-8d3a-b96a43651af9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Bedenoch told the host. "Immigration is something that we need to make sure we get right!"
The BBC host pushed back with the anticipated corporate left-wing frame: that all immigration at whatever frequency and from any culture is a blessing to the U.K.
"You have said their culture is less valid, are you saying those people should not be welcomed in the U.K.?" the host asked.
"If we want to have a well-integrated society, then **[we need to make sure that we have a shared culture and a shared identity,"](https://substack.com/redirect/873dab22-47ba-4f83-8d3a-b96a43651af9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Bedenoch fired back.
The conservative MOP was blunt and unapologetic through the entire interview, which clearly disturbed the corporate media interviewer. Watch the rest of the tense exchange below:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/873dab22-47ba-4f83-8d3a-b96a43651af9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---

# **Conservative speaker GOES OFF on Muslim student who blames America for terrorism?!!**
Watch conservative activist **[Brigitte Gabriel EXPLODE at a muslim student](https://substack.com/redirect/5b13a263-c6d5-465f-b408-43c6f6f2caa5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who asks an eyebrow-raiding question during a Heritage Foundation Q&A about America's response to the horrific Benghazi attacks.
"You stood there to make a point about 'peaceful moderate muslims'. I wish you brought 10 with you to ask how we can hold our government responsible!," Gabriel erupted at the student.
"It is time we take political correctness and throw it **[in the garbage where it belongs!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/5b13a263-c6d5-465f-b408-43c6f6f2caa5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT [From House Republicans]
subject: EVERYTHING comes down the FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21 Special Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
There’s no other way around this:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z528adf2j5qrcg44v95ukf6s8suur782to8i2og0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs "INCOMING: Three Special Elections")
---

Sorry to be the bearer of bad news:

Our House Majority is hanging on by a thread. We're clinging to one of the narrowest Majorities of the last CENTURY. And if Democrats win the upcoming Special Elections, they could win back the House and bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt.

There's no other way around this: _Everything comes down to the upcoming Special Elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21._

**_[Early voting is about to begin in Florida and this is a major test for our Conservative movement.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z45nu70qctdpq9nn97fbqnjmboanh767ijsg7nt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs "Early voting is about to begin in Florida and this is a major test for our Conservative movement.")_**

Why? Because...

**If we lose these Special Elections, House Democrats would take control and effectively destroy our Republican Trifecta in one fell swoop.**

Democrats are supercharging their efforts to take back control of the House so we desperately need your help to rebuild our warchest after our 2024 victory.

We're closing in on the first and most IMPORTANT deadline of the New Year so if you're willing and able to **_[chip in a few bucks](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvbm001ncds3thin767q7c6o04pblhk8vj1rr0uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs "chip in a few bucks")_** to help, you can make a REAL difference.
| | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znq9vl8069mp0c1mlc6v0mk0qudcrkpa9bdh3kr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE")
---

If you're debating whether or not to contribute right here and right now, remember this:

**Our Conservative House Majority isn 't the only thing on the line... So is the fate of our Republican Trifecta.**

_**[So- with everything on the line - can we count on you to step up?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh59qv0o7q7hf8aniklucv2mnid3rjl2toar4f98_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs "So – with everything on the line – can we count on you to step up?")**_
| [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv21035giu7bvffr04q8jl0frajfl8p31768p730_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE HERE")
---

Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- House Republicans

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfs3e6qkn4q6j1o7lnbq2n3260jhqfhitetc1ak8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt610f515pv7k63mc0h4hm5lhk2okti3lusth5r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh11lugvdf3qaohkv1il0ikv0m2lvc5a7211tqn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmao3pcjet342isk5bctiq2a2qhm3os7re4jaqu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv0s4mp1k7tcptmc3d6eu4bfqqr9crfh3re539i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc8fin78jcg4ggrit1lbaofr8vct47l43gk95q30_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8k9nuqh0mspn4u8h13d9im3v5iivfha6t80pstg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z05bbfb3f6pp83hs5b7n0e9748k2u2vpr438viho_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsbj563hs1n118p9n1nqfljbqs4pr0fe5ppar3cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zst8g374tqvc14i3mno5l4fcambv1cnlqa9dncfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0q9r0ngg5cs7qucfb2g4agiff3f9sbftblongqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrbccjg2dl1id3g3ebfanqvb70u82laaj4k24hko_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zojocgfh43uldp5j51s3jm1g9je1solmm95e14jo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3ctieco32cdh2bs)

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's hear.com's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! name: Josh
subject: I’m the teacher who’ll bring GOP to its knees in 2025
body:
We’ve got less than 90 days to flip this seat and stop MAGA extremism in its tracks.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HPSO5TRNyjBfK_CLuROhd1pS1DfFBknGYicRwuzxP7eqsvb7JXgA7HNcQqF-E2wdaimId7Jj-IRL77UpW33JjFWHGMwib_RGGkPEe-V3kVmmjKfwuZUijlafR9dlacOd36L4YgtK1a-sN-MsXyZKHRD15VvG1jGId3Jzl4Uf_-hru_zphgB6gC4m0QFyvTL1NlNVId6EvXl-OUkhqN1SQrx0wGh0c_yJYpN6Gr_EoJ4=&c=7sbh1swlbOlJ9SP8kbas_m_rjbFG7ERh6-ZiCbYPUWsQW10uWmn5Tg==&ch=5H7PPSMVXiVpbWXMDTh1EDf-1K3Mqe7SpySGD_p8IJe6G7Lsi9JGlg==)
---
| | | | Team,
If you and I haven't met yet, my name is Josh Weil. I'm a single father, Democrat, and public school teacher running in the Special Election for Florida's 6th Congressional District - the bellwether first election of 2025.
As we begin to hit our stride after a whirlwind first few weeks of this campaign, I haven't yet had the chance to sit down and write out the story of who I am & why I'm running so let me tell you about why you should put your belief into this scrappy campaign that stands to topple the GOPs razor thin 1-vote majority.
My career has been defined by work with at-risk or post risk populations in public schools.
I worked for three years in juvenile detention under the FL Department of Juvenile Justice, then for two years at University Behavioral Center, a residential mental health hospital for teens.
In these programs, kids were typically 5 years behind grade level and the programs were extremely underfunded and under-resourced. As a result I had to wear a bunch of different hats - teacher, therapist, parent, and more. It's a helluva a job (literally), and it's not for everybody, but I am proud to have made a tangible impact with these students and this experience was foundational in making me the teacher that I am today.
---
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HPSO5TRNyjBfK_CLuROhd1pS1DfFBknGYicRwuzxP7eqsvb7JXgA7HNcQqF-E2wdaimId7Jj-IRL77UpW33JjFWHGMwib_RGGkPEe-V3kVmmjKfwuZUijlafR9dlacOd36L4YgtK1a-sN-MsXyZKHRD15VvG1jGId3Jzl4Uf_-hru_zphgB6gC4m0QFyvTL1NlNVId6EvXl-OUkhqN1SQrx0wGh0c_yJYpN6Gr_EoJ4=&c=7sbh1swlbOlJ9SP8kbas_m_rjbFG7ERh6-ZiCbYPUWsQW10uWmn5Tg==&ch=5H7PPSMVXiVpbWXMDTh1EDf-1K3Mqe7SpySGD_p8IJe6G7Lsi9JGlg==)
---
A project I put together at the Department of Juvenile Justice School where the kids built a working wind turbine (Left). Me and my two incredible sons (Right) .
---
| I now work in Florida's Osceola County public schools where I am on the leadership team of Kissimmee Middle School - a title one school (schools which have a high population of low income families and in turn receive lots of extra supplemental funding, all students receive supplemental funding).
On the leadership team of Kissimmee: I'm an instructional coach for teachers, the Dean of Students where I handle behavior issues with students and families, and the MTSS coordinator - a role required under education law where I monitor/track student data across the school and then coordinate interventions and individualized education plans (IEPs) for students who are underperforming.
In my first year where I oversaw Math, scores went down in every category at my school except math which went up one point. In my 2nd year, I oversaw all of STEM where we made major gains in both categories and became the highest gaining school in the whole county/district for that category.
I have devoted my life's work to solving challenges that seem insurmountable to most, to uplifting students and classrooms that society and our GOP state legislature have written off. So when I read that a special election would be held in my community for a vacant House seat following a Trump cabinet appointment, I saw an opportunity to tackle a challenge that I am uniquely qualified to take on and conquer. Before our launch, we were warned by Doubting Thomases that the Democratic base was burnt out, defeated, and apathetic in the aftermath of Kamala Harris's defeat. We were told that we would be hard pressed to find people who would donate and or volunteer on this race. They told us to give up.
My belief then and ever more so now is that when the chips are down and we're backed into a corner is when we fight the hardest--and now I am vindicated every day as Democrats from across the US pour in to fight with us.
---
| | | | [Together, we can rob the GOP of their 1-vote majority and restore hope to a movement reeling from our 2024 defeat - can you make a donation today to help us rapidly scale this campaign in time for our April 1st election?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HPSO5TRNyjBfK_CLuROhd1pS1DfFBknGYicRwuzxP7eqsvb7JXgA7HNcQqF-E2wdCl-NKOD3My6RZ1uaXU5NXmfvN5HqMlAx35i3csRR_0WwKchhUOoSkzsZJVhUpbyXgD-GuRWoRTExgpm4lAJpx8pp-Y0qskbbZcDTl36rq0yEpUefLUmWcVPfbmkyOiJXhg8Q5otn__alBUejhtdy2PXWs5OCs88ubvLXhKj6adZ0YP5WZd7NDw==&c=7sbh1swlbOlJ9SP8kbas_m_rjbFG7ERh6-ZiCbYPUWsQW10uWmn5Tg==&ch=5H7PPSMVXiVpbWXMDTh1EDf-1K3Mqe7SpySGD_p8IJe6G7Lsi9JGlg==)

In these programs, kids were typically 5 years behind grade level and the programs were extremely underfunded and under-resourced. As a result I had to wear a bunch of different hats - teacher, therapist, parent, and more. It's a helluva a job (literally), and it's not for everybody, but I am proud to have made a tangible impact with these students and this experience was foundational in making me the teacher that I am today. | | | | | == A project I put together at the Department of Juvenile Justice School where the kids built a working wind turbine (Left). Me and my two incredible sons (Right) . | I now work in Florida's Osceola County public schools where I am on the leadership team of Kissimmee Middle School - a title one school (schools which have a high population of low income families and in turn receive lots of extra supplemental funding, all students receive supplemental funding). On the leadership team of Kissimmee: I'm an instructional coach for teachers, the Dean of Students where I handle behavior issues with students and families, and the MTSS coordinator - a role required under education law where I monitor/track student data across the school and then coordinate interventions and individualized education plans (IEPs) for students who are underperforming. In my first year where I oversaw Math, scores went down in every category at my school except math which went up one point. In my 2nd year, I oversaw all of STEM where we made major gains in both categories and became the highest gaining school in the whole county/district for that category. I have devoted my life's work to solving challenges that seem insurmountable to most, to uplifting students and classrooms that society and our GOP state legislature have written off. So when I read that a special election would be held in my community for a vacant House seat following a Trump cabinet appointment, I saw an opportunity to tackle a challenge that I am uniquely qualified to take on and conquer. Before our launch, we were warned by Doubting Thomases that the Democratic base was burnt out, defeated, and apathetic in the aftermath of Kamala Harris's defeat. We were told that we would be hard pressed to find people who would donate and or volunteer on this race. They told us to give up. My belief then and ever more so now is that when the chips are down and we're backed into a corner is when we fight the hardest--and now I am vindicated every day as Democrats from across the US pour in to fight with us. | | | | == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | | | == | | | | Thank you for being a part of this movement to stop Project 2025 and send a teacher--not a book banner--to Congress. This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, and we cannot afford to miss it. Yours in the fight, Josh Weil Democrat for Florida's 6th | | | | | == | | | | Josh Weil for Congress | 8381 Citrus Chase Drive | Orlando, FL 32836 US | |

From: All On The Line
Date: Thurs, Jan 9, 2025
Subject: We’d like to hear from you on this

> With so much of the oxygen going towards our chaotic national politics, we know it can be hard to find up-to-date, reliable, and comprehensive coverage on what’s happening on the ground in state-level fights for fair maps and redistricting reform.
> But we know it’s important you have the information you need to stand up for democracy — especially with the incoming administration.
> **So later this month, our team is going to provide a closer look into a key state — and it’s up to this community to decide which one.**[**Click here to cast your vote and help us decide which state we should highlight in our next in-depth analysis.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100315889/522361729/593034927?refcode=eng_aotl_tier1_email_PollSrvyLift_email_20250113-AOTL-Tier1-PollSrvyLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250113-AOTL-Tier1-PollSrvyLift_&utm_campaign=PollSrvyLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzZTMzZGJkLWI2ZDEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=faBM0yjHOUeEwXVtUOsEqMDyadyjQXxCu1yw_OmV-PE=&emci=bd76001b-9ccf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=33e33dbd-b6d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8431045)
> We’ll be looking at the current balance of power in the state legislature and upcoming elections; the state’s redistricting process, including the history of how we got to where we are today and the fairness of the current maps; and timelines of upcoming redistricting battles — and what’s at stake with them.
> As you know, there is no “off season” in redistricting. Gerrymandering continues to pose a critical threat to our democracy, with opponents of fair maps _actively_ undermining redistricting reforms, electing anti-democracy leaders, and threatening mid-decade map redraws. **But you don’t always hear about it. **
> [**So don’t wait: Cast your vote right now to help us decide which key state should be featured in our next comprehensive update.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100315891/522361731/593034927?refcode=eng_aotl_tier1_email_PollSrvyLift_email_20250113-AOTL-Tier1-PollSrvyLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250113-AOTL-Tier1-PollSrvyLift_&utm_campaign=PollSrvyLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzZTMzZGJkLWI2ZDEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=faBM0yjHOUeEwXVtUOsEqMDyadyjQXxCu1yw_OmV-PE=&emci=bd76001b-9ccf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=33e33dbd-b6d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8431045)

clean_body: We need to close the poll in the next 24 hours so our team can get to work. | Hi Peter, Last week we asked this community to provide input on which state we should choose for an in-depth update. We’ve received responses from supporters all over the country — and before we close the poll, we wanted to make sure you had an opportunity to participate: We’ll close the poll in 24 hours so our team can get to work on the deep dive. Thanks so much, Team AOTL \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: All On The Line Date: Thurs, Jan 9, 2025 Subject: We’d like to hear from you on this With so much of the oxygen going towards our chaotic national politics, we know it can be hard to find up-to-date, reliable, and comprehensive coverage on what’s happening on the ground in state-level fights for fair maps and redistricting reform. But we know it’s important you have the information you need to stand up for democracy — especially with the incoming administration. So later this month, our team is going to provide a closer look into a key state — and it’s up to this community to decide which one. We’ll be looking at the current balance of power in the state legislature and upcoming elections; the state’s redistricting process, including the history of how we got to where we are today and the fairness of the current maps; and timelines of upcoming redistricting battles — and what’s at stake with them. As you know, there is no “off season” in redistricting. Gerrymandering continues to pose a critical threat to our democracy, with opponents of fair maps actively undermining redistricting reforms, electing anti-democracy leaders, and threatening mid-decade map redraws. But you don’t always hear about it. Thanks for your input — it matters a lot. All On The Line = --- is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = --- | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: In one week, Donald Trump’s second term will begin
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Ruben is going to continue to fight for the little guy. For the mom and dad sitting at the kitchen table, worried they won’t be able to cover the rent. For the veteran who’s worried about their health care. For the kid trying to figure out how they’re going to find a career, or get into school.
#

Peter —
We’re coming to grips with it ourselves, but in one week we will observe the peaceful transition of power. Donald Trump will begin his term as the 47th President of the United States.
1. Ruben is not going anywhere.
2. The only way we’re going to get through this is **together.**

Ruben is going to continue to fight for the little guy. For the mom and dad sitting at the kitchen table, worried they won’t be able to cover the rent. For the veteran who’s worried about their health care. For the kid trying to figure out how they’re going to find a career, or get into school.
He’s going to fight for those people because he is those people. Ruben knows how tough it is, and he knows that those people deserve a champion in the Senate.
And today, he’s asking you to help him keep it up.
[**Help Ruben continue fighting by making a donation of $5 or anything you can afford today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&refcode=em250113-1-120&t=1&akid=3645%2E734936%2E-4vDUw)
[DONATE $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&amount=5&refcode=em250113-1-120&t=2&akid=3645%2E734936%2E-4vDUw)
Thanks so much for your help,
Team Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: the enemy within
body:
50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Juan Ciscomani
subject: secure the border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=133703ef7b&e=659fba240e)
---
| | **SECURE THE BORDER.** The 119th Congress is off to a strong start, with significant progress being made just days into the session. First order of business: SECURE THE BORDER.

In the first week, House Republicans:

☑️ Passed _H.R. 29 the Laken Riley Act_ \- and I was proud to be a cosponsor of the bill.
☑️ I introduced _H.R. 35 the Agent Raul Gonzalez Officer Safety Act_ to impose federal penalties on bad actors involved in high-speed chases with our local and federal law enforcement.
☑️ AND I also introduced the _H.R. 263 Transnational Criminal Organization Illicit Spotter Prevention and Elimination Act_ to crack down on the cartels’ surveillance operations with legislation that holds them accountable to the fullest extent of the law.

I am PROUD to fight for policies that secure our border and have wasted NO TIME in delivering.

Juan
---

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Less than 10 days
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQjdEBGIy40AggnsUo2mj-fyyUU9lMiEcnnUoHm10ICIhwW1yHFO5QvPeScX0)
---
In less than 10 days, President Trump will be sworn in, and we’ll continue working tirelessly to deliver on his bold America First agenda.
From fixing our economy to securing the border and unleashing American energy, our mission is clear: put the American people first.
But while we work tirelessly to rebuild our nation, the Democrats are already gearing up to stop us.
The House Majority PAC, House Democrats’ Super PAC that spent millions attacking Republicans last cycle, is targeting me, and they’ll stop at nothing to derail our progress.
I’m counting on grassroots patriots like you to help us fight their attacks.
**[So with less than 10 days until President Trump is inaugurated, please make a contribution of $10 or more to help me stave off the attacks from the radical Left as I fight to deliver his America First agenda.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQjdEBGIy40AggnsUo2mj-fyyUU9lMiEcnnUoHm10ICIhwW1yHFO5QvPeScX0)**

---
The Left is furious, and they’ll do anything they can to stop us or slow us down.
Their goal is clear: silence conservatives, smear our values, and block our progress.
We can’t let them win.
I need you to help me stop them in their tracks.
**[So with less than 10 days until President Trump is inaugurated, please make a contribution of $10 or more to help me stave off the attacks from the radical Left as I fight to deliver his America First agenda.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQjdEBGIy40AggnsUo2mj-fyyUU9lMiEcnnUoHm10ICIhwW1yHFO5QvPeScX0)**

**Musk’s support for far-right political movements in Germany should raise concern.** Hi, I’m Gay Valimont, and I’m running for Congress in Florida’s 1st District because I believe it’s time for leaders who prioritize people over profit. name: Jonathon Nave
subject: Will you help Pat Herrity get on the ballot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Hi Peter,

It's Jonathon -- Pat Herrity's campaign manager.

Pat is a commonsense, conservative leader who has defended our values against progressives in Northern Virginia for years on the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors.

As the last Republican standing in Fairfax, Pat has proven that he knows how to win tough elections in a Democrat area without compromising on our conservative values.

As our nominee for Lieutenant Governor in 2025, Pat will continue to move the needle in Northern Virginia and help our Republican ticket get the support we need to win all three of our statewide elected offices.

But before we can get there, Pat needs your help.

We're required to collect 10,000 signatures from registered voters across Virginia in order for Pat's name to be listed on the ballot.

So I'm writing today to ask that you consider volunteering just a little of your time to collect signatures from your friends and neighbors to get Pat on the ballot.

**Will you volunteer some time to help?**

---
| [Click here to volunteer](mailto:jnave@patforva.com?subject=I'll%20help%20Pat%20get%20on%20the%20ballot!&body=Jonathon%2C%0A%0APlease%20send%20me%20petition%20forms%20and%20information%20on%20how%20to%20help! "Click here to volunteer")
---
|
Click the button above or reply directly to this email, and I'll send you everything you need to help collect signatures and make sure that Pat gets on the ballot!

Peter -- Even collecting just a dozen signatures from your closest friends and family will make a big difference towards the 10,000 we need.

If you're not able to help with signatures, I'd ask that you consider [making a contribution of $10, $25, $50 or even as much as $100](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=001ab5949a&e=a1ea0f9c99) to cover the many expenses of running a campaign, and ensure that Pat is in the strongest possible position to defeat the Democrats' nominee in November.

However you are able to help, we're extremely grateful for your support of Pat's campaign.

I look forward to working with you this year to ensure that we continue Governor Youngkin's commonsense, conservative legacy by electing Pat Herrity as our next Lieutenant Governor, reelecting Jason Miyares as our Attorney General, and getting Winsome Earle-Sears into the Governor's mansion.

Thank you!

**Jonathon Nave**
Campaign Manager | Pat Herrity for Lieutenant Governor
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=f8db29a6f6&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Donate")
---

Friends of Pat HerrityP.O Box 2863Springfield, VA 22152
[Add us to your address book](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=bcefc4f31e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&t=b&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=bcefc4f31e)

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: stunning rebuke
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I need your immediate attention.

I just spoke with Joy Reid about Trump's extreme cabinet nominees.

And now, we have a chance to hand him a stunning rebuke by winning THREE upcoming special elections and flipping critical seats from red to blue.

Let me repeat that, Peter: We have to prove to Donald Trump that our Democrats are more united than ever and we’re ready to stop his extreme agenda at every turn. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

But Peter, I need your help to do this. We can create an undeniable wave of support for our Democrats entering these special elections — but I can’t do it alone. Please, will you chip in $14 before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

I’ll tell you what I just told Joy, Peter:

As a member of Congress, I made a sacred promise to protect our Democracy.

Hear me, Peter: Trump’s cabinet nominees are more loyal to Donald Trump than they are to the American people. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m working relentlessly to put a check on Trump’s presidency. So please, will you chip in $14 right now? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Chip in $19 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=19]
Chip in $24 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=24]
Chip in $50 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=50]
Chip in $100 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=100]
Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thank you, RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?refcode=footer]

Peter, what I need most right now is your feedback.
I launched my first Democratic Priorities Survey to help guide our strategy in this brand-new Congress.
******[**_It would mean so much to me if you could take 10 seconds to share your feedback and help me learn more about what you want Democrats to focus on. Will you take my survey before midnight? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100325910/522390137/1707618179?source=20250113_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDBiNGMzOC1jMWQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiR0n3Yt50QHM8fVOc3g9SRbYCLe2NnC2QDCNRA93Sc=&emci=5c9002d1-76cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=ad0b4c38-c1d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=21290350)******
Peter, I refuse to stand by while Republicans jam far right extremism down the throats of the American people.
– Instead of fighting for everyday Americans, Republicans are thirsty to cut taxes for their wealthy donors.
– Instead of putting People Over Politics, Republicans are planning to decimate Social Security and Medicare.
– Instead of making life better For The People, Republicans are doing the exact opposite.
Enough is enough.
I need you to know:
House Democrats will never be bullied or intimidated by extremism, no matter who comes to power.
We will always do what’s right for the American people.
We are listening to you. We are fighting for you.
We need to know what’s on your mind as we move forward.
[**You have a seat at the table as we build the grassroots movement we need to reclaim the House.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100325911/522390149/1707618179?source=20250113_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDBiNGMzOC1jMWQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiR0n3Yt50QHM8fVOc3g9SRbYCLe2NnC2QDCNRA93Sc=&emci=5c9002d1-76cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=ad0b4c38-c1d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=21290350)
******[**_That’s why I’m launching my first Democratic Priorities Survey since the new Congress took office. I need 50 of our best supporters from your zip code to step forward and share your thoughts. It would mean so much if you would take my survey and provide your perspective >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100325912/522390152/1707618179?source=20250113_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDBiNGMzOC1jMWQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiR0n3Yt50QHM8fVOc3g9SRbYCLe2NnC2QDCNRA93Sc=&emci=5c9002d1-76cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=ad0b4c38-c1d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=21290350)******

clean_body: Peter, I’m launching my first Democratic Priorities Survey since our brand-new Congress was sworn in. | | | Peter, I’m launching my first Democratic Priorities Survey since our brand-new Congress was sworn in. ****** | Peter, what I need most right now is your feedback. I launched my first Democratic Priorities Survey to help guide our strategy in this brand-new Congress. **** Peter, I refuse to stand by while Republicans jam far right extremism down the throats of the American people. – Instead of fighting for everyday Americans, Republicans are thirsty to cut taxes for their wealthy donors. – Instead of putting People Over Politics, Republicans are planning to decimate Social Security and Medicare. – Instead of making life better For The People, Republicans are doing the exact opposite. Enough is enough. I need you to know: House Democrats will never be bullied or intimidated by extremism, no matter who comes to power. We will always do what’s right for the American people. We are listening to you. We are fighting for you. We need to know what’s on your mind as we move forward. **** I need each of you by my side to ensure we take back the House. The only way we’re going to win is if we all have a voice. **** I can’t wait to see what you have to say! Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support.
