name: Signature Request [via Team Marsha]
subject: Dear President Trump,
body:
We want your name at the VERY TOP of this letter!

| |
---
| | | Hey there -

We are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP.

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. _**[So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zheebeltrd1i7ttdq092k18v0ph5hg3d2cnr10r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g60oj6c9h2bs "So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:")**_

---
| Dear President Trump,

I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States.

Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. _I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time._

From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts:

**1)** Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that **YOU** are the right person to lead America.

**2)** Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that **YOUR** leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans.

_Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration._

Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great.

Together, we will **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

Sincerely,

**[X_________________](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zu0gv4g88ullgjcge6jcvptkso8gq19c24aevg20_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g60oj6c9h2bs "X_________________")**
---
| | | [SIGN THE LETTER](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8fl2hqaqoo7b2okftd4a8350bbuua0t7clakps0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g60oj6c9h2bs "SIGN THE LETTER")
---

Thank you,

Team Marsha

---

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. "So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:" | Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER

| Dear Hello
Now that Richmond City water issues have been mitigated, the General Assembly was able to get to work today.
All 3 Senate Committees were held today: Local Governments, Courts of Justice and Commerce and Labor.
Both the Virginia Senate and House gaveled in at House Chambers this morning, Monday, January 13 at 9:30am for a Joint Assembly to hear the Governor's State of the Union address. You can watch by clicking[ this link](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELEfzqBmti5f4Pt-ByAMM7WYyIqg7JhYLnOOmTbcfCoo2uMa4HI4Xgy3V-dc1jv_NTod6_GCWwHwJmj4dKmSZy1pHo5Tm0QNwxaGA5LEU-Ujm77Ev6WU3M9kIIS-zVpADPvhaFN-7_1juqRQyt3iujZm7dTN_FClD2Se3tlaFbNp-BTAteZzFJbcuxIij059kAEknnrBy3tWKL0K4DKt4w==&c=I-WuUZebKE00e7Kw3k-Nd6ZU5sQVFRCFluYxcArJmazLZmAM52t-bw==&ch=0QNwXBMdUK5vSgeml7IpgRvzX6elzACGqt1zYrj7ofay_SupHMRTwA==) and fast forward to 10am.
Did you know that you can watch your Virginia General Assembly in action every Monday through Friday until they adjourn on Saturday, February 22?
Just click the links below to watch a committee meeting or session.
You can actually call in while the committee is meeting and state whether you support or oppose each of the bills on the docket and briefly explain your position.
Some people prefer to go in person.
Due to the thousands of bills that will come before the House and the Senate, I will be following the Senate calendar. If a bill passes the House, it will be reviewed by the Senate after crossover.
If you would like to tune to committee meetings or session, you can do so using the links below. If you missed the meetings, you can always watch the recordings.
---

|
---
While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated.
While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you.
Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. Thank you in advance.
We must now save Virginia. Let's do this.
---
| 2025 Session JOINT SESSION Governor Glenn Youngkin's State of the Commonwealth Address Monday, January 13, 2025 at 9:30am
---
| This morning, Governor Glenn Youngkin delivered his last annual State of the Commonwealth Address to the Joint Session of both the Virginia House and Senate in House Chambers.
The Governor celebrated achievements made over the past 3 years and set a vision for his remaining year in office to include the following:

* push back against the shut down of carbon emitting power plants and the Virginia Clean Economy Act passed in 2020 by the Democrat Trifecta
* more tax relief including the removal of tax on tips, the car tax on qualifying individuals and an income tax credit
* encouragement of more data centers, making Virginia the "data center capital of the world," and making sure Virginia is doing what is necessary to support that goal
* $517 million in state aid to local schools
* $290 million in school construction
* "foundational and comprehensive re-design of our funding formula for public schools
* deport illegals here in the state who have committed violent crimes
* if localities have "sanctuary city" policies and refuse to cooperate with ICE, they should lose state funding.
* opposition to legalizing a retail market for marijuana
* create a commission to oversee the several varieties of gambling now allowed in Virginia.

### SB762 Supervisors, boards of; increases statutory salary caps for certain counties.
Introduced by: [Tammy Brankley Mulchi (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELEfzqBmti5f4Pt-ByAMM7WYyIqg7JhYLnOOmTbcfCoo2uMa4HI4XuWP5A-9JlYSxEwcYy4LkDrTNZOdquPqli9qhlM7VB0z8aP5i3M0z6QzI7p1s2YtVfiaiIP4uqw4Z48KUtAOo3buhY7jqCYdXMZkOZ9IO3oc63Ts689H-dmvEymgi9YHeMw3vMfeUV8jzoqNaFHklCFcw9vC6EqVpcBcyByEUbgRxFZBC6v3HeU7uU-bYK9oMQ==&c=I-WuUZebKE00e7Kw3k-Nd6ZU5sQVFRCFluYxcArJmazLZmAM52t-bw==&ch=0QNwXBMdUK5vSgeml7IpgRvzX6elzACGqt1zYrj7ofay_SupHMRTwA==)
Salaries of boards of supervisors for certain counties. Increases the statutory salary caps for boards of supervisors of counties that have adopted salary limits consistent with provisions in the Code of Virginia relating to alternative procedures for establishing salaries of boards of supervisors.
1.Alternative procedure for establishing salaries of boards of supervisors; limits; fringe benefits. In lieu of other provisions of law, the boards of supervisors of the several counties may establish annually, by ordinance, and pay in monthly installments each of their members an annual salary pursuant to the following procedure and schedule:
1\. On a date determined by the board of supervisors, not earlier than May 1 nor later than June 30 each year, the board, after public hearing pursuant to notice in the manner and form provided in §§ 15.2-1426 and 15.2-1427, shall establish by ordinance the salary of its members for the ensuing fiscal year not to exceed the maximums herein set out.
2\. Counties within the following population brackets shall be allowed to set salaries for board members not to exceed the following amounts:
Population Annual Salary 200,000 and over $15,000 to $52,000
105,000 to 199,999 $13,000 to $47,000
80,000 to 104,999 $11,000 to $43,000
50,000 to 79,999 $9,000 $34,000
25,000 to 49,999 $7,000 to $22,000
15,000 to 24,999 $5,500 to $21,000
14,999 and under 4,000 $20,000
The maximum annual salaries herein provided may be adjusted in any year or years, by ordinance as above provided, by an inflation factor not to exceed five percent.
3\. Any board of supervisors may fix, by ordinance as above provided, annually an additional sum to be paid as hereinabove provided to the chairman and vice-chairman of the board not to exceed $1,800 and $1,200, respectively, without regard to the maximum salary limits.
4\. In addition to and without regard for the salary limits herein set out, any board of supervisors by resolution may grant to its members any or all of the fringe benefits in the manner and form as such benefits are provided for county employees or any of them.

### SB872 Charter; City of Portsmouth.
Introduced by: [L. Louise Lucas (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELEfzqBmti5f4Pt-ByAMM7WYyIqg7JhYLnOOmTbcfCoo2uMa4HI4XuWP5A-9JlYSPnOINcLTFcgkNEMpn4F8CIDxQ_fWA2-Kyr32C2qABDVxjintjStDAelLSYfy427WhL_TnXxrUF9f-GkHg66yydWNsCowgrF5xaQBaQqbD314W2lF98ar36nHPPn_jLpn4MEgEnH1fSYvzHO29m4uGqzWXi72Q-7E9Frxqa58I1eY6t8a2R5v7Q==&c=I-WuUZebKE00e7Kw3k-Nd6ZU5sQVFRCFluYxcArJmazLZmAM52t-bw==&ch=0QNwXBMdUK5vSgeml7IpgRvzX6elzACGqt1zYrj7ofay_SupHMRTwA==) Charter; City of Portsmouth. Amends the charter for the City of Portsmouth by authorizing the City Manager to require city departments to implement appropriate enhancement or remedial measures consistent with prevailing law wherever there exists (i) a compelling government interest, (ii) an analysis that documents a statistically significant disparity between the availability and utilization of minority-owned and women-owned businesses, or (iii) direct evidence by minority-owned businesses or women-owned businesses of the impact of race by discrimination.

### SB839 Zoning; by-right multifamily development in areas zoned for commercial use.
Introduced by: [Schuyler T. VanValkenburg (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELEfzqBmti5f4Pt-ByAMM7WYyIqg7JhYLnOOmTbcfCoo2uMa4HI4XuWP5A-9JlYS9SEblPkLNjyLmE1vz-dEOqMcvbNLvNk1Gv1HWyYYOJsrCOmPIYqetGytSdEMVzVL6XFoV8nK8xN6lSMtelfJrLvgGWtHy_PrRfiGdtKEBzTp4Q_FTYV9oPiVQPEX1Att1eQOla4xs0_SwqdxTQrMmiRrYIP7yLasLWLYkfi8SqYz9eFNELXevw==&c=I-WuUZebKE00e7Kw3k-Nd6ZU5sQVFRCFluYxcArJmazLZmAM52t-bw==&ch=0QNwXBMdUK5vSgeml7IpgRvzX6elzACGqt1zYrj7ofay_SupHMRTwA==) Zoning; by-right multifamily development in areas zoned for commercial use. Requires a locality to provide in its zoning ordinance provisions allowing for the by-right development and construction of multifamily residential uses on all land contained in commercial or business zoning district classifications.
The bill provides that the review and approval of such development shall be done administratively by the locality's staff and that any residential development that dedicates a minimum of 10 percent of the total number of housing units to households with a household income at or below 80 percent of the area median income shall be granted an accelerated plan review and permit approval process by the locality's staff.

### SB851 Local ordinances for the use of certain rainwater harvesting systems.
Introduced by: [J.D. "Danny" Diggs (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELEfzqBmti5f4Pt-ByAMM7WYyIqg7JhYLnOOmTbcfCoo2uMa4HI4XuWP5A-9JlYSF1XL_YusOj0eBg2RfbzcFEYoD8dCtQ3reUgDqIe-nJSTMTAZ55yB7zY2atStZQlwEFg3H9Oii3TGqPwAKP2gkU5SZTqZW55TFv9w6l9MM2uCSJt-NWeOyZE7QyXcfULjmwcm1qQ4UhclX7PHepk8nBsBmaJVz49qnzM9Fmbxx2h1FGKR8jDZuw==&c=I-WuUZebKE00e7Kw3k-Nd6ZU5sQVFRCFluYxcArJmazLZmAM52t-bw==&ch=0QNwXBMdUK5vSgeml7IpgRvzX6elzACGqt1zYrj7ofay_SupHMRTwA==) Local ordinances for the use of certain rainwater harvesting systems. Provides that existing local ordinances adopted prior to July 1, 2025, governing rainwater harvesting systems, shall continue in force; however, in the event of a conflict between a Board of Health regulation and a local ordinance adopted prior to July 1, 2025, the Board regulation shall govern, except when the conflicting local ordinance is more stringent. The bill prohibits a locality from adopting any local ordinance requiring owners of Tier 4 rainwater harvesting systems to connect to any municipal water supply or impose any penalty, including condemnation proceedings, on such owner for failing to connect to a municipal water supply.

# Statewide Mandate of 7.5%
# Housing Growth?!?!
NOT HEARD YET

### SB975 Statewide housing targets for localities.
Introduced by: [Schuyler T. VanValkenburg (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELEfzqBmti5f4Pt-ByAMM7WYyIqg7JhYLnOOmTbcfCoo2uMa4HI4XuWP5A-9JlYS9SEblPkLNjyLmE1vz-dEOqMcvbNLvNk1Gv1HWyYYOJsrCOmPIYqetGytSdEMVzVL6XFoV8nK8xN6lSMtelfJrLvgGWtHy_PrRfiGdtKEBzTp4Q_FTYV9oPiVQPEX1Att1eQOla4xs0_SwqdxTQrMmiRrYIP7yLasLWLYkfi8SqYz9eFNELXevw==&c=I-WuUZebKE00e7Kw3k-Nd6ZU5sQVFRCFluYxcArJmazLZmAM52t-bw==&ch=0QNwXBMdUK5vSgeml7IpgRvzX6elzACGqt1zYrj7ofay_SupHMRTwA==)
Statewide housing targets for localities. Requires localities to increase their total housing stock by at least 7.5 percent over the five-year period beginning January 1, 2026.
The bill provides that, in order to meet the 7.5 percent growth target, a locality shall develop a housing growth plan that best meets the needs of the locality and may include any of various listed housing growth strategies.
The bill further provides that, after January 1, 2031, an applicant who seeks local government approval for a residential development that will have the effect of increasing the supply of housing in a locality and has that application rejected may, in addition to other remedies, appeal such decision to the Housing Approval Board, which shall be established by the Director of the Department of Housing and Community Development.
The bill authorizes the Housing Approval Board to overturn local decisions and approve applications under certain circumstances. However, if the Housing Approval Board determines that a locality has in good faith implemented at least three of the housing growth strategies listed in the bill and has not rejected more than 25 percent of new housing development proposals over the previous five years, the Housing Approval Board shall allow the local decision to stand.
Finally, the bill provides that the Housing Approval Board shall give extra weight for increases in affordable housing and for the rehabilitation of current, underutilized housing stock.

### SB744 Firearm transfers to another person from a prohibited person.
Introduced by: [Barbara A. Favola (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELEfzqBmti5f4Pt-ByAMM7WYyIqg7JhYLnOOmTbcfCoo2uMa4HI4XuWP5A-9JlYSMD1EwZyHwe8KkWKWnHM0TT0PgZafilYQqZb2dcxjRbH4UvtlESIZfqDb0Co2bhAmS-_62lAQT5FbIiTDFNj2DcPNTIj9RBuzsLhzmZkibiR8Y1xd8bmNCGJ1JRszs87keugFm4_N89zNJQqPjQNm5KShpjgZ9Fd-Py8YwpaLAn7MLWcOd10sng==&c=I-WuUZebKE00e7Kw3k-Nd6ZU5sQVFRCFluYxcArJmazLZmAM52t-bw==&ch=0QNwXBMdUK5vSgeml7IpgRvzX6elzACGqt1zYrj7ofay_SupHMRTwA==)
MOVES FORWARD ON PARTY LINE VOTE 01/13/2025 Senate: Reported from Courts of Justice (8-Y 5-N) Committee: Courts of Justice
Votes YEAS--Surovell, Deeds, Boysko, Bagby, Aird, Carroll Foy, Perry, Salim--8 NAYS--Obenshain, McDougle, Stanley, Peake, Jordan--5 ABSTENTIONS--0

Firearm transfers to another person from a prohibited person. Provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member may transfer a firearm owned by such prohibited person to any person who is not otherwise prohibited
The bill also provides that such prohibited person who transfers, sells, or surrenders a firearm pursuant to the provisions of the bill shall inform the clerk of the court of the name and address of the transferee, the federally licensed firearms dealer, or the law-enforcement agency in possession of the firearm and shall provide a copy of such form to the transferee.
The bill also provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member shall be advised that a law-enforcement officer may obtain a search warrant to search for any firearms from such person if such law-enforcement officer has reason to believe that such person has not relinquished all firearms in his possession.

### SB837 Concealed handgun permits; minimum age requirement.
Introduced by: [Glen H. Sturtevant, Jr. (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELEfzqBmti5f4Pt-ByAMM7WYyIqg7JhYLnOOmTbcfCoo2uMa4HI4XuWP5A-9JlYSY0S-rVUpZw5RYWqJx3i37pKQnRpxqO8Y5FjF0qdSBlAXLpMSNIrA3Z3TE25S7avC4MqzQWxa6_MIVZCSVOfWNIL8cxnWcLSFY7aksosXa6-DyKnfPQGLqoILz01lkXJwuy5kDdZ5LPp4dP2YqUpW-Wxdd9q1ZwNPmG6oxSkIi11ddDUU16tDqg==&c=I-WuUZebKE00e7Kw3k-Nd6ZU5sQVFRCFluYxcArJmazLZmAM52t-bw==&ch=0QNwXBMdUK5vSgeml7IpgRvzX6elzACGqt1zYrj7ofay_SupHMRTwA==) NOT HEARD
Concealed handgun permits; minimum age requirement. Reduces from 21 years of age to 18 years of age the minimum age requirement for resident and nonresident concealed handgun permits.

### SB848 Purchase of certain firearms; age requirement; penalty.
Introduced by: [Saddam Azlan Salim (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELEfzqBmti5f4Pt-ByAMM7WYyIqg7JhYLnOOmTbcfCoo2uMa4HI4XuWP5A-9JlYSEEGHtW6HREtbSHOpkMgJcsfroqMMbS7h4jSBVjXqiXtv1x6z4cAiBt9YrGiIxRA-0H0Zg8KA0Msx3xZcfUX98c1QAP7IDaqTeOKmWC3CX2Xy0T9Ze0TqdqtJ_X36iPlTtFCTpN7wCApavzptJlund9qYOReQkzs8LWVXSYNwtmBhO14mAhnGgg==&c=I-WuUZebKE00e7Kw3k-Nd6ZU5sQVFRCFluYxcArJmazLZmAM52t-bw==&ch=0QNwXBMdUK5vSgeml7IpgRvzX6elzACGqt1zYrj7ofay_SupHMRTwA==) Purchase of certain firearms; age requirement; penalty. Prohibits any person under 21 years of age from purchasing a handgun or assault firearm, with exceptions for the purchase of an assault firearm by a law-enforcement officer, correctional officer, jail officer, or member of the Armed Forces of the United States, the Virginia National Guard, or the National Guard of any other state. Accordingly, the bill prohibits a licensed dealer from selling, renting, trading, or transferring from his inventory a handgun or assault firearm to any person under 21 years of age. A violation of either prohibition is a Class 6 felony. The bill also expands the definition of "assault firearm" as the term applies to criminal history record information checks. NOT HEARD

### SB849 Nonresident concealed handgun permits.
Introduced by: [J.D. "Danny" Diggs (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELEfzqBmti5f4Pt-ByAMM7WYyIqg7JhYLnOOmTbcfCoo2uMa4HI4XuWP5A-9JlYSF1XL_YusOj0eBg2RfbzcFEYoD8dCtQ3reUgDqIe-nJSTMTAZ55yB7zY2atStZQlwEFg3H9Oii3TGqPwAKP2gkU5SZTqZW55TFv9w6l9MM2uCSJt-NWeOyZE7QyXcfULjmwcm1qQ4UhclX7PHepk8nBsBmaJVz49qnzM9Fmbxx2h1FGKR8jDZuw==&c=I-WuUZebKE00e7Kw3k-Nd6ZU5sQVFRCFluYxcArJmazLZmAM52t-bw==&ch=0QNwXBMdUK5vSgeml7IpgRvzX6elzACGqt1zYrj7ofay_SupHMRTwA==) Nonresident concealed handgun permits. Requires the Department of State Police to immediately issue a nonresident concealed handgun permit after 90 days from the receipt of the application for such permit if, within that 90-day period, the Department has not issued such permit or determined that the applicant is disqualified from receiving such permit. The bill further requires the Department to revoke such permit if the applicant is later found by the Department to be disqualified from receiving such permit. NOT HEARD

clean_body: The 2025 General Assembly Session | | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT | | | | | | | | | 2025 SESSION What happened Monday? | GOVERNOR'S STATE OF THE COMMONWEALTH ADDRESS | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES Begins: Wednesday, January 8 at noon Crossover: Tuesday, February 4 Ends: Saturday, February 22 Last Day for Governor's Actions: Monday, March 24 Reconvene: Wednesday, April 2 Monday Senate Committee Meetings LOCAL GOVERNMENT 8:00 AM, Monday Senate Room B (306), GAB COURTS OF JUSTICE 8:00 AM, Monday Senate Room A (305), GAB JOINT SESSION GOVERNOR'S STATE OF THE COMMONWEALTH ADDRESS 9:30 AM, Monday Senate Chamber, Capitol COMMERCE & LABOR 15 min after session adjourns, Monday Senate Room A (305), GAB Click on the links below to see bills coming up in Senate committees on Monday. Bills that say "failed" are bills that are continued from last year. Focus on bills that say "in committee." | == | == | == | AMANDA CHASE | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | Dear Hello Now that Richmond City water issues have been mitigated, the General Assembly was able to get to work today. All 3 Senate Committees were held today: Local Governments, Courts of Justice and Commerce and Labor. Both the Virginia Senate and House gaveled in at House Chambers this morning, Monday, January 13 at 9:30am for a Joint Assembly to hear the Governor's State of the Union address. You can watch by clicking== and fast forward to 10am. Did you know that you can watch your Virginia General Assembly in action every Monday through Friday until they adjourn on Saturday, February 22? Just click the links below to watch a committee meeting or session. You can actually call in while the committee is meeting and state whether you support or oppose each of the bills on the docket and briefly explain your position. Some people prefer to go in person. Due to the thousands of bills that will come before the House and the Senate, I will be following the Senate calendar. If a bill passes the House, it will be reviewed by the Senate after crossover. If you would like to tune to committee meetings or session, you can do so using the links below. If you missed the meetings, you can always watch the recordings. | | | While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you. Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. Thank you in advance. We must now save Virginia. Let's do this. | 2025 Session JOINT SESSION Governor Glenn Youngkin's State of the Commonwealth Address Monday, January 13, 2025 at 9:30am | This morning, Governor Glenn Youngkin delivered his last annual State of the Commonwealth Address to the Joint Session of both the Virginia House and Senate in House Chambers. The Governor celebrated achievements made over the past 3 years and set a vision for his remaining year in office to include the following: push back against the shut down of carbon emitting power plants and the Virginia Clean Economy Act passed in 2020 by the Democrat Trifecta more tax relief including the removal of tax on tips, the car tax on qualifying individuals and an income tax credit encouragement of more data centers, making Virginia the "data center capital of the world," and making sure Virginia is doing what is necessary to support that goal $517 million in state aid to local schools $290 million in school construction "foundational and comprehensive re-design of our funding formula for public schools deport illegals here in the state who have committed violent crimes if localities have "sanctuary city" policies and refuse to cooperate with ICE, they should lose state funding. opposition to legalizing a retail market for marijuana create a commission to oversee the several varieties of gambling now allowed in Virginia. | | | | | | | | | | | | LOCAL GOVERNMENTS COMMITTEE | There are currently 18 bills "in committee." Several bills were heard today. Note that the Senate Local Governments Committee meets on Mondays at 8am each week. If the bill wasn't heard today, check the docket for next Monday. Here's the progress of some of the bills highlighted. | Raises for the Board of Supervisors QUADRUPLED?!! BILL MOVES FORWARD SEE VOTES BELOW | SB762 Supervisors, boards of; increases statutory salary caps for certain counties. Introduced by: == Salaries of boards of supervisors for certain counties. Increases the statutory salary caps for boards of supervisors of counties that have adopted salary limits consistent with provisions in the Code of Virginia relating to alternative procedures for establishing salaries of boards of supervisors. 1.Alternative procedure for establishing salaries of boards of supervisors; limits; fringe benefits. In lieu of other provisions of law, the boards of supervisors of the several counties may establish annually, by ordinance, and pay in monthly installments each of their members an annual salary pursuant to the following procedure and schedule: 1\. On a date determined by the board of supervisors, not earlier than May 1 nor later than June 30 each year, the board, after public hearing pursuant to notice in the manner and form provided in §§ 15.2-1426 and 15.2-1427, shall establish by ordinance the salary of its members for the ensuing fiscal year not to exceed the maximums herein set out. 2\. Counties within the following population brackets shall be allowed to set salaries for board members not to exceed the following amounts: Population Annual Salary 200,000 and over $15,000 to $52,000 105,000 to 199,999 $13,000 to $47,000 80,000 to 104,999 $11,000 to $43,000 50,000 to 79,999 $9,000 $34,000 25,000 to 49,999 $7,000 to $22,000 15,000 to 24,999 $5,500 to $21,000 14,999 and under 4,000 $20,000 The maximum annual salaries herein provided may be adjusted in any year or years, by ordinance as above provided, by an inflation factor not to exceed five percent. 3\. Any board of supervisors may fix, by ordinance as above provided, annually an additional sum to be paid as hereinabove provided to the chairman and vice-chairman of the board not to exceed $1,800 and $1,200, respectively, without regard to the maximum salary limits. 4\. In addition to and without regard for the salary limits herein set out, any board of supervisors by resolution may grant to its members any or all of the fringe benefits in the manner and form as such benefits are provided for county employees or any of them. | THE BILL MOVES FORWARD 01/13/2025 Senate: Reported from Local Government (7-Y 4-N 1-A) Committee: Local Government VOTES YEAS--Hackworth, Bagby, Sturtevant, Williams Graves, Durant, Diggs, Pekarsky--7 NAYS--Suetterlein, Aird, VanValkenburg, Roem--4 ABSTENTIONS--McPike--1 | Preferential Treatment for Minority Owned and Women Owned Businesses BILL MOVES FORWARD NO REPUBLICAN OPPOSES | SB872 Charter; City of Portsmouth. Introduced by: == Charter; City of Portsmouth. Amends the charter for the City of Portsmouth by authorizing the City Manager to require city departments to implement appropriate enhancement or remedial measures consistent with prevailing law wherever there exists (i) a compelling government interest, (ii) an analysis that documents a statistically significant disparity between the availability and utilization of minority-owned and women-owned businesses, or (iii) direct evidence by minority-owned businesses or women-owned businesses of the impact of race by discrimination. | 01/13/2025 Senate: Reported from Local Government (10-Y 0-N 3-A) Committee: Local Government VOTES YEAS--McPike, Hackworth, Bagby, Aird, VanValkenburg, Roem, Williams Graves, Durant, Diggs, Pekarsky--10 NAYS--0 ABSTENTIONS--Stanley, Suetterlein, Sturtevant--3 | Preferential Treatment Based on Income? NOT HEARD YET | SB839 Zoning; by-right multifamily development in areas zoned for commercial use. Introduced by: == Zoning; by-right multifamily development in areas zoned for commercial use. Requires a locality to provide in its zoning ordinance provisions allowing for the by-right development and construction of multifamily residential uses on all land contained in commercial or business zoning district classifications. The bill provides that the review and approval of such development shall be done administratively by the locality's staff and that any residential development that dedicates a minimum of 10 percent of the total number of housing units to households with a household income at or below 80 percent of the area median income shall be granted an accelerated plan review and permit approval process by the locality's staff. | Want to Harvest Your Own Rainwater? Beware Local Government Mandating Connection to Water Supply NOT HEARD YET | SB851 Local ordinances for the use of certain rainwater harvesting systems. Introduced by: == Local ordinances for the use of certain rainwater harvesting systems. Provides that existing local ordinances adopted prior to July 1, 2025, governing rainwater harvesting systems, shall continue in force; however, in the event of a conflict between a Board of Health regulation and a local ordinance adopted prior to July 1, 2025, the Board regulation shall govern, except when the conflicting local ordinance is more stringent. The bill prohibits a locality from adopting any local ordinance requiring owners of Tier 4 rainwater harvesting systems to connect to any municipal water supply or impose any penalty, including condemnation proceedings, on such owner for failing to connect to a municipal water supply. | Statewide Mandate of 7.5% Housing Growth?!?! NOT HEARD YET | SB975 Statewide housing targets for localities. Introduced by: == Statewide housing targets for localities. Requires localities to increase their total housing stock by at least 7.5 percent over the five-year period beginning January 1, 2026. The bill provides that, in order to meet the 7.5 percent growth target, a locality shall develop a housing growth plan that best meets the needs of the locality and may include any of various listed housing growth strategies. The bill further provides that, after January 1, 2031, an applicant who seeks local government approval for a residential development that will have the effect of increasing the supply of housing in a locality and has that application rejected may, in addition to other remedies, appeal such decision to the Housing Approval Board, which shall be established by the Director of the Department of Housing and Community Development. The bill authorizes the Housing Approval Board to overturn local decisions and approve applications under certain circumstances. However, if the Housing Approval Board determines that a locality has in good faith implemented at least three of the housing growth strategies listed in the bill and has not rejected more than 25 percent of new housing development proposals over the previous five years, the Housing Approval Board shall allow the local decision to stand. Finally, the bill provides that the Housing Approval Board shall give extra weight for increases in affordable housing and for the rehabilitation of current, underutilized housing stock. | COURTS OF JUSTICE COMMITTEE | GUN BILLS COMING UP MONDAY | SB744 Firearm transfers to another person from a prohibited person. Introduced by: == MOVES FORWARD ON PARTY LINE VOTE 01/13/2025 Senate: Reported from Courts of Justice (8-Y 5-N) Committee: Courts of Justice Votes YEAS--Surovell, Deeds, Boysko, Bagby, Aird, Carroll Foy, Perry, Salim--8 NAYS--Obenshain, McDougle, Stanley, Peake, Jordan--5 ABSTENTIONS--0 Firearm transfers to another person from a prohibited person. Provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member may transfer a firearm owned by such prohibited person to any person who is not otherwise prohibited The bill also provides that such prohibited person who transfers, sells, or surrenders a firearm pursuant to the provisions of the bill shall inform the clerk of the court of the name and address of the transferee, the federally licensed firearms dealer, or the law-enforcement agency in possession of the firearm and shall provide a copy of such form to the transferee. The bill also provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member shall be advised that a law-enforcement officer may obtain a search warrant to search for any firearms from such person if such law-enforcement officer has reason to believe that such person has not relinquished all firearms in his possession. SB837 Concealed handgun permits; minimum age requirement. Introduced by: == NOT HEARD Concealed handgun permits; minimum age requirement. Reduces from 21 years of age to 18 years of age the minimum age requirement for resident and nonresident concealed handgun permits. SB848 Purchase of certain firearms; age requirement; penalty. Introduced by: == Purchase of certain firearms; age requirement; penalty. Prohibits any person under 21 years of age from purchasing a handgun or assault firearm, with exceptions for the purchase of an assault firearm by a law-enforcement officer, correctional officer, jail officer, or member of the Armed Forces of the United States, the Virginia National Guard, or the National Guard of any other state. Accordingly, the bill prohibits a licensed dealer from selling, renting, trading, or transferring from his inventory a handgun or assault firearm to any person under 21 years of age. A violation of either prohibition is a Class 6 felony. The bill also expands the definition of "assault firearm" as the term applies to criminal history record information checks. NOT HEARD SB849 Nonresident concealed handgun permits. Introduced by: == Nonresident concealed handgun permits. Requires the Department of State Police to immediately issue a nonresident concealed handgun permit after 90 days from the receipt of the application for such permit if, within that 90-day period, the Department has not issued such permit or determined that the applicant is disqualified from receiving such permit. The bill further requires the Department to revoke such permit if the applicant is later found by the Department to be disqualified from receiving such permit. NOT HEARD | Making Sure Data Centers Estimate Water Need | SB899 Zoning; data centers; water use. Introduced by: == Zoning; data centers; water use. Authorizes a locality to include in its zoning ordinance provisions for (i) requiring proposed data center developments to submit water use estimates and (ii) considering water use when making rezoning and special use permit decisions related to data center development NOT HEARD YET | | | | | | | | | TOMORROW'S SENATE COMMITTEE MEETINGS SESSION BEGINS AT NOON | | | | == | | == | == | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US | | | | | | |

name: Voter Action Project
subject: This is about serving our citizens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
So many people depend on the USPS. Not just our fellow citizens, but businesses as well, where private shipping companies and retailers depend on USPS for "final mile" delivery where it's not profitable for their business to do the delivery.
Privatizing the Postal Service would make USPS focus on profit, too, and not service, inevitably leading to route cuts and ending delivery in rural areas and elsewhere. It's not anything close to what our founders intended.
Make your voice heard: Tell Congress you don't want to see the USPS privatized ever! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011325_1&amount=25]
Folks,
The United States Postal Service has served every corner of our nation for nearly 250 years. But Trump and his billionaire allies want to rip it apart, placing profits over an essential public service. Their dangerous plan to privatize the USPS threatens rural communities, Indigenous communities, seniors, veterans, small businesses, and many millions of Americans who rely on affordable, reliable mail service.
It's simple: Privatization means higher costs, reduced access, and the elimination of mail services in areas where private companies refuse to deliver. For rural Americans, this isn’t just inconvenient, it’s catastrophic, especially for mail-in ballots.
Please, step up and tell Congress: Do NOT privatize the USPS now or ever! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
A coalition of groups stopped Trump’s last privatization push in 2018 with overwhelming, bipartisan public outcry. But this time, the stakes are higher. Trump is working with his billionaire friends Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy and other MAGA allies to pressure Congress into dismantling this beloved institution.
The USPS isn’t just a service; it’s a promise to every American. That’s why both parties came together in 2022 to pass the Postal Service Reform Act with overwhelming bipartisan support. Even Postmaster Louis DeJoy stepped up to lobby Congress at the time. They knew privatization was wrong then, and it’s wrong now .
The USPS is America’s lifeline, delivering to every corner of the nation. We cannot let it be picked apart, sold for its parts, and placed into the hands of Wall Street billionaires. We must raise our voices louder than ever to protect the USPS.
Add your name and make it clear to Congress: We won't let you privatize our critical postal service >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011325_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011325_1&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011325_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011325_1&amount=25]

clean_body: So many people depend on the USPS. Not just our fellow citizens, but businesses as well, where private shipping companies and retailers depend on USPS for "final mile" delivery where it's not profitable for their business to do the delivery. Privatizing the Postal Service would make USPS focus on profit, too, and not service, inevitably leading to route cuts and ending delivery in rural areas and elsewhere. It's not anything close to what our founders intended. Make your voice heard: Tell Congress you don't want to see the USPS privatized ever! >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project Logo [] Folks, The United States Postal Service has served every corner of our nation for nearly 250 years. But Trump and his billionaire allies want to rip it apart, placing profits over an essential public service. Their dangerous plan to privatize the USPS threatens rural communities, Indigenous communities, seniors, veterans, small businesses, and many millions of Americans who rely on affordable, reliable mail service. It's simple: Privatization means higher costs, reduced access, and the elimination of mail services in areas where private companies refuse to deliver. For rural Americans, this isn’t just inconvenient, it’s catastrophic, especially for mail-in ballots. Please, step up and tell Congress: Do NOT privatize the USPS now or ever! >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] A coalition of groups stopped Trump’s last privatization push in 2018 with overwhelming, bipartisan public outcry. But this time, the stakes are higher. Trump is working with his billionaire friends Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy and other MAGA allies to pressure Congress into dismantling this beloved institution. The USPS isn’t just a service; it’s a promise to every American. That’s why both parties came together in 2022 to pass the Postal Service Reform Act with overwhelming bipartisan support. Even Postmaster Louis DeJoy stepped up to lobby Congress at the time. They knew privatization was wrong then, and it’s wrong now . The USPS is America’s lifeline, delivering to every corner of the nation. We cannot let it be picked apart, sold for its parts, and placed into the hands of Wall Street billionaires. We must raise our voices louder than ever to protect the USPS. Add your name and make it clear to Congress: We won't let you privatize our critical postal service >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Trump, Elon, & The Bee
body:
Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn’t have become such a major issue this election.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn9cfdblgpjapobfcalahht8jq4fl3si13a7j5c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64o30cjh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl6vo4hk0gfa3am84g7v9s397lsu7ub7kpno9ek8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64o30cjh2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0l2bus2em8iv2v050bvflu6obu2jt4aadd3g1mo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64o30cjh2bs)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_**Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcs5rq296gfclsjhtmvjoud33aeaggv7v50k8sa0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64o30cjh2bs)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1029kibfjui1oc5af5b7bbt634gcfk9llmtv8eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64o30cjh2bs)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. "**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkpk4rkc784e28gs47ms0usvbv9nt3ecpsc725ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64o30cjh2bs)I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd1lh35urf19piht2ft5jar8ibdv45q471acuu8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64o30cjh2bs)
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3tn20ee5lugbmi00j9atpfgtrp3tjhtquutadn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64o30cjh2bs)
---
Thanks for supporting free speech. **We 'll never give up the fight.**Seth Dillon
CEO, The Babylon Bee

| Good Morning,
We hope you enjoyed your New Year, and are ready for a great 2025! Over the past few weeks, Rob and the Team have been out in the district, in Washington D.C., and working hard for the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania! Rob took his oath of office in Washington, as well as a ceremonial oath of office at the Luzerne County Courthouse, went to several community events, and had some great chili in Duryea!
---
|
---
|
---
| Rob is extremely supportive of our first responders, which is why he went to several events to help volunteer fire companies and ailing responders this weekend. With this in mind, we are praying for the brave firefighters and victims of the tragic fires ravaging Southern California. Join us in support of our fellow Americans whose lives have been turned upside down.

name: Signature Request [via Team Marsha]
subject: Dear President Trump,
body:
We want your name at the VERY TOP of this letter!

| |
---
| | | Hey there -

We are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP.

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. _**[So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zod534kbqgtgnrkrdb0463ndoifh50r9h77pr4tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64o34c1h2bs "So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:")**_

---
| Dear President Trump,

I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States.

Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. _I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time._

From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts:

**1)** Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that **YOU** are the right person to lead America.

**2)** Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that **YOUR** leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans.

_Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration._

Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great.

Together, we will **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

Sincerely,

**[X_________________](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zoddli60k6sccfjmb9gqdd7385fhaer5ga5rf1d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64o34c1h2bs "X_________________")**
---
| | | [SIGN THE LETTER](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8ff3f8dmqojh4i7lo04pugausm8ao1rer6irc2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64o34c1h2bs "SIGN THE LETTER")
---

Thank you,

Team Marsha

---
|
---
| Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.

---

Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. "So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:" | Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Sincerely, "X_______________" | | | "SIGN THE LETTER" Thank you, Team Marsha | | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund PO Box 3750 Brentwood, TN 37024 This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community. | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: I never imagined this would happen
body:
Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn’t have become such a major issue this election.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z49p0tn8dc3acjq90vka50vnnpsjk7oqqvql7hmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64p72cph2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc4pts55o8muo3v4jg759q341ajephbf6147v9do_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64p72cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ohjn4kema2uoc14safa078uqi2h0earlojcbm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64p72cph2bs)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_**Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs7luji2l2j1u54jnafpol0s04egeqsort39tc4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64p72cph2bs)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8256bbp7p75u2501lo1aaf14quphighpg4vqlq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64p72cph2bs)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. "**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8nvk2qfvi504uivd5rptquuur7kbfhjlflu3g5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64p72cph2bs)I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjml031c0lk78ieki2mp0ado7tpjngvp0aauk8sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64p72cph2bs)
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze01utshf4gbhnffovk3jir7cadafr3a914hrvso_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g64p72cph2bs)
---
Thanks for supporting free speech. **We 'll never give up the fight.**Seth Dillon
CEO, The Babylon Bee
Pronouns: Bee and Beeself

For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke. The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.Enter Elon Musk. Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines. But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election. The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are " fringe." President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America. Thanks for supporting free speech. We 'll never give up the fight.Seth Dillon CEO, The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself | Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: The Babylon Bee, LLC PO Box 546 Jupiter, FL 33468 American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Before Trump is inaugurated next week
body:
Trump is preparing to enter the White House with a Republican Congress and Cabinet stacked with billionaires ready to do his bidding.
---
Derek, A week from today, Trump will be inaugurated as our next president. He will enter the White House with a Republican Congress and a Cabinet stacked with billionaires ready to do his bidding. We know that’s not the outcome we fought so hard for last year. If you’re feeling frustrated and worried about what’s to come, you’re certainly not alone. But while it might be tempting to tune out entirely right now, the truth is that there is nothing Trump and his allies would love more than to enact their Project 2025 agenda while we all just sit by and watch. They’d love to see Democrats give up. And that’s exactly what we can’t afford to do — not with so much on the line. Since Election Day, thousands of Democrats have committed to staying in the fight, and have made contributions to help us build the strongest possible Party. Today, they need you to join them. We hope you’ll consider making your first $3 contribution of 2025 before Trump is inaugurated next week. [**Click below to make a contribution of any amount that feels right to you:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250113_2535_fr&refcode2=2556_22930333_HWoqrh&akid=2556%2E22930333%2EHWoqrh) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250113_2535_fr&refcode2=2556_22930333_HWoqrh&akid=2556%2E22930333%2EHWoqrh)**

Thank you in advance for considering pitching in for the first time this year to help.
The Democrats

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=88e515170d3a419c80dede80824860e4&_e=i_nzFNoGtPJD1rjC_qWnDYoTGlfWVxuI5oWnMXgaySCuJ0sy_Q0p_RsMpOpmK3GOGTiqYcYwQ2JIgqcqwOt6J9GJOAwxWzxu4cADtfRMSOY0aYhvGxxz87MmrMy_7zcIR3KC7eQ8-MOjTshJ7c9Y4eQ3voHSlMaikvY6vWQv4ER_y28bvIN_PVZVN9W7el4_QK3TJE4Wc73kkv-ZcpaTMJ7nuEqNqOaa2toZc9SmEa8k-VbyGjzrqwa_xTsmy7W0S7FWkaH-Po0RWw6yNO1oerfUKfMl5IR0rf6mlS_ON3D6c9KaF6Ek1FuRuRSibVyXI5z8WKjLu8CTgddo-TbPYVzKsxZJLPTYgKMcCGtrvJTCKGT9-x-7ddLaa8e47BfsSWrwRsuzcM2bDpuRNqSpng%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=88e515170d3a419c80dede80824860e4&_e=i_nzFNoGtPJD1rjC_qWnDYoTGlfWVxuI5oWnMXgaySCuJ0sy_Q0p_RsMpOpmK3GOGTiqYcYwQ2JIgqcqwOt6J9GJOAwxWzxu4cADtfRMSOY0aYhvGxxz87MmrMy_7zcIR3KC7eQ8-MOjTshJ7c9Y4eQ3voHSlMaikvY6vWQv4ER_y28bvIN_PVZVN9W7el4_QK3TJE4Wc73kkv-ZcpaTMJ7nuEqNqOaa2toZc9SmEa8k-VbyGjzrqwa_xTsmy7W0unGdvN2zJQkFiRI6n23Usr-hEpQl8rR6Bqn7qZoR0G9_vf2ftqkQmJct3QVsaWKSfAD2j8AnZXT0_LVZrPxpjAUOkft8EP4rdVrbMxd_4-XJF6oGq4khTSJ2St261B5fmnI4IqlwCfjAoytoHCRdow%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=88e515170d3a419c80dede80824860e4&_e=i_nzFNoGtPJD1rjC_qWnDYoTGlfWVxuI5oWnMXgaySCuJ0sy_Q0p_RsMpOpmK3GOGTiqYcYwQ2JIgqcqwOt6J9GJOAwxWzxu4cADtfRMSOY0aYhvGxxz87MmrMy_7zcIR3KC7eQ8-MOjTshJ7c9Y4eQ3voHSlMaikvY6vWQv4ER_y28bvIN_PVZVN9W7el4_QK3TJE4Wc73kkv-ZcpaTMJ7nuEqNqOaa2toZc9SmEa8k-VbyGjzrqwa_xTsmy7W0IqXRHZGIYPfLsqm-nwneW4V7MNPBbqiTSK2MXkUvoNiulUf0Uuuo53oB4qSN6msmhIaVKXWz1ZrhLi50iWKLStBe6SItA1hSyeixqd_2iwGlvfwP3KfHPmNfvRY6VWs5MQzf0veZCieULmOuiHZ38w%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=88e515170d3a419c80dede80824860e4&_e=i_nzFNoGtPJD1rjC_qWnDYoTGlfWVxuI5oWnMXgaySCuJ0sy_Q0p_RsMpOpmK3GOGTiqYcYwQ2JIgqcqwOt6J9GJOAwxWzxu4cADtfRMSOY0aYhvGxxz87MmrMy_7zcIR3KC7eQ8-MOjTshJ7c9Y4eQ3voHSlMaikvY6vWQv4ER_y28bvIN_PVZVN9W7el4_QK3TJE4Wc73kkv-ZcpaTMJ7nuEqNqOaa2toZc9SmEa8k-VbyGjzrqwa_xTsmy7W0CJiydswVoGnEBCZB1JA-yt2-4vhKw0WREjupX2B2GC1-HB09bJDAruHs0D53d8MTLoLBRLFewd_z1aOXYQTLzLf3ne-4vkqodCwH8005x-S3Ji4xKb-7RyBMiiC4z5WLReT-Jvqr9A-hc6Z4MDCFdg%3D%3D)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC
body:
| | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9v_zDMKsOhIsGaYsSQAIlT46RJ1cLFi0RbsWsZWZVQtXmgyDsn337uID04JUXAsI6orsUbi_w-ZL2hmMGJwRhHH7to16DmC-xG6nDdRvcKRJqaU_ussDh7LuKXYXWNOBzK1g9qdgTNFukKJpvRfgtlWWm0MHVTQvPpcXHT15WH9E6f7MSNHmYHmhVXk8p2pp-ePwjBgDIEwJU8VRSwvknMvj6V9pI3TPs5_9c8ubHOM0fF2bkRu0-6_PfdvcdE65wmKb0-u2wBsK1RjTRPFO0YtBv6A9H9-suWRm-tfFCJXClHgqb8unYZuuEMQR2vJU9hsBiYqiyrBssMhE-DWO1kYL4nE9R79PhXtPO2Ff5o_mkFQhf33JJGn0_zCalhT43c9n9DgLaFlZNJY75DswRF9fh7bSa1hBd2Tdg8ymfMjoIgpHykkC69M1ODfHXGRce/4d4/au3C92jWT3C6HNyIg0EOJQ/h0/h001.AVPrtyK1q_WNGrRX309xQyd0Ki5VOiyI6qZCjtKBTns) | |
---
RFK Jr.’s nomination to run the Department of Health and Human Services has deadly consequences for the future of our children.

Not only is he pushing dangerous and false anti-vaccine and health rhetoric, but his views directly threaten the well-being of our children everywhere.

**[We cannot have RFK Jr. run our nation’s health policies. We need to do everything we can to protect the health and future of our children. Sign our petition now, if you agree >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5kFGCOu-4QWAFcxar6PJRSeLYPqDqQlHf0o6aC3mFxb-GdPhL6wSq_Mqhdu15CkZyWWjdYsheZlsG5cnZWUl9Nr49Cd-B8Eg3K-yhvCACapUezn-tpfsK3-0SBJXti9LrIhqoOa7nUgfNStCzc5pc8OLf4teTZ1TjIA-Eg8EY1cPvCMXvG01uja8QPVovsT4SlVqyby-droABBqapkP-XyiE3aMMmqwOHJb0AQJHOaIbL9kwogEPKZzRf8EqOE1TFyAnqN-S1YRTpZkbJggHa-Q-I_MgGhqNl2aT0_TDs5Lk7VuMesb1X_MB7TKPp1TDpDVSSDvU3Yl0H1r8PrxWxJElX41cuNH7jcNo7572Z74uNKz0kr2Z9Suoc3DCRljdV/4d4/au3C92jWT3C6HNyIg0EOJQ/h1/h001.WtMqOa-TEueME-7Plf67d8clndNAOoKEgdJEM8On53I)** | | [Fight back against RFK Jr.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5kFGCOu-4QWAFcxar6PJRSeLYPqDqQlHf0o6aC3mFxb-GdPhL6wSq_Mqhdu15CkZyWWjdYsheZlsG5cnZWUl9Nr49Cd-B8Eg3K-yhvCACapUezn-tpfsK3-0SBJXti9LrIhqoOa7nUgfNStCzc5pc8F_iZVxpwnRXZa-bswiLfYv9zB8Kf0Hvom0YulNVyUzz4h9bYh2Y9t1JNGQzUsWgeaM5Id6mJZ8wcowG5kDs5ySMFLIn2_r-qzuxhhS7bDxhGWnFGm2Lm134B3oGGFenUIklUbazJlOehs3EA5xZFUZPQaB0xJUfBrtEeAkITUvG5vnWOm_9wWBbqrPe_o4i_ZJqiiPGgqHXtXYCZMzZirO3ipTmjWDhInG92aH9-7jE/4d4/au3C92jWT3C6HNyIg0EOJQ/h2/h001.My7dZeNjgb-2KlOglCdvcrPvFawU5c0Il7_PNJSgIEc)
---
The list goes on and on about why RFK Jr. is unfit for this position, but here are just a few reasons why it could harm our children’s well-being:
* He continues to spread dangerous anti-vaccine misinformation and debunked vaccine-autism theories, **_putting children at risk of preventable diseases_** like measles and polio.
* He has proposed weakening the FDA, which could lead to **_harmful, unregulated treatments_** being pushed on children **_without proper safety checks._**
* **_He proposes removing fluoride from our water supply, a move that would lead to a rise in preventable dental infections, hospitalizations, and surgeries among children._**

That’s why we’re committed to make sure every child has a voice in the policy decisions that shape their lives. We need leaders who are going to listen to science to protect our future.

name: Lara Trump
subject: Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids
body:
You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind

| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkctu2zAQRb-G2tGgOHqQCy3kyMoidVFo4S6JITl0COsFSkp-v3CTfkC3BzMXOPf-vporxjHO9584UfNwyaTNWG9swg_iIybkezqmlX8aKWTJRc5zMJD5xmtXYZVRk9dQ1TrXtcjem1CCzpVHgSSCC1goKT0AWHBkvZJZbJ45Is8hr4q6LE9KBSxrHRQFZ72WrBA4UtpPD6LVLfM90bYlWg87RofzyS1TNjbv-75uDFomeyb7jdyR6IQz-WV_XjDZfxnYZXlsTPZKSkV1qLhCGXihVcVRB8e1tbZArSTVgkF_7JPZliM5YtCdu1c-XG5MVk88kY_HxKC7XL-Jw2nFeJ8ZdF9OAsy5ezXnob1dzI92aM1wuZlfLX97Gb5_dsege3sZ-L8WstT49TOOY9yqmhXiPmEc_0ru_zHHRyP_BAAA__-BUo7R)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkctu2zAQRb-G2tGgOHqQCy3kyMoidVFo4S6JITl0COsFSkp-v3CTfkC3BzMXOPf-vporxjHO9584UfNwyaTNWG9swg_iIybkezqmlX8aKWTJRc5zMJD5xmtXYZVRk9dQ1TrXtcjem1CCzpVHgSSCC1goKT0AWHBkvZJZbJ45Is8hr4q6LE9KBSxrHRQFZ72WrBA4UtpPD6LVLfM90bYlWg87RofzyS1TNjbv-75uDFomeyb7jdyR6IQz-WV_XjDZfxnYZXlsTPZKSkV1qLhCGXihVcVRB8e1tbZArSTVgkF_7JPZliM5YtCdu1c-XG5MVk88kY_HxKC7XL-Jw2nFeJ8ZdF9OAsy5ezXnob1dzI92aM1wuZlfLX97Gb5_dsege3sZ-L8WstT49TOOY9yqmhXiPmEc_0ru_zHHRyP_BAAA__-BUo7R)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkctu2zAQRb-G2tGgOHqQCy3kyMoidVFo4S6JITl0COsFSkp-v3CTfkC3BzMXOPf-vporxjHO9584UfNwyaTNWG9swg_iIybkezqmlX8aKWTJRc5zMJD5xmtXYZVRk9dQ1TrXtcjem1CCzpVHgSSCC1goKT0AWHBkvZJZbJ45Is8hr4q6LE9KBSxrHRQFZ72WrBA4UtpPD6LVLfM90bYlWg87RofzyS1TNjbv-75uDFomeyb7jdyR6IQz-WV_XjDZfxnYZXlsTPZKSkV1qLhCGXihVcVRB8e1tbZArSTVgkF_7JPZliM5YtCdu1c-XG5MVk88kY_HxKC7XL-Jw2nFeJ8ZdF9OAsy5ezXnob1dzI92aM1wuZlfLX97Gb5_dsege3sZ-L8WstT49TOOY9yqmhXiPmEc_0ru_zHHRyP_BAAA__-BUo7R)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkctu2zAQRb-G2tGgOHqQCy3kyMoidVFo4S6JITl0COsFSkp-v3CTfkC3BzMXOPf-vporxjHO9584UfNwyaTNWG9swg_iIybkezqmlX8aKWTJRc5zMJD5xmtXYZVRk9dQ1TrXtcjem1CCzpVHgSSCC1goKT0AWHBkvZJZbJ45Is8hr4q6LE9KBSxrHRQFZ72WrBA4UtpPD6LVLfM90bYlWg87RofzyS1TNjbv-75uDFomeyb7jdyR6IQz-WV_XjDZfxnYZXlsTPZKSkV1qLhCGXihVcVRB8e1tbZArSTVgkF_7JPZliM5YtCdu1c-XG5MVk88kY_HxKC7XL-Jw2nFeJ8ZdF9OAsy5ezXnob1dzI92aM1wuZlfLX97Gb5_dsege3sZ-L8WstT49TOOY9yqmhXiPmEc_0ru_zHHRyP_BAAA__-BUo7R)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise.
