name: Lara Trump
subject: If you want truth to win, please open this email.
body:
You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind

| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0d8c56f62d64360a2cba757545aaa64&_e=Egyk99s499zK3wi2O8Z6e2NobtXab-qgNd8Ir3Qf7Ei2rLZ8sn46ahy-pGJfQc-O1QwFMPjfYkzatGndokDbjjlAW_ExNyB8-0PkccvSeI-UvtiryzD9OOO6UT3_nAIvvBzxiPuTBPmNLaNf3_CU_LaX5rNkQSVabtMJ45iRAyLH_8OI7uW7FE9pgVSSN-zwSqLi2uFBQuPHJRYtxlvN5bipv_7PjUe20ifvzrfdyMp7ovYWQfNkRwYNdJ8I3Jgt3bqlqP2pVm46iALcWqtbEWOLcO3ZObqlrEeUy4JKWr8NJVIIi8hscD69QW1ogg19odR53vf5IJC92-JhMD0Ff0WSmcE8rrD07oiic-mIUF6D3bOnXIZiIVacf7q2pd13lFWRmqoW1x3lbrhyk7eIlg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0d8c56f62d64360a2cba757545aaa64&_e=Egyk99s499zK3wi2O8Z6e2NobtXab-qgNd8Ir3Qf7Ei2rLZ8sn46ahy-pGJfQc-O1QwFMPjfYkzatGndokDbjjlAW_ExNyB8-0PkccvSeI-UvtiryzD9OOO6UT3_nAIvvBzxiPuTBPmNLaNf3_CU_LaX5rNkQSVabtMJ45iRAyLH_8OI7uW7FE9pgVSSN-zwSqLi2uFBQuPHJRYtxlvN5bipv_7PjUe20ifvzrfdyMp7ovYWQfNkRwYNdJ8I3JgtfW-bBPOGTuEIixPCIqYYSqUchO1KIsa1Oah3_Eer0CUcRiCxV-gYrQPMfkN7HFhg34rfcwENRblbHyzs_FgDzbKOedpXFeV-6AvRSK3esfADfttyMXBioFPUHCSMbhbhioa2k5-7KmaPuOF0AfaLVA%3D%3D)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0d8c56f62d64360a2cba757545aaa64&_e=Egyk99s499zK3wi2O8Z6e2NobtXab-qgNd8Ir3Qf7Ei2rLZ8sn46ahy-pGJfQc-O1QwFMPjfYkzatGndokDbjjlAW_ExNyB8-0PkccvSeI-UvtiryzD9OOO6UT3_nAIvvBzxiPuTBPmNLaNf3_CU_LaX5rNkQSVabtMJ45iRAyLH_8OI7uW7FE9pgVSSN-zwSqLi2uFBQuPHJRYtxlvN5bipv_7PjUe20ifvzrfdyMp7ovYWQfNkRwYNdJ8I3Jgtwg1XbdtV_18EtO6boEQI2Q2JbFSrzZRFuq59Zg3LKrO68aDEG6cb_Lrlc3DYRASut4dxqypGE7OTbqb6d-66QNlGQQ_h_9YQF4TM8tD5qj_uSme8T_fYCUgLC9KvK5bPRn9aFrw0khtG62nnBMQVTQ%3D%3D)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0d8c56f62d64360a2cba757545aaa64&_e=Egyk99s499zK3wi2O8Z6e2NobtXab-qgNd8Ir3Qf7Ei2rLZ8sn46ahy-pGJfQc-O1QwFMPjfYkzatGndokDbjjlAW_ExNyB8-0PkccvSeI-UvtiryzD9OOO6UT3_nAIvvBzxiPuTBPmNLaNf3_CU_LaX5rNkQSVabtMJ45iRAyLH_8OI7uW7FE9pgVSSN-zwSqLi2uFBQuPHJRYtxlvN5bipv_7PjUe20ifvzrfdyMp7ovYWQfNkRwYNdJ8I3JgtFIO9n4MRBWvqUA2QcyDT99rJerdvCP-Xv8xL35VHKYl1GJQLUVa1XMtZ3LsmzmwXvIRzhvUyh2VdXOjC_UqVy6CQIVNl3C2nVUVQnwY0aJWr7VOdCO59oeFBWV9IhVX82gdUG2aHklxdZsyeQiE9xg%3D%3D)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0d8c56f62d64360a2cba757545aaa64&_e=Egyk99s499zK3wi2O8Z6e2NobtXab-qgNd8Ir3Qf7Ei2rLZ8sn46ahy-pGJfQc-O1QwFMPjfYkzatGndokDbjjlAW_ExNyB8-0PkccvSeI-UvtiryzD9OOO6UT3_nAIvvBzxiPuTBPmNLaNf3_CU_LaX5rNkQSVabtMJ45iRAyLH_8OI7uW7FE9pgVSSN-zwSqLi2uFBQuPHJRYtxlvN5bipv_7PjUe20ifvzrfdyMp7ovYWQfNkRwYNdJ8I3JgtlNfqPs79LMrPFiDOmqcawV1ylDlznG0p19AsUnGmAw1EX5C_yNmkicxf7o9Z4IUOf2W0dh5a0KXsqAafL7o11RvyYNtV3hs-K7xzgjolvxu1BteYjO3JL_P58cVWzGMuUTslwmoPbBaWetBLW42lcA%3D%3D)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0d8c56f62d64360a2cba757545aaa64&_e=Egyk99s499zK3wi2O8Z6e2NobtXab-qgNd8Ir3Qf7Ei2rLZ8sn46ahy-pGJfQc-O1QwFMPjfYkzatGndokDbjjlAW_ExNyB8-0PkccvSeI-UvtiryzD9OOO6UT3_nAIvvBzxiPuTBPmNLaNf3_CU_LaX5rNkQSVabtMJ45iRAyLH_8OI7uW7FE9pgVSSN-zwSqLi2uFBQuPHJRYtxlvN5bipv_7PjUe20ifvzrfdyMp7ovYWQfNkRwYNdJ8I3JgtZf-kv3e7lQEFfvDK2rbx_X8ndXgqcrn2_pXOWXQ4PL5DFyHLcB5Qr0AvgPqYBX1_W8lb_OaPj3Z0ODH3MeomIcoKQrhEIiF-m9cLsMFqvbZqF2GZrRx7bakNmnyTwrr9r7a5R4LDWihACIP6CEX1Zw%3D%3D), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---

clean_body: You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind | | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology. | | | | Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. If you've heard of Brave Books , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on Fox News for countering the Left's horrible poison. Brave Books fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian Kirk Cameron (Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great Brave Books with conservative messages such as: The Test of Lionhood by Kevin Sorbo -- Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good. The Night the Snow Monster Attacked by General Michael Flynn -- Shows children what it takes to be a good leader. Happy No Snake Day byRiley Gaines -- Encourages children to stand up for the truth. Because You're My Family by Missy Robertson -- Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love. | | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several Brave Books. But my favorite is Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at Brave Books aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My Brave Book , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled The Never-Give-Up Pup and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In The Never-Give-Up Pup , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. Your gift helps Brave Books create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your, I'll send you a copy of The Never-Give-Up Pup as a special "Thank you" from me. Sharing the lessons of The Never-Give-Up Pup with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children, | | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author | | | Lara Trump Wife, Mother, and Author | | | P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left. clean_body: You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind | | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology. | | | | ~ Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, ~ Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. ~ I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. ~ If you've heard of Brave Books , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on Fox News for countering the Left's horrible poison. Brave Books fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian Kirk Cameron (Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great Brave Books with conservative messages such as: The Test of Lionhood by Kevin Sorbo -- Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good. The Night the Snow Monster Attacked by General Michael Flynn -- Shows children what it takes to be a good leader. Happy No Snake Day byRiley Gaines -- Encourages children to stand up for the truth. Because You're My Family by Missy Robertson -- Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love. | | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several Brave Books. But my favorite is Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at Brave Books aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My Brave Book , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled The Never-Give-Up Pup and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In The Never-Give-Up Pup , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. ~ Your gift helps Brave Books create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your~, I'll send you a copy of The Never-Give-Up Pup as a special "Thank you" from me. Sharing the lessons of The Never-Give-Up Pup with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children, | | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author | ~ | | ~ Lara Trump Wife, Mother, and Author | | | P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left.~ Thank you! - Lara ~ | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~~ | ~~_

Team, I’m sure you receive many emails from campaigns asking for money, but hopefully, I can provide some context behind these requests. As we strategize and plan for the future of our campaign, our monthly and quarterly fundraising objectives are crucial in these discussions. Our ability to secure victory in 2025 hinges on whether we meet these goals. We don't set these benchmarks arbitrarily; they guide our trajectory towards success. So, when you receive communications from us stressing the significance of reaching our fundraising goal, please understand that it comes from a place of sincerity. _**We value your support immensely and are committed to being completely transparent about our campaign's direction.**_ [**With that in mind, I need your support to ensure we reach our fundraising goal. * **TOP NEWS**

"**Mexican cattle banned from Texas due to screwworm threat,** " Texas Tribune's **Pooja Salhotra** -- "A single cow in Mexico and a pest the size of a housefly have held up pens full of Texas-bound cattle worth millions of dollars for the past six weeks.

The U.S. Department of Agriculture has banned Mexican cattle imports since November after a parasite known as screwworm, which wriggles into the flesh of livestock and kills them if left untreated, was discovered on a cow near Mexico's border with Guatemala. The ban on imports is a bigger problem than the screwworm itself, according to Texas Agriculture Commissioner**Sid Miller** and some Texas cattle ranchers, who say closing cattle imports damages their livelihoods, bottlenecks beef production and could increase beef prices for consumers.

"I get calls every single day from people asking for cattle," said **Alvaro Bustillos** , president of Vaquero Trading, a livestock procurement company in El Paso. "Key steps in the production value chain are being stopped because people cannot source cattle."

Miller remembers a time when screwworm wreaked havoc in Texas -- [$132 million](https://substack.com/redirect/3d73d56b-377c-4f98-871e-ce7917a0a97f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in damages in 1976 -- but said the USDA prematurely closed imports and is hampering an industry still trying to recover from two years of [widespread drought](https://substack.com/redirect/0157bb8e-63f6-4e38-ac98-42530fc6983b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/cf9fc7c2-b5b7-4de7-9dfe-ef3ee501e0a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"There's no way we are going to get screwworm," Miller told The Texas Tribune. "We have a very strict import process for these cattle."

About 3% of U.S. cattle come from Mexico. But Mexican cattle play a disproportionate role in southern states' beef production. Approximately two-thirds of Mexican cattle imports remain in Texas, New Mexico or Oklahoma, according to an estimate from **Ben Weinheimer** , the president and CEO of the Texas Cattle Feeders Association, which represents the industry across those three states.

Cattle crossing between Mexico and the U.S. remains on hold while the USDA installs new inspection pens and enhanced safety protocols to ensure cattle are healthy. Keeping the U.S. free of screwworm saves livestock producers close to $1 billion a year, said Texas Animal Health Commission spokesperson **Erin Robinson** , pointing to a USDA estimate that accounts for costs of labor, treatment, veterinary care, eradication efforts and loss of production.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/cf9fc7c2-b5b7-4de7-9dfe-ef3ee501e0a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Shutting off Mexican cattle imports has contributed to a recent increase in cow prices, said **David P. Anderson** , a professor of agricultural economics at Texas A&M University AgriLife Extension. Prices of feeder steers, which make up a large portion of Mexican cattle imports, are forecast to rise by 8% in 2025, a [USDA report](https://substack.com/redirect/c7213350-ade5-4041-aae6-1a4acc2be82e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) states. If import restrictions continue for much longer, beef production could drop, pushing up prices for consumers.

"Fewer cattle mean higher beef prices, increasing inflation at the checkout line," Miller wrote in a [Dec. 23 editorial](https://substack.com/redirect/3f310934-740e-46a3-815f-a81dbf4ab006?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), adding that the ban "could send shockwaves through the beef market."

Screwworm infestations occur when a female fly lays her eggs on an animal's open wound or another area such as their eyes or mouth. The female can lay up to 300 eggs at a time, and any warm-blooded animal, including humans, although rare, can be affected. The eggs hatch into larvae that dig into the animal and feed on living flesh.

Screwworm was declared eradicated from the U.S. in 1966, but Texas experienced a more recent outbreak in 1976 that affected 20% of cattle." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/26045ec5-0896-4765-832b-950a470b25b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Mexican cattle banned from Texas due to screwworm threat, " Texas Tribune's Pooja Salhotra -- "A single cow in Mexico and a pest the size of a housefly have held up pens full of Texas-bound cattle worth millions of dollars for the past six weeks. The U.S. Department of Agriculture has banned Mexican cattle imports since November after a parasite known as screwworm, which wriggles into the flesh of livestock and kills them if left untreated, was discovered on a cow near Mexico's border with Guatemala. The ban on imports is a bigger problem than the screwworm itself, according to Texas Agriculture CommissionerSid Miller and some Texas cattle ranchers, who say closing cattle imports damages their livelihoods, bottlenecks beef production and could increase beef prices for consumers. "I get calls every single day from people asking for cattle," said Alvaro Bustillos , president of Vaquero Trading, a livestock procurement company in El Paso. "Key steps in the production value chain are being stopped because people cannot source cattle." Miller remembers a time when screwworm wreaked havoc in Texas -- in damages in 1976 -- but said the USDA prematurely closed imports and is hampering an industry still trying to recover from two years of . "There's no way we are going to get screwworm," Miller told The Texas Tribune. "We have a very strict import process for these cattle." About 3% of U.S. cattle come from Mexico. But Mexican cattle play a disproportionate role in southern states' beef production. Approximately two-thirds of Mexican cattle imports remain in Texas, New Mexico or Oklahoma, according to an estimate from Ben Weinheimer , the president and CEO of the Texas Cattle Feeders Association, which represents the industry across those three states. Cattle crossing between Mexico and the U.S. remains on hold while the USDA installs new inspection pens and enhanced safety protocols to ensure cattle are healthy. Keeping the U.S. free of screwworm saves livestock producers close to $1 billion a year, said Texas Animal Health Commission spokesperson Erin Robinson , pointing to a USDA estimate that accounts for costs of labor, treatment, veterinary care, eradication efforts and loss of production. Shutting off Mexican cattle imports has contributed to a recent increase in cow prices, said David P. Anderson , a professor of agricultural economics at Texas A&M University AgriLife Extension. Prices of feeder steers, which make up a large portion of Mexican cattle imports, are forecast to rise by 8% in 2025, a states. If import restrictions continue for much longer, beef production could drop, pushing up prices for consumers. "Fewer cattle mean higher beef prices, increasing inflation at the checkout line," Miller wrote in a , adding that the ban "could send shockwaves through the beef market." Screwworm infestations occur when a female fly lays her eggs on an animal's open wound or another area such as their eyes or mouth. The female can lay up to 300 eggs at a time, and any warm-blooded animal, including humans, although rare, can be affected. The eggs hatch into larvae that dig into the animal and feed on living flesh. Screwworm was declared eradicated from the U.S. in 1966, but Texas experienced a more recent outbreak in 1976 that affected 20% of cattle." | Now that I’ve been officially sworn into my second term in Congress, I’m back to work delivering for West Michiganders.

Republicans may have the majority in Congress, but it’s one of the smallest majorities in our history. I’m not backing down in the face of attacks on our freedoms, the environment, and the rule of law, and I need your support. [_**Will you chip in whatever you can to my campaign right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100334224/522414913/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-01-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWY0YWJlNS1jZmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5xznmSd5UJGBwdooRdWhL8-e7vYOKd3rorNWoZB105M=)

_**A Republican trifecta poses severe risks to Social Security and Medicare, reproductive rights nationwide, and so much more. But I don’t panic, I plan.**_ We’re facing a challenging few years and our ability to protect our communities depends on what we do now.

When the second Trump administration is sworn in on January 20th, I’m going to need every spare minute working to navigate the challenges–to our freedoms, to the environment, and to the rule of law. The more I raise now, the less time I’ll have to spend fundraising and the more time I can commit to protecting us and our communities. [_**Anything you can give right now, $3, $5, or $10, will help more than you know.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100334230/522414919/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-01-13_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWY0YWJlNS1jZmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5xznmSd5UJGBwdooRdWhL8-e7vYOKd3rorNWoZB105M=)

name: Signature Request [via Team Marsha]
subject: Dear President Trump,
body:
We want your name at the VERY TOP of this letter!

| |
---
| | | Hey there -

We are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP.

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. _**[So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpb6kce96up39ockc8vmg4p5u8s3gk454lvt292g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g6aor4chh2bs "So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:")**_

---
| Dear President Trump,

I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States.

Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. _I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time._

From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts:

**1)** Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that **YOU** are the right person to lead America.

**2)** Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that **YOUR** leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans.

_Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration._

Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great.

Together, we will **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

Sincerely,

**[X_________________](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj6ebbsfuue6ak0kood8de16gog8uhlfm5296d7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g6aor4chh2bs "X_________________")**
---
| | | [SIGN THE LETTER](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg0dskun21iggfaa7u5r2lhmcse9t911a6clukf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c3g6aor4chh2bs "SIGN THE LETTER")
---

Thank you,

Team Marsha

---
|
---

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Mexican cattle banned from Texas due to screwworm threat,** " Texas Tribune's **Pooja Salhotra** -- "A single cow in Mexico and a pest the size of a housefly have held up pens full of Texas-bound cattle worth millions of dollars for the past six weeks.

The U.S. Department of Agriculture has banned Mexican cattle imports since November after a parasite known as screwworm, which wriggles into the flesh of livestock and kills them if left untreated, was discovered on a cow near Mexico's border with Guatemala. The ban on imports is a bigger problem than the screwworm itself, according to Texas Agriculture Commissioner**Sid Miller** and some Texas cattle ranchers, who say closing cattle imports damages their livelihoods, bottlenecks beef production and could increase beef prices for consumers.

"I get calls every single day from people asking for cattle," said **Alvaro Bustillos** , president of Vaquero Trading, a livestock procurement company in El Paso. "Key steps in the production value chain are being stopped because people cannot source cattle."

Miller remembers a time when screwworm wreaked havoc in Texas -- [$132 million](https://substack.com/redirect/bbf435c2-3b6b-455c-b76d-4bcf28d9baa8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in damages in 1976 -- but said the USDA prematurely closed imports and is hampering an industry still trying to recover from two years of [widespread drought](https://substack.com/redirect/55d307ea-e064-4b78-b31c-18f646347bb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/b9fe0a49-ed26-4020-bd80-88a9ca19209a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"There's no way we are going to get screwworm," Miller told The Texas Tribune. "We have a very strict import process for these cattle."

About 3% of U.S. cattle come from Mexico. But Mexican cattle play a disproportionate role in southern states' beef production. Approximately two-thirds of Mexican cattle imports remain in Texas, New Mexico or Oklahoma, according to an estimate from **Ben Weinheimer** , the president and CEO of the Texas Cattle Feeders Association, which represents the industry across those three states.

Cattle crossing between Mexico and the U.S. remains on hold while the USDA installs new inspection pens and enhanced safety protocols to ensure cattle are healthy. Keeping the U.S. free of screwworm saves livestock producers close to $1 billion a year, said Texas Animal Health Commission spokesperson **Erin Robinson** , pointing to a USDA estimate that accounts for costs of labor, treatment, veterinary care, eradication efforts and loss of production.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/b9fe0a49-ed26-4020-bd80-88a9ca19209a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Shutting off Mexican cattle imports has contributed to a recent increase in cow prices, said **David P. Anderson** , a professor of agricultural economics at Texas A&M University AgriLife Extension. Prices of feeder steers, which make up a large portion of Mexican cattle imports, are forecast to rise by 8% in 2025, a [USDA report](https://substack.com/redirect/3d291937-9535-415b-86cf-93f73426d52c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) states. If import restrictions continue for much longer, beef production could drop, pushing up prices for consumers.

"Fewer cattle mean higher beef prices, increasing inflation at the checkout line," Miller wrote in a [Dec. 23 editorial](https://substack.com/redirect/59e4ca7e-82d1-4b63-86eb-bcdb54ae901c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), adding that the ban "could send shockwaves through the beef market."

Screwworm infestations occur when a female fly lays her eggs on an animal's open wound or another area such as their eyes or mouth. The female can lay up to 300 eggs at a time, and any warm-blooded animal, including humans, although rare, can be affected. The eggs hatch into larvae that dig into the animal and feed on living flesh.

Screwworm was declared eradicated from the U.S. in 1966, but Texas experienced a more recent outbreak in 1976 that affected 20% of cattle." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/b7c7f480-cf48-4803-8a25-d06e947e003e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Mexican cattle banned from Texas due to screwworm threat, " Texas Tribune's Pooja Salhotra -- "A single cow in Mexico and a pest the size of a housefly have held up pens full of Texas-bound cattle worth millions of dollars for the past six weeks. The U.S. Department of Agriculture has banned Mexican cattle imports since November after a parasite known as screwworm, which wriggles into the flesh of livestock and kills them if left untreated, was discovered on a cow near Mexico's border with Guatemala. The ban on imports is a bigger problem than the screwworm itself, according to Texas Agriculture CommissionerSid Miller and some Texas cattle ranchers, who say closing cattle imports damages their livelihoods, bottlenecks beef production and could increase beef prices for consumers. "I get calls every single day from people asking for cattle," said Alvaro Bustillos , president of Vaquero Trading, a livestock procurement company in El Paso. "Key steps in the production value chain are being stopped because people cannot source cattle." Miller remembers a time when screwworm wreaked havoc in Texas -- in damages in 1976 -- but said the USDA prematurely closed imports and is hampering an industry still trying to recover from two years of . "There's no way we are going to get screwworm," Miller told The Texas Tribune. "We have a very strict import process for these cattle." About 3% of U.S. cattle come from Mexico. But Mexican cattle play a disproportionate role in southern states' beef production. Approximately two-thirds of Mexican cattle imports remain in Texas, New Mexico or Oklahoma, according to an estimate from Ben Weinheimer , the president and CEO of the Texas Cattle Feeders Association, which represents the industry across those three states. Cattle crossing between Mexico and the U.S. remains on hold while the USDA installs new inspection pens and enhanced safety protocols to ensure cattle are healthy. Keeping the U.S. free of screwworm saves livestock producers close to $1 billion a year, said Texas Animal Health Commission spokesperson Erin Robinson , pointing to a USDA estimate that accounts for costs of labor, treatment, veterinary care, eradication efforts and loss of production. Shutting off Mexican cattle imports has contributed to a recent increase in cow prices, said David P. Anderson , a professor of agricultural economics at Texas A&M University AgriLife Extension. Prices of feeder steers, which make up a large portion of Mexican cattle imports, are forecast to rise by 8% in 2025, a states. If import restrictions continue for much longer, beef production could drop, pushing up prices for consumers. "Fewer cattle mean higher beef prices, increasing inflation at the checkout line," Miller wrote in a , adding that the ban "could send shockwaves through the beef market." Screwworm infestations occur when a female fly lays her eggs on an animal's open wound or another area such as their eyes or mouth. The female can lay up to 300 eggs at a time, and any warm-blooded animal, including humans, although rare, can be affected. The eggs hatch into larvae that dig into the animal and feed on living flesh. Screwworm was declared eradicated from the U.S. in 1966, but Texas experienced a more recent outbreak in 1976 that affected 20% of cattle." * **TOP NEWS**

“**Mexican cattle banned from Texas due to screwworm threat,** ” Texas Tribune's **Pooja Salhotra** — “A single cow in Mexico and a pest the size of a housefly have held up pens full of Texas-bound cattle worth millions of dollars for the past six weeks.

The U.S. Department of Agriculture has banned Mexican cattle imports since November after a parasite known as screwworm, which wriggles into the flesh of livestock and kills them if left untreated, was discovered on a cow near Mexico’s border with Guatemala. The ban on imports is a bigger problem than the screwworm itself, according to Texas Agriculture Commissioner**Sid Miller** and some Texas cattle ranchers, who say closing cattle imports damages their livelihoods, bottlenecks beef production and could increase beef prices for consumers.

“I get calls every single day from people asking for cattle,” said **Alvaro Bustillos** , president of Vaquero Trading, a livestock procurement company in El Paso. “Key steps in the production value chain are being stopped because people cannot source cattle.”

Miller remembers a time when screwworm wreaked havoc in Texas — [$132 million](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0ePntQrXMtm7wPKRwvlDsKLm1To343s1Amh235Zr7wv-O6zvQq3jXh6l3433oqzuvM2mXk5Md7DfkK2P5qlV9JriyVrGrYMkZZOcv2inQcnkuNNUzUHy9XuTLguHxqU62QsFO8d2ecucO-UJCTugt9oBH85xV0Hc16BZGNQuUGgt1GrNwZY7blNEIDzLOXKXrCKcGssQdNQJtizB59hFM1b0EWcSGx8WB-ysnGZi4EgylQ-sPGMevqw-tRFA-DYSQNuzEC5r7mIbunn3FPmhsRei33wMtStMSffIInZhN2dyvVLSIHNjToTUVGl8IsCI1FGlGkwlit60RQ3gFyJ7_CrnSolKYYHWQegmkMXF4s8DA7Cu8QZ-nRuPU5gqgpGKrx2PiaNOt5Pfp2BaoRAq5PECwLXKuHc6m9b0wnp2g6NFu/4d4/F_tXpEzPSViRwXoAhnRYIw/h10/h001.aSwEeAnDNSPZAlbR9M8rzuvBHA4CZZLbQZBiF1O3Zmk) in damages in 1976 — but said the USDA prematurely closed imports and is hampering an industry still trying to recover from two years of [widespread drought](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eCyDm7YZItPaA-BvJlf4tsAidmlVp_11LUPB_OXwxrIoUKNRavpddwvB5ZAA54B8P5vwCXH_ROmj9ikuqQvkAHKyElAdf5RIbor7tNdKMYXFwuGTYtZkYTxcIkT-unIek747fzGSAcyauAC2NYgxxn5ph8DQjLWyU5Q_lXzKnE6Ib7CwbgekqRAHzJ1ep-bbS1vHG_-vnL1Hx5Oxzl12M0f4KeoVcrY-wm1ExVIfOH2lXQdE29wdAmnAfOPqU9WsDVkdSEOHyLkQFcxhweMdv_z1_jtGvNiyRqM6Zk_SfWyjkbB8_D20VYg5XxA0aDnFmAk4yMYcjZY8UuyxZgVUw7gvQGH7TQbjXcrRmi2nIKszYIKArh3uxz3YqIv6WGAFhKD9LeLiUCNGIE_r_8KPUPt3e372dxClzZQctGwD-jt59MnXxCN87Rc96rvSWdxB8U_08bd__QWSpl8X6B9HBqk/4d4/F_tXpEzPSViRwXoAhnRYIw/h11/h001.DMyzHXpAT070_9ErBwo18YnNfdxCt31RvQGoD-nwkK8).

“There’s no way we are going to get screwworm,” Miller told The Texas Tribune. “We have a very strict import process for these cattle.”

About 3% of U.S. cattle come from Mexico. But Mexican cattle play a disproportionate role in southern states’ beef production. Approximately two-thirds of Mexican cattle imports remain in Texas, New Mexico or Oklahoma, according to an estimate from **Ben Weinheimer** , the president and CEO of the Texas Cattle Feeders Association, which represents the industry across those three states.

Cattle crossing between Mexico and the U.S. remains on hold while the USDA installs new inspection pens and enhanced safety protocols to ensure cattle are healthy. Keeping the U.S. free of screwworm saves livestock producers close to $1 billion a year, said Texas Animal Health Commission spokesperson **Erin Robinson** , pointing to a USDA estimate that accounts for costs of labor, treatment, veterinary care, eradication efforts and loss of production.
» [BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.IpGzAqnc3m6dMmKQdod4OdZdsfX-sjnRfDuEmaXW-5lN-IqpP1xu2_Ygevf9CBs8iGkDwdDuKv-OIdRCcryDDgoqnwbBfsyGSk_4VJrOSCvmgxZEZTEXv72w0U68JXHpny88FhFoE4mM3a9phL8bbLnjR6LwHP-Knk0Pfum_y-c7cH89x1l2SDbBiPqt_d9R_fm3mUQImvfW71pMFdt1BzUVyOtB5_CoVwD9LLNfeYJYYyTfxdm155th-zGwGKDHbFgsR1kj1_bjGeihr_B6lhBVdcYKnmekHwjF5G-q8QtBJdB6slAnQp2RVBrQ_4xuCaTuYNtgSaoCj56SIV7EQBvqAEBIyJpV5cz9SQmUABx570S9viLME-wwz1lbH5UTSnboc1E2YuKKkwvRYZgdnCrL6U1LGdoCU0tCzMwHNJw/4d4/F_tXpEzPSViRwXoAhnRYIw/h13/h001.aCzmU1Uf24VKVyu7sJxbAtAEBGqCeacR8pmRceH6au4)
Shutting off Mexican cattle imports has contributed to a recent increase in cow prices, said **David P. Anderson** , a professor of agricultural economics at Texas A&M; University AgriLife Extension. Prices of feeder steers, which make up a large portion of Mexican cattle imports, are forecast to rise by 8% in 2025, a [USDA report](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eHDivip6AN7CfaFEECFxPeL1qdw12hv64-NCLW_bAhatcdwgWNHhx4iaUZVrvm67ggnNcM7iZM9L-UYmhvmOkrVtu4pFTjOSZURBTkClTscCbVW9pfO9jt04eohxOzlzBE3vdDalrAOus-h8WNtLCBOlgfAU3Jom1h417KrpYbQHb_MD1XFyo9rF8eV11IZQTPX3f9yPI0HPSN3sM8t36666cHvaYNszZ5tVjszk_hmRk1Em0HDScc-crKoq87adXOXIRUPxqRlWaW3b8RJpC71BOYR6VjmNY6FyXVDjRjIUo5wG7DbJNHiOwj2bvdyQbHJAf59blAMhkIxhCmnOocC3L6MqAzNkRAmFURQCnuFl9jGVwdCsGH4sOgyZtMnf244XlEl6G5sj5PU8QIC_p4NOcVj7G59RnRv8Uk7G3vcJ3GSUczFA9MWWe9gUpra53A/4d4/F_tXpEzPSViRwXoAhnRYIw/h14/h001.DbJUCUUYeny_mIx45qME_a9of1uzSJTnTu9W0Hfdu4I) states. If import restrictions continue for much longer, beef production could drop, pushing up prices for consumers.

“Fewer cattle mean higher beef prices, increasing inflation at the checkout line,” Miller wrote in a [Dec. 23 editorial](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.5lwqIBNPgUpXckHvDM7-mNQUHOqeB0Dypy2uRe0TG0xLuN9FFIXq2H7tp8cVx7j5AldsbNZQzF5DVddPVEP-oCAIe9r38ZzBXPqiaKFB_8aIHUEL2nuoOolangh0qbC0pnlSCE9HHjvMlBNUpLwcaEE1z5b88m2zEZlkwwXJpGr00zuCnDo01TcHFW22fH-sWx_mrgU7jK1QoTt1x82pN5C8j3coQTU7zeqGeUh4Adsj2tNgj0x5KI_Yb4CIlwxFPG5UkdrC8Wl-Cu8BzLOpafA98T9PVn4QHGWgGB5jjmXfktH8QrNy4s2YnwQF609UWWgpa0JH9vI5gvmeT9wE9_qbFZIoj1H8QmdzMgzWfQhTHnpYqyMiDnWj95WMKXX7WbGWLKYBcMnlC7H23eREJYodP04PQ5K8koNPBS8VDQkK2aufTU-XcOgUAOFD3sZIfTb93prOQNTrRvEyBPkFuXB2ynOiEAu_P2FMVn5gbRo/4d4/F_tXpEzPSViRwXoAhnRYIw/h15/h001.fgYzdwXV2FIqpRGIZeksNAx9Aq953eUkaqEGX2SK06s), adding that the ban “could send shockwaves through the beef market.”

Screwworm infestations occur when a female fly lays her eggs on an animal’s open wound or another area such as their eyes or mouth. The female can lay up to 300 eggs at a time, and any warm-blooded animal, including humans, although rare, can be affected. The eggs hatch into larvae that dig into the animal and feed on living flesh.

Screwworm was declared eradicated from the U.S. in 1966, but Texas experienced a more recent outbreak in 1976 that affected 20% of cattle." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) | TOP NEWS “Mexican cattle banned from Texas due to screwworm threat, ” Texas Tribune's Pooja Salhotra — “A single cow in Mexico and a pest the size of a housefly have held up pens full of Texas-bound cattle worth millions of dollars for the past six weeks. The U.S. Department of Agriculture has banned Mexican cattle imports since November after a parasite known as screwworm, which wriggles into the flesh of livestock and kills them if left untreated, was discovered on a cow near Mexico’s border with Guatemala. The ban on imports is a bigger problem than the screwworm itself, according to Texas Agriculture CommissionerSid Miller and some Texas cattle ranchers, who say closing cattle imports damages their livelihoods, bottlenecks beef production and could increase beef prices for consumers. “I get calls every single day from people asking for cattle,” said Alvaro Bustillos , president of Vaquero Trading, a livestock procurement company in El Paso. “Key steps in the production value chain are being stopped because people cannot source cattle.” Miller remembers a time when screwworm wreaked havoc in Texas — in damages in 1976 — but said the USDA prematurely closed imports and is hampering an industry still trying to recover from two years of . » “There’s no way we are going to get screwworm,” Miller told The Texas Tribune. “We have a very strict import process for these cattle.” About 3% of U.S. cattle come from Mexico. But Mexican cattle play a disproportionate role in southern states’ beef production. Approximately two-thirds of Mexican cattle imports remain in Texas, New Mexico or Oklahoma, according to an estimate from Ben Weinheimer , the president and CEO of the Texas Cattle Feeders Association, which represents the industry across those three states. Cattle crossing between Mexico and the U.S. remains on hold while the USDA installs new inspection pens and enhanced safety protocols to ensure cattle are healthy. Keeping the U.S. free of screwworm saves livestock producers close to $1 billion a year, said Texas Animal Health Commission spokesperson Erin Robinson , pointing to a USDA estimate that accounts for costs of labor, treatment, veterinary care, eradication efforts and loss of production. » Shutting off Mexican cattle imports has contributed to a recent increase in cow prices, said David P. Anderson , a professor of agricultural economics at Texas A&M; University AgriLife Extension. Prices of feeder steers, which make up a large portion of Mexican cattle imports, are forecast to rise by 8% in 2025, a states. If import restrictions continue for much longer, beef production could drop, pushing up prices for consumers. “Fewer cattle mean higher beef prices, increasing inflation at the checkout line,” Miller wrote in a , adding that the ban “could send shockwaves through the beef market.” Screwworm infestations occur when a female fly lays her eggs on an animal’s open wound or another area such as their eyes or mouth. The female can lay up to 300 eggs at a time, and any warm-blooded animal, including humans, although rare, can be affected. The eggs hatch into larvae that dig into the animal and feed on living flesh. Screwworm was declared eradicated from the U.S. in 1966, but Texas experienced a more recent outbreak in 1976 that affected 20% of cattle." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. _**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c9eb45cb01554c5e8e0331c9415e876a&_e=6zFDE71cEQr0r_g6ZsXaeKAvS2Zv0d8xSjEuoJHZRY0oWv5l9wpMYRUWs7JGkbB8qDIsU_UoMZ22At_nBR-1miI2Phw2htx1PkWfUJuEWuZEa4qNzyNlXshJG-sMHL1P4G2LVEpIDpeYvtKtdMrQm-rk_sp9w878ko2SQU5Vl3E2iyXHAbocEk24zgGmfp1mTHIUasFgqeUVDn3XxWuypjzPKitNU9lDn_MrXF6v3spOAM6yq6UKpb2KPg9SqC9A81qlczQvWyqNDBq4YPjUakHAh5ApsjdZi2tD6ajnDztDPrpmKXx0Bex_WIz2snGch9qOBxjzu2rUkihtqCnnsUZTlHFq91uVzOVAsjFHZehy7yfPJ5VQKyQXT3axKy_eEIe5lid4-88yh7AUDJfau9OKqFB43Ik3TMk85rKLzVRGCzkoUI_iu-M_fetYzZdY)

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c9eb45cb01554c5e8e0331c9415e876a&_e=6zFDE71cEQr0r_g6ZsXaeKAvS2Zv0d8xSjEuoJHZRY0oWv5l9wpMYRUWs7JGkbB8qDIsU_UoMZ22At_nBR-1miI2Phw2htx1PkWfUJuEWuZEa4qNzyNlXshJG-sMHL1P4G2LVEpIDpeYvtKtdMrQm-rk_sp9w878ko2SQU5Vl3E2iyXHAbocEk24zgGmfp1mTHIUasFgqeUVDn3XxWuypjzPKitNU9lDn_MrXF6v3spOAM6yq6UKpb2KPg9SqC9A81qlczQvWyqNDBq4YPjUamAZolaXeBaHiBGSBCZso66p_ziz6qGBpdhI07xfxCm5CypGp6YJjuZw6v8b7gQe46kdifdA0rmcx91BkKyuCaqSGGcjlTJHBzJ07hzyUHehXczrTsM9yBwPpN4OJJbcYXf_h6-m53rSv9-PihcCKQ3Tctqt82PFk9ppizNDGvaC)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c9eb45cb01554c5e8e0331c9415e876a&_e=6zFDE71cEQr0r_g6ZsXaeKAvS2Zv0d8xSjEuoJHZRY0oWv5l9wpMYRUWs7JGkbB8qDIsU_UoMZ22At_nBR-1miI2Phw2htx1PkWfUJuEWuZEa4qNzyNlXshJG-sMHL1P4G2LVEpIDpeYvtKtdMrQm-rk_sp9w878ko2SQU5Vl3E2iyXHAbocEk24zgGmfp1mTHIUasFgqeUVDn3XxWuypjzPKitNU9lDn_MrXF6v3spOAM6yq6UKpb2KPg9SqC9A81qlczQvWyqNDBq4YPjUaoW0RdE_lHajQWfHICG5qzMk4VqvHBhX7rqV6Iws63OCjUT7hD14sWfLK6eJVvlLdz7jwKd0gBvOYC_hYELxMUe-JqnSFcdJH7yb5onu4prKrE6EQr81f6YCvPWqj0TM_QYZGN_9u2UcUEbyp4eQCvyVLCkghMULXMY_DQpXtOM6) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

| | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[Sen. Cruz Tapped To Head Powerful Commerce Committee:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Sen. Ted Cruz has been ratified to chair the Senate Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation, and says he plans to use the role to focus on job creation and economic growth. "With jurisdiction over 40% of the United States economy, the Senate Commerce Committee sits at the nexus of America's most critical industries," the Texas Republican said in a statement. "I am grateful for the opportunity to serve as the first Texan chairman of this storied committee," he added. "My top priority in this role remains the same as it has throughout my entire career in the..." **[Ted Cruz Defends Trump's Pitch To Acquire Greenland:](http://trk.tedcruz.-11-tDvV3tkB_JjYA_0XYw)** "During his first term, Donald Trump toyed with purchasing Greenland. Much of Washington and Europe dismissed the idea at the time as another of the president's eccentricities. But as he heads back to the White House, Trump is stressing that people should take the idea seriously. And Sen. Ted Cruz agrees. "This is a serious possibility," the Republican senator said on his podcast published Wednesday. Greenland is an autonomous territory of Denmark, with Greenlanders holding full Danish citizenship. Scandinavian powers have occupied parts of the territory for over..."

Mark Zuckerberg's big tech company announced early Tuesday that it will get rid of its fact-checkers, which executives admitted led to political censorship, on Facebook and Instagram. subject: WATCH: Our first big load of supplies going to LA!
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=99830f5e3b81480483b8fd50e4066a95&_e=f8ZRBie1AX96DruHymrXrRCG2uubSZXUUFscQn7xFrFuRkTM1aTAxtQKohcG0a2h9PdVb9w0bRHlt1yosEGLcGccFcRUOdfYkOT5VNnZAppOPhC3SHT1DgJvIALIYBbNDSoQ0UBZSnUnkWhkMcqGHaC0BaAtxmJohTrJZv7syontwAFdsfEHBBQSk85D2rPzg587x7NSGuZOpjx5YY9DI8q4SrTyaxukVkrJP9GMbecrlZ4Uh8uNDRT1jZwGgKwJSUhUEN4XFmf5oYV7oa-DDxXOscwW1lpCP1RQFOlXJE97ZL_3Y0QFgc4BUkL7zQjGWFh4xJR0XQL5FxCoXEXVqA24vHBQOMKQ8WNRPyAors4%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Saturday night at Angelus Temple was a _POWERFUL TIME!! _Believers gathered to worship, intercede on behalf of the people of Southern California, and serve those impacted by the raging wildfires. James tells us, "As the body without the spirit is dead, so faith without deeds is dead." Let Us Worship is fueled by faith, and we want our works to be marked by the same love that Christ had as he healed bodies and hearts. Below is a just a little bit of how Let Us Worship was able to serve, thanks to Believers like YOU coming together and generously donating to help the hurting.
---

clean_body: | | | Dear Friend, Saturday night at Angelus Temple was a POWERFUL TIME!! Believers gathered to worship, intercede on behalf of the people of Southern California, and serve those impacted by the raging wildfires. James tells us, "As the body without the spirit is dead, so faith without deeds is dead." Let Us Worship is fueled by faith, and we want our works to be marked by the same love that Christ had as he healed bodies and hearts. Below is a just a little bit of how Let Us Worship was able to serve, thanks to Believers like YOU coming together and generously donating to help the hurting. In addition to providing and distributing supplies, we were also able to write a large check to the LA Dream Center to continue the relief efforts after we've left! All of this is possible thanks to the favor of the Lord and the generosity of Believers from all across the nation coming together to be the hands and feet of Jesus. From the bottom of my heart, I say THANK YOU! Till all hear, Sean | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

subject: Josh got two bills passed!
body:
Actually getting things done.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100335797/522420674/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjI4M2JlNjMtZDNkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EWEyKqe-Q6GaAduKCozHAfHWfLZa2E5YGGzCd5dipl4=) | Peter, **We have great news: Two of Josh’s bills passed the House of Representatives - even with Republicans in control!** Josh always says that if we want to ask for people’s votes, we need to show them we’re actually getting things done for them. That’s why Josh is so focused on writing legislation that can _actually move_ in a divided Congress. Well, his strategy is working! _First,_ Josh successfully passed the “Fire Department Repayment Act” which gets timely funding to fire departments on the frontlines of battling wildfires. It’s a no-brainer and a big help for us in Northern California. _Second,_ Josh passed his bipartisan bill fighting the giant “swamp rats” in California. You may remember the nutria - they are the invasive rats with nacho cheese-colored teeth causing havoc on our water systems. For anyone who cares about California water or agriculture, this is a big win. **[Josh is proving we can still get things done. These were two of Josh’s biggest priorities in 2024 and he got it done! Will you sign our card to congratulate Josh on these two accomplishments?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100335798/522420675/1015144404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjI4M2JlNjMtZDNkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EWEyKqe-Q6GaAduKCozHAfHWfLZa2E5YGGzCd5dipl4=&emci=c8355808-2bcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f283be63-d3d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6455652)** [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100335799/522420676/1015144404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjI4M2JlNjMtZDNkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EWEyKqe-Q6GaAduKCozHAfHWfLZa2E5YGGzCd5dipl4=&emci=c8355808-2bcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f283be63-d3d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6455652) When it comes to supporting our firefighters and protecting our water, there is no one in Congress who steps up to the plate like Josh. **We are so proud to support a member of Congress who not only stands up for values but also works in a bipartisan way to actually get things done. We’re going to need that approach now more than ever!** **[If you support the work Josh is doing, please add your name to congratulate him on securing these two major victories.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100335800/522420677/1015144404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjI4M2JlNjMtZDNkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EWEyKqe-Q6GaAduKCozHAfHWfLZa2E5YGGzCd5dipl4=&emci=c8355808-2bcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f283be63-d3d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6455652)** None of this would be possible without your support, \- Team Harder

**Friend,

Did you see what Elon Musk's DOGE uncovered?

The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) uncovered how the U.S. Government Spent your Tax Dollars in 2024.

Here are some of the highlights, or should we say lowlights.

-$7 million on various projects studying magic
-$1,513,299 to use kittens in a study to analyze motion sickness.
-$419,470 to determine if lonely rats sought cocaine at a greater frequency than happy rats
-$123,000 teaching children in Kyrgyzstan how to go viral on social media
-The State Department spent $4,840,082 on "influencers"**

name: Team ODP
subject: New year, same GOP hogwash

body:
Today we’re taking a look at our least favorite Ohio Republican’s New Year's Resolutions
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100336398/522422779/658475868?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_250113_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGNlNmFjZS1kNGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SGcnu_IfvObhHBTbg6qNo_73NKDQj1lS0VFIsDc5R_o=) Team,

Happy 2025! For most people, a new year means a fresh start and setting meaningful goals. For Ohio Republicans? It’s just more of the same – screwing over working families while cozying up to special interests.

Before we dive into their absurd New Year’s resolutions, let’s be clear: We need to fight back. [_**Can you chip in to help us reach our $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal so we can protect Ohioans from GOP overreach?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100336399/522422780/658475868?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_250113_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGNlNmFjZS1kNGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SGcnu_IfvObhHBTbg6qNo_73NKDQj1lS0VFIsDc5R_o=)

Here’s a sneak peek at their New Year’s Resolutions:
* **Frank "Loser" LaRose:** Continue forcing Ohioans to jump through hoops just to vote – and brainstorm even more barriers.
* **Attorney General Dave Yost:** Clear the 2026 gubernatorial field by sucking up to Trump and the most extreme Republicans, all while politicizing his office and pretending his utility company sweetheart deals didn’t cost Ohio families.
* **Lieutenant Governor Jon Husted:** Save his skin any way he can – caving to extremists, dodging his role in Ohio’s biggest corruption scandal, and angling for whatever job he can get next.
* **Mike DeWine:** Spend his final days in office clinging to a "folksy" image, while trying to hand a U.S. Senate seat to his buddy Husted.

There’s no presidential election this year, but for Ohio Democrats, the fight to hold Republicans accountable is 24/7.

[_**Let’s make one resolution together: To stop GOP corruption and ensure Ohio is run by leaders who actually care about its people. Pitch in before our deadline on Wednesday >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100336400/522422781/658475868?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_250113_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGNlNmFjZS1kNGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SGcnu_IfvObhHBTbg6qNo_73NKDQj1lS0VFIsDc5R_o=)

Thanks for having our back,

Ohio Dems **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100336401/522422782/658475868?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_250113_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGNlNmFjZS1kNGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SGcnu_IfvObhHBTbg6qNo_73NKDQj1lS0VFIsDc5R_o=)**

name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: Your personal invite to Trump’s inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Join us in Washington D.C. on January 20th to witness history as Donald J. Trump becomes the 47th President of the United States.

Hey friend,

The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) uncovered how the U.S. Government Spent your Tax Dollars in 2024.

Here are some of the highlights, or should we say lowlights.

-$7 million on various projects studying magic
-$1,513,299 to use kittens in a study to analyze motion sickness.
-$419,470 to determine if lonely rats sought cocaine at a greater frequency than happy rats
-$123,000 teaching children in Kyrgyzstan how to go viral on social media
-The State Department spent $4,840,082 on "influencers"**

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Indiana GOP Statement on Governor Mike Braun's Inauguration
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| | **For Immediate Release: **January 13, 2025

**Indiana GOP Chairwoman Erin Lucas' Statement on Governor Mike Braun's Inauguration ** **INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (January 13, 2025)** – Chairwoman Erin Lucas released the following statement upon Mike Braun’s inauguration to the office of Governor. “Following a landslide victory at the ballot box, I am honored to congratulate Mike Braun on his inauguration as the 52nd Governor of the State of Indiana. The Indiana Republican Party looks forward to working with the new administration to fulfill the historic mandate he has been given. Faith, family, and community have always been the values Hoosiers hold most dear, and our party is proud to have put forward a candidate who has never wavered in standing up for those convictions.” “Last November, Hoosiers made a decisive choice in favor of Freedom and Opportunity and chose a Governor with a proven record of conservative leadership to carry out that agenda. From main street to the halls of Congress, Governor Braun has never backed down on delivering for the people of Indiana, and it is that tireless dedication that is going to make these next four years a turning point for our state and its future.”

###

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3db71c77384e445aa041d89d43cabe82&_e=-LFXaFIPANooYESTp1qVACEypwLaXs5-r6Ix_9c56EmpRafvShI6mKzOSyQk3omiUllK07tQkJ0p8kkhYtKLWvjmXvhjaHl-ZO5qX-gu7HfHcqUmX7TyoLmXoXMycodcBBePzeauWMEjosmMqj5N7CQ0g2fxjxH9ZMN08uGtyane_qCR3sYqmQXfqROot3929mlwdkD2e_EAwHHvdht7hAZuFl0FUxG9Je8VM-2yi7BhR81o7zvzjfzeRylwHBV2PoIZV6c2-z2_by46unzP1utR6gg8i9ZFDLBq1A_tIRUvFeFayrlxckTP_jZpWQT02yEhX16JjfBq6Q13xVG7UTlY-iKBXq9kkt2I9uj32tqaxmOYUoA1271DL3uNVYwa)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the holidays, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**

clean_body: They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me. | Dear Friend, I didn’t want to bother you over the holidays, but I now have something very important to share with you. Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration. This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my final chance to save my home. Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th. During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s truly important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that eternal “heavenly treasures” await us. The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession. I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions. "For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? " (Mark 8:36) As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

body:
Thousands of homes have burned in California, and this is an unimaginable loss for families.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100336973/522425555/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGNlYjZlMS1kNmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SlT38GNtry0i9zEEJLULDLLbnjttt6SixaebPYzrcc4=&emci=e135662b-ced1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=0dceb6e1-d6d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=26261389)
---

| | The images of the catastrophic wildfires in the Los Angeles area are nothing short of horrifying. The loss of homes, churches, and schools is incalculable. Thousands of homes have burned in California, and this is an unimaginable loss for families. I am so grateful to all those stepping up, from firefighters and first responders to local reporters and good samaritans trying to save their communities. We need to take bold steps today to protect our environment, fight the climate crisis, make our communities more resilient to extreme weather, and protect our planet for our kids and future generations. Natural disasters like this one in California will only continue to grow worse due to climate change, and we need to take steps now to prepare. The investments we make now will provide a cleaner, safer environment to enjoy now and in generations to come. That is a future we can look forward to, and one we can feel proud of when we hand it off to our kids and the next generation of leaders. We can not stand idly by as this natural disaster destroys California. I am grateful to everyone who is stepping up, and we can step up alongside them by supporting local organizations on the ground [**like the California Community Fund.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100336974/522425556/586874683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGNlYjZlMS1kNmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SlT38GNtry0i9zEEJLULDLLbnjttt6SixaebPYzrcc4=&emci=e135662b-ced1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=0dceb6e1-d6d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=26261389) Thank you, _Andy_ |

| | Dear Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4e0ddb1ba85420c82e111d7bdf75580&_e=RYtdctBFJpkLW18kBtHNxJkbtXZrZnx2mHd6_V5bKElRrXaLaypCearE4HZOM2jfcz3AqRbK0SwLbAod3LimXizkL3Yx6HiM-7lAhiavurpD3rI-JpUiVoYRFJ0QbNhN1ARE_2iNJ3DOA7YUUuHuQ6rQZ-fdyGkYb-ZcHzojqRmLFaSqHIiMlBqxwSC0mcWGDJ-YjR1Npurq7Pz9VYw78N-wlLQHhN4fYSgoKzp-Jnf8mC515-rtkvNpVnbDLiVvwdITbCNDK0maWiHe-neni37hrfXeQxt5eY1gLJcH24kHi5XRR5XxUfeBmJtcjFVmrQNRGefYB_GWeTNJUNSA47iaAPrs-VR8RYNwtfBscaXLxQUktz9pCsiV5Ws3vC_jOloOIi21Ps8KdESJMJVNekDgwg3-ePUULVw1A9l0T45H-SyuKyh_TXGZ2bMWnbPp)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4e0ddb1ba85420c82e111d7bdf75580&_e=RYtdctBFJpkLW18kBtHNxJkbtXZrZnx2mHd6_V5bKElRrXaLaypCearE4HZOM2jfcz3AqRbK0SwLbAod3LimXizkL3Yx6HiM-7lAhiavurpD3rI-JpUiVoYRFJ0QbNhN1ARE_2iNJ3DOA7YUUuHuQ6rQZ-fdyGkYb-ZcHzojqRmLFaSqHIiMlBqxwSC0mcWGDJ-YjR1Npurq7Pz9VYw78N-wlLQHhN4fYSgoKzp-Jnf8mC515-rtkvNpVnbDLiVvwdITbCNDK0maWiHe-neni9VegChjTTYWbumh_KK1GzmGbdL_H1CVD4-WhzLIBoTDmb08byBh4b-6FjdSsoJ_uv_c9Q5COK6nH7_K10LA-MpdzzoMj24TNE4hfNfH_4GT66jlr9EIjZpcPW7c7o_8Tzghfkc3fye7NhtTa1OOerrXr-tOvZb19hyrtHsfYMx6).

Best regards,

https://voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://voteheidicampbell.com/]
In just one day, the 2025 legislative session will begin.
I’m prepared to continue using my voice in the legislature, advocating for common sense policies that will support and strengthen our education system, public safety measures, environmental protections, and other top priorities for everyday Tennesseans.
The fundraising blackout period for legislators will also begin 24 hours from now , and I need your support before I return to the Senate floor.
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025hcemail]
It is crucial I stay on track to hit my fundraising goal before Tuesday. Can I count on you to help ensure my campaign is well-resourced and ready for the fight ahead? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025hcemail]
Your support and continued trust in me means the world. I look forward to getting back to work for my constituents in District 20 and for Tennesseans across the state.
Heidi Campbell
Senator Heidi Campbell is running for re-election in TN Senate District 20. She is championing change for Tennessee and won't rest until we see gun safety reform, corporate accountability, and a safe and prosperous community where everyone can thrive.

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Mikie Sherrill is serving in Congress with Jason Crow to defend democracy and deliver for the people. Now, she's on a mission to get things done for New Jersey as governor. We hope you’ll read her message below, and then split a donation between her and Jason’s campaigns.

Folks,

In a few moments, I’m going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for Governor of New Jersey and Jason Crow [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-sherrill] . But first, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why your early support is so meaningful.

After the 2024 election, we know people are more divided than ever on how we move forward.

With Donald Trump in the White House, folks are worried about how much he’ll roll back our fundamental rights. They’re worried about how he’ll attack our freedoms. Frankly, they’re worried if we’ll be able to get anything done at all.

We cannot afford to lose the New Jersey governor’s race in 2025. Democratic governors are the first line of defense against Donald Trump and his extremist agenda, and nothing is more important to me than fighting for New Jersey.

As a Navy helicopter pilot, as an Assistant U.S. Attorney, and as a Member of Congress, I’ve always been willing to take on anyone and everyone to serve the people and deliver results. I’ve never turned away from a tough fight — and this will be no different.

We can win this race and get to work on New Jersey’s future, but we need to do it the same way we always have — together.

Grassroots support has always been the key ingredient to our success — from 2018, when we flipped New Jersey’s 11th District blue for the first time in decades, to winning reelection three cycles in a row — earning more votes than any other New Jersey House Democrat in 2022 and 2024.

We’ve built one of the most powerful grassroots movements the Garden State has ever seen, and if we’re going to win this race for New Jersey’s future, we need to get to work right now.

It would mean the world to me to have your support as we launch this campaign. Can I count on you to split any amount between my campaign and Jason Crow today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-sherrill]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mikie Sherrill and Jason Crow will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-sherrill?amount=10&express_lane=true]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-sherrill?amount=25&express_lane=true]

DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-sherrill?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-sherrill?amount=100&express_lane=true]

DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-sherrill?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-sherrill]

By contributing today, you’ll be helping my team and I build up the resources we need to build this campaign from the ground up.

Thank you for everything,

Mikie
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
