But first, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why your early support is so meaningful. After the 2024 election, we know people are more divided than ever on how we move forward. Frankly, they’re worried if we’ll be able to get anything done at all. We cannot afford to lose the New Jersey governor’s race in 2025. Democratic governors are the first line of defense against Donald Trump and his extremist agenda, and nothing is more important to me than fighting for New Jersey. As a Navy helicopter pilot, as an Assistant U.S. Attorney, and as a Member of Congress, I’ve always been willing to take on anyone and everyone to serve the people and deliver results. I’ve never turned away from a tough fight — and this will be no different. We can win this race and get to work on New Jersey’s future, but we need to do it the same way we always have — together. Grassroots support has always been the key ingredient to our success — from 2018, when we flipped New Jersey’s 11th District blue for the first time in decades, to winning reelection three cycles in a row — earning more votes than any other New Jersey House Democrat in 2022 and 2024. We’ve built one of the most powerful grassroots movements the Garden State has ever seen, and if we’re going to win this race for New Jersey’s future, we need to get to work right now. It would mean the world to me to have your support as we launch this campaign. Can I count on you to split any amount between my campaign and Jason Crow today? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mikie Sherrill and Jason Crow will go through immediately: DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [] By contributing today, you’ll be helping my team and I build up the resources we need to build this campaign from the ground up. Thank you for everything, Mikie Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com] Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress *Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: No Dem Left Behind Executive Director, Hassan Martini
subject: Immigration, the California fires, and how they are connected.
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w2iiy-swlayt-kyd76rh1/)
---
# **Immigration, the California fires, and how they are connected**
---
| | | | |
---
Hello friend, Let me start off by saying Donald Trump’s border czar is a complete and unhinged lunatic. His name is Tom Homan, and, well, let’s just say he’s not the nicest guy in the world. What Tom also seems to completely disregard are two things: our country’s laws and the current economic conditions we are in. Even if Trump and MAGA wanted to come in and kick out every brown person they see—let’s face it, that’s the ultimate goal—they can’t. Business in America would come to a complete halt. I’m not just talking about service jobs; I’m talking about all jobs. All sectors of the economy heavily rely on immigrant labor. This border czar, Tom Homan, seems to get a thrill by going on national cable networks and making threats to communities of color. So, we tell him, “Bring it on.” We are not afraid of you. We have the law and the American people on our side. One thing we must ensure is that we are screaming at the top of our lungs to anyone who will listen: there is no Trump or MAGA mandate. He won the election fair and square, but he didn’t win the overwhelming majority he keeps bragging about and lying about. In fact, he practically received the same number of votes that he did when he lost in 2020. I’m not going to get into why he won and where our voters went in this email, but I will in future ones, so please stay tuned and stay engaged with us. **_But how does this tie into the California fires?_** It’s simple. We are going to need a hell of a lot of skilled labor to go in and rebuild entire communities—and do it fast and safely, of course. MAGA is counting on a complete state failure of California. They are rooting for California to fail. Speaker of the House Johnson is threatening to withhold federal resources from California and politically blackmail them. This is all happening in real-time, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Our team is working tirelessly to ensure that our supporters and our candidates, past and future, have the talking points and messaging they need to convey this to their constituents as well as voters. I will be visiting Southern California next week to meet with folks and get a better grasp of the political climate on the ground. This is not to take away from the colossal humanitarian disaster that is unfolding, but we need to be prepared politically, and it’s my job to do just that. All we are looking for is transparency with the public. Backroom deals and shady handshakes that have gone on for too long need to be a thing of the past. We have a lot of work to do on that subject, and we are working on a plan for that as well. I know I have shared a lot of bad news with you today and in my previous messages, but I have some good news to share as well. My phone is starting to ring again with really talented and energetic candidates who want to run for Congress from across the country. I have meetings scheduled, and when I find the really good ones, they will receive our endorsement, and you will be the first to meet them. Remember, winning a congressional race requires immense effort, time, and resources. On the subject of resources, our capabilities are directly tied to the support we receive from our incredibly loyal grassroots supporters like you. We need that support to show up so that we can continue to advocate for all of us. If you are in a position to do so, please consider a one-time donation or a recurring one to No Dem Left Behind. In Solidarity, Hassan Martini
---

This is not to take away from the colossal humanitarian disaster that is unfolding, but we need to be prepared politically, and it’s my job to do just that. All we are looking for is transparency with the public. Backroom deals and shady handshakes that have gone on for too long need to be a thing of the past. We have a lot of work to do on that subject, and we are working on a plan for that as well. I know I have shared a lot of bad news with you today and in my previous messages, but I have some good news to share as well. My phone is starting to ring again with really talented and energetic candidates who want to run for Congress from across the country. I have meetings scheduled, and when I find the really good ones, they will receive our endorsement, and you will be the first to meet them. Remember, winning a congressional race requires immense effort, time, and resources. On the subject of resources, our capabilities are directly tied to the support we receive from our incredibly loyal grassroots supporters like you. We need that support to show up so that we can continue to advocate for all of us. If you are in a position to do so, please consider a one-time donation or a recurring one to No Dem Left Behind. In Solidarity, Hassan Martini | | | | | Thank you for your support in this pivotal time. | | | | | No Dem Left Behind PAC P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003 | You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to modify your or .

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: You'll want this in your home in 2025
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=41f13fe39d0a4c928ace616729d350e4&_e=Gt-N2dAhTvATcsV8E-Qh0fTZttt3KgrFcE-wGW-cWMl_93qbIbUiZpqm0tJls489xhqBUJriL5tOeIUQBN-DwXiAA562DR13RwWpjqa3RhrVbPkD3fycRyvIVPg_Rr6WVK2vST0HVf9K_zge2qnO-43hU9aam8xzSeiKKw9hPebcysHvkDDFblP9KqUIN7tkDt0XJTdHfeZCDSaCIxrl4I8XHcrapUyjLV5bqoOAoccXcSRrGB5izJamBmgiuBuJ9PJ-vnWiDNqri_gda2JjPs-h9llaHVQEkvk-AJacmbcPXTIko75ndnY68jEgYe0cYYxKiF-oB0jAD4q-BzPvDQZnQ0nSG5pZb42pOFimpHxrMX7OK6cVgLWcRAWMnPocmSlzb40D65-XenfMxRSyuQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=41f13fe39d0a4c928ace616729d350e4&_e=Gt-N2dAhTvATcsV8E-Qh0fTZttt3KgrFcE-wGW-cWMl_93qbIbUiZpqm0tJls489xhqBUJriL5tOeIUQBN-DwXiAA562DR13RwWpjqa3RhrVbPkD3fycRyvIVPg_Rr6WVK2vST0HVf9K_zge2qnO-43hU9aam8xzSeiKKw9hPebcysHvkDDFblP9KqUIN7tkDt0XJTdHfeZCDSaCIxrl4I8XHcrapUyjLV5bqoOAoccXcSRrGB5izJamBmgiuBuJC0poa7QuyrDpJDCJHmIssg62xRAEp2TB5BlpC_axUeGQ-Lc2EehtlTyt_msRHXU_xCwjDUfD_ig6m90QwxFLLEEQGO86ZG2mfbDfKIJLVDGZblTLC9VYTPHflc8KsbtfI67qEoD4uVzRohUUPtNePg%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=41f13fe39d0a4c928ace616729d350e4&_e=Gt-N2dAhTvATcsV8E-Qh0fTZttt3KgrFcE-wGW-cWMl_93qbIbUiZpqm0tJls489xhqBUJriL5tOeIUQBN-DwXiAA562DR13RwWpjqa3RhrVbPkD3fycRyvIVPg_Rr6WVK2vST0HVf9K_zge2qnO-43hU9aam8xzSeiKKw9hPebcysHvkDDFblP9KqUIN7tkDt0XJTdHfeZCDSaCIxrl4I8XHcrapUyjLV5bqoOAoccXcSRrGB5izJamBmgiuBuJhryoBJBSaqFvrHPQbu7QxE5QLPFwSypVCe1uKnb-YSiIwr6DB8h4_LKxZWcyU3xjQVm2OPyyjdTRfstDWAQJ9YVKCmG9lq33g1A66HwAxcIQbYABf7U9DU2lNiO6sbeSuw4sIWSL7hKKz8Lixlh7KQ%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=41f13fe39d0a4c928ace616729d350e4&_e=Gt-N2dAhTvATcsV8E-Qh0fTZttt3KgrFcE-wGW-cWMl_93qbIbUiZpqm0tJls489xhqBUJriL5tOeIUQBN-DwXiAA562DR13RwWpjqa3RhrVbPkD3fycRyvIVPg_Rr6WVK2vST0HVf9K_zge2qnO-43hU9aam8xzSeiKKw9hPebcysHvkDDFblP9KqUIN7tkDt0XJTdHfeZCDSaCIxrl4I8XHcrapUyjLV5bqoOAoccXcSRrGB5izJamBmgiuBuJD5-bqwi_TQj2BXOyPhSfsWu-EXel3Iq6rusQQ2Bg6uT-BDy3mzv4BNRdBFgNfn-WEGtvyHSjdKDtdprkc4cgVJ_fSNAtPe12uSNTILHnl3TH7NUUcmwxvOwAlbOJ9e8eXywzC_D_dN2b944JqV3nRg%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=41f13fe39d0a4c928ace616729d350e4&_e=Gt-N2dAhTvATcsV8E-Qh0fTZttt3KgrFcE-wGW-cWMl_93qbIbUiZpqm0tJls489xhqBUJriL5tOeIUQBN-DwXiAA562DR13RwWpjqa3RhrVbPkD3fycRyvIVPg_Rr6WVK2vST0HVf9K_zge2qnO-43hU9aam8xzSeiKKw9hPebcysHvkDDFblP9KqUIN7tkDt0XJTdHfeZCDSaCIxrl4I8XHcrapUyjLV5bqoOAoccXcSRrGB5izJamBmgiuBuJIuQwqtiMcn9xMMAi-Ghfm9LnzVnFigcsT0oZOnFcvXlHeGcIdxKK-XmxcK5HYd5W5MDuPo1DQRiF6p27J5jhIMm2p9QBBW_-VqUpS-wXvhmSiMOX8M6U6m1k-cMzm6gnfLETAbHdSFJEzYq5rlpfAA%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=41f13fe39d0a4c928ace616729d350e4&_e=Gt-N2dAhTvATcsV8E-Qh0fTZttt3KgrFcE-wGW-cWMl_93qbIbUiZpqm0tJls489xhqBUJriL5tOeIUQBN-DwXiAA562DR13RwWpjqa3RhrVbPkD3fycRyvIVPg_Rr6WVK2vST0HVf9K_zge2qnO-43hU9aam8xzSeiKKw9hPebcysHvkDDFblP9KqUIN7tkDt0XJTdHfeZCDSaCIxrl4I8XHcrapUyjLV5bqoOAoccXcSRrGB5izJamBmgiuBuJr-faKhPoWyDjxYCi0784tsgqb0nSBYx3PyN765dd-R7wxPsYrNDnsKsUAWVVnM5TP-Pq1VTibkTEWr5uJeWj3enyt6R2yJcGAvx_fnDzYvzpjs25VICYvcMSqQGTh2QXm2QpVsyPzfW-bLIBeL_gOg%3D%3D)

**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)****Actor, Author, and Father**

|

Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.

| | | For years the government has grown bigger, more wasteful, less efficient, and more corrupt.

_**But that stops now. **_

House Republicans are committed to working with the **[Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=45aa79e961d445cfa52e0ac3abbacac2&_e=UF_oBpTHVW396IKp1tTQgDrq_mQCAb3WEtUbhs1E8gecuF0giF4X-K_1AMTHYGqKG3Cl98RHoi3xaBNI572PXcEBuxLS0mJMYATqADYkum7nX-We_OkRWaCIUCCdxeOPpzQQ7l80rbQxRHozF_PXz8ov6joWFHdvE4HWpKBXd9gfu-aymNzSWRDCLd3Dr0CQXLsymrD6Wbky5fWTYvMFbYQTSs27mysxGN6NEyEAebjP5i0pNWeUvHZ5L11dMQJpd1tHvGTm_MLv2VO30I21v6lDibbHb36x3URk_74OjralSMN3Jrhp_s00tH18MPpmjhd9Q-5WSth0ejM0v2I_GUIoNieuI00Vn0kgqFcSuH7kmYVcWwQJRUQ0b7DFpX31fF0oaEVWkEbyOCVcZ7OwDP2GNf_APu7QrCOmFE4wGrUqQ0-0Gdd_vSEto2bmlHBg "Department of Government Efficiency \(DOGE\)")** to reform our bloated, woke, and inefficient federal government.

The Radical Left will be in a panic when they see that Republicans slashed funding for the Department of Education sponsored communism, illegal immigrants' healthcare, and any other of the Democrats' favorite ideas.

body:
Claim your limited edition t-shirt to celebrate our new Canadian and Greenlander friends!

|
---
| | |
Friend,

**Trudeau is OUT and freedom is IN.**

The people of Canada and Greenland better get excited, because they're about to get a taste of freedom.

Word on the street is that the United States of America could get a little bit bigger, and we just released these **[PATRIOTIC new t-shirts to celebrate.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XENFgIjRMe0kvjx1ZsNUHA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_~~ "PATRIOTIC new t-shirts to celebrate.")**

**_Isn 't America wonderful, Friend?_**

---
| | | [CLAIM MY USA T-SHIRT](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XENFgIjRMe0kvjx1ZsNUHA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_~~ "Generic Button")
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XENFgIjRMe0kvjx1ZsNUHA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_~~)
---

To celebrate America's potential union with Canada and Greenland, we are releasing just **500** of these beautiful t-shirts, and we'd like for you to have one, Friend.

---
| | | [CLAIM MY USA T-SHIRT](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XENFgIjRMe0kvjx1ZsNUHA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_~~ "Generic Button")
---

Democrats and their little pals in the media are LOSING it at the thought of Greenland and Canada becoming part of the United States

_**But that could just be the best thing to ever happen to them!**_

So if you're on board and you want the people of Canada and Greenland to know what freedom feels like, **[chip in $35 right now and claim your limited t-shirt before they're gone.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XENFgIjRMe0kvjx1ZsNUHA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_~~ "chip in $35 right now and claim your limited t-shirt before they're gone.")**

---

For freedom,

House Republicans

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/noKfHOA6UjygqwSBRX9sDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_nkP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI1MDExM1cDc3BjQgpnf_pchWfpnBxkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/noKfHOA6UjygqwSBRX9sDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_nkP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI1MDExM1cDc3BjQgpnf_pchWfpnBxkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/noKfHOA6UjygqwSBRX9sDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_nkP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI1MDExM1cDc3BjQgpnf_pchWfpnBxkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/noKfHOA6UjygqwSBRX9sDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_nkP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI1MDExM1cDc3BjQgpnf_pchWfpnBxkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/noKfHOA6UjygqwSBRX9sDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_nkP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI1MDExM1cDc3BjQgpnf_pchWfpnBxkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
What makes [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/noKfHOA6UjygqwSBRX9sDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_nkP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI1MDExM1cDc3BjQgpnf_pchWfpnBxkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/noKfHOA6UjygqwSBRX9sDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_nkP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI1MDExM1cDc3BjQgpnf_pchWfpnBxkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/noKfHOA6UjygqwSBRX9sDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_nkP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI1MDExM1cDc3BjQgpnf_pchWfpnBxkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/noKfHOA6UjygqwSBRX9sDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ_nkP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI1MDExM1cDc3BjQgpnf_pchWfpnBxkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

body:

Peter, as we start the new year, I want to touch base with you. Since my time serving in the Vermont State Senate, I’ve always been willing to work with anyone who can help alleviate suffering and solve the challenges facing working people. And in Congress, I’m working to make those same connections to get work done on your behalf. In the 2024 election, there were tons of voters, including many here in Vermont, who didn't vote solely on party lines. Some voted both for Donald Trump and progressive Democrats like myself. If you were a split-ticket voter, I would love to hear about what drove your decision. If you weren’t, I’m still curious to know what you think about this defining characteristic of the 2024 election. I see this as an opportunity to reflect and understand how I can best serve the needs of every Vermonter, no matter how you voted. **[My team created a survey to record your response, as well as ask about your top issues heading into 2025. Click any of the links in this email to get started. It should only take a minute or two.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100339689/522435346/-883834606?amount=10&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTk5Zjc1Ni1kZGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WctPoMH6sq8a9dNtLm1LlZhmRk02N_BOfu11aVYdtNE=&emci=10fd8050-ddd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c199f756-ddd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=43402272)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100339690/522435347/-883834606?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTk5Zjc1Ni1kZGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WctPoMH6sq8a9dNtLm1LlZhmRk02N_BOfu11aVYdtNE=&emci=10fd8050-ddd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c199f756-ddd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=43402272)

Canaan. Charleston. Jay. Lyndon. Maidstone. Pittsford. Poultney. Pownal. Readsboro. Ryegate. Tinmouth. Woodford.
In all of these towns, Vermonters split their tickets and voted to send both Trump and myself back to DC.
I’m committed to representing every voice, and it’s the honor of my life to continue serving my state in Congress. That’s why I want to hear from all of you and learn more about my supporter base.
**[If you have a moment to let me know your thoughts, please take our survey today. Your responses will help me better support you in the new year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100339691/522435348/-883834606?amount=10&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTk5Zjc1Ni1kZGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WctPoMH6sq8a9dNtLm1LlZhmRk02N_BOfu11aVYdtNE=&emci=10fd8050-ddd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c199f756-ddd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=43402272)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can’t fill Matt Gaetz’s seat without some more help.
And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:
| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

| | | Here’s Why You Need This Knife in Your Arsenal: ****
**> Lightning-Fast Deployment**: With the Out-The-Front (OTF) mechanism, this knife is ready to go in an instant. Perfect for when every second counts. ****
**> Superior Blade Quality**: Crafted with high-quality steel, this blade is sharp, durable, and designed to maintain its edge, making it a reliable companion in any situation. ****

It’s not just a knife; it’s a statement. ****
**> Compact & Concealable**: Designed to be discreet yet always within reach, it’s the perfect size to fit comfortably in your pocket or clip onto your gear. ****
**Limited Stock Alert:**
These knives are in high demand, and we’ve got a limited quantity available. Don’t miss out on owning one of the most versatile and dependable OTF knives on the market. ****
**Special Offer Just for You:**
For a limited time, we’re offering an **exclusive discount** to our loyal subscribers. Don’t wait—this deal won’t last forever.******_**_******_**__**_******_**_**********
[**Claim Your Yellow Jacket OTF Knife Here!**](https://links.zerolethal.com/a/1537/click/19779/6374453/5a275a2904fa8c41435a5ef5a174c1aece97c717/a0a2fd8e83bb4ffc60606f8bdfa51d8bc4b88111)

This is more than just a knife—it’s a piece of gear you’ll be proud to carry every day. Whether you’re in the field, on the job, or just out and about, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife is the edge you need.

Stay sharp, stay prepared.

_~Zero Lethal_ __

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Urgent: In less than 24 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Dear Peter,
Tomorrow at noon the 2025 legislative session begins. When we head back to the State Capitol to continue our fight for Tennessee families we will no longer be able to accept monetary support for our legislative efforts.
RUSH A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dems25email]
This year the stakes couldn’t be higher. Gov. Bill Lee and Republicans are again coming after our local public schools with their voucher scam, the rights of vulnerable children across our state and, of course, women’s rights. To combat Republicans’ extreme legislation and all their other harmful efforts, it is imperative that we have the resources we need to combat their lies and propaganda while promoting our strong agenda for Tennessee families throughout the legislative session.
It’s never been more important to have a strong, well-funded House Democratic Caucus that can push back against their extremism in real time and fight for policies that improve the lives of every Tennessean.
Will you help us start the session strong by making a donation before we gavel in tomorrow at noon? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dems25email] Every dollar counts in this fight for Tennessee’s future.
The work ahead won’t be easy, but with your support, we’ll be able to stand strong for the values we share. Thank you for being in this fight with us—I’m sincerely grateful for you.
Best,
John Ray Clemmons
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dems25email]

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, Tomorrow at noon the 2025 legislative session begins. When we head back to the State Capitol to continue our fight for Tennessee families we will no longer be able to accept monetary support for our legislative efforts. RUSH A CONTRIBUTION [] This year the stakes couldn’t be higher. Gov. Bill Lee and Republicans are again coming after our local public schools with their voucher scam, the rights of vulnerable children across our state and, of course, women’s rights. To combat Republicans’ extreme legislation and all their other harmful efforts, it is imperative that we have the resources we need to combat their lies and propaganda while promoting our strong agenda for Tennessee families throughout the legislative session. It’s never been more important to have a strong, well-funded House Democratic Caucus that can push back against their extremism in real time and fight for policies that improve the lives of every Tennessean. Will you help us start the session strong by making a donation before we gavel in tomorrow at noon? [] Every dollar counts in this fight for Tennessee’s future. The work ahead won’t be easy, but with your support, we’ll be able to stand strong for the values we share. Thank you for being in this fight with us—I’m sincerely grateful for you. Best, John Ray Clemmons Tennessee House Democratic Caucus CONTRIBUTE [] Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer Tennessee House Democratic Caucus P. O. body:
Claim your limited edition t-shirt to celebrate our new Canadian and Greenlander friends!

| | |
Friend,

**Trudeau is OUT and freedom is IN.**

The people of Canada and Greenland better get excited, because they're about to get a taste of freedom.

Word on the street is that the United States of America could get a little bit bigger, and we just released these **[PATRIOTIC new t-shirts to celebrate.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SHY8qiZLilGvyBkreV48CQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZ__c2KFZ-VoHL9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "PATRIOTIC new t-shirts to celebrate.")**

Democrats and their little pals in the media are LOSING it at the thought of Greenland and Canada becoming part of the United States

_**But that could just be the best thing to ever happen to them!**_

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Health Care Cuts are at the forefront of The Right’s Agenda.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
**Right now, Republicans in Congress are reportedly considering cutting healthcare funding to pay for more tax breaks for the wealthy.** Hi, I’m Gay Valimont, and I’m running for Congress in Florida’s 1st District. This is not just irresponsible; it’s downright**unethical**. Millions of Americans rely on public healthcare programs like Medicare, Medicaid, and the Affordable Care Act to stay healthy, yet some politicians want to take that away to line the pockets of the richest among us. _**April 1st is special elections, and the clock is ticking until we have to act.**_ _**Only YOU can make a change, and we have one shot to do it.**_
---
---
I believe everyone deserves access to affordable healthcare, and I’ll fight every day to protect the programs that make that possible. Cutting healthcare funding to pay for tax cuts for the wealthy is a betrayal of our values. I’m committed to ensuring healthcare remains a right for all, **not** a privilege for the few.
**[We can stop these dangerous cuts and build a future where healthcare is for everyone, not just the rich. Before its too late, rush $8 to my campaign in order to spread the message to those who need it most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100340399/522438369/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjAzY2M4YWItZTBkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lHgG3mzNp4CpYRg6DItSrdMudo5vdFDj2ANCuygwUU0=)**

clean_body: | | | Right now, Republicans in Congress are reportedly considering cutting healthcare funding to pay for more tax breaks for the wealthy. Hi, I’m Gay Valimont, and I’m running for Congress in Florida’s 1st District. This is not just irresponsible; it’s downrightunethical. Millions of Americans rely on public healthcare programs like Medicare, Medicaid, and the Affordable Care Act to stay healthy, yet some politicians want to take that away to line the pockets of the richest among us. April 1st is special elections, and the clock is ticking until we have to act. Only YOU can make a change, and we have one shot to do it. I believe everyone deserves access to affordable healthcare, and I’ll fight every day to protect the programs that make that possible. Cutting healthcare funding to pay for tax cuts for the wealthy is a betrayal of our values. I’m committed to ensuring healthcare remains a right for all, not a privilege for the few. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Without healthcare, thousands of people will be vulnerable. subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93d00161c88e41408bd127fd98037428&_e=ymuYNN_BFEF9hvPB8eg0qIcnjSvC5EjIhU0GWCdFM6VBn8BN6O__MPdpgKMtEl6NklrEo7fajoIjCP6Z0BWKqrJAwl5nZfMCNDnE9cpT2VhPOh9-y99w1hg0Lxp9sm5GYR1v4kzsaaFiJMPIaPXKYNTccgwu4B-ipkCPmpJPHpUQOZkhm8-RWCsXbcclSmKrvEZEfkqc8LcGBk1NUvMT603UADuMM-iBl0KxRv1mTBbfkzDYPjNM8wEvYurgSD9GbqdAS2ctdmRuoSpEmQ2cjB_HhJ6nvM9C00YvuHlArNfYlXinuHZqOAfTNpOcA0pwnn33xmE1dwFk3wwjbts4oSinh2KpyKUSZnOZZhlD-hCcss__8PVtCTtv_LI_txRzIy7FmRKIad1sz5Pl8bxXwdgRKSBvw8E2Wvrar4abhclX1KOwhmHi2wOCByCRNBi9J8NHpjeI-vyaNyEQvl_MSCOPVhlLaCD7zr0F4oYmfe8%3D)

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93d00161c88e41408bd127fd98037428&_e=ymuYNN_BFEF9hvPB8eg0qIcnjSvC5EjIhU0GWCdFM6VBn8BN6O__MPdpgKMtEl6NklrEo7fajoIjCP6Z0BWKqrJAwl5nZfMCNDnE9cpT2VhPOh9-y99w1hg0Lxp9sm5GYR1v4kzsaaFiJMPIaPXKYNTccgwu4B-ipkCPmpJPHpUQOZkhm8-RWCsXbcclSmKrvEZEfkqc8LcGBk1NUvMT603UADuMM-iBl0KxRv1mTBbfkzDYPjNM8wEvYurgSD9GbqdAS2ctdmRuoSpEmQ2cjB_HhJ6nvM9C00YvuHlArNfYlXinuHZqOAfTNpOcA0pwnn33xmE1dwFk3wwjbts4odbkVmiWyPlFmbpSFNYg3QiB-m77N_aGp-YUs5kEYrfsaSLkuRg-d1WvSEf4Ya9DBHYGcRacqthjCY7DXROQzY8M_7ZZWYXeC92hq9yF3Kn1NoZ4jfwMfH5aDzqDoGXcwlaTzkrH7ShsGH6szOdMEX0%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93d00161c88e41408bd127fd98037428&_e=ymuYNN_BFEF9hvPB8eg0qIcnjSvC5EjIhU0GWCdFM6VBn8BN6O__MPdpgKMtEl6NklrEo7fajoIjCP6Z0BWKqrJAwl5nZfMCNDnE9cpT2VhPOh9-y99w1hg0Lxp9sm5GYR1v4kzsaaFiJMPIaPXKYNTccgwu4B-ipkCPmpJPHpUQOZkhm8-RWCsXbcclSmKrvEZEfkqc8LcGBk1NUvMT603UADuMM-iBl0KxRv1mTBbfkzDYPjNM8wEvYurgSD9GbqdAS2ctdmRuoSpEmQ2cjB_HhJ6nvM9C00YvuHlArNfYlXinuHZqOAfTNpOcA0pwnn33xmE1dwFk3wwjbts4oQofli95MA73-1wix2ncgwuOX51o5V9Ft5KUHrD8ViRQjYserxMSVmRF4aIsTpZgJ2qPsDb_n2ivcDlMESSrTgcBuqD59L5PDO_rDiSEfswkoWSTFEYWbB-j2pv6Kq2NYaw3RL9_B3SS3cX5zsobv-Y%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93d00161c88e41408bd127fd98037428&_e=ymuYNN_BFEF9hvPB8eg0qIcnjSvC5EjIhU0GWCdFM6VBn8BN6O__MPdpgKMtEl6NklrEo7fajoIjCP6Z0BWKqrJAwl5nZfMCNDnE9cpT2VhPOh9-y99w1hg0Lxp9sm5GYR1v4kzsaaFiJMPIaPXKYNTccgwu4B-ipkCPmpJPHpUQOZkhm8-RWCsXbcclSmKrvEZEfkqc8LcGBk1NUvMT603UADuMM-iBl0KxRv1mTBbfkzDYPjNM8wEvYurgSD9GbqdAS2ctdmRuoSpEmQ2cjB_HhJ6nvM9C00YvuHlArNfYlXinuHZqOAfTNpOcA0pwnn33xmE1dwFk3wwjbts4obyFEyGYh2vQ16LHmGHg-EVMmTUifiL4J1kgb6DqtVfRuf9S3PuoCD-ZKQ9GTRY46Gcqcqi6GFbZtUyZaGzq3_ggfgNkxhfQt6KhvH2f2z60r6NTfxXBkz7YYPMyhTOjwl5PP7WO9towxFTij5Fc6mU%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93d00161c88e41408bd127fd98037428&_e=ymuYNN_BFEF9hvPB8eg0qIcnjSvC5EjIhU0GWCdFM6VBn8BN6O__MPdpgKMtEl6NklrEo7fajoIjCP6Z0BWKqrJAwl5nZfMCNDnE9cpT2VhPOh9-y99w1hg0Lxp9sm5GYR1v4kzsaaFiJMPIaPXKYNTccgwu4B-ipkCPmpJPHpUQOZkhm8-RWCsXbcclSmKrvEZEfkqc8LcGBk1NUvMT603UADuMM-iBl0KxRv1mTBbfkzDYPjNM8wEvYurgSD9GbqdAS2ctdmRuoSpEmQ2cjB_HhJ6nvM9C00YvuHlArNfYlXinuHZqOAfTNpOcA0pwnn33xmE1dwFk3wwjbts4oRkB9n16_4PLGxTf9iMiglktM_j-MHqXkjwSJXEQBP1rTYVh2jFdIl_SoY3dyXkZUu3QbGT618EAbKybznFjvi_woyP0cKop_Awae2zYad0m-evcBLiTzz06RYehUgZKXr_-RyzbBR5Ul8fXbzJI1F8%3D)
[ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93d00161c88e41408bd127fd98037428&_e=ymuYNN_BFEF9hvPB8eg0qIcnjSvC5EjIhU0GWCdFM6VBn8BN6O__MPdpgKMtEl6NklrEo7fajoIjCP6Z0BWKqrJAwl5nZfMCNDnE9cpT2VhPOh9-y99w1hg0Lxp9sm5GYR1v4kzsaaFiJMPIaPXKYNTccgwu4B-ipkCPmpJPHpUQOZkhm8-RWCsXbcclSmKrvEZEfkqc8LcGBk1NUvMT603UADuMM-iBl0KxRv1mTBbfkzDYPjNM8wEvYurgSD9GbqdAS2ctdmRuoSpEmQ2cjB_HhJ6nvM9C00YvuHlArNfYlXinuHZqOAfTNpOcA0pwnn33xmE1dwFk3wwjbts4oeQmM-70iC8LNDGrCDCtjptrIzFlTN7AFY9MKr1gOUd7u3ikgHKrx0WRQjqI4xDgGgO7tjO2JQK9cacH-od6A85mFdS5cHT7f4vV0CHGAlUIuydCt5pSLvTN3SlosNTiFZ1UnzQXnsOqMT5x_7Rro3U%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93d00161c88e41408bd127fd98037428&_e=ymuYNN_BFEF9hvPB8eg0qIcnjSvC5EjIhU0GWCdFM6VBn8BN6O__MPdpgKMtEl6NklrEo7fajoIjCP6Z0BWKqrJAwl5nZfMCNDnE9cpT2VhPOh9-y99w1hg0Lxp9sm5GYR1v4kzsaaFiJMPIaPXKYNTccgwu4B-ipkCPmpJPHpUQOZkhm8-RWCsXbcclSmKrvEZEfkqc8LcGBk1NUvMT603UADuMM-iBl0KxRv1mTBbfkzDYPjNM8wEvYurgSD9GbqdAS2ctdmRuoSpEmQ2cjB_HhJ6nvM9C00YvuHlArNfYlXinuHZqOAfTNpOcA0pwnn33xmE1dwFk3wwjbts4oS3_U4cl4SZ77S2IzDAl46A_HtnWi4uPHVFtVpMcMV8taolb1Qv2pMQcrR39Abp9fZG_h4tMAr5k4j705pXI1-3LmsbemqB4OpsFqv799GV67yR-V8mPupWatdDVaZ1UfEv-TA8rURiawxLVusb4cBU%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93d00161c88e41408bd127fd98037428&_e=ymuYNN_BFEF9hvPB8eg0qIcnjSvC5EjIhU0GWCdFM6VBn8BN6O__MPdpgKMtEl6NklrEo7fajoIjCP6Z0BWKqrJAwl5nZfMCNDnE9cpT2VhPOh9-y99w1hg0Lxp9sm5GYR1v4kzsaaFiJMPIaPXKYNTccgwu4B-ipkCPmpJPHpUQOZkhm8-RWCsXbcclSmKrvEZEfkqc8LcGBk1NUvMT603UADuMM-iBl0KxRv1mTBbfkzDYPjNM8wEvYurgSD9GbqdAS2ctdmRuoSpEmQ2cjB_HhJ6nvM9C00YvuHlArNfYlXinuHZqOAfTNpOcA0pwnn33xmE1dwFk3wwjbts4oXzJkwle0MvNT33COjuHXFirD8_vMU7ddxtxSxm96EuRRp_OqXKQuWf16c0e1whk5AfENeakMAjF8sbMzss94V-K6XWv3lsAh_EU5wn_ap5-6zoPJzv-3xY9-yIQEy_3AbfbUtqSmO5b8xPfxB33hQI%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93d00161c88e41408bd127fd98037428&_e=ymuYNN_BFEF9hvPB8eg0qIcnjSvC5EjIhU0GWCdFM6VBn8BN6O__MPdpgKMtEl6NklrEo7fajoIjCP6Z0BWKqrJAwl5nZfMCNDnE9cpT2VhPOh9-y99w1hg0Lxp9sm5GYR1v4kzsaaFiJMPIaPXKYNTccgwu4B-ipkCPmpJPHpUQOZkhm8-RWCsXbcclSmKrvEZEfkqc8LcGBk1NUvMT603UADuMM-iBl0KxRv1mTBbfkzDYPjNM8wEvYurgSD9GbqdAS2ctdmRuoSpEmQ2cjB_HhJ6nvM9C00YvuHlArNfYlXinuHZqOAfTNpOcA0pwnn33xmE1dwFk3wwjbts4oaCtKa_nniDDwlChkUGUsyzmz4Eq4ZZkNlqDhu2IL0UqTUleuGLBg9xW2e7kyp84lWB2-PvDa1WQFKbP6Wlne8I7hyTZ0eVkwzW2P3GPcfJzltWLjs0WOzRHPuR21G1AbblK-IJO8MaYjmZTB-SZj-4%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! body:
Last week, we affirmed the election results to ensure a peaceful transfer of power from one administration to another.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100341369/522441446/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzBiYWJjMS1lMmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zn_Fsl2eCvZKHSQYXUeryDlKtcyVDMminNXfHXnXCfw=&emci=931996b1-9ccf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2c0babc1-e2d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9494239)

| | Last week, we affirmed the election results to ensure a peaceful transfer of power from one administration to another. Every January 6th, every four years, Congress meets to perform a perfunctory action of certifying the Electoral College. Unfortunately, four years ago, others used the day to riot and deface the Capitol. January 6 is now a day to remember that democracy bent but did not break. Now, our work in Congress continues. In recent years, we have invested in improving Washington's infrastructure and economy. In my time on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I have worked hard to bring home federal money for critical transportation projects like earthquake safety upgrades for roads and bridges in Skagit County and Lynnwood; safe routes to school for Lynden; and road improvements that will make possible a green technology center in Everett. **In Washington state, transportation means jobs. You cannot have a big league economy with a little league infrastructure.** This session, as the ranking Democrat on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I will continue to work with my colleagues and support bipartisan efforts that help the people of Northwest Washington and the United States. We have a difficult road ahead of us, and we face unprecedented challenges. We may have setbacks, but here is what I know: **our shared values – working hard, caring for each other, and serving the community – will always guide my work in Congress to serve the people of Northwest Washington.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: Last week, we affirmed the election results to ensure a peaceful transfer of power from one administration to another. | | | | Last week, we affirmed the election results to ensure a peaceful transfer of power from one administration to another. Every January 6th, every four years, Congress meets to perform a perfunctory action of certifying the Electoral College. Unfortunately, four years ago, others used the day to riot and deface the Capitol. January 6 is now a day to remember that democracy bent but did not break. Now, our work in Congress continues. In recent years, we have invested in improving Washington's infrastructure and economy. In my time on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I have worked hard to bring home federal money for critical transportation projects like earthquake safety upgrades for roads and bridges in Skagit County and Lynnwood; safe routes to school for Lynden; and road improvements that will make possible a green technology center in Everett. In Washington state, transportation means jobs. You cannot have a big league economy with a little league infrastructure. This session, as the ranking Democrat on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I will continue to work with my colleagues and support bipartisan efforts that help the people of Northwest Washington and the United States. We have a difficult road ahead of us, and we face unprecedented challenges. We may have setbacks, but here is what I know: our shared values – working hard, caring for each other, and serving the community – will always guide my work in Congress to serve the people of Northwest Washington. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . ### [State high court dismisses taxpayer’s suit over Minneapolis protections for teachers of color ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71899&L=34244&F=H&&hash=2bd194b1f257b2b211d38474eeaf7d64540bd52ea39c00c3a71f74833d504ce9) Sahan Journal The Minnesota Supreme Court ruled that a Minneapolis taxpayer does not have standing to challenge a provision in the Minneapolis Public Schools teacher union contract aimed at protecting teachers of color during layoffs.

But Tom Fitton, the president of Washington, D.C.-based conservative legal group Judicial Watch, which represented the taxpayer in this case, blasted the “woke, racially discriminatory contract” and said his group would ask President-elect Donald Trump to investigate it as a “blatant civil rights violation.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71899&L=34244&F=H&&hash=2bd194b1f257b2b211d38474eeaf7d64540bd52ea39c00c3a71f74833d504ce9)

### [Joe Biden Awards Presidential Medal Of Freedom To Group Including George Soros, Hillary Clinton ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71899&L=34212&F=H&&hash=2c7b2b79a68573a803520b2daea6a1d7b5c47cf7a0ca23c4b886f30e847e2296) The Daily Caller President Joe Biden awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom to a group of 19 recipients including George Soros and Hillary Clinton on Saturday. As secretary of state, Clinton presided over the U.S. State Department during the 2012 terrorist attack in Benghazi, Libya which killed four Americans, including U.S. Ambassador Chris Stevens. Clinton had hours’ advanced warning of the planned attack, which was planned up to 10 days prior to the assault, according to documents obtained by Judicial Watch. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71899&L=34212&F=H&&hash=2c7b2b79a68573a803520b2daea6a1d7b5c47cf7a0ca23c4b886f30e847e2296)

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that the Superior Court in Fulton County, GA, issued an order granting $21,578 “attorney’s fees and costs” in the open records lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 13, 2025 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that the Superior Court in Fulton County, GA, issued an order granting $21,578 “attorney’s fees and costs” in the open records lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. The order followed a previous order finding that Willis was in default in the lawsuit. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced today it sued the California Coastal Commission for records about the decision to prohibit more Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (SpaceX) rockets from launching out of Vandenberg Space Force Base (Judicial Watch Inc. v. California Coastal Commission (No. CPF-24-518820)). A member of the Commission specifically tied her vote against Musk and SpaceX to Musk’s support for President Trump. ---|--- | | | | | The Minnesota Supreme Court’s decision to reverse the Court of Appeal’s ruling is beyond the pale. Minneapolis Public Schools is unabashedly discriminating against teachers based on their race, and the school district is using taxpayer dollars to do so. The Minnesota Supreme Court’s disgraceful decision not only threatens teachers’ jobs but also prevents Minnesota taxpayers (present and future) from holding their government to account. This woke, racially discriminatory contract cannot stand. Judicial Watch will ask the Trump administration to investigate this blatant civil rights violation and take all necessary steps to ensure teachers do not lose their jobs because of their race. ---|--- | | | | | As if it were not bad enough that over a dozen states grant illegal immigrants driver’s licenses, a criminal ring has for years exploited the security vulnerabilities of the leftist policies to obtain licenses for undocumented migrants who live in jurisdictions that do not offer the benefit. For about $1,400, illegal aliens living in states that prohibit them from obtaining the cards, fraudulently secured them in New York and Massachusetts—both sanctuary states—with the help of five individuals. ---|--- | | | As if it were not bad enough that over a dozen states grant illegal immigrants driver’s licenses, a criminal ring has for years exploited the security vulnerabilities of the leftist policies to obtain licenses for undocumented migrants who live in jurisdictions that do not offer the benefit. For about $1,400, illegal aliens living in states that prohibit them from obtaining the cards, fraudulently secured them in New York and Massachusetts—both sanctuary states—with the help of five individuals. Sahan Journal The Minnesota Supreme Court ruled that a Minneapolis taxpayer does not have standing to challenge a provision in the Minneapolis Public Schools teacher union contract aimed at protecting teachers of color during layoffs. But Tom Fitton, the president of Washington, D.C.-based conservative legal group Judicial Watch, which represented the taxpayer in this case, blasted the “woke, racially discriminatory contract” and said his group would ask President-elect Donald Trump to investigate it as a “blatant civil rights violation.” The Daily Caller President Joe Biden awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom to a group of 19 recipients including George Soros and Hillary Clinton on Saturday. As secretary of state, Clinton presided over the U.S. State Department during the 2012 terrorist attack in Benghazi, Libya which killed four Americans, including U.S. Ambassador Chris Stevens. Clinton had hours’ advanced warning of the planned attack, which was planned up to 10 days prior to the assault, according to documents obtained by Judicial Watch. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn America back to Godly values
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b156aa69a16c4e51b4c65605e597df95&_e=eCGxXqPnDJ6vq8Lmce5jfwk4ZIl5Z7j8T7SyhG4nqFF8GYndfck4SxVy-SYAi2cMKROrug1SyDrkNHdul8DGGAvwkiTtSx6u3ecLoL6X6qojGMUx5JncCw4IvM7OO8qr8ouG5XQp1x7uwh4bD8b3SIDXbdypTmFpVjJ9WbdYCPciEPn2P-Rk-_eR7sXUG1hF7sesUeKSRH4Uh2HG0D7Zo2pBAyGl4XwvPu1YuCX6nhPSmdryutuO394p60hj0p6UOpd6xxYNNkvvc_QM0Gb_iQUhJI3jCKWRFXt3ISL_dI45clRqPVtZ8uV1T76dQkwis3kGqfDHFLcAv-kFRz2IWjlXB3dwoo3tHl0IiGEPQ7KOdCnj-Gq782LzAwgdHTW6)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b156aa69a16c4e51b4c65605e597df95&_e=eCGxXqPnDJ6vq8Lmce5jfwk4ZIl5Z7j8T7SyhG4nqFF8GYndfck4SxVy-SYAi2cMKROrug1SyDrkNHdul8DGGAvwkiTtSx6u3ecLoL6X6qojGMUx5JncCw4IvM7OO8qr8ouG5XQp1x7uwh4bD8b3SIDXbdypTmFpVjJ9WbdYCPciEPn2P-Rk-_eR7sXUG1hF7sesUeKSRH4Uh2HG0D7Zo2pBAyGl4XwvPu1YuCX6nhM4UzSsCuQ1QFZjVzQqGkvCj7ZoCVJmX7Y2OVMH8frYmqk13HuxPHaO82kKTXqrpwV77pAqqlkfRboECYBO1LSxE6vdW5wRxd79BLAarGGRkSgd1biNysQX9q1hma7hde3x_iw_S_zI4-ZlGflg-_ki)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Trump, Elon, & The Bee
body:
Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b741eb1d28a5475da24311f86c1447d1&_e=nboLZVcmw9oUzFvXcC2mOKjQ04nMiSP16OLfKD_O1rQRqlJ5kFj8xmLEDuaIoR-GujTSp6qKGSBSIxlBT5EglDZ_8S83sI9MbpPm-373RKtTW0e5sBgKx-8cOYuti1VIJ_1tOg-baoVUJ4Z20CCb3OyPn_QzdYZo8fbU5q4dXh5V7vrkLFXVDocfPhxqknJrrkmzfatnyXGMELvVgV3HN85GNouhukge3UwKJURTqH3HZx40Gn73ibECfmGZrHs-nkXAaGOpabwGT9K-wPgVIQ%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b741eb1d28a5475da24311f86c1447d1&_e=nboLZVcmw9oUzFvXcC2mOKjQ04nMiSP16OLfKD_O1rQRqlJ5kFj8xmLEDuaIoR-GujTSp6qKGSBSIxlBT5EglDZ_8S83sI9MbpPm-373RKtTW0e5sBgKx-8cOYuti1VIMlpdXHt_PccjBDedJuLiQfZi15Nm986_z2Ard6i1jVf1Qi7RxwUAQHjAS5c2OeaW3hZmrYDuP8J1USUkASWlENXyYBazNFB1CIaabwsvLm32xoRTP0EZEWGtWP18O83W8wqVcP0I9HkZCDDPWHt-8w%3D%3D)
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b741eb1d28a5475da24311f86c1447d1&_e=nboLZVcmw9oUzFvXcC2mOKjQ04nMiSP16OLfKD_O1rQRqlJ5kFj8xmLEDuaIoR-GujTSp6qKGSBSIxlBT5EglDZ_8S83sI9MbpPm-373RKtTW0e5sBgKx-8cOYuti1VIOoGCimIrJv7nktj0gPj-Q4fgWXQNJUslIdS_d-6PzAcCOrG3ebwpDW67Rni-jJnpH4GNyJVXsvf8Cmd5obcsuAliz7mMl73yA3nDz-ecgMMYIt66w7IFAKMbMba7jWdAJ-Fk-ZZGbTXKBRfuFGipEA%3D%3D)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_**Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b741eb1d28a5475da24311f86c1447d1&_e=nboLZVcmw9oUzFvXcC2mOKjQ04nMiSP16OLfKD_O1rQRqlJ5kFj8xmLEDuaIoR-GujTSp6qKGSBSIxlBT5EglDZ_8S83sI9MbpPm-373RKtTW0e5sBgKx-8cOYuti1VIkPbgMTAo4LvBvPp2IyCDtFeI_bpOuLRcFIrLXbxHhWhexa8Xy7YPejBGz-POXHUG1b7gZ8DXta_nFc_fiHi77yZRnTRXhay5DN7JhNkioQKPuOWIe1e-9muR731dldMHbEXLHUEZKOUo8BYCEuReaw%3D%3D)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b741eb1d28a5475da24311f86c1447d1&_e=nboLZVcmw9oUzFvXcC2mOKjQ04nMiSP16OLfKD_O1rQRqlJ5kFj8xmLEDuaIoR-GujTSp6qKGSBSIxlBT5EglDZ_8S83sI9MbpPm-373RKtTW0e5sBgKx-8cOYuti1VIXhVw_DKp4vl-Sxlap-WDqCM-eXbZTiVfQMuLI7gY5Absm8iy2ERu4AOOIxgvU60K1jVAu4PKIwRoHlKu8OwEjkwukxLja8RinKjUgrpKgex6aEZyoKrz_fMmdxIEEoPmQu8SHDPZhbTtihJ9mpdzBg%3D%3D)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. "**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b741eb1d28a5475da24311f86c1447d1&_e=nboLZVcmw9oUzFvXcC2mOKjQ04nMiSP16OLfKD_O1rQRqlJ5kFj8xmLEDuaIoR-GujTSp6qKGSBSIxlBT5EglDZ_8S83sI9MbpPm-373RKtTW0e5sBgKx-8cOYuti1VIEYSE1FJWrCE_XneF42mS0pUsGTe4WMDheRNZlZMqRyeCEfDN7udDJSH09HvQAWxHcvF10KPYqCg7uMZIp6QBTT3Ms7_e7M0BoGcfrc01lbrMwp2D8WDKRKcVjiDhiumUWtG07kWPYs1tuMu8S7-aRg%3D%3D)I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b741eb1d28a5475da24311f86c1447d1&_e=nboLZVcmw9oUzFvXcC2mOKjQ04nMiSP16OLfKD_O1rQRqlJ5kFj8xmLEDuaIoR-GujTSp6qKGSBSIxlBT5EglDZ_8S83sI9MbpPm-373RKtTW0e5sBgKx-8cOYuti1VILvBhg3bwduU_CAgfxwYsxN6kEDRbHZRYLGYVlHapPKW83cuKFYYmfCcmpX-L7OUGavOUXdIud0R7lRoCt-RHcm5iTFR2F3iwTRF9XPpXWJxd6IuUCFfbNsieI843cxwVzSS2swWKsDy7GD8Za_bXog%3D%3D)
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b741eb1d28a5475da24311f86c1447d1&_e=nboLZVcmw9oUzFvXcC2mOKjQ04nMiSP16OLfKD_O1rQRqlJ5kFj8xmLEDuaIoR-GujTSp6qKGSBSIxlBT5EglDZ_8S83sI9MbpPm-373RKtTW0e5sBgKx-8cOYuti1VIyuHAEuR6u04y_h4SBKuxoksOHiJZ2BqszdIIPL_txR_ESh9_SNMWG4pwOQeJ6e-TVDubUJPr4xBNlTrhGRMKuA8SKjVgagvjxsYLu6utMs_0S_eFkHY6vOTzj0ODmcCReig904rKXuJmZ6Y-MCxnQw%3D%3D)
---
Thanks for supporting free speech. **We 'll never give up the fight.**Seth Dillon
CEO, The Babylon Bee

body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011325_2&amount=25]
Team,
2025 is considered an "off year" for elections, but the reality is that there are a number of important elections on the ballot:
* Three special elections (so far) to fill vacancies in the U.S. House of Representatives

* Two special elections to fill vacancies in the U.S. Senate

* Two Governorships in Virginia and New Jersey, who will have the power to appoint judges

* All 100 seats in Virginia’s House of Delegates

* All 80 seats in the New Jersey General Assembly

* State Supreme Court seats in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin -- where legal challenges to mail-in voting have been heard and continue to be brought forward

* 10 major Mayoral races in big cities
And those are just the highlights. You can bet that opponents of voting rights are already targeting these races after their victories in 2024. We've got to match their efforts and help mobilize voters for these special elections and defend our right to vote .
Team: Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us prepare for these important elections, fight for voting rights in state legislatures, and so much more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=011325_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011325_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011325_2&amount=25]

# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1449%2E791427%2ETb0upu)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3005?t=2&akid=1449%2E791427%2ETb0upu)
Friend,
Elon Musk’s lies and disinformation are out of control.
Over the last few years he has fully embraced the conspiracies of the far-right, especially the white nationalist [Great Replacement Theory.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3003?t=3&akid=1449%2E791427%2ETb0upu)**
And now with Donald Trump soon to be back in power, Musk will be right by his side, guiding policy with these racist lies and pushing them to millions of people on his platform.
He’s a dangerous man, and we must fight back against his lies at every chance we get.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

**Don’t close this email just yet? 🙏**
Even though Trump is set to take the White House, it doesn’t mean we can give up on our fight for the working class. Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100342460/522445098/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250113_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2VmYmMzZC1lNmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-zYl6rujVwYUv9Zw32c0gn4_anPunXGG-aEJELBib8=) Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain.

I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips.

**I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100342461/522445099/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250113_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2VmYmMzZC1lNmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-zYl6rujVwYUv9Zw32c0gn4_anPunXGG-aEJELBib8=) My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family.

Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.

You see, the New York City government shoveled over _$100 million in government aid_ to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. _They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street._

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: **Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families.**

When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it.

I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress.

Right now, the shadow of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families _– and they’re raising millions to pull it off._

But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. [**Can I count on you to join our coalition today by chipping in $3 toward our $10,000 pre-Inauguration Day goal? If thousands of people like you each chip in what they can afford, I know we can take on their dark money and handle whatever the GOP trifecta throws our way. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100342462/522445100/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250113_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2VmYmMzZC1lNmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-zYl6rujVwYUv9Zw32c0gn4_anPunXGG-aEJELBib8=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100342469/522445107/-864556716?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250113_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2VmYmMzZC1lNmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-zYl6rujVwYUv9Zw32c0gn4_anPunXGG-aEJELBib8=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.
