name: Dan Goldman
subject: Newsletter: My first week back in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, If my first week back in Congress as the proud representative from New York’s 10th Congressional District is any indication, the 119th Congress is going to be both chaotic and challenging. As I did last Congress, I will use this weekly newsletter to share some of the highlights and inside perspectives about Washington and NY-10. Before I do, I have a quick request: **[If you’re able, please consider pitching in any amount to support my work in Congress. This grassroots team is a driving force behind the work I do to make life better for NY-10 and every American.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100342487/522445176/-2121622411?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZiNTY2NS1lNmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrRC42sH25gqSYVFQvwcSKbvZozAe6JdeZjpXhcgHd0=)** — **Along with Senators Schumer and Gillibrand, I just secured a $2 million federal grant to revitalize the unused space below the Brooklyn Bridge in Manhattan.** This grant for the Arches Plaza project will help to reconnect the historically divided communities of lower Manhattan — including Chinatown, Two Bridges, the South Street Seaport and the Financial District — by reimagining this space. — **President Biden signed into law the Social Security Fairness Act to expand Social Security benefits to millions of public workers.** I am proud to have been an early supporter of this legislation, which allows government workers, teachers, and others to get their full social security benefits even if they also have pensions. Social Security is not an entitlement; it is an earned benefit that all working Americans deserve. I will continue to work to protect our seniors and those whose labor powers this country by fighting to protect and expand access to Social Security. — **President Biden also signed the Water Resources Development Act, in which I secured $160 million in authorizations to help New York City combat flooding and other climate-change impacts.** The residents of NY-10 are no strangers to the devastating impacts of the climate crisis, and we must ensure that we are doing everything possible to make the coastal areas of lower Manhattan and Brooklyn environmentally resilient. This money will help to ensure that the City is prepared for the next big flood. — One final thought. We saw last week Donald Trump’s strategy at work: distract with crazy and outlandish _comments_ (Greenland, Panama, Gulf of Mexico) to avoid attention on the damaging _actions_ he intends to take (raising taxes on working Americans to benefit billionaires, cut Social Security and Medicare, mass deportations, etc.).**We must not fall for his efforts to distract with nonsense and chase sound bites.** Instead, we must focus on his dangerous efforts to help his oligarch buddies like Elon Musk and hurt people like you. **[This is just the beginning, Peter. To support my work standing up to Trump on behalf of all Americans, please pitch in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100342489/522445178/-2121622411?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZiNTY2NS1lNmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrRC42sH25gqSYVFQvwcSKbvZozAe6JdeZjpXhcgHd0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100342491/522445180/-2121622411?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZiNTY2NS1lNmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrRC42sH25gqSYVFQvwcSKbvZozAe6JdeZjpXhcgHd0=)

clean_body: | Peter, If my first week back in Congress as the proud representative from New York’s 10th Congressional District is any indication, the 119th Congress is going to be both chaotic and challenging. As I did last Congress, I will use this weekly newsletter to share some of the highlights and inside perspectives about Washington and NY-10. Before I do, I have a quick request: = — Along with Senators Schumer and Gillibrand, I just secured a $2 million federal grant to revitalize the unused space below the Brooklyn Bridge in Manhattan. This grant for the Arches Plaza project will help to reconnect the historically divided communities of lower Manhattan — including Chinatown, Two Bridges, the South Street Seaport and the Financial District — by reimagining this space. — President Biden signed into law the Social Security Fairness Act to expand Social Security benefits to millions of public workers. I am proud to have been an early supporter of this legislation, which allows government workers, teachers, and others to get their full social security benefits even if they also have pensions. Social Security is not an entitlement; it is an earned benefit that all working Americans deserve. I will continue to work to protect our seniors and those whose labor powers this country by fighting to protect and expand access to Social Security. — President Biden also signed the Water Resources Development Act, in which I secured $160 million in authorizations to help New York City combat flooding and other climate-change impacts. The residents of NY-10 are no strangers to the devastating impacts of the climate crisis, and we must ensure that we are doing everything possible to make the coastal areas of lower Manhattan and Brooklyn environmentally resilient. This money will help to ensure that the City is prepared for the next big flood. — One final thought. We saw last week Donald Trump’s strategy at work: distract with crazy and outlandish comments (Greenland, Panama, Gulf of Mexico) to avoid attention on the damaging actions he intends to take (raising taxes on working Americans to benefit billionaires, cut Social Security and Medicare, mass deportations, etc.).We must not fall for his efforts to distract with nonsense and chase sound bites. Instead, we must focus on his dangerous efforts to help his oligarch buddies like Elon Musk and hurt people like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Trump, Elon, & The Bee
body:
Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=208d517185e445d29a78cdff2f69f143&_e=J9nqsLUaeiP-IzKcOe3jWzhMM5HnP3x-baaoCUmLwxlIVxWzhrC_KTEwV2s9x9U_82uu4owMlFshRzMspYDf_nFEKyz7KUsuntMgD6K0IooPOROkRHLIL_m-pUHuMHIM9kUjA4MzW0W19d-DzRj-j2YlXHMvxCYpUSt2e8VWLhi3c5eWIfrdRrNGNxCkU9NtEX1-NFH4jxOzFEyOAnU8WZDyWqINzODJ-TRTe2kaxHlhx2WpOZDsDpCq0XjxjZrBD1WjssJSqSKwWvFETTbyWg%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Friend, Voters have made their voices heard. Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant. **_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=208d517185e445d29a78cdff2f69f143&_e=J9nqsLUaeiP-IzKcOe3jWzhMM5HnP3x-baaoCUmLwxlIVxWzhrC_KTEwV2s9x9U_82uu4owMlFshRzMspYDf_nFEKyz7KUsuntMgD6K0IooPOROkRHLIL_m-pUHuMHIMOykXsGU373van-c-ecjCIHADlkpid3lGZywUg7kuTnxf9K70Os9ivpYun_QTcV5g_mrZqdQOOC3a3DCrmv1GCEfi0D7xuQb0Rq_G0-LApReFdaZ6BUlkwBZapP01gdVbBm5Pr7MPPdTVh5VHXuIkrw%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=208d517185e445d29a78cdff2f69f143&_e=J9nqsLUaeiP-IzKcOe3jWzhMM5HnP3x-baaoCUmLwxlIVxWzhrC_KTEwV2s9x9U_82uu4owMlFshRzMspYDf_nFEKyz7KUsuntMgD6K0IooPOROkRHLIL_m-pUHuMHIM-jgfEpMyTwhAERYaa3DSq22CP09nU04JAyTYc_mdXFFrcC9GWi01MnSVuZxnALZOdnvnQixuifRIrq_zquytcYra2gGi2vEcPO_Q5wUPqqYXj3nCKUIb3wYyXYVPCXIRYDd0D0Xr3CTXSZQN5tHY0w%3D%3D)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_ **Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=208d517185e445d29a78cdff2f69f143&_e=J9nqsLUaeiP-IzKcOe3jWzhMM5HnP3x-baaoCUmLwxlIVxWzhrC_KTEwV2s9x9U_82uu4owMlFshRzMspYDf_nFEKyz7KUsuntMgD6K0IooPOROkRHLIL_m-pUHuMHIMv4OzOPDWUQwyqIombCQ3z3JtRdNVpWC-x3GqGGmB8mSetqfDKEhT9JHHE4EUHV_OZP0qiko-rxt3qXjrnYh7-3AzAgbNAbrqmIJi_QuvHE0gYF2bIgo7Dd4wVGgJ-bcFDezKQRFv0WT05X4qAD8lEA%3D%3D)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=208d517185e445d29a78cdff2f69f143&_e=J9nqsLUaeiP-IzKcOe3jWzhMM5HnP3x-baaoCUmLwxlIVxWzhrC_KTEwV2s9x9U_82uu4owMlFshRzMspYDf_nFEKyz7KUsuntMgD6K0IooPOROkRHLIL_m-pUHuMHIMDUpQ58H9eTYDaRPZF82QbVxuDBQKhrDQnYkZgz_S1G_NZEb77IwchwynSpgUK6mUez1zSdERkM35QaUnXgI6-0UoaqkdddPIgZxpK9vByguKqkYf2JiQK8tkmyNLQIjzWzsjwEiOjaBRWQPRDyDlLQ%3D%3D)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. "**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=208d517185e445d29a78cdff2f69f143&_e=J9nqsLUaeiP-IzKcOe3jWzhMM5HnP3x-baaoCUmLwxlIVxWzhrC_KTEwV2s9x9U_82uu4owMlFshRzMspYDf_nFEKyz7KUsuntMgD6K0IooPOROkRHLIL_m-pUHuMHIMU_hsNwQ1etlaWp8AvXyoDQUGcRuMr6EyqxHZ9Ub5EfR9qKO0yot2iSid45Lrzb-SM0TVorxmfdT1Q52y20dWG0bGjh6Jr7AjaeVx0VxdkVX1KBFyluIrI8-gXVm9N83FJwp13ScLEaZCNbNNHDk93g%3D%3D) I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America.

But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought. Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election. The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are " fringe." President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America. Thanks for supporting free speech. We 'll never give up the fight. Seth Dillon CEO, The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself | Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: The Babylon Bee, LLC PO Box 546 Jupiter, FL 33468 Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

Hey team,
If you’re feeling angry, scared, or just despondent about next Monday, I don’t blame you. It’s infuriating to have to accept that, in just one week, Donald Trump will return to power. And with him comes an agenda that is dangerous, cruel, and antithetical to the values this country was founded on.
I for one refuse to be paralyzed by Trump’s intimidation tactics, and I’m determined to take action.
Over the next four years, NextGen will be fighting to defend our constitution, uplift working class people, and preserve our rights.
We know that young voters will be the key to defeating Trump’s hate-fueled agenda. And reaching them will be a huge undertaking.
[I’m reaching out to you personally to ask if you’ll make an investment of any amount to this fight for our future. We won’t survive the next four years if we don’t stick together. body:
Last Tuesday, Virginians sent a message that they want sensible leaders who get things done. In Virginia’s first special election since Trump’s win, Loudoun County elected Kannan Srinivasan to the State Senate and JJ Singh to the House of Delegates.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100343568/522448065/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTkzNDFkOWQtZTlkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EgZIsPCVW4ottWe1BxmsOQfdOhrapSdKb2rPJnEQT8g=)

| Peter,

Last Tuesday, Virginians sent a message that they want sensible leaders who get things done. In Virginia’s first special election since Trump’s win, Loudoun County elected Kannan Srinivasan to the State Senate and JJ Singh to the House of Delegates.

These wins are big – Democrats will continue to hold a narrow majority in both the Senate and House of Delegates. They’re more than just a victory for these two incredible candidates – they signal that Virginians are choosing progress, unity, and pragmatic leadership over division and chaos.

We are in a strong position to continue making progress on the issues that matter most, like protecting our communities, strengthening our public schools, and lowering everyday costs for families.

**To keep building on this momentum, we need your support so we can flip the Governor’s seat and maintain our Democratic Majority in the House of Delegates.[_So, will you contribute to our campaign today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100343569/522448066/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTkzNDFkOWQtZTlkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EgZIsPCVW4ottWe1BxmsOQfdOhrapSdKb2rPJnEQT8g=)**

clean_body: Last Tuesday, Virginians sent a message that they want sensible leaders who get things done. In Virginia’s first special election since Trump’s win, Loudoun County elected Kannan Srinivasan to the State Senate and JJ Singh to the House of Delegates. | = | Peter, Last Tuesday, Virginians sent a message that they want sensible leaders who get things done. In Virginia’s first special election since Trump’s win, Loudoun County elected Kannan Srinivasan to the State Senate and JJ Singh to the House of Delegates. These wins are big – Democrats will continue to hold a narrow majority in both the Senate and House of Delegates. They’re more than just a victory for these two incredible candidates – they signal that Virginians are choosing progress, unity, and pragmatic leadership over division and chaos. We are in a strong position to continue making progress on the issues that matter most, like protecting our communities, strengthening our public schools, and lowering everyday costs for families. To keep building on this momentum, we need your support so we can flip the Governor’s seat and maintain our Democratic Majority in the House of Delegates.= | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Team Schiff
subject: Let’s come together for Southern California
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Homes burned down. Families displaced. The devastation across Los Angeles
County and Southern California is unlike anything we’ve ever seen.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.0S_64z&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]Fire in Los Angeles County

Adam worked closely with Senator Alex Padilla to secure a Major Disaster
Declaration and 100% match from President Biden, which means even more
life-saving resources are coming to California. But there’s more we can do
together.

Since Adam emailed you, we’ve raised tens of thousands directly to
on-the-ground organizations, helping fight the worst of these wildfires
and supporting families through the recovery. We’re hoping to double that.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2320?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.tYEdDM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]If you’re able, will you split a charitable $20 donation between the
Los Angeles Fire Department Foundation, United Way of Greater Los Angeles,
the Los Angeles Regional Food Bank, and the California Community
Foundation Wildfire Relief Fund? 100% of your donations will go directly
to these groups doing the essential work right now.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.gBmz75&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.5u_p-a&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.SnM8Ml&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.IEGO2P&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.0S_64z&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you.

— Team Schiff

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Adam Schiff
Date: Wednesday, January 8, 2025
Subject: Here’s how you can help those being devastated by the wildfires

Derek,

Southern Californians are grappling with horrific Palisades, Eaton, and
Hurst wildfires. The damage from these fires is far-reaching — several
individuals have died, thousands of people and their animals have been
told to evacuate, and thousands of homes, businesses, places of worship,
and schools have been destroyed.

First responders and firefighters are working tirelessly to save lives and
contain these fires.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.0L4IZA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]Right now, there are some incredible organizations on the ground
supporting the efforts — including the Los Angeles Fire Department
Foundation, United Way of Greater Los Angeles, the Los Angeles Regional
Food Bank, and the California Community Foundation Wildfire Relief Fund.
If you can spare, please split a direct donation to these organizations
today:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.gBmz75&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1618?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.2sGZxf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $20

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.5u_p-a&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.SnM8Ml&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1016&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.IEGO2P&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.0S_64z&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

The sudden wildfires have completely upended access to basic necessities
and thousands of homes.

The Los Angeles Fire Department Foundation is actively working to contain
these fires and keep Angelenos safe. Your donations will help local LAFD
firefighters get emergency equipment and supplies to save as many lives as
possible.

Meanwhile, United Way of Greater Los Angeles, the Los Angeles Regional
Food Bank, and the California Community Foundation Wildfire Relief Fund
are on the ground, helping connect residents in need with food, water,
sanitary items, and other critical supplies during this emergency.

Your support for these great organizations would be greatly appreciated.
And it will make a real difference in the lives of so many.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2320?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.tYEdDM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1019&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]Even $20 split between these organizations will make an impact. Chip
in today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.gBmz75&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1020&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1618?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.2sGZxf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1021&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $20

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.5u_p-a&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1022&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.SnM8Ml&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1023&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.IEGO2P&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1024&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.0S_64z&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1025&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

My office and I are closely monitoring these developments and will share
information as we find out more. Thank you, and stay safe.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.0S_64z&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC90_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1026&akid=8259%2E5257348%2EBZome6 ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $20 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT My office and I are closely monitoring these developments and will share information as we find out more. Thank you, and stay safe. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433 [ ]DONATE 135 E. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Marathon #34 in the books!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=32%2E181023%2EQAMgka)
Team,
If there’s one thing you should know about me, I’m a runner.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250113-1?refcode=em20250113-1&refcode2=32_181023_QAMgka&akid=32%2E181023%2EQAMgka) _Last year’s marathon ^_
I love to take advantage of the beautiful weather days in Michigan and run on some of my favorite trails. Whenever I’m not defending democracy, I’m putting that energy into training for the next marathon!
**And after yesterday, I’m really excited to announce marathon #34 is in the books:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250113-1?refcode=em20250113-1&refcode2=32_181023_QAMgka&akid=32%2E181023%2EQAMgka)
I’m so grateful to everyone who made this race smooth and successful for all of us runners! With that race run, I’m headed back on the road for more Community Conversations with Michiganders, and I’ll keep you updated on what we’re hearing across our state.
But I also want to hear from you: _What marathon should I run next?_ Let me know if you have recommendations!
Thanks,
Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=32%2E181023%2EQAMgka)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_2024/?t=3&akid=32%2E181023%2EQAMgka)

Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO BOX 21368,
Detroit, MI 48221
PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=318396579d724fd3a7c85b93f590a519&_e=QinTP4QpSZCiq-1bE8iJ2s7Q3Uv9aPYlHhML1p1cVAK1m7rZwKx2-Ai1Dm9wFiqKl6J7qRm4J9H4HDgjoYmAuCddLwhNkd2__ayhoLiyY2IGEyy6bpn4gDKC8nhcyDBCGjkDBqZ3mjrePuU0O0Ow4vQo9ceBvLHplD6rdYc2vdw7NsZnMneFVR0eFBECdkew3iNoSPviNMQjinQ2GsSR_OdvlIq6u7619-GbywECqXWWe-GJDxpLi1cM3iZ6qkSZ5PKQ9TDtUKp5yu7H7L-FjvSf2o9t-uzw0XZwRgmlkCvajQ-9jG7ltZivUA4DzvvHsPKIBDSzX0PrL_p3IYAw3lUyS7bIlqrO68c-jD8LPX_njQAuYaSlZ7gmiWAReXVS9nsZ0TqDBhpfpCk7Xyu9JA%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=318396579d724fd3a7c85b93f590a519&_e=QinTP4QpSZCiq-1bE8iJ2s7Q3Uv9aPYlHhML1p1cVAK1m7rZwKx2-Ai1Dm9wFiqKl6J7qRm4J9H4HDgjoYmAuCddLwhNkd2__ayhoLiyY2IGEyy6bpn4gDKC8nhcyDBCGjkDBqZ3mjrePuU0O0Ow4vQo9ceBvLHplD6rdYc2vdw7NsZnMneFVR0eFBECdkew3iNoSPviNMQjinQ2GsSR_OdvlIq6u7619-GbywECqXX0Zu6QCfUxnI2da6y_om_nrbydjjuxke_YeWyGPHgXmfUKpEgFxgq8eoXWEeso49cSBzil8OnzEmc9zBOmclxGpfguLufIQSUE3A-4kv0M-RVIJr_oqfherxWFLiqgoThKkQjehqrahX80oYpk-XFni_wP8-L8ryZSddLX4etYZw%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=318396579d724fd3a7c85b93f590a519&_e=QinTP4QpSZCiq-1bE8iJ2s7Q3Uv9aPYlHhML1p1cVAK1m7rZwKx2-Ai1Dm9wFiqKl6J7qRm4J9H4HDgjoYmAuCddLwhNkd2__ayhoLiyY2IGEyy6bpn4gDKC8nhcyDBCGjkDBqZ3mjrePuU0O0Ow4vQo9ceBvLHplD6rdYc2vdw7NsZnMneFVR0eFBECdkew3iNoSPviNMQjinQ2GsSR_OdvlIq6u7619-GbywECqXXfHD7HJmZrQ4rfM8xCYxGJYuwFKWMBm-IMfcZsmGbf7wxyEIbHaLFrh14RXF6Z_lUFhjSfzeltXG5Lz4QUrvBuMNS1xTLTXJwEtPqc2RgdD4p1VXCxnzdl3oTKypPm79p4pz71ngRiDyZcrOd9zrcb1DFgN48BkAsLiWNaYQM9lw%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=318396579d724fd3a7c85b93f590a519&_e=QinTP4QpSZCiq-1bE8iJ2s7Q3Uv9aPYlHhML1p1cVAK1m7rZwKx2-Ai1Dm9wFiqKl6J7qRm4J9H4HDgjoYmAuCddLwhNkd2__ayhoLiyY2IGEyy6bpn4gDKC8nhcyDBCGjkDBqZ3mjrePuU0O0Ow4vQo9ceBvLHplD6rdYc2vdw7NsZnMneFVR0eFBECdkew3iNoSPviNMQjinQ2GsSR_OdvlIq6u7619-GbywECqXU_cljqE4mVrszR9LQW_oV-c9TAftuW8gChYI3z-tAxmwYFLSHNDczDy_dlgRXNIScfLtJbhBTTL57G-JWBv0ie3Ya-d42zLycSYnH___9EpVkHygJa8jaV7D6hCLBMsfyr7yfU0DwMiXy9dNHoGFio9AtcJA3VYe8SoA8IV5ViYA%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=318396579d724fd3a7c85b93f590a519&_e=QinTP4QpSZCiq-1bE8iJ2s7Q3Uv9aPYlHhML1p1cVAK1m7rZwKx2-Ai1Dm9wFiqKl6J7qRm4J9H4HDgjoYmAuCddLwhNkd2__ayhoLiyY2IGEyy6bpn4gDKC8nhcyDBCGjkDBqZ3mjrePuU0O0Ow4vQo9ceBvLHplD6rdYc2vdw7NsZnMneFVR0eFBECdkew3iNoSPviNMQjinQ2GsSR_OdvlIq6u7619-GbywECqXWObK4fAOd8nFCLHHB9ydBpGGlSQTMd0OyA9UZBd4nNpUID4LwEf-gQJkwzrNaDqWPGzEySPF7YcB7O_pwt5PcYw7lpYfsXJnhwREmcQMwGBj-4TcMjDWMkT4olrzWLBRdS6lF1T5HwbSyLVV2J_t2eJKc-iCAbgK5mdhoUgcC-ZA%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=318396579d724fd3a7c85b93f590a519&_e=QinTP4QpSZCiq-1bE8iJ2s7Q3Uv9aPYlHhML1p1cVAK1m7rZwKx2-Ai1Dm9wFiqKl6J7qRm4J9H4HDgjoYmAuCddLwhNkd2__ayhoLiyY2IGEyy6bpn4gDKC8nhcyDBCGjkDBqZ3mjrePuU0O0Ow4vQo9ceBvLHplD6rdYc2vdw7NsZnMneFVR0eFBECdkew3iNoSPviNMQjinQ2GsSR_OdvlIq6u7619-GbywECqXW59BwfAn3YiII9NC79X752gb9J-aT2NZQOT8AQieDEaJV2erem3jvSvwMUpnOc6Y9jgs6dbUJsSBtPAWaxpD2o0W1f6lH410D_ChFJa3HI6UbVMsC_rD2MgT4vY67ADl6ol0tkvWJPMYtjLwsnO7E3qhaqwavW0sssIgDALhE2aQ%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=318396579d724fd3a7c85b93f590a519&_e=QinTP4QpSZCiq-1bE8iJ2o4QfynI8l6CBTwyHvgyXKUqlyMgGJI0g-iIcGSB9KlzYfKW3wwBt8839JSDPvkfwO2zFACeMTCGdSW-e9bZFh5w8s1YAgF9uRRnK7S2j56pu0Wr9Uxz9-5WA-fapLalJ613YkGTIF6NO7jDULTMtyZEqaOzT0QUrer-43yHJaJbVgRFbsDoxZYSte623MENjg%3D%3D)

subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM1u6jAQhZ_G3hHZMw6OF17A5aaVSqVSlbZi59hOY9UhIX8ob19BKdujb-Z8OqZuYyhnTeSaAFTB9QSA4IoAjAO-m_3-uZsXu226OCP4S0zg342c4M4erXnYLseD7Df9x-vuTazWnxO_08Pc-jt7q0x8bUK8pHJDnRZgeGmp11ziMmMMOKeVltZgmRaAXhmrPJTcK5kBk1nJVKYcDRoYpIxzBIaMs8RBiqiEV8IWhZOCCHYtSsrO-6EKx2_fORPinNimplFXw9D2V7GcQN64IjmONvqx_72yTU0gvykTyCcCeX3Cp8Pq4CpBML9OhpsX_P_YnZqMdtq15xBj6JeSCPb194VOGn4CAAD__8tbbJc)

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU1vozAQhn-NuRHZMzaGA4dmSbIrtVKbbbMfF-TYQ2OFrwWTKv9-BUK5zOHRI70z75imr311z5neMoCLdyMDYPjEAKaAJ_Px8TLc47dnFX8h0IwZfFvNGzzc1prDczL91WMx_jq-vcun7e-beNjh3tPDXSM31Bhfz1QXkcslGFHZiHKhMUk5ByGiS26VRjKOOytQWZkCl-gylyqALEGjIp8DB8WFQODIBd84UIiZpEza89lpySRfgjbVQBQuvr3S4Iyv7xvbNVGdX0Lox2WxPYP9SHYaaGNacl2YDQb782BuFJ-77joy2GOW8lSRjZNKUiy1VnFGxsWpI6e5EEZUxHA_haYMNDQMiyo4wSCZydhNgyWGxbY4xMfdacUNOT_N6u5lJdY0vfGfLcNivY-XPw6HP6DK4-5U_nx_OsbzYJCUbe0dw-Jgoeiv4fiqFri8EotX3H0f_nVpNOSu__J17cdEM8k_l07mCm45_A8AAP__fzCaFQ)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU2PmzAQhn-NuYHsMWA4cNgUSFvtSt00m35ckI2HxApfNYZV_n0FQrnM4dEjvTPvyG5sTfPIiDgQgJvREwEg_IUAzI5f5MfHm33476-R_8kBV0zgy24u8HT7Wh5f4_mvmPLp1-n9HL4cfi_sabvHiE93jwywk6Zdqcg9nYUgWVN7mDHB44RSYMy7ZTpmFFUq64Y3SiEVKo0iBZpFXMVNIj2TAYWIMsaBcspooCHiPA0xDWultAhJSLegoLGI7mb6O1otTfsI6qHz2uzm3Dhti5UEygnr2WIge9SDWw0CpbJyQV8Nw30iUPI0oUmEtR83IfqhEJGfotR-olELyphkDRJezq6rHNqO8LxxmhGIVzINs62R8PyQH_1Tcdlxh9rMq1q87aSW3SjNtSc83--j1bfj8Q9E1am4VD_PLyd_HQTiqm-NJjxfbFyc1f36XW1weyXPf_Diq_03JJ7N9Php2tZMsSAhvW6drBUsGfwPAAD__wpFm4M) Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**. If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own. And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries. It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. >> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces. And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages. It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging. But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU1vm0AQhn_NcgPtzi4sHDjYBdxKidS4sdvmghZmCNvwVT4c-d9HIOTLHB490jvzjmmHxlb3mOkjA6gtTgyAyQMDWGZ5NZfL83h3X55891MCrZjBt928wcPtSnN6CpY3PSXT7_PLqzoc_9zEw57vAz3cPdKj1thmpTpxMFZgRFU6FAstg5BzEMKpY218FVSExA0GhYEAAKlEv_AJudDSsTFw8LkQErjkgnsIvpSRokiVRYFaMcW3IK8aiebadh80orHN3Sv71mniep6HaVssY5BNVC4jeaYj7OfVYJAVo7mRW_T9x8Qgk1HIQ59KN6gUuUpr343IoBsioeZCGFERk9kyt_lMY8tkUs0oGAQrmfplLInJ5Jic3HN63XFLaJdVTZ93Upp2MPa9YzLZ7-P5j9PpL_j5Ob3mv14PZ3cdDIK8aywymQzR8q9OLim9bXB7pUx-yvT7-L8PnTHG4dM2jZ0CzRR_3zpZK7jF8BUAAP__AG2bcw) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_. This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU1vnDAQhn_NcAPZY4PhwCFblm2lRGposk17QV48ZN3wVTCb8u8rENrLHB490jvzjm6HxtZLCuoAiFdrJkAE8QCIsxNn_fr6NC7-82PofwqkFQN-2c0b3t2u0qfHaP6tpmz6WTy_yIfD243fbbcMdHf3yIBabZuVqswzqUTN68qjlCsRxYwh5941VRHniTZaakxQcoYy0TGrY6NiGYZh7NkUGYaMc4FMMM4Cg6EQiaREVpeLURIk24KCeiRyV9t90Gi0bZag6luvSa_ODdO2WA6YT1TNIwW6I9O71QDML6O-kX_p-48JMBdJzOKQKj-qJflSqdBPSBs_NmQU41zzmkDks2tLR2MLIqud4YDRSqZ-HisCkR2yk18czztuydh5VY9PO6l0O2j73oHI9vtY-e10-oVhWRzP5Y-Xh8JfB2BUdo01ILI_xXJ4-6eGZdjg9kqRfRfHr-PfPvbG1AyftmnsFCmQ7H3rZK3gluL_AAAA___m_Joh)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU2PmzAQhn-NuRHZM8aGA4ekJGmljbSb7qYfl8ixh421ECgYovz7CoRymcOjR3pn3jF1W_nykTO9YQBX73oGwHDNAIaAJ_Pxcege8dtLEt8RaMIMvi3mCE_3Zs3-RQ1_dV_0v45v73K9-T2Kpx0eLT3dJXJFtfHVRHURuVyCEaWNKBcaVco5CBFdc46IlGZGaK6suKQWXZKV6EBJrciIyOfAIeFCIHDkgq8cJIiZpEzay8VpySSfg1ZlRxSu_vZFnTO-eqxsU0dVfg2h7efFdgx2Pdmho5W5kWvCZDDYXTozUnxpmq-ewQ6zlKcJ2ViVkmKpdRJnZFycOnKaC2FESQx3Q6jPgbqaYVEGJxioifTN0FliWGyKfXzcnhZck_PDpG4PC7Gmbo3_vDEslvv4-cd-_weS83F7Ov98Xx_jaTBQ51vlHcPiuh435v6qwmGG8yuxeMXt9-5fk0Zd7tq7ryrfK80k_5w7mSoYc_gfAAD__4VNmlI)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. clean_body: | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books. If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own. And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries. It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. >> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces. And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages. It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging. But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD. This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.

Friend,

You know how slim our House Majority is. _**And it could get even smaller.**_

NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6 are all set for special elections this year, **and we need your help to defend these seats.**

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: What Americans love more than bacon
body:
Voters have made their voices heard.

| | | [](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkM2K5CAURp_G7FKo16i1cDFMkc1Qw-xmKTd6OyWlSdCkf96-SdMP0NvzweHw_b_7O6aclvkvFnLPUH1tHslPOH30E1H_7iWXQ89FL8BDF128Bo26IycMaMsHZXj3cBb1ZJRW1kQl7JW0DAqDsgZeOCrLu-RODxcCJFdG6IsFjEOIEgYjzaCBKY6Z6n55Em1hXeZKrVXajimngMslrKXL7rHvW2Pwi8mRyfGszOsyEZ0zk-OWcWkMxmMvvlBMR2Fwo4IpM6lP2NajBmJwQ_omAcuGaV4Y3P78_qe5AttVF7e3lHNq2jDF51PwFbD_4KJXJz8DAAD__4raa2E)
---
|
---
Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkM2K5CAURp_G7FKo16i1cDFMkc1Qw-xmKTd6OyWlSdCkf96-SdMP0NvzweHw_b_7O6aclvkvFnLPUH1tHslPOH30E1H_7iWXQ89FL8BDF128Bo26IycMaMsHZXj3cBb1ZJRW1kQl7JW0DAqDsgZeOCrLu-RODxcCJFdG6IsFjEOIEgYjzaCBKY6Z6n55Em1hXeZKrVXajimngMslrKXL7rHvW2Pwi8mRyfGszOsyEZ0zk-OWcWkMxmMvvlBMR2Fwo4IpM6lP2NajBmJwQ_omAcuGaV4Y3P78_qe5AttVF7e3lHNq2jDF51PwFbD_4KJXJz8DAAD__4raa2E)
---
[](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkM2K5CAURp_G7FKo16i1cDFMkc1Qw-xmKTd6OyWlSdCkf96-SdMP0NvzweHw_b_7O6aclvkvFnLPUH1tHslPOH30E1H_7iWXQ89FL8BDF128Bo26IycMaMsHZXj3cBb1ZJRW1kQl7JW0DAqDsgZeOCrLu-RODxcCJFdG6IsFjEOIEgYjzaCBKY6Z6n55Em1hXeZKrVXajimngMslrKXL7rHvW2Pwi8mRyfGszOsyEZ0zk-OWcWkMxmMvvlBMR2Fwo4IpM6lP2NajBmJwQ_omAcuGaV4Y3P78_qe5AttVF7e3lHNq2jDF51PwFbD_4KJXJz8DAAD__4raa2E)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_**Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkM2K5CAURp_G7FKo16i1cDFMkc1Qw-xmKTd6OyWlSdCkf96-SdMP0NvzweHw_b_7O6aclvkvFnLPUH1tHslPOH30E1H_7iWXQ89FL8BDF128Bo26IycMaMsHZXj3cBb1ZJRW1kQl7JW0DAqDsgZeOCrLu-RODxcCJFdG6IsFjEOIEgYjzaCBKY6Z6n55Em1hXeZKrVXajimngMslrKXL7rHvW2Pwi8mRyfGszOsyEZ0zk-OWcWkMxmMvvlBMR2Fwo4IpM6lP2NajBmJwQ_omAcuGaV4Y3P78_qe5AttVF7e3lHNq2jDF51PwFbD_4KJXJz8DAAD__4raa2E)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkM2K5CAURp_G7FKo16i1cDFMkc1Qw-xmKTd6OyWlSdCkf96-SdMP0NvzweHw_b_7O6aclvkvFnLPUH1tHslPOH30E1H_7iWXQ89FL8BDF128Bo26IycMaMsHZXj3cBb1ZJRW1kQl7JW0DAqDsgZeOCrLu-RODxcCJFdG6IsFjEOIEgYjzaCBKY6Z6n55Em1hXeZKrVXajimngMslrKXL7rHvW2Pwi8mRyfGszOsyEZ0zk-OWcWkMxmMvvlBMR2Fwo4IpM6lP2NajBmJwQ_omAcuGaV4Y3P78_qe5AttVF7e3lHNq2jDF51PwFbD_4KJXJz8DAAD__4raa2E)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. "**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkM2K5CAURp_G7FKo16i1cDFMkc1Qw-xmKTd6OyWlSdCkf96-SdMP0NvzweHw_b_7O6aclvkvFnLPUH1tHslPOH30E1H_7iWXQ89FL8BDF128Bo26IycMaMsHZXj3cBb1ZJRW1kQl7JW0DAqDsgZeOCrLu-RODxcCJFdG6IsFjEOIEgYjzaCBKY6Z6n55Em1hXeZKrVXajimngMslrKXL7rHvW2Pwi8mRyfGszOsyEZ0zk-OWcWkMxmMvvlBMR2Fwo4IpM6lP2NajBmJwQ_omAcuGaV4Y3P78_qe5AttVF7e3lHNq2jDF51PwFbD_4KJXJz8DAAD__4raa2E)I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America.

clean_body: Voters have made their voices heard. | | | | Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke. The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.Enter Elon Musk. Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines. But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election. The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are " fringe." President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America. Thanks for supporting free speech. We 'll never give up the fight.Seth Dillon CEO, The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself | Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: The Babylon Bee, LLC PO Box 546 Jupiter, FL 33468 Keep Congress Republican PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: OKGOP
subject: Witness President Trump’s inaugural address in person!
body:
Please represent Oklahoma at his swearing-in ceremony!

| [ ](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_witness_president_trump_s_in&n=1)
---
Peter -- When Donald J. Trump raises his right hand to be sworn in as the President of the United States, he wants to see that all his patriotic supporters from Oklahoma have his back. That’s why the Oklahoma Republican Party and the Trump Vance Inaugural Committee formally invite you to represent Oklahoma in our Nation’s Capital to witness President Trump taking the**OATH OF OFFICE!** **** | [](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=IvlgeQZGorKQ9mO1lweC8iYPJPe3qjURROjNh8qax9ytfMLQPcaO6dC8XcrvzOdOBM-R8pgjj6khb5I1XA7kJQGKRqKdg_vRecMt8E5rMa4&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_witness_president_trump_s_in&n=2 "ACCEPT INVITATION") [ACCEPT INVITATION](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=IvlgeQZGorKQ9mO1lweC8iYPJPe3qjURROjNh8qax9ytfMLQPcaO6dC8XcrvzOdOBM-R8pgjj6khb5I1XA7kJQGKRqKdg_vRecMt8E5rMa4&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_witness_president_trump_s_in&n=2)
---
If you thought last year’s nominating convention was a blowout celebration, you haven’t seen anything yet.
The crowd will be massive, the atmosphere will be electric, and the Inaugural Address of the 47th President will go down in history!
**_It’s a special moment that you made possible, Nathan, and President Trump wants you to soak it all in while you represent Oklahoma. >>_**

For the People,

Nathan Dahm
OKGOP Chairman

disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC
body:
| |

| | | |
---

---
| Friend, Did you see this weekend's Op-Ed by Sens. Sharon Carson and Regina Birdsell? Give it a read below! \- NH Senate Republicans
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Sens. Sharon Carson & Regina Birdsell: We'll keep New Hampshire on the path to prosperity**
---
| |
---
| A NEW YEAR and a new session bring new leadership to the New Hampshire Senate, but the same commitment to conservative, Republican principles that has put the Granite State on the path to prosperity. Under Republican legislatures and Governor Chris Sununu, New Hampshire not only ranks as the freest state in the nation, but the safest and most prosperous, with the lowest poverty rate and the most economic opportunity. Incoming Governor Kelly Ayotte and Republican candidates for House and Senate promised to build on this success, and New Hampshire voters rewarded us with increased majorities at the State House. Responsible leadership starts with a balanced budget. Senate Republicans take pride in the role we’ve played in passing balanced budgets that lowered taxes for every New Hampshire home and business, increased funding for Granite State schools, and expanded opportunities for our families. And we’ve not only done it without a broad-based tax, but we’ve made New Hampshire completely income tax free. This year’s budget will be a challenge. Inflation fueled by out-of-control federal spending forced interest rate increases that slowed the national economy, and that is being felt here. As we tackle the tough choices that a balanced budget forces, rest assured we will never support an income tax, a sales tax, a capital gains tax, or higher property taxes. The housing shortage is not only a challenge for New Hampshire families, but an obstacle to our state’s continued economic growth. Steps we’ve taken such as increasing the Affordable Housing Fund and a new Housing Champions program are starting to show results in increased housing starts. We will continue to make housing our top economic priority. In fact, Senator Dan Innis convened the Senate Commerce Committee within hours of Governor Ayotte’s inauguration to consider a bill to open up financing options for new housing projects. We are setting up a special subcommittee on housing to bring all our policy options together to increase access to housing for New Hampshire families. We will keep New Hampshire the safest state in the nation. We’re going to ban sanctuary cities to avoid the chaos and rampant spending hitting states like Massachusetts that have supported open border policies. We will continue to support the Northern Border Alliance and block attempts to repeal it. We will continue to improve the landmark bail reform law we passed last year to end the “catch and release” system for violent offenders. And we will toughen sentences for reckless criminals who traffic in deadly fentanyl and other drugs. Supporting our law enforcement officers helps them keep us safe. Parents know what is best for their children, and Senate Republicans will always have their backs. We will pass a “Parents Bill of Rights” to guarantee that parents always know what is happening with their kids in New Hampshire schools. We will support the Education Freedom Account program, which is providing more than 5,000 working families with educational alternatives that their kids need. The Student-Centered Education Funding Formula included in the last budget is increasing state aid to local school districts by 31% over this decade. One area where costs have risen higher than anticipated was special education, and we will make that a top priority in the next budget. Several years of responsible management produced large surpluses that we have dedicated to unprecedented state aid to local communities, including record amounts of education funding, new investments in water infrastructure, and road and bridge aid. We are doing our part to bring down local property taxes, but local tax rates will always be driven by local spending decisions. Taxpayers facing rising property tax rates should insist on the same fiscal discipline locally that we’ve delivered at the State House. There are more challenges ahead, such as PFAS in our water, high electric rates, and the cost of health care. We don’t promise easy answers, but we do promise the same commitment to solving these issues that we’ve demonstrated in the past. A new year with new leadership means we will keep fighting for the Granite State’s prosperity. _Sen. Sharon Carson (R-Londonderry) is president of the New Hampshire Senate. Sen. Regina Birdsell (R-Hampstead) is Senate majority leader._ [Do you agree with Sens. Carson and Birdsell? Consider making a $25, $50 or even $100 donation to the NH Senate Republicans! (Secure Link)](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yNjU2OTAwNzQwNDY2ODc0MTI4JmM9ZjhrOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0xNDA0Nzc2MDUxJmQ9dDVxMXcybw==.6m2Tm_2a1_ks4j0kZA6leN4S_qlUArXam0jsE3LDPwM)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: President Trump: “Save Rudy!”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The trial of my life begins this week. And I don’t get a jury!
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c7f8eb895c3941089d993f24a7bab62e&_e=6NYPyrlvQvsCPS1df5qE1ET95P_pSgVt4ElbuNMb1g09zzj7cEOv0FFgHPzkyIHIQyz-DbLxLWYIa2mxKMrWZGq4WIoijtp_IS1yWi7cdtWT3nkWChAizurpTaWg4OdZBZIa5XtpFkya754K1M06PvfvMyfU7bPRgvYMhMSJaHnfBckHnnZU-RShF_RDgF1DaaqJtVXDd_psjvYWSgx5q3ebEqX0OIuXmNVHYqhlF0wYwR3VwIaOU7rnekkEBwEp7qgwcoE4DkQQ1QMdvAtVYYCBqk9hVxN7IqB7PTGa4dSQlNSnZziU6MnkKIZmKH803jW-X-pQ62u2jQyQpfsyU3KsoGhsAHY21Lun-qp8rCi6J3mbyG90g3jNRHfDlwnv)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
With the trial of my life set to begin, President Donald J. Trump just said two powerful words for the entire nation to hear...
---
**_“SAVE RUDY!”_**
---
On Thursday, I will be on trial – __without_ a jury, mind you_ – to determine whether or not I still have a home to live in. It’s a trial to save my home and a trial to fight for my basic freedoms and rights.
---
_But more than that, our nation’s very system of justice will also be on trial._
---
If the Radical Left Democrats can get away with destroying me in a weaponized court without a jury – and possibly imprisoning me – solely because I served as President Trump’s lawyer, then the rule of law is DEAD in America.
---
**Just last week, a bloodthirsty left-wing judge threatened me with contempt and imprisonment if I didn’t recite her dictated false version of covered-up massive evidence of voter fraud.**
---
I had a choice to make: _I could recite the state-sanctioned propaganda like an obedient little dog and be rewarded with a pat on the head. Or, I could have the courage to stand for what I know to be true._
---
When I remind you of this Bible verse, you’ll know exactly which choice I made: "_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)
---
You see, I refuse to give up on America. That’s why I’m going on trial to fight to save my home, my liberty, and __our__ Republic.
---
_Are YOU with me?_ Will you join the cause to “SAVE RUDY?”
---
**[Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c7f8eb895c3941089d993f24a7bab62e&_e=6NYPyrlvQvsCPS1df5qE1ET95P_pSgVt4ElbuNMb1g09zzj7cEOv0FFgHPzkyIHIQyz-DbLxLWYIa2mxKMrWZGq4WIoijtp_IS1yWi7cdtWT3nkWChAizurpTaWg4OdZBZIa5XtpFkya754K1M06PvfvMyfU7bPRgvYMhMSJaHnfBckHnnZU-RShF_RDgF1DaaqJtVXDd_psjvYWSgx5q1NgxdA8dylfOilToZiU89rI1Pbaig_s6dPSTKRLmr4pVWk2FECHlSF0VsfgAYiQNqUkcKuUAG6D4tDnC_6Z_0wzJlxhuxUo_iOChII6c39ETMSBVWdK6B5ma3IhWWYaqUbB4Uosx-U2aUJZ-ZxKkLwWfx9KElUAn-BA2KyOzIie) – as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in. **
---

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c7f8eb895c3941089d993f24a7bab62e&_e=6NYPyrlvQvsCPS1df5qE1ET95P_pSgVt4ElbuNMb1g09zzj7cEOv0FFgHPzkyIHIQyz-DbLxLWYIa2mxKMrWZGq4WIoijtp_IS1yWi7cdtWT3nkWChAizurpTaWg4OdZBZIa5XtpFkya754K1M06PvfvMyfU7bPRgvYMhMSJaHnfBckHnnZU-RShF_RDgF1DaaqJtVXDd_psjvYWSgx5q2YepNGB-I6Y-lIelDzcO2RfqZ2RgfXW2PxhzmydlXvGcfRf07Sp5jJPT9tIrrwlgFW9ZfoGyaKU1HUz_8AZ5WhES8UgdvPsjHygSS_HB-I8hwJC9VNBYYDfqZYfYN7g3_a7jqHyr9rnx4qShx7mUKtF0kwUPh_54TCyMSsFoUYq)

clean_body: The trial of my life begins this week. And I don’t get a jury! | Fellow Patriot, With the trial of my life set to begin, President Donald J. Trump just said two powerful words for the entire nation to hear... “SAVE RUDY!” On Thursday, I will be on trial – without a jury, mind you – to determine whether or not I still have a home to live in. It’s a trial to save my home and a trial to fight for my basic freedoms and rights. But more than that, our nation’s very system of justice will also be on trial. If the Radical Left Democrats can get away with destroying me in a weaponized court without a jury – and possibly imprisoning me – solely because I served as President Trump’s lawyer, then the rule of law is DEAD in America. Just last week, a bloodthirsty left-wing judge threatened me with contempt and imprisonment if I didn’t recite her dictated false version of covered-up massive evidence of voter fraud. I had a choice to make: I could recite the state-sanctioned propaganda like an obedient little dog and be rewarded with a pat on the head. Or, I could have the courage to stand for what I know to be true. When I remind you of this Bible verse, you’ll know exactly which choice I made: "For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? " (Mark 8:36) You see, I refuse to give up on America. That’s why I’m going on trial to fight to save my home, my liberty, and our Republic. Are YOU with me? Will you join the cause to “SAVE RUDY?” – as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100345009/522453489/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250113_f_LegislativeSession_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTE5MjE2ZS1mMWQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EkApcNq7mpF1x1Wsz8PYUoplsfbUwSoYoSGFwKBcPdQ=&emci=c4c5f61f-e9d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=b119216e-f1d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=1037277)

| | It’s the first day of Georgia’s legislative session — and it’s time to get to work. Legislative session is when lawmakers gather to debate, create, and pass laws. It’s a time to address issues that impact our communities and future. And for anti-voter extremists in our state, it’s when they push through bills that would create new challenges to accessing the ballot box, preventing thousands from having a say in our democracy. During last year’s session, we saw an expansion of voter suppression tactics, along with attacks on public education and the LGBTQ+ community. And this year, we could see a return of the rules the Georgia State Election Board put forward — attempts that could have disenfranchised voters right before the presidential election. [**Attacks will move fast through the legislature, and we need to be ready for anything — your donation today can help Fair Fight Action mobilize at a moment's notice. clean_body: Help Fair Fight Action mobilize against MAGA bills | | | It’s the first day of Georgia’s legislative session — and it’s time to get to work. Legislative session is when lawmakers gather to debate, create, and pass laws. It’s a time to address issues that impact our communities and future. And for anti-voter extremists in our state, it’s when they push through bills that would create new challenges to accessing the ballot box, preventing thousands from having a say in our democracy. During last year’s session, we saw an expansion of voter suppression tactics, along with attacks on public education and the LGBTQ+ community. And this year, we could see a return of the rules the Georgia State Election Board put forward — attempts that could have disenfranchised voters right before the presidential election. = | = Lawmakers will spend the next weeks and months debating, amending, and voting on bills that could shape Georgians’ future. We’re staying alert and on top of any bills that could threaten our rights, and when it comes time to hold anti-voter extremists accountable for their actions, we hope you’ll join us. Our voices matter, and we won’t back down without a fight. name: Defend the House Majority
subject: Two Special Elections in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
_We must work together to protect the legacy of our Republican trifecta._

|
---
Patriot,

**Governor Ron DeSantis has announced TWO Special Elections to replace Congressman Matt Gaetz in FL-01 and Congressman Michael Waltz in FL-06.**

With a slim majority in the House, we must keep these seats red. Democrats are pouring money into these districts to try and flip them blue.

Every seat is crucial to defending the House Majority. Without the House Majority, the America-First Agenda will hit a standstill. **_We must work together to protect the legacy of our Republican trifecta._** Losing just one seat can ruin our Conservative victory.

Republicans nationwide are working to raise money, increase resources, and ensure we WIN in FL-01 and FL-06, but **[we need your support.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=54729047ce194caca922c929be98b286&_e=Pkpo4ZmKPF-55osVYfwDBDSZNJ3YQLDwdQ2JwMyzLbpyedIz-1qka7C698lG-tElww5OrNjIxGt1PF4-g6Q_73mD06oqIa5rlgLRjVSfgbunmzmwdaM_v95za3tMzTpaxx92wL0EQjayg3tO9aOIB2Xl-wHiy15vSDdlOcHAAM8aZSsUYwWkTbQtxA2l980F1i_hy1Sph5jrUSJrYwnK6NeupOKK2A4FYQMIZdnzeeyZd0B0ip9W4mUg-KuxzI41yxJ-i0Y3pwxyr1lpUQbOJdnkWs1PEsnxUqacZmw33zBza29DAR02iG68qH7m8wcqPWbZvwDS_wk0jNrFl0j6Vw%3D%3D)** _Everything we worked for and earned in 2024 is on the line._ We can't lose it all in the early moments of 2025.

It will all come down to the results of these special elections.

We know all the hard work and support you gave us in 2024, which is why we hate asking you for more support. But we wouldn't ask unless it is crucial. **[So, we're coming to you humbly. Will you please make a donation today, Patriot?](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=54729047ce194caca922c929be98b286&_e=Pkpo4ZmKPF-55osVYfwDBDSZNJ3YQLDwdQ2JwMyzLbpyedIz-1qka7C698lG-tElww5OrNjIxGt1PF4-g6Q_73mD06oqIa5rlgLRjVSfgbunmzmwdaM_v95za3tMzTpaxx92wL0EQjayg3tO9aOIB2Xl-wHiy15vSDdlOcHAAM8aZSsUYwWkTbQtxA2l980FtSOBkLs3j-YpEPhKSVMv0fj_iKfRvpJJdvSXOFh2oRWP6Gt_6IUQhoSZa7HyD3E4Zv957aBPhWhnc1KwSjPsIiKk2JRodLA2zyT0ekJhXVDh6Ovldrjh2-_sXJ1XSezFszeaV-LR2DAJsjYJn4hTfA%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

_House Majority Defense Via Team Harrigan_

body:
Hi, my name is Tom Barrett.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=015e192a4fc04967a47f56b98261b4a9&_e=6vHSXm_NLbzcIgskqaNKwtCt15O6p1IfjmJ2uKb8_FwZ6iEZ5kySWWsW3YuLugxepQW2109Z2ao4RYfSpJdZclqFa4hg8LhtvwF1pI1kbYNR3YR-78orMcoG0lvfaeQx0ezDWb1ZBr17zPhHFPr03jtKscqdzK96IMWS_Fku2AeWHqwZjC14mopDPDp32HhaAlaXnoC6WjQeCbxesos8SGcHYDceiFWDKuze0ecoYc5aDa1CO_RR-_Nh2vHgZoaAyKq2KCV9rrbjTAwey6v_CX-KXE1xb3T_WE_NDzexI0rPhKT9_tdfirw8v76cRRQrStAAVylPWSMYFh2JHgu_r69F6_MiICqswejwxcPc2BcTNA1qMLEuTHgH_SwEFmmIMf87_ipmoF7nDI4gHPWzlEF7a9K5xq_ToTL2x3p0ckfoa_lO7NTUg4C0ESIFieciu4l_osgGT6Pc9of7_0ErLA%3D%3D "Tom Barrett")

My name is Tom Barrett.

For 22 years, I served my country in Iraq, Guantanamo Bay, Kuwait, and the Korean DMZ. As you can imagine, I've worn many hats over the years but now I am honored to wear a new one: _I am proud to introduce myself as MI-07 's new Congressman._

But whether it's Lansing, Baghdad, or Washington DC, I know one thing for certain: **A man is only as strong as his team.**

That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise ONE LAST TIME before the end of the month. Our Conservative team in the House is on a knife's edge. If we lose just a handful of close races - like mine - our Majority will go up in flames.

We're a team. That's why he and I are partnering up to raise $50,000 to help win key battleground districts including mine.
| | [FINAL DEADLINE: SPLIT A DONATION NOW](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=015e192a4fc04967a47f56b98261b4a9&_e=6vHSXm_NLbzcIgskqaNKwtCt15O6p1IfjmJ2uKb8_FwZ6iEZ5kySWWsW3YuLugxepQW2109Z2ao4RYfSpJdZclqFa4hg8LhtvwF1pI1kbYNR3YR-78orMcoG0lvfaeQx0ezDWb1ZBr17zPhHFPr03jtKscqdzK96IMWS_Fku2AeWHqwZjC14mopDPDp32HhaAlaXnoC6WjQeCbxesos8SGcHYDceiFWDKuze0ecoYc5aDa1CO_RR-_Nh2vHgZoaAyKq2KCV9rrbjTAwey6v_CX-KXE1xb3T_WE_NDzexI0rPhKT9_tdfirw8v76cRRQrsjLqVB3S-_Q6l3KJgOz7h25u8C286hm0yLxj5Q2naTcGPa3Y2sFIlgIaH8qw13sJAfnzfplkIw2CCXTCIVSdVldNHlsQgsyU76rjSOiW2azDl4uDo3X75s5zyUkGdPL2B6tVPnY-aq7yMM7IF-_TJw%3D%3D "FINAL DEADLINE: SPLIT A DONATION NOW")
---

The Democrats know the quickest way to destroy our Republican Trifecta is by flipping a few House seats and winning back the House. If they flip my toss-up district, that could be the whole ballgame.

In fact, the top House Democrat Super PAC already launched a recruitment fund to help bankroll a Liberal challenger against me.

I know I can beat them but I really need a team at my side.

**_[So what do you say- can you be a part of our winning team?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=015e192a4fc04967a47f56b98261b4a9&_e=6vHSXm_NLbzcIgskqaNKwtCt15O6p1IfjmJ2uKb8_FwZ6iEZ5kySWWsW3YuLugxepQW2109Z2ao4RYfSpJdZclqFa4hg8LhtvwF1pI1kbYNR3YR-78orMcoG0lvfaeQx0ezDWb1ZBr17zPhHFPr03jtKscqdzK96IMWS_Fku2AeWHqwZjC14mopDPDp32HhaAlaXnoC6WjQeCbxesos8SGcHYDceiFWDKuze0ecoYc5aDa1CO_RR-_Nh2vHgZoaAyKq2KCV9rrbjTAwey6v_CX-KXE1xb3T_WE_NDzexI0rPhKT9_tdfirw8v76cRRQrNRAX5IZq_iy9QvpfkLlwAeuGcnTk5VxLq3dZc4l2I2lj7n2lt0yYKaZYLmBJEd2IcCFb47tt1-Qn6bKRWJBjtQ9gPxD2MXWO5-woXq0_ysTsjD7zKSKNDLty0q_w_f6jAKZBacWiufq2SMsCsMP9pg%3D%3D "So what do you say – can you be a part of our winning team?")_** If everyone reading this email added JUST TWENTY BUCKS, we'll hit our final fundraising goal and win big.
| [FINAL DEADLINE: SPLIT A DONATION NOW](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=015e192a4fc04967a47f56b98261b4a9&_e=6vHSXm_NLbzcIgskqaNKwtCt15O6p1IfjmJ2uKb8_FwZ6iEZ5kySWWsW3YuLugxepQW2109Z2ao4RYfSpJdZclqFa4hg8LhtvwF1pI1kbYNR3YR-78orMcoG0lvfaeQx0ezDWb1ZBr17zPhHFPr03jtKscqdzK96IMWS_Fku2AeWHqwZjC14mopDPDp32HhaAlaXnoC6WjQeCbxesos8SGcHYDceiFWDKuze0ecoYc5aDa1CO_RR-_Nh2vHgZoaAyKq2KCV9rrbjTAwey6v_CX-KXE1xb3T_WE_NDzexI0rPhKT9_tdfirw8v76cRRQruJt_p8fu5D3ktarjaF_uqd1U9kzADtMH9Lw34ujApdCYPOVi_R4ZPQBbOwfQA8HnQirOh8WDQYxsA15oWEuXqa0lYs1KKnWVrFd7jDDEtyaie3_zK8HrAwyzO9rFIHHY-7F-ZI9ANGxmLaziqYLhSw%3D%3D "FINAL DEADLINE: SPLIT A DONATION NOW")

**Tom Barrett**
_Congressman, MI-07_

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: 7 days from now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=dVYUAS9lbgsrRwKJunzsHwSS2s158X2%2Fd6xF4XP4LXHeWHSKX4jpB0e4EqAwhNBnuzcmQrp1d%2BwKG1p7GbYgUm5pUyB6jCG4r1COEnpGYlxrggbbfsXzsEIJ1fHTlVfSSdME7Y6VkHymbSEJ3NezPBj%2B0D3VQXfQtYyKKykEsCIbc33nQqlkc31JWxjf%2BwftsIz2IWNcRSm9q5YCWfvaC4Lh%2Fpia1xyLOKBxRyXycgIOOvSK2y5pE7qfoqNhvrrPaYJqh8f7rxDowxdfzVALXS7GcBNHpOdCIARny1qNo11CijpEioMbGzBf98VpFEYC5MzxOjPGB30SsjV9Tegg5m9vRym2GoWAqk9epUNEDgs6Q1RMHkZdL1EwzT6EsA1SNySX9auc9EYYxJJ1sdNYVOFwB1oQYlh0OHQM5vq%2Bh6E%3D)
