Saludos, One week from today marks the Presidential inauguration that will see Donald Trump as the 47th President of the United States. Against national headwinds, we made HISTORY by holding NM-02 blue in 2024 -- but now’s the time when the real work begins. We’ve got to be ready for all the incoming Trump administration has in store and be prepared to fend off his Project 2025 agenda at every stop along the way. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and take on whatever this next administration throws our way in Congress, but over these critical next few months, I need to know that I have you by my side. Making a recurring contribution to our campaign is exactly how many of our top supporters do just that. Chipping in monthly -- be it $5 or $50 -- allows my team to plan out our budgets with confidence, fuel our on-the-ground organizing early, and stand ready for any and all attacks by Donald Trump and his MAGA allies. And now, as we begin the 119th Congress, I’m more determined than ever to continue our fight for progress. Whether working to lower costs, create good-paying jobs or secure resources for our rural and urban communities, I’m ready to fight for real solutions that make a difference in people’s lives — but I need to know that you’re with me. We’ve set out an ambitious goal of gaining 50 new recurring supporters before our mid-month fundraising deadline on Wednesday, which is why I’m asking you personally: [Will you join us in this fight by making a recurring donation of $10 or any amount to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100345750/522457986/-1737807343?amount=10&recurring=true&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_011325_1_1_MMFR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODVhNTdlYy1mNGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QJmg60xJY75N_ikOwp6vhgouUISlB5BzYFIqYZ7wZE=) | | [MAKE A RECURRING DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100345757/522457988/-1737807343?amount=10&recurring=true&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_011325_1_1_MMFR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODVhNTdlYy1mNGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QJmg60xJY75N_ikOwp6vhgouUISlB5BzYFIqYZ7wZE=)

**TRUMP EXPECTED** to force through his dangerous right-wing nominees with no pushback.

**BUT, IT DIDN’T WORK:** **Trump and the MAGA GOP are FURIOUS!**

With Trump hand-picking only the most extreme people, we need Democrats like Senator Schiff to call Trump out. **We MUST stand behind Schiff!** [**20,000 SIGNATURES REQUIRED: Add your name to stand with Adam Schiff against Trump and the MAGA GOP’s attacks »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-sen-schiff/?source=FFR_20250113_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22750%2E4449941%2EM5E8rB) | [PETITION CLOSING AT MIDNIGHT: ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH ADAM SCHIFF »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-sen-schiff/?source=FFR_20250113_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=22750%2E4449941%2EM5E8rB)

subject: Your 2025 membership inside, Peter!
body:
No such thing as an off year here. |

---
Peter,
---
Unfortunately for the American people, democrats are still in charge for a few more days. But it is clear—the American people are looking to Donald Trump to lead and to deliver the agenda they voted for.

The Republican Senate and House are behind that agenda, and we're going to do whatever we've got to do to deliver now. The American people put their confidence in us to get the job done.

We've got to deliver— close the border, get our energy production back online again, get the American people safe, get the criminals off the streets and get tax relief for working families. The democrats have left us a mess to clean up, and it's time for us to get after it!
_**Help us get after it ⬇️⬇️⬇️**_
---

clean_body: | | | Peter, Unfortunately for the American people, democrats are still in charge for a few more days. But it is clear—the American people are looking to Donald Trump to lead and to deliver the agenda they voted for. The Republican Senate and House are behind that agenda, and we're going to do whatever we've got to do to deliver now. The American people put their confidence in us to get the job done. We've got to deliver— close the border, get our energy production back online again, get the American people safe, get the criminals off the streets and get tax relief for working families. The democrats have left us a mess to clean up, and it's time for us to get after it! Help us get after it ⬇️⬇️⬇️ God Bless, Josh Hawley | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Team TFVC
subject: Are You Ready to Rally?
body:
| |
---
Join Us on February 18! | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQzNDUxMjAwMTUyNDA1NDYyLFwiclwiOjE0MzQ1MTI0ODkwNjk5NTQ5M30iLCJzIjoiYTYyYmY4ZDY4NjA4ZDQ5YSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQzNDUxMjAwMTU5NzQ1NDk4LFwiclwiOjE0MzQ1MTI0ODkwNjk5NTQ5M30iLCJzIjoiYjczYzQzMzhhOGY3OWVjMyJ9)
---
|
---
Peter, [The TFVC Freedom Fight Rally](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQzNDUxMjAwMTY2MDM2OTU1LFwiclwiOjE0MzQ1MTI0ODkwNjk5NTQ5M30iLCJzIjoiNmQwNjc4OTU2ODU1ZWM5OSJ9) is just around the corner, and we are so excited to celebrate our tenth anniversary with you to show Austin the amazing passion and strength of our TFVC family. On February 18, 2025, we will gather on the South Steps of the Texas Capitol Building, united in our mission to protect medical liberty. We will get the rally started at 1:00 PM and spend the hour hearing stories from some of our inspirational vaccine choice heroes, champion legislators, and other friends and allies like you, who have been an essential part of our mission.
| | | [ RSVP Now! ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQzNDUxMjAwMTcxMjc5ODM2LFwiclwiOjE0MzQ1MTI0ODkwNjk5NTQ5M30iLCJzIjoiMmQzOWIzOTA3ZDRlY2M0MyJ9)
---
|
---
One of the most rewarding aspects of TFVC is the bonding we get to experience with people all over Texas, sharing stories, victories, challenges, and perspectives as we each play our own part in advancing our mission. [Our power to make real change is in our message and our numbers, so we want everyone to have a chance to get their very own TFVC t-shirt when they RSVP!](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQzNDUxMjAwMTc2NTIyNzE4LFwiclwiOjE0MzQ1MTI0ODkwNjk5NTQ5M30iLCJzIjoiYTRkNmM4MzE5ZWM2NGQzMSJ9)

|
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQzNDUxMjAwMTgxNzY1NjAwLFwiclwiOjE0MzQ1MTI0ODkwNjk5NTQ5M30iLCJzIjoiYjQxMDRlOThkODlhMWRmYiJ9)
---
|
---
Imagine what an impact our wave of red TFVC t-shirts will have on everyone who sees us! Plus, we will be able to identify each other in the hustle and bustle of the Austin crowd. But... We need you to get those orders in right away. **T-shirt sales will close in just 2 weeks** , so don’t put off your purchase. I can’t wait to see you at the Capitol! It will be truly inspiring to celebrate how far we’ve come and the possibilities of what lies ahead.
|
---
| | | **See You Soon!** **Rebecca Hardy** **President, TFVC**
---|---|---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
##### Texans for Vaccine Choice
1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States |

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Beloved Los Angeles mosque has burned down from wildfires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
The Masjid Al-Taqwa has served and welcomed multiple generations of Altadena residents, but burned to the ground in LA’s fires. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWOFiKpHgdsR1HKL2e4UddndylQaAr78J3f_TxtlCjNjGwoPcOELdeqSEnzrDVv-4ohw8xa5oz6olrSBiw2kxiegEkDyQVz8J9_YMD8IiTKrwLM9LPas_t7v95EnpArqlLzJAMwBXQW1NDYF8LaYgTuJt4vflOI-Q3OFBXyeym_-9fIzjUF28RzXG-hH1pyzacDy7eBIyN6v7tJFQC6-5N4ttkZPXzU7tnl-0drusASjo/4d4/IOqRNhw0QUePEs228AKFcw/h0/h001.pNY9BLt_6ck2n0sNQ84GA5WNj4V0uG-WyrF0dAVX2kA)
---
Friend, The wildfires around Los Angeles have devastated working class communities like Altadena, with predominantly Black and brown residents who’ve been displaced, including families who’d been able to build generational wealth through homeownership in spite of systemic racism. As part of this catastrophic loss, community spaces and houses of worship have also been burned to the ground. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMTZtVJbn538R1vkr6pLN12jLBmoCBlVbYlsLgbSo5UoEZxoYs-aE_NeprQMzYPKuqYjAEtO3ygMsjyxchZ_M1gM-ynrQQ8n_cyUIf-QbkwtgmdjM05OBUc_erOTIhEi-YfRSVLB4EtwQxOdgv8IjdnUf60EED26vqwgG2Jv-JLslRKdt9Y2KeMTABrsMN5f5dLKraSIx9E_ouwHk6sbGE8JIMNa1icnPKG48gScsrGcpGbYyuwRxWF8wjKnyqSFsDYWBYv0-y1tLWtiJ11KJxYS9CVVuKPRhc7okXVXQUWgR-pxOmLrMvguJ3kw2OfNR7LhbfaX-7bgYP6fSM63o85lWdGpRmPEx-8mqyw6DoOGU1ZjQXiCIl61dgtBXLfC6T62AvbG4kvGUD7ENUzC2Pbo/4d4/IOqRNhw0QUePEs228AKFcw/h1/h001.6GGTB77sMnFtyCLZO6KtdXIikOxjCzEMs_Dr_p1cnY0) For 30 years, the beloved Masjid Al-Taqwa has served and welcomed multiple generations of residents, building and nourishing the community. Now, a local construction company has agreed to rebuild the mosque without making a profit, and the community is fundraising to cover the costs of materials and labor to rebuild. [**Will you chip in what you can to rebuild the Masjid Al-Taqwa, the beloved mosque in a Los Angeles working class community that’s been devastated by fire?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMTZtVJbn538R1vkr6pLN12jLBmoCBlVbYlsLgbSo5UoEZxoYs-aE_NeprQMzYPKuqYjAEtO3ygMsjyxchZ_M1gM-ynrQQ8n_cyUIf-Qbkwtg0b-a8cwjs_LQiyCjMQzdy_s7GmNSbFVrAy-9rpw7gU4xTYmBt2xq_4GC_4cY3tP7y6UKtRp82KWYYX0KoQDrXw1eRhE-Wcy4F5uL3do_IE_0wZCCZy_E9h5LP0tPracv3W0p5v0bOc35_K8-uvysF3lyQ1StY62IFdABsRw-JzImR6PHPeN83Y4FZ8mE07lm5p3TGZhr17aZR2hXmSsKOir_KTAmLWcrwsB0bRXkAOVrQGdeDFYXClDrpDWBNeMax987F_65AUFLwFyBAn0gmVLhTZQIJinMF8ixj7FNmbs/4d4/IOqRNhw0QUePEs228AKFcw/h2/h001.5lp1x8DyfMiTf2vIOXqgQBaxll-BK5SXHxSYiaSlvKs) | [CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMTZtVJbn538R1vkr6pLN12jLBmoCBlVbYlsLgbSo5UoEZxoYs-aE_NeprQMzYPKuqYjAEtO3ygMsjyxchZ_M1gM-ynrQQ8n_cyUIf-QbkwtgTGf_Y5W-kF4bRnTP_nrd5hZiVGiYrCOIfVlKIGIuGItMUetfNDZhKDhdBkKk5yUQKXdvIxO2jbaDlgm0pXbw0aPbAe_U5OgPNuPdhuuCJj37uSq1IEvwXNWiDeoOCJCXaQyiduVFIctjOmxYGR6zGYSpTw8DqQaWxK1tXA5_Y_nWFYiTCl90I6KeqJJbiDe2gABn32rj5PXeqLo_FMXgBkW259fEbKS_qMAo6hMTw4PFxa5sLVtAc_DyX8jgFZsTHmvYujJ-9Jw4S27LxIjRxNW65-igLfna6NNJg8GwAE0/4d4/IOqRNhw0QUePEs228AKFcw/h3/h001.RIjpLamMERvAmVb2fq9CQfeAKAlAjKR5aKwR_XI9IAA)
---
Thank you. Inequitable wealth disparities mean that communities like Altadena face far more challenges in rebuilding than other LA neighborhoods.
While many Altadena residents feel left behind by the government’s disaster preparation and response, the community is coming together to support one another. Together, we’re pushing for a government that actually represents its constituents’ desire to care for one another, a government that spends taxpayer dollars on community needs rather than funding the industries that are destroying our world for profit.
With the far-right holding more power over the next presidential and congressional terms, we will need each other more than ever, including supporting mutual aid programs when we can. Thanks for all you do.
In solidarity,
Rashida
P.S. Look out for another email for mutual aid for Los Angeles to help families in the area.

clean_body: The Masjid Al-Taqwa has served and welcomed multiple generations of Altadena residents, but burned to the ground in LA’s fires. | | | Friend, The wildfires around Los Angeles have devastated working class communities like Altadena, with predominantly Black and brown residents who’ve been displaced, including families who’d been able to build generational wealth through homeownership in spite of systemic racism. As part of this catastrophic loss, community spaces and houses of worship have also been burned to the ground. For 30 years, the beloved Masjid Al-Taqwa has served and welcomed multiple generations of residents, building and nourishing the community. Now, a local construction company has agreed to rebuild the mosque without making a profit, and the community is fundraising to cover the costs of materials and labor to rebuild. | Thank you. Inequitable wealth disparities mean that communities like Altadena face far more challenges in rebuilding than other LA neighborhoods. While many Altadena residents feel left behind by the government’s disaster preparation and response, the community is coming together to support one another. Together, we’re pushing for a government that actually represents its constituents’ desire to care for one another, a government that spends taxpayer dollars on community needs rather than funding the industries that are destroying our world for profit. With the far-right holding more power over the next presidential and congressional terms, we will need each other more than ever, including supporting mutual aid programs when we can. Thanks for all you do. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. Look out for another email for mutual aid for Los Angeles to help families in the area. Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: My dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, Last week, I had the incredible privilege of bringing my father, Bijan — or Beej, as we affectionately call him — with me to a White House event hosted by President Biden for newly elected Members of Congress. This was my special way of celebrating his 70th birthday. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100347389/522464469/-2009428715?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDkwZjg1ZC1mYWQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kmdGxs_yPHIguopcV2QaeovTGfKA0V_J5xc6Kqdb_lo=) My dad’s journey to America is truly inspiring. He came here to pursue an engineering degree at the University of Oregon, having grown up in a working-class family in Iran. His first summer in the United States was spent cleaning dorm rooms to make ends meet. After earning his degree, he dedicated 17 years to the public works department in Washington State. Later, he put himself through business school at night and eventually founded his own company. **To me, this epitomizes the American Dream.** One of the hardest things about politics is enduring the falsehoods about my family's background and story. I could not be prouder of my parents, who displayed immense determination and resilience — fleeing a harsh, theocratic regime during their home country's revolution — to offer a promising future for their children. My dad's patriotism is **unparalleled** ; he imbued in me the encouragement and drive to follow my passion for public service. Moreover, he’s not just an exemplary father but also my best friend, my chief cheerleader, and the funniest person I know. Thank you for everything you’ve done for our family, Beej. I'm forever grateful for you. ❤️ — Yassamin | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100347390/522464470/-2009428715?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDkwZjg1ZC1mYWQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kmdGxs_yPHIguopcV2QaeovTGfKA0V_J5xc6Kqdb_lo=)

name: VoteVets
subject: It’s gonna be a no from us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Tomorrow Pete Hegseth will sit in front of the Senate as he is considered for the role of Secretary of Defense, and VoteVets is going to be crystal clear about our position on his nomination:
#
Peter —
Pete Hegseth served. We’re grateful he answered the call. We honor that service.
Tomorrow Pete Hegseth will sit in front of the Senate as he is considered for the role of Secretary of Defense, and VoteVets is going to be crystal clear about our position on his nomination:
This guy has absolutely no place — none, zero, nada — commanding the finest Military in the history of mankind. Pete Hegseth is uniquely unqualified to lead the Army, Navy, Marines, Air Force, and Space Force. There is nothing on his resume that indicates he has what it takes to manage the largest and most complex federal agency in the United States — 3.4 million across our Active Duty, Reserves, Guard, and civilian contractors and employees.
It’s almost comical — but it’s so much worse than just that.
Lack of qualification is one thing, but Hegseth seems to want to impose a far-right extremist social engineering agenda on the United States Military. He has openly and publicly said that he wants to exclude women from combat roles after they have served valiantly in those roles for decades. He intends to restrict access to abortion for Active Duty and would do the same for Veterans. The list goes on.
The United States Military is the most effective and strongest fighting force the world has ever known because it harnesses the best people who can do the job from all corners of this nation. It doesn’t matter where your parents are from, who you love, which bathroom you use — the chief qualification is whether you can do the job. And our fighting men and women do the job better than anyone on the face of the earth. Bar none. To change that means you’re making our military weaker.
It’s gonna be a no from us, Pete. And if you agree, please:
[**Add your name and voice your opposition to Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense. We need to be loud and organized if we are going to successfully oppose this nomination.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250113_vv_em_hegseth/?source=em250113-1-120&akid=34077%2E3013755%2EuaSLGR)**
| [ADD Your Name](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250113_vv_em_hegseth/?refcode=&akid=34077%2E3013755%2EuaSLGR)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Bell and Latimer joined Republicans to sanction the ICC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While climate change-fueled wildfires are ravaging Los Angeles, and
communities across the U.S. continue struggling to pay for food,
healthcare, and more, our leaders in Congress are choosing to prioritize
genocide.

On Friday, Congress voted overwhelmingly to sanction the International
Criminal Court (ICC) and anyone associated with their efforts to
investigate, arrest, detain, or prosecute any "protected person" of the US
and its allies (like Israel).

45 Democrats joined Republicans in supporting this bill, including Reps.
Wesley Bell and George Latimer who replaced Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman
with AIPAC’s help in the 2024 election. Every Justice Democrat voted
against it.

As Justice Democrats’ Rep. Rashida Tlaib pointed out, there are countless
issues affecting working people that need to be urgently addressed in our
country, but Republicans and the Democratic establishment would rather
protect Benjamin Netanyahu’s administration from being held accountable
for its war crimes against Palestinians.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250113?refcode=em20250113-36314&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36314_1203867_vU-gU6&akid=36314%2E1203867%2EvU-gU6 ]Tweet from Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib: What’s their top priority the
first week of the new Congress? Lowering costs? Addressing the housing
crisis? No, it’s sanctioning the International Criminal Court to protect
genocidal maniac Netanyahu so he can continue the genocide in Gaza.

This is exactly why we need to send more progressive, working-class
leaders to fight for us in Congress and start prioritizing peace, economic
justice, climate action, and more.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250113?refcode=em20250113-36314&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36314_1203867_vU-gU6&akid=36314%2E1203867%2EvU-gU6 ]Help us recruit and support the next generation of candidates to
challenge out-of-touch politicians who supported this bill: pitch in
$5 or whatever you can spare to fuel our 2026 Candidate
Recruitment Fund today.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250113?refcode=em20250113-36314&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36314_1203867_vU-gU6&akid=36314%2E1203867%2EvU-gU6 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

clean_body: I know that together, we can make a real difference for hard-working families. | Folks, Our mid-month fundraising deadline is just two days away, marking our campaign's first crucial goal of the year. We're also just a week from Donald Trump's inauguration. = | = I'm ready to work with anyone to deliver for the American people. It’s time to increase the supply of affordable housing, protect Social Security and Medicare benefits, and lower the costs of child care — and I’ll work with Democrats and Republicans to make a difference on these priorities. But trust me, I am also ready to stand firm against the far-right extremism threatening to undo our progress and pull our country back. Many of Donald Trump’s nominees for his Cabinet do not reflect our values, and I’ll make sure they’re held accountable to the American people. The road ahead of us is winding and full of challenges — but I know that together, we can make a real difference for hard-working families. That’s why I’m humbly asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support! — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

**🪧 **Protect our democracy and strengthen the integrity of our elections.

clean_body: Your continued support led us to a victory for our district last year. As we celebrate that victory, we’re already working to build a strong foundation for another victory in 2026. | = | Peter, The year is now in full swing, and I’m laser-focused on delivering for Marylanders in our 6th District. Before I share some of what I hope to achieve, I hope I can count on your support as we prepare to rebuild our campaign for 2026. = | = 🪧 Protect our democracy and strengthen the integrity of our elections. 🌎 Protect the environment and tackle the impacts of climate change. 🩺 Defend reproductive rights nationwide and restore women’s rights to make their own healthcare decisions. 🏥 Lower the costs of healthcare and cap the costs of insulin. 💲 Protect Social Security and Medicare. Your continued support led us to a victory for our district last year. As we celebrate that victory, we’re already working to build a strong foundation for another victory in 2026. This year, I’ll be spending every spare minute working to deliver for Marylanders and fighting back against any challenges to our democracy.= | = | = | = | = | = Grateful to have your support, April * | | = PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS April McClain Delaney for Congress PO Box 83940 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-83940 United States | = = We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. **It is RUSSIA HOAX 2.0**

We saw this story before, and we cannot let this insanity carry out as long as it did last time.

body:
| | | Hey y'all, it's James Carville. I need you to listen up because I'm about to do something I don't do too often:

**[My partners at the DSCC tell me they're not on track to hit their $125,000 mid-month goal, so I convinced 'em to authorize a limited-time match to help them catch up and give the GOP their first signs of trouble. So please, scare the daylights out of Trump's allies by chipping in $5 (becomes $15)!](https://go.dscc.org/go/20973?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250113-JamesCarville-CarvilleMatchLaunchFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250113-JamesCarville-CarvilleMatchLaunchFR-ETG-sl1&akid=19344%2E9716520%2E8oksnb)**

| | [DONATE $5 (BECOMES $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/20973?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250113-JamesCarville-CarvilleMatchLaunchFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250113-JamesCarville-CarvilleMatchLaunchFR-ETG-sl1&akid=19344%2E9716520%2E8oksnb)
---

Trump's buddies in the Senate are BANKING on us falling flat while they retake power and abuse it left and right. They're hoping a slow start for us will give them the advantage -- _but we're not about to let that happen._

**So here's the deal I'm making with you to get these guys shaking in their boots: Every single dollar you give until the mid-month deadline will be TRIPLED to help Democrats fight back and say SAYONARA to the MAGA machine.**

That means IF YOU ACT NOW, your $5 becomes $15, your $15 becomes $45 -- hell, your $50 becomes $150! And I'm tellin' you, that kind of impact _right now -- before the deadline hits_ \-- can make a BIG difference down the line.

But I'm not gonna put the cart before the horse -- this match means nothing unless you do something about it _today_. **So I've gotta ask you now:**

**[Will you chip in $5 to help Democrats take back the Senate majority and stop MAGA Republicans dead in their tracks? Your gift is TRIPLED until the mid-month deadline, so I need you with me >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20973?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250113-JamesCarville-CarvilleMatchLaunchFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250113-JamesCarville-CarvilleMatchLaunchFR-ETG-sl1&akid=19344%2E9716520%2E8oksnb)**

name: Tina Kotek
subject: My State of the State address today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, I just delivered my State of the State address to a joint session of the Oregon House and Senate in the Capitol in Salem. We’re halfway through my first term as Governor, and I’m feeling positive about what we’ve accomplished together. Thanks to your support, we’ve made tangible progress for our state. There’s a lot that I want to get done in the coming year — and I want to share some priorities with you: ➡️ **Housing and Homelessness:** By this July, our actions are expected to rehouse 3,300 households and prevent another 24,000 households from experiencing homelessness in the first place. Our state shelter program now supports over 4,800 shelter beds. And we know housing supply is the long-term solution. By July, the state will have financed 2,800 affordable housing units and provided infrastructure for over 25,000 affordable and market rate housing units. This is a strong start — but we need to keep our foot on the pedal of progress. ➡️ **Mental Health and Addiction Treatment:** We have to push harder to get Oregonians the treatment they need and deserve. We’re on track to add 465 new treatment beds by 2026, and I’ve recommended funding for another 363 treatment beds. We need to continue to focus on supporting the behavioral health workforce we need to provide the care. And we can’t forget our children and youth. I’m also calling for increased access to mental health and addiction care to support Oregon’s children and their families and targeted work on youth suicide prevention. ➡️ **Education:** We retooled the way schools teach our youngest children to read, updated our funding model to create more reliable budgets for our schools, and invested in summer learning programs. Now we must ensure our investments come with deeper accountability to get the best results for our children and youth. When a district’s numbers show failure for their students, there will be help and attention — not voluntarily requested, but required direct assistance to make sure all resources are pointed toward better student outcomes. ➡️ **Climate and Resilience:** We need to stay the course on fighting climate change and do more to build resilient communities — because the health and safety of our most vulnerable neighbors, our working and natural lands, and our air, water, and wildlife are all at risk. Peter, the choices we make today will have a ripple effect on generations to come. [**I continue to focus my efforts every day, chipping away at our challenges, and working to make Oregon a place where everyone can be successful. I hope you will support me by making a small contribution to my campaign. Any amount is a signal that you believe in our work to make Oregon the best state in the nation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100348029/522466820/1591756684?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTEwY2RmYi1mZGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6hsLWF0l0S2LOoVg9RnJUf1c0I5nLP_OBh2xYS2GG4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100348030/522466821/1591756684?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTEwY2RmYi1mZGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6hsLWF0l0S2LOoVg9RnJUf1c0I5nLP_OBh2xYS2GG4=)

clean_body: | Peter, I just delivered my State of the State address to a joint session of the Oregon House and Senate in the Capitol in Salem. We’re halfway through my first term as Governor, and I’m feeling positive about what we’ve accomplished together. Thanks to your support, we’ve made tangible progress for our state. There’s a lot that I want to get done in the coming year — and I want to share some priorities with you: ➡️ Housing and Homelessness: By this July, our actions are expected to rehouse 3,300 households and prevent another 24,000 households from experiencing homelessness in the first place. Our state shelter program now supports over 4,800 shelter beds. And we know housing supply is the long-term solution. By July, the state will have financed 2,800 affordable housing units and provided infrastructure for over 25,000 affordable and market rate housing units. This is a strong start — but we need to keep our foot on the pedal of progress. ➡️ Mental Health and Addiction Treatment: We have to push harder to get Oregonians the treatment they need and deserve. We’re on track to add 465 new treatment beds by 2026, and I’ve recommended funding for another 363 treatment beds. We need to continue to focus on supporting the behavioral health workforce we need to provide the care. And we can’t forget our children and youth. I’m also calling for increased access to mental health and addiction care to support Oregon’s children and their families and targeted work on youth suicide prevention. ➡️ Education: We retooled the way schools teach our youngest children to read, updated our funding model to create more reliable budgets for our schools, and invested in summer learning programs. Now we must ensure our investments come with deeper accountability to get the best results for our children and youth. When a district’s numbers show failure for their students, there will be help and attention — not voluntarily requested, but required direct assistance to make sure all resources are pointed toward better student outcomes. ➡️ Climate and Resilience: We need to stay the course on fighting climate change and do more to build resilient communities — because the health and safety of our most vulnerable neighbors, our working and natural lands, and our air, water, and wildlife are all at risk. Peter, the choices we make today will have a ripple effect on generations to come. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for reading and for your continued support! — Tina Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

–--SAMPLE OF THE THANK YOU PRESIDENT BIDEN CARD BEGINS BELOW–--
Dear President Biden,

I wanted to take a second to **_thank you_** for all that you have done for our country over the past four years.

You created a model for what good, strong Democratic leadership looks like.

You put the American people’s interests first and created millions of jobs, defended democracy here and abroad, and passed historic climate legislation.

As we step into 2025, I want you to know that thousands of Democrats just like me are energized and prepared to build on your accomplishments. **[That’s why I’m signing this card to THANK YOU and show my commitment to keep fighting for the Democratic agenda in 2025 so we can keep electing Democrats and defend democracy! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100348190/522467288/-2109688963?refcode=NDCAF_20250113_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmY3MjQwNy1mZmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6wIEIxc5vUKHk83hc0WXSu2iUjSFSduf-edGPvDmF88=&emci=e661671f-cbd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6ff72407-ffd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO SIGN THE THANK PRESIDENT BIDEN CARD »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100348191/522467289/-2109688963?refcode=NDCAF_20250113_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmY3MjQwNy1mZmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6wIEIxc5vUKHk83hc0WXSu2iUjSFSduf-edGPvDmF88=&emci=e661671f-cbd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6ff72407-ffd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=48524772)

Hey friend, As the legislative session picks up, I have a question for you: [_**What do you think we can do to make this Maryland’s decade?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100348324/522467715/1435514768?source=em20250113-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDBlZmEzZS0wMGQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwbpkImc7LeRBIPJ3e0lnVsI2H0e1_TyRsUotRGPmRo=&emci=a06aff38-00d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=600efa3e-00d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=24635485) We’re conducting a survey to find out what issues are most important to you. Whether it’s improving healthcare, expanding housing, or increasing job opportunities — we want to hear your thoughts! I’m working hard with our team, the legislature, and stakeholders to ensure we are making as much progress as we can over the next three months and beyond. This includes hearing from you, friend. [**Please, take our survey today to let us know what you want to see my team and I accomplish in 2025.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100348325/522467716/1435514768?source=em20250113-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDBlZmEzZS0wMGQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwbpkImc7LeRBIPJ3e0lnVsI2H0e1_TyRsUotRGPmRo=&emci=a06aff38-00d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=600efa3e-00d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=24635485) | **[Share your Thoughts »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100348326/522467717/1435514768?source=em20250113-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDBlZmEzZS0wMGQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwbpkImc7LeRBIPJ3e0lnVsI2H0e1_TyRsUotRGPmRo=&emci=a06aff38-00d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=600efa3e-00d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=24635485)**

clean_body: Hey friend, As the legislative session picks up, I have a question for you: We’re conducting a survey to find out what issues are most important to you. Whether it’s improving healthcare, expanding housing, or increasing job opportunities — we want to hear your thoughts! I’m working hard with our team, the legislature, and stakeholders to ensure we are making as much progress as we can over the next three months and beyond. This includes hearing from you, friend. | Elevate, Wes

body:
The trial of my life begins this week. And I don’t get a jury!
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c2040ba2271144988b5d6e020e53bfbf&_e=YVT_NedFCOEC_9sIGlTErgUbUnA8s2l1HDAIcjlOuAwSkqCPNQh7emvhD9ZFrGAza39ZQCBBkxd82Q-KOJTANk8J5yVSwuRPU8gIcx4l8UTJIIO7JD53uvAVsJsyF59PwzgTcBhNWPqNeGp5hBbs46uxOU9hpE4ZML5qhblUaOvUgrOAhDSXxzX7FGEeOqDY_dRtysyJ9kstUK4GF0nOIbFvMp7liVyfvGB4UhLzXFyvIsCNTrGAhK0qJ9sZWmmNTLewDrveEAL-TzUU-d5HaCGhEVOaod75IsZsXFAhFYmn5-kVqh-I2E4Nb5wg2A2amA6-vUHBG3YgvrBZbqH6107y_qJ2uHID_zhGWKfBizx_8k19pd6ddg6w5vkEGpkT)

Fellow Patriot,
---
With the trial of my life set to begin, President Donald J. Trump just said two powerful words for the entire nation to hear...
---
**_“SAVE RUDY!”_**
---
On Thursday, I will be on trial – __without_ a jury, mind you_ – to determine whether or not I still have a home to live in. It’s a trial to save my home and a trial to fight for my basic freedoms and rights.
---
_But more than that, our nation’s very system of justice will also be on trial._
---
If the Radical Left Democrats can get away with destroying me in a weaponized court without a jury – and possibly imprisoning me – solely because I served as President Trump’s lawyer, then the rule of law is DEAD in America.
---
**Just last week, a bloodthirsty left-wing judge threatened me with contempt and imprisonment if I didn’t recite her dictated false version of covered-up massive evidence of voter fraud.**
---
I had a choice to make: _I could recite the state-sanctioned propaganda like an obedient little dog and be rewarded with a pat on the head. Or, I could have the courage to stand for what I know to be true._
---
When I remind you of this Bible verse, you’ll know exactly which choice I made: "_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)
---
You see, I refuse to give up on America. That’s why I’m going on trial to fight to save my home, my liberty, and __our__ Republic.
---
_Are YOU with me?_ Will you join the cause to “SAVE RUDY?”
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5a0d45bd-2f48-4c23-abb1-67524da43666?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Trump posted a message of support for Giuliani, Sunday on Truth Social.
In these tumultuous times, when so many in the political press and within the Democrat Party seem to be teaming up against me, it's comforting to know that I have friends who stand by me, unconditionally. I want to take this moment to express my deepest gratitude to Donald J. Trump, a man I've known for decades, and who has recently shown his unwavering support by posting "SAVE RUDY" on Truth Social.
Firstly, let me say, Mr. President, your gesture means more to me than you could possibly know. It's not just about the post; it's about the message it sends. ...

name: John Fetterman
subject: One thing that would make me feel a lot better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Look, Derek, yinz + youse know how I feel about the Sheetz v Wawa debate.
#
Look, Derek, yinz + youse know how I feel about the Sheetz v Wawa debate – it’s Sheetz allllll day long 😎☕
But when you’re >50 miles from a Sheetz, a trip to Wawa at least helps a bit with the homesickness... 🙄
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250113?refcode=em20250113-9792&refcode2=9792_434096_D0kP0f&akid=9792%2E434096%2ED0kP0f)
With our mid-month deadline coming up, one thing that would make me feel a lot better is having to think *less* about our fundraising goals so I can focus *more* on my work for you in the U.S. Senate.
[**If you could you kick in $10 or literally anything at all to our grassroots campaign before Wednesday’s deadline, it’d mean *so* much:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250113?refcode=em20250113-9792&refcode2=9792_434096_D0kP0f&akid=9792%2E434096%2ED0kP0f)

John ❤️

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: 2025 is about perseverance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=g0wqS3CvNpoWPa4CODAOkB5H5i6CeRCL%2FGHTNw3Wg099Z6vRCWHQRd00gMbHAZKnG9HBX%2FyqDD8kHTxH%2BnVI3jX4QoOG4eaf7S%2FMMS%2BJSKj1fet6YgGXgvat13%2BPXeAfI1WcLPzcvDhPLm98JHvgfQLT2MMTfYnQBGuCMWtVQHw6CE4RbUMoZEb97ceyMRJ2cAQwT5WHyQ0hTTmp4w8qlbhbPd9IX1nONPBtMA6%2BXPayCONzWrtzLwTYx%2BKwPUKWeo1PqeA81SvvQUNUcX9b4OqMYUUDdjj1m0GHk%2Fc0U0q5KtjUanQq6iIncLjNbtloBAg336NiiCu1%2F6G1%2BvEa9q4TzoFlhkpdq%2BmMcWfPdr9ctKXPDkaOz4VJBUXchnVjXNLu6guHYX8YB0LHTkcumsi0AlCOz7blvwKkKkOcUUs%3D)
---
| |
---
Peter, let me tell you a story about perseverance.

The only college I applied to was the University of North Carolina. I attended for 2 years through scholarships and grants but eventually left to work after I could no longer sustain the tuition costs. I went back a few years later for one semester, but even then, I couldn’t manage working and studying full time. I got married, and had my children, but I always felt like something was missing.

The thing is, Peter, I’m not a quitter, but I had quit school. I felt like I had let down my friends who had graduated college, and wanted to be an example for my children on how to accomplish goals – but mostly, I had this fire within me to succeed.

So, over 25 years later, I went back to UNC and earned a bachelor’s degree in Political Science and Afro and African-American studies. For those 4 semesters, I was a dean’s list student while working as County Commissioner.

The moral of the story? It’s not about how many times you get knocked down – it’s about getting back up. Despite the challenges we face after the 2024 election, I will never give up in the fight for reproductive freedoms, our children’s education, preventing gun violence, and so much more.

[This week is my first mid-month fundraising deadline of the new year. If you’re with me and ready to persevere through 2025, will you chip in $10 to support my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100349000/522470133/669864211?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_011325_1_1_Mid_Month&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjZhNjc1YS0wMmQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MxAV52x7sbcm8hM5ONAZ-OPIinkIuViNtT6n47Mcg2s=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, let me tell you a story about perseverance. The only college I applied to was the University of North Carolina. I attended for 2 years through scholarships and grants but eventually left to work after I could no longer sustain the tuition costs. I went back a few years later for one semester, but even then, I couldn’t manage working and studying full time. I got married, and had my children, but I always felt like something was missing. The thing is, Peter, I’m not a quitter, but I had quit school. I felt like I had let down my friends who had graduated college, and wanted to be an example for my children on how to accomplish goals – but mostly, I had this fire within me to succeed. So, over 25 years later, I went back to UNC and earned a bachelor’s degree in Political Science and Afro and African-American studies. For those 4 semesters, I was a dean’s list student while working as County Commissioner. The moral of the story? It’s not about how many times you get knocked down – it’s about getting back up. Despite the challenges we face after the 2024 election, I will never give up in the fight for reproductive freedoms, our children’s education, preventing gun violence, and so much more. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Valerie Foushee | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, You can also =.

body:
|
#
---
$2, team. If we told you that donating just $2 could help us elect Democrats nationwide who will fight like hell to protect our fundamental freedoms and deliver results for working families, would you chip in? That’s not a typo. In just 2 days, we will face our first fundraising deadline of the new year — and there’s no better time than now to start laying the groundwork for the 2026 midterm elections. You see, the work to win battleground races starts long before Election Day. We start creating our strategy, hosting in-person trainings for candidates and campaign staff, and investing in battleground races months ahead of time. It’s thanks to that year-long work that we helped elect Elissa Slotkin to the U.S. Senate, Kristen McDonald Rivet to the House of Representatives, and secure other important victories to move Michigan forward. _**We couldn’t do it without donations from folks like you — even just $2. **_ $2 may not seem like a lot, but consider this: By the time you read this, many others will have already chipped in $2 — and all your donations combined will make a huge difference in our work. We’re hoping you can join hundreds of others before our first fundraising deadline this year. [**Are you with us, team? clean_body: | $2, team. If we told you that donating just $2 could help us elect Democrats nationwide who will fight like hell to protect our fundamental freedoms and deliver results for working families, would you chip in? That’s not a typo. In just 2 days, we will face our first fundraising deadline of the new year — and there’s no better time than now to start laying the groundwork for the 2026 midterm elections. You see, the work to win battleground races starts long before Election Day. We start creating our strategy, hosting in-person trainings for candidates and campaign staff, and investing in battleground races months ahead of time. It’s thanks to that year-long work that we helped elect Elissa Slotkin to the U.S. Senate, Kristen McDonald Rivet to the House of Representatives, and secure other important victories to move Michigan forward. We couldn’t do it without donations from folks like you — even just $2. $2 may not seem like a lot, but consider this: By the time you read this, many others will have already chipped in $2 — and all your donations combined will make a huge difference in our work. We’re hoping you can join hundreds of others before our first fundraising deadline this year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: Team Rosen
subject: We need to be prepared for whatever Trump does next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
We know what we need to do.
| | |
---
Friend,
One week from today, Donald Trump will be sworn into his second term in the White House, and it’s going to take all of us to hold him accountable for his worst actions and most extreme priorities.

We don’t know exactly what will happen, but we do know Trump has said that he would use local law enforcement and the National Guard to organize mass deportations that would rip millions of families apart and cause total chaos.

We know that Trump has criticized U.S. aid to our allies and said he wants to **withdraw American support for Ukraine** in their war to stop Russia’s brutal and unprovoked invasion – which would be a triumphant victory for Vladimir Putin.

We know that Trump has promised to **stand with those convicted of crimes during the Jan. 6 insurrection** and “sign their pardons on Day One.”

Unfortunately, we also know that Trump will have considerable power to do whatever he truly intends to do during his administration, thanks to the Supreme Court and his Republican allies in Congress who now hold majorities in both the House and the Senate.

The only good news is that we’ve dealt with a Trump presidency before, and we can do it again, friend.

**If we stand together, we can limit the damage during the next four years and finally bring an end to the Trump and MAGA era.**

So as we prepare for Trump to take office once again: **_[Will you please chip in $5 or more now to help Jacky Rosen and Senate Democrats continue the fight against Trump and defeat his extreme GOP allies in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100349417/522470948/-939119864?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5430-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWRlNGY5Ny0wM2QyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Y30SGJY3nlznVL1I9_VAucVywUD_vyXZ4PjmZigWC0=)_**

subject: Top Priority Survey
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Beth Van Duyne for Congress
body:
Your response to my 2025 Top Priorities Survey is vital for our future |
Peter,

Thank you for standing with me in 2024 and helping me protect this great country we love.

The new year of 2025 is underway! With that comes all the planning for President Trump's inauguration, and we need to maximize the less than four years we have remaining with his fearless leadership.

There are, unfortunately, LOTS of messes to clean up after the Democrats propped up a demented Joe Biden as President and made a mess of our country and others by allowing radical leftists to run a shadow Government as Joe Biden’s terrible mental health deteriorated.

With the trial of my life set to begin, President Donald J. Trump just said two powerful words for the entire nation to hear...
---
**_“SAVE RUDY!”_**
---
On Thursday, I will be on trial – __without_ a jury, mind you_ – to determine whether or not I still have a home to live in. It’s a trial to save my home and a trial to fight for my basic freedoms and rights.
---
_But more than that, our nation’s very system of justice will also be on trial._
---
If the Radical Left Democrats can get away with destroying me in a weaponized court without a jury – and possibly imprisoning me – solely because I served as President Trump’s lawyer, then the rule of law is DEAD in America.
---
**Just last week, a bloodthirsty left-wing judge threatened me with contempt and imprisonment if I didn’t recite her dictated false version of covered-up massive evidence of voter fraud.**
---
I had a choice to make: _I could recite the state-sanctioned propaganda like an obedient little dog and be rewarded with a pat on the head. Or, I could have the courage to stand for what I know to be true._
---
When I remind you of this Bible verse, you’ll know exactly which choice I made: "_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)
---
You see, I refuse to give up on America. That’s why I’m going on trial to fight to save my home, my liberty, and __our__ Republic.
---
_Are YOU with me?_ Will you join the cause to “SAVE RUDY?”

clean_body: The trial of my life begins this week. And I don’t get a jury! The trial of my life begins this week. And I don’t get a jury! | Patriot, With the trial of my life set to begin, President Donald J. Trump just said two powerful words for the entire nation to hear... “SAVE RUDY!” On Thursday, I will be on trial – without a jury, mind you – to determine whether or not I still have a home to live in. It’s a trial to save my home and a trial to fight for my basic freedoms and rights. But more than that, our nation’s very system of justice will also be on trial. If the Radical Left Democrats can get away with destroying me in a weaponized court without a jury – and possibly imprisoning me – solely because I served as President Trump’s lawyer, then the rule of law is DEAD in America. Just last week, a bloodthirsty left-wing judge threatened me with contempt and imprisonment if I didn’t recite her dictated false version of covered-up massive evidence of voter fraud. I had a choice to make: I could recite the state-sanctioned propaganda like an obedient little dog and be rewarded with a pat on the head. Or, I could have the courage to stand for what I know to be true. When I remind you of this Bible verse, you’ll know exactly which choice I made: "For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? " (Mark 8:36) You see, I refuse to give up on America. That’s why I’m going on trial to fight to save my home, my liberty, and our Republic. Are YOU with me? Will you join the cause to “SAVE RUDY?” Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

subject: new year, same me

Peter, have you set any New Year's resolutions yet? I know – this time of year they can get pretty overwhelming. There’s so much pressure to reinvent yourself and try something new... but here’s the thing: **I’ve seen how much more effective it is to invest in your priorities for the _long term_ , rather than starting it!** That’s why my resolutions for this year are focused on _continuing_ and _strengthening_ the work I’ve been doing. Here’s a few of them: 1) **Progressive coalition building in Congress** – I want to build a legislature that represents us all, not just traditional politicians. 2) **Being a voice for my generation** – While _Gen Beta_ started this year, I’m still going to be the loudest voice for Gen Z and all of my constituents. 3) **Fighting against big money in government** – I’m looking at you, Elon. [**_I know I’ll be able to do my part in keeping these resolutions, but I need _your_ help to keep this work funded and flourishing. There’s so much pressure to reinvent yourself and try something new... but here’s the thing: I’ve seen how much more effective it is to invest in your priorities for the long term , rather than starting it! That’s why my resolutions for this year are focused on continuing and strengthening the work I’ve been doing. Here’s a few of them: 1) Progressive coalition building in Congress – I want to build a legislature that represents us all, not just traditional politicians. 2) Being a voice for my generation – While Gen Beta started this year, I’m still going to be the loudest voice for Gen Z and all of my constituents. 3) Fighting against big money in government – I’m looking at you, Elon. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | ~~ | ~~ | ~ Maxwell Frost | Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~ ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

I’ve been fighting for public education for 40 years.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100349669/522471690/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1ZTA2MC0wNmQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txIGuffEeo-ydAaoMf_JmZxa7OPpDUuztJrEcVTTDUY=)

Hey Peter, it’s Mark.

I recently sent over a petition asking engaged Democrats to add their name to stand with the Department of Education against attempts to abolish it — and I’m still waiting on your response.

[**We have limited time to act before Trump takes office and his media circus completely distracts from any public action — but we need massive support: If you could take 1 minute to add your signature, I would be deeply appreciative »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100349670/522471691/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20250113_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1ZTA2MC0wNmQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txIGuffEeo-ydAaoMf_JmZxa7OPpDUuztJrEcVTTDUY=&emci=8f17409e-fad1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d065e060-06d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18839602) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100349671/522471692/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20250113_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1ZTA2MC0wNmQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txIGuffEeo-ydAaoMf_JmZxa7OPpDUuztJrEcVTTDUY=&emci=8f17409e-fad1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d065e060-06d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18839602)
---
Thank you so much,

Mark

**P.S. You can read my original message below.**
**Before running for Congress I was an English teacher for 20 years.** Here I am in the classroom back in 1994. Simpler times.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100349672/522471693/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20250113_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1ZTA2MC0wNmQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txIGuffEeo-ydAaoMf_JmZxa7OPpDUuztJrEcVTTDUY=&emci=8f17409e-fad1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d065e060-06d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18839602)
Working with students and their parents has still been the most rewarding part of my decades in public service.

**Looking back, it would be unconscionable to think that just 30 years after that picture was taken, the very foundation of public education in this country – the Department of Education – would be under attack.**

**_Let me be as abundantly clear_ : abolishing the Department of Education would be a disaster– for our students, for our teachers, for parents, for our economy, and for our future.**

Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies want to dismantle public education in this country. Top to bottom, inside and out, they want to gut education and force working families to pay more taxes for less.

I know this seems like a losing fight, Peter. But that’s exactly what Donald Trump wants you to feel. He wants you to feel defeated. He wants you to give up and acquiesce to his extreme agenda. **We cannot let him win.**

We have to fight back, Peter. For students, for parents, for teachers, and for our future. This is one of the most important fights we’ll take on in the New Year.

[**If you’re willing to stand with me, can you add your name to the growing list of Democrats defending the Department of Education from MAGA Republicans? I am hoping to see at least 150 new signatures from PA tonight. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100349673/522471694/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20250113_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1ZTA2MC0wNmQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txIGuffEeo-ydAaoMf_JmZxa7OPpDUuztJrEcVTTDUY=&emci=8f17409e-fad1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d065e060-06d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18839602)
[ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100349674/522471695/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20250113_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1ZTA2MC0wNmQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txIGuffEeo-ydAaoMf_JmZxa7OPpDUuztJrEcVTTDUY=&emci=8f17409e-fad1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d065e060-06d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18839602)

Mark Takano

Friend, Elon and Vivek are starting a Department of Government Efficiency podcast!

What better way to help hold the government accountable than to bring the public along to see all of the wasteful spending, unnecessary regulations and fraud that goes on.

Well, that’s what Elon and Vivek’s new podcast is all about. Call it DOGEcast if you will.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: All eyes will be on us…
body:
---
Derek, At the end of this month, we’ll close the books on our very first end-of-month deadline of the year, and our fundraising numbers will be public. Here’s the truth: _Everyone_ will be looking at those numbers. Trump and the Republican Party are undoubtedly emboldened by the election results. They’re counting on all of us being too tired and too disappointed to fight back against their Project 2025 agenda. We have to prove them wrong. As we start this year and enter a Trump administration, there is no organization better positioned to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, in 2025, 2026, and beyond. If everyone receiving this email pitched in $3, that would put us in a good position to hit our goals. But not everyone gives, which is why we’re hoping all Democrats who understand the stakes of this deadline and this moment give today. So we’re asking: [**Can Democrats nationwide count on you to contribute $3 directly to the Democratic National Committee today? Your support will help us reach our goals before our fundraising numbers are public, and we'll put it right to work preparing for _anything_ coming our way after Trump is inaugurated.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250113_2537_fr&refcode2=2537_22930333_C7xLgO&akid=2537%2E22930333%2EC7xLgO) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250113_2537_fr&refcode2=2537_22930333_C7xLgO&akid=2537%2E22930333%2EC7xLgO)**

Here’s the truth: Everyone will be looking at those numbers. Trump and the Republican Party are undoubtedly emboldened by the election results. They’re counting on all of us being too tired and too disappointed to fight back against their Project 2025 agenda. We have to prove them wrong. As we start this year and enter a Trump administration, there is no organization better positioned to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, in 2025, 2026, and beyond. If everyone receiving this email pitched in $3, that would put us in a good position to hit our goals. But not everyone gives, which is why we’re hoping all Democrats who understand the stakes of this deadline and this moment give today. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

body:
Cutting wasteful government spending and slimming down our bloated federal government is no small task, but it’s what we were elected to do.

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Helping relief efforts in southern California
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250113-1184-foote&t=1001&akid=1184%2E342411%2ETYZR6_ ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter, our
neighbors in California need urgent support.

In just six days, hundreds of thousands of lives have been turned upside
down.

Last week, Southern California faced devastating wildfires fueled by
global warming and our growing climate crisis. Thousands of homes,
community centers, businesses, and lush landscapes have been lost.
Tragically, the death toll has risen to 24 as firefighters prepare for
even harsher winds in the days ahead.

If you’re looking for a way to help Californians affected by these
wildfires, we’ve made it easy to support three incredible organizations
working tirelessly on the ground:

* World Central Kitchen’s Relief Team, providing food and water to
displaced families and first responders.
* United Way of Greater Los Angeles, delivering long-term support
through direct outreach and partnerships with community organizations.
* The Los Angeles Regional Food Bank, working in tandem with government
agencies, faith-based organizations and first responders throughout LA
county.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250113-ca-relief.W9f_8u&refcode=em20250113-1184&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1184%2E342411%2ETYZR6_ ]Click here to split a $5 donation to support Californians impacted by
the wildfires.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250113-ca-relief.W9f_8u&refcode=em20250113-1184&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1184%2E342411%2ETYZR6_ ]Contribute ››

Additionally, Baby2Baby is on the ground distributing over 1 million
emergency supplies to support vulnerable children and families who have
lost everything in the fires. From diapers, food, and formula to water,
clothing, blankets, hygiene products, and more. They’re providing critical
relief, but they need our help to continue this vital work.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19517?t=1004&akid=1184%2E342411%2ETYZR6_ ]You can click here to provide a direct donation of any amount to
Baby2Baby.

Contribute ››

Together, we can bring relief and hope to communities in need. Let’s stand
in solidarity with Californians during this challenging time.

In solidarity,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1184%2E342411%2ETYZR6_

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Doug Ducey
subject: The single most powerful thing you can do to defend parental rights
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=616c2a7e5a04429fb42b9dfef6998334&_e=xbP83Ww2ZstLvaYtPVIbpXW5K6KxihV-Pg4U48T2odEjvak6M9xCC8HmJ_TTnY_RZUoUQ59Scq1bArc2uyT7xFmTkOrH-2zK8idaYaDOqnnByRit8kRPybWXWuuX1ruE01oI16i-fyMG7AvmNTl726u8hqx8plLg_yC0PJGFiGgMIiZWb_X-TA_uGpumlIJ4H8BtgrF3PHamgogf_EL7I-ved4ad0981_eCwyMuXZhN6YvzaR7KtdzFyl7NKd956Q2GeUxPk0bfZNtfpRFk3heKE6mSpQrgYEeulDLC7zNcQbGml_j7h3ySKlRBapRqx7J_bmkS-nZVkGXlxPI9LR040FeHeEJpdv_ApUXkq7cyvyFx_JRklXcZKno4Ow0PWaDhzr7KXr_NipWstJJekTKUOTlghO6fueXw_0_5Ki24%3D)

Peter,

There is nothing more important than the freedom we enjoy as Americans.

It's why I ran for governor in the great state of Arizona and why I consider myself blessed beyond measure to have served in that capacity through some of the state's toughest times.

It's also why I'm such a staunch supporter of the Goldwater Institute!

I know that they are 100% committed to restoring America's education system through their trademark education savings accounts and school choice programs.

As the Governor of Arizona, I had no greater ally in passing conservative, common sense policies that helped the citizens of our state live freer, happier lives than the Goldwater Institute.

[Can you join me by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $500 to support the Goldwater Institute today? Your gift will help the Goldwater Institute meet their fundraising goal of $27,000 this month and continue their mission of making school choice the law of the land. Click here to donate now! >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=616c2a7e5a04429fb42b9dfef6998334&_e=xbP83Ww2ZstLvaYtPVIbpXW5K6KxihV-Pg4U48T2odEjvak6M9xCC8HmJ_TTnY_RZUoUQ59Scq1bArc2uyT7xFmTkOrH-2zK8idaYaDOqnnByRit8kRPybWXWuuX1ruE01oI16i-fyMG7AvmNTl726u8hqx8plLg_yC0PJGFiGgMIiZWb_X-TA_uGpumlIJ4H8BtgrF3PHamgogf_EL7I-ved4ad0981_eCwyMuXZhN6YvzaR7KtdzFyl7NKd956wC5P3rAuylWXxPMCa8VdFvpxXiUZdQcObs1Jzfv25LmWG2AHZlLDtDCbx6BoQycoBJt8fpUs0ijvDRLDwliRp2xLN_4m9irW0MGKDlSEMV6gZWn_Mt-QEsiwbBt_v__M6odU8ANbfff5sscHxd5sAHcnbPvG1gU04XP42XD8pCY%3D)

For over 30 years, the Goldwater Institute has been the nation's pre-eminent liberty organization, scoring real wins for freedom from coast to coast.

As Governor, I am proud to have passed critical school choice legislation that paved the way for parental rights across the nation. The Goldwater Institute was a key ally in this battle to empower parents and students.

The legislation I signed into law establishes universal Education Savings Accounts (ESAs), which provide all families with the freedom to pursue excellence in education for their children, regardless of their socioeconomic status.

**Since then, the Goldwater Institute has helped pass ESAs and other school choice legislation in more than 20 states, and they 're not slowing down.**

clean_body: Peter, There is nothing more important than the freedom we enjoy as Americans. It's why I ran for governor in the great state of Arizona and why I consider myself blessed beyond measure to have served in that capacity through some of the state's toughest times. It's also why I'm such a staunch supporter of the Goldwater Institute! I know that they are 100% committed to restoring America's education system through their trademark education savings accounts and school choice programs. As the Governor of Arizona, I had no greater ally in passing conservative, common sense policies that helped the citizens of our state live freer, happier lives than the Goldwater Institute. For over 30 years, the Goldwater Institute has been the nation's pre-eminent liberty organization, scoring real wins for freedom from coast to coast. As Governor, I am proud to have passed critical school choice legislation that paved the way for parental rights across the nation. The Goldwater Institute was a key ally in this battle to empower parents and students. The legislation I signed into law establishes universal Education Savings Accounts (ESAs), which provide all families with the freedom to pursue excellence in education for their children, regardless of their socioeconomic status. Since then, the Goldwater Institute has helped pass ESAs and other school choice legislation in more than 20 states, and they 're not slowing down. From taking on the teachers' unions to exposing radical critical race theory (CRT) indoctrination in classrooms, the Goldwater Institute has made it their mission to preserve the integrity of American education. Thanks to their work, what we started as a pilot program in Arizona has now spread to states across the country. The Goldwater Institute's school choice policies are vital for ensuring that children can receive an education free from indoctrination, such as the following: In Boston, a teacher hung a poster in the classroom promoting anti-Americanism with slogans like, "The American Dream is a scam" and "America was built on genocide and slavery." In Arizona, the Attorney General is trying to block parents from using their Education Savings Account funds on common sense curriculum materials and school supplies. In Maine, school staff secretly gave a chest binder to a 13-year-old girl and encouraged her to switch genders, much to the surprise of her parents. School choice is the #1 way to fight this indoctrination and give education back to parents. Today, I'm proud to partner with the Goldwater Institute to ask you to join us in the fight. Help us ensure that no kids are stuck in failing schools and that parents have the freedom of choice when it comes to their children's education! - Thank you in advance for your support. For Freedom, Doug Ducey Former Governor of Arizona and CEO of Citizens for Free Enterprise The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. |

Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
